C: 登上舞台\n不要害怕\n不要回头
E: Get onstage\nFear not\nNever look back

C: 你们与星穹列车的贵宾已经抵达了预定的会谈地点。按照惯例，「梦主」驾临需要专人提前接引，眼下这一重要任务便落在你们肩头。\n距离「梦主」抵达还有一段时间，恰逢远处传来求助的呼声——你们或许还有时间前去探望。
E: You and the Astral Express VIPs have arrived at the agreed location. As is convention, the "Dreammaster's" arrival demands a designated escort to greet them. This crucial mission has fallen on your shoulders.\nIn the distance, you happen to hear someone calling for help. There is still time until the Dreammaster's scheduled arrival... Perhaps you have time to go and investigate.

C: 另一边，你，一位姗姗来迟的牛仔，为留守列车的丹恒和帕姆捎来了一个不好的消息——深入美梦的列车组如今很可能有危险——因为一位「虚无」的令使正在梦境中游荡。你很快成功说服丹恒一起深入梦境施以援手，可甫一步入酒店大堂便遭遇了严重挫折：由于酒店的严格规定，你们根本无法进入匹诺康尼。\n你与丹恒达成一致：无论是现实还是梦中，现在的匹诺康尼绝对谈不上「正常」。好在你总会为自己留个备用计划（虽然这谈不上什么好事）——是时候施展你的「江湖智慧」了！
E: Meanwhile, you, the cowboy who is a little late to the party, bring unfortunate news to Dan Heng and Pom-Pom who have stayed guard aboard the Express... There is a strong chance that the Crew members who have entered the dream are in danger, because an Emanator of Nihility is roaming the Dreamscape. You quickly succeed in convincing Dan Heng to accompany you into the Dreamscape and provide assistance, but run into a serious setback as you enter the hotel lobby: Due to strict hotel regulations, you are forbidden from entering Penacony.\nYou and Dan Heng reach a consensus: Whether this is reality or a dream, nothing about Penacony in its current state can be described as "normal." Fortunately, you always keep a backup plan ready for yourself (though it may not always lead to good things...) It's time for you to use your "street smarts"!

C: 你们即将面对本届苏乐达™盛会海选最后、也是最难的关卡——「巨星巅峰战」。能成为匹诺康尼下一位盛会巨星的，只有在擂台上笑到最后的那个人……\n那究竟是你？还是那位高大、坚实、热情似火、凭一己之力拿下演技挑战最高分的高贵男子？敬请拭目以待！
E: You are about to face the final and most challenging stage of the SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions — "The Superstar Showdown"! Only they who laugh last in the ring will be able to become the next Penacony Festive Superstar...\nWill that person be you? Or will it be the towering, strong, passionate nobleman who easily secured the top score in the acting challenge? Stay tuned to find out!

C: 尘埃落定，阿斯德纳和整个宇宙最终免于成为「秩序」傀儡的命运。距离击败「齐响诗班」似乎已经过去了一段时间…这期间都发生了些什么？\n你与丹恒会合，还认识了一位新朋友：「巡海游侠」牛仔波提欧。此处本应插入一段穿插各种冷笑话和过气老梗的寒暄，但念及姬子和瓦尔特实在担忧你的安危，于是这段流程凭空消失了，还得请你多多担待。
E: As the dust settles, Asdana and the entire universe have escaped the fate of becoming puppets to the Order. It seems some time has passed since the Harmonious Choir were defeated... What has happened in this time?\nYou reunite with Dan Heng and meet a new friend: The Galaxy Ranger cowboy, Boothill. There was supposed to be an exchange of small talk here with lots of cheesy jokes and callbacks. However, as Himeko and Welt are still concerned about your well-being, this section of banter vanished into thin air. We hope for your understanding and patience in this matter.

C: 实际惊险！原来虾蟇•忍者并非叛忍，而是心中另有妙算，真乃智囊忍也。此刻，借助你的忍法潜入缭乱•忍侠的追忆片段中，寻找救度众生的甘露吧！\n直视忍者的过往可能会发生应激反应，请自备救心丸、镇静剂与尿不湿。
E: Thrilling! Turns out Ninja Gama is not a renegade ninja, but a wise ninja with a solid plan. Now, use your ninjutsu to dive into the Dazzling Ninja Hero's fragmented memories in search of the panacea that promises the world's salvation!\nStaring a ninja's past in the face may trigger stress responses. Please bring your own heart medications, sedatives, and adult diapers.

C: 他宝贝的，你还上上课了。行吧，好好感受一下这场梦到底有什么花样，能让人自愿变成猴子。\n放弃，放弃，放弃。
E: That clock-stucker really thinks he's a mentor or something? Fine, let's see what's so fancy in this dream that's got folks willingly turning into monkeys.\nGive up. Give up. Give up.

C: {NICKNAME}与白厄、万敌来到了悬锋城。曾经兵戈作响的尚战之邦，如今已成了一座阴森的荒墟。疯溃的尼卡多利就身在这座移动堡垒的深处。
E: {NICKNAME}, Phainon, and Mydei arrive at Castrum Kremnos. What was once a fierce city filled with the clamor of armaments has become a haunting ruin. Deep within this mobile fortress lies the maddened and fallen Nikador.

C: 借黄金狮首之口，{NICKNAME}一行人得知疯溃的尼卡多利正在酝酿针对奥赫玛的恐怖袭击。事已至此，唯有继续前进，挫败恶意的源头。
E: Through Chryseus Leo, {NICKNAME} and the party learned that the maddened Nikador is planning a devastating attack on Okhema. With events taking this dire turn, their only option is to press forward and eliminate the source of this malevolence.

C: 借黄金狮首之口，{NICKNAME}一行人得知疯溃的尼卡多利正在酝酿针对奥赫玛的恐怖袭击。事已至此，唯有继续前进，挫败恶意的源头。
E: Through Chryseus Leo, {NICKNAME} and the party learned that the maddened Nikador is planning a devastating attack on Okhema. With events taking this dire turn, their only option is to press forward and eliminate the source of this malevolence.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 比「世界命运」更沉重之物…我们以取巧的方式，用三月七的相机通过了这项考验。
E: An item heavier than the "Fate of the World"... We adopted a tricky method and used March 7th's camera to solve this puzzle.

C: 据{NICKNAME}所说，欧洛尼斯让{F#她}{M#他}看到了星核猎手…那是一段理应不存在，却无比鲜明的记忆。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, Oronyx showed {F#her}{M#him} the Stellaron Hunters... It was a memory that should not exist, yet it seems so vivid and realistic.

C: {NICKNAME}成功打开悬锋城的往世之门，来到过去的悬锋城。彼时正值悬锋祭典，尼卡多利的失神刚刚开始，悬锋城仍然喧嚣繁荣。
E: {NICKNAME} unlocked the door to the past in Castrum Kremnos, stepping into the city's former days. It was the time of the Kremnos Festival, and Nikador had just begun to lose their mind. Castrum Kremnos was still prosperous and vibrant with life.

C: 故障的根本原因是窃忆者的入侵。将问题连根拔起后，黑塔即将正式进入命途狭间，觐见博识尊。
E: The root cause of the malfunction is an invasion of Memosnatchers. After uprooting the problem, Herta is about to formally enter the Path Space to seek an audience with Nous.

C: 我，不死的迈德漠斯，亡国的王储，纷争的新神…如今已迈上以血作辙的归途。
E: I, the undying Mydeimos, the Last Prince, the new God of Strife... now tread the blood-soaked road home.

C: 得知阿那克萨戈拉斯投奔元老院之后，为了掌控火种动向，阿格莱雅立刻动身前去黎明云崖质问元老院。\n那位学者似乎与如今{NICKNAME}的状况相同，也许将成为{F#她}{M#他}得救的关键。
E: After discovering Anaxagoras had fled to the Council of Elders, Aglaea rushed to Dawncloud to confront the Council about the Coreflames.\nThe scholar appears to share the same condition as {NICKNAME}. This might hold the key to {F#her}{M#his} salvation.

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 一场多么美的宴会，君王举起杯中的野心，令臣子与万民酣醉。但若细品蜜酿回味，甜中又夹杂了几分咸腥和苦涩，醉中难免伴着晕眩与痛楚——但在灵魂飞往高空的狂欢中，无人需要俯瞰大地。\n除非你飞到了最高、最高的地方，那里的寒风会让你清醒。\n继而咸腥、苦涩、晕眩、痛楚会如瀑布天降，抱着你下坠。
E: What a spectacle this banquet of power is, where the ruler's ambitious toast leaves everyone intoxicated with possibility. Beneath the sweet honey brew, though, salt and bitterness linger on the tongue.\nThe higher the revelry soars, the less anyone notices the world below. That's the trick of it all.\nOnly those who reach the absolute summit feel the sobering winds of truth. Then comes the inevitable fall. Salt, bitterness, vertigo, pain... all rushing up to embrace you as gravity collects its debt.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 在翁法罗斯经历的一切，在列车上又到底经过了多长呢？好像自己还是和星穹列车隔了一层，这究竟是怎么回事？\n总之，别忘记出发时大家的担忧，看看三月现在怎么样了。
E: How long has it really been since everything that happened in Amphoreus, and how much time has passed on the Express? It feels like there's still some kind of barrier between you and the Astral Express. What exactly is going on here?\nIn any case, don't forget everyone's concerns when you set out. Let's see how March is doing.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which sealed the "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Remembrance already warped the Grove. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.

C: 权杖内核层已严重损毁，宛如废墟。要想在此搜寻德谬歌的痕迹，无异于大海捞针。真是欲盖弥彰呀，这只说明一件事——\n我找对地方了。
E: The Scepter's kernel is severely damaged, little more than rubble. Seeking traces of the Demiurge here would be like finding a needle in a haystack. How revealing... This only confirms one thing...\nI'm exactly where I need to be.

C: 突破屏障之后，螺丝咕姆发现一处有趣的信号——「神话之外」。去会会现实中的智械哥，从他脑袋里找出德谬歌的线索吧。
E: After breaking through the barrier, Screwllum detects an intriguing signal: Exomyth. It's time to meet the old Intellitron in reality and find clues about the Demiurge from his head.

C: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
E: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

C: 绝望，是救世主执念的另一部分。唯有同时卸下沉重的愿望与滚烫的绝望，白厄自己的心愿才能够得到解放。
E: Despair is another part of the Deliverer's obsession. Only by letting go of both the heavy wishes and burning despair can Phainon's own heart be set free.

C: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
E: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

C: 倘若世间因果是一条顺流而下的溪涧，那么少女就是被岁月之风吹起、溯流而上的花朵。沿着回望的方向，她踮着脚在水面上播撒着涟漪，圆满了因果、拂留了芬芳，将一切重要的瞬间铭刻于此，慢慢地靠近…那最初的起点。
E: If the world's causality were a stream flowing downstream, then the girl would be a flower, blown against the current by the winds of time. Following her backward gaze, she tiptoes across the water, casting ripples, completing the cycle of cause and effect, and leave a lingering fragrance. Engraving every precious moment here, she gradually draws closer... to that very beginning.

C: 位于最前线的基座舱段危险重重，守望此地的科员于孤独中等待着后方的援助。此刻，一位名叫亚伯拉罕的故人正要直面他的阿喀琉斯之踵……
E: The Base Zone on the frontline is engulfed in grave danger. The researchers are alone and waiting for support. At this moment, an acquaintance named Abraham is about to face his Achilles Heel...

C: 在查清楚艾丝妲所谓的「中饱私囊」的谣言后，你决定找艾丝妲坦白此事。\n但出乎你意料的，不仅有艾丝妲惊人的财力，还有匿名群背后的真相……
E: After understanding the rumor about Asta's alleged embezzlement, you decide to report everything to Asta.\nWhat was surprising is not only Asta's wealth, but also the truth behind the anonymous chat group...

C: 击败被识别程序标记的怪物，收集信标数据。
E: Defeat enemies marked by the recognition system and collect beacon data.

C: 击败被识别程序标记的怪物，收集信标数据。
E: Defeat enemies marked by the recognition system and collect beacon data.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n贝洛伯格，还挺热闹。四处转转，说不定能撞上熟人。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nBelobog's quite lively. Taking a stroll around, might bump into familiar faces.

C: 尽管推理不太顺利，但是现场还会留下追踪犯人的线索，只要你好好调查，一定会有结果的。\n找出真相的方法虽然各有不同，但终将抵达事件的真相——绕远路就是你的捷径。
E: Although it doesn't go well, there are still clues related to the culprit at the scene. You're certain to find something if you look around.\nThere are many ways to find the truth... but for you, taking the long way is a shortcut.

C: 桑博想请你帮他找到两件丢失的矿具，其中一件据他说称说，是被一位流浪者抢走了。不过区区一个流浪者，这对你来说小事一桩。
E: Sampo wants you to help him find two lost mining tools. According to him, one of them was taken by a vagrant. Dealing with vagrants is a piece of cake.

C: 虎克大人自己准备的藏宝图，自己却看不懂，意料之外，情理之中。\n幸好，你还有在矿区捡到的家用寻物仪——查宝。可以用它来找找看看。
E: Hook can't read her own treasure map, which is understandable.\nFortunately, you took Findie, the Home-Use Object Finder you found in the mine, with you. Give it a try.

C: 根据神策府的情报，现在有可疑人士正在长乐天宣传关于寿瘟祸祖的异端邪说。难道这就是传说中的「药王秘传」吗？
E: According to the Seat of Divine Foresight's intel, there are currently suspicious people at the Exalting Sanctum promoting heresies about the Plagues Author. Could they be the rumored Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 夕葵向你展示了机巧鸟抓拍的路口影像，仅从这些影像上很难判断具体的肇事星槎。和檀檀再对一次证言，从中推理出真正的肇事星槎吧。
E: Xikui shows you footage from the cycranes, and it's difficult to tell which starskiff was at fault from these images alone. Go over the testimonials with Tantan once again, and deduce the true culprit.

C:
三月七离终点（或云起点）更近了一步，也总算是见到了那位一路上布设阻碍的幕后黑手——「信使」。
「信使」似乎将她和符玄困进了一处循环的记忆之中。那时三月七还是个漂流在宇宙中的无名女孩，直到星穹列车将她救起，使她第一次拥有了自己的「家人」。
如果这不是「信使」的诡计，那三月七还真愿意在这里多待一会儿——几乎人人都眷恋自己的家，并暗自希望自己与家人平凡的日常可以向着过去与未来无限延伸……
但很遗憾，这是不可能的。
E:
March 7th is now one step closer to the end (or the beginning) and finally sees the mastermind who has been placing obstacles along the way — It is the Messenger.
The Messenger seems to have locked March 7th and Fu Xuan into a memory that is an enclosed loop. March 7th was still a nameless girl drifting in space, until the Astral Express saved her, and she gained a "family" for the first time.
March 7th would love to stay in this memory for longer if this weren't a part of the Messenger's plot — Everyone misses their home and secretly wishes the peaceful everyday life they share with their family could last forever into the future and the past...
Unfortunately, that is simply not possible.

C:
三月七离终点（或云起点）更近了一步，也总算是见到了那位一路上布设阻碍的幕后黑手——「信使」。
「信使」似乎将她和符玄困进了一处循环的记忆之中。那时三月七还是个漂流在宇宙中的无名女孩，直到星穹列车将她救起，使她第一次拥有了自己的「家人」。
如果这不是「信使」的诡计，那三月七还真愿意在这里多待一会儿——几乎人人都眷恋自己的家，并暗自希望自己与家人平凡的日常可以向着过去与未来无限延伸……
但很遗憾，这是不可能的。
E:
March 7th is now one step closer to the end (or the beginning) and finally sees the mastermind who has been placing obstacles along the way — It is the Messenger.
The Messenger seems to have locked March 7th and Fu Xuan into a memory that is an enclosed loop. March 7th was still a nameless girl drifting in space, until the Astral Express saved her, and she gained a "family" for the first time.
March 7th would love to stay in this memory for longer if this weren't a part of the Messenger's plot — Everyone misses their home and secretly wishes the peaceful everyday life they share with their family could last forever into the future and the past...
Unfortunately, that is simply not possible.

C: 缅怀既毕，你跟随她前往鳞渊境，不知为何她兴起了寻医问药的念头。而在丹鼎司中，也许没人比那位龙女更有资格为罗浮前代剑首把脉看诊了。
E: Respects paid, you follow her towards the Scalegorge Waterscape. For some reason, she now has the desire to seek medical counsel. No one is more qualified in the Alchemy Commission than that Dragon Lady to read the pulse and diagnose the Luofu's previous Sword Champion.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 这场奇妙的梦境终于结束了。爱德华医生似乎想听听你的感受，和他聊聊吧。哦对了，别忘了黑天鹅最开始的叮嘱：「这段记忆的性质有些特殊，为了其他顾客的梦境体验，还请不要向任何人透露它的结局。」
E: This wonderful dream has finally come to an end. Dr. Edward would like to hear your thoughts — go and talk with him. Oh, don't forget what Black Swan told you at the start: "The nature of this memory is special. Don't ruin the dreamscape experience for anyone else by spoiling the ending."

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n跟随孤云继续前进。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nFollow Guyun and continue onward.

C: 纷乱的渡口，被押解运送的犯人逃脱，少年剑士霜锋出鞘，却被人捷足先登。
E: The escorted prisoner attempts to escape amidst the chaos at the harbor. The young swordsman's frosty blade unsheathes, but someone else was a step ahead of him.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 柯柯娜依然在往一个地方跑去，像上次那样，你也需要经历她的记忆才能追上她的脚步。
E: Cocona is still running towards a particular location. Once again, you must experience the events in her memories to catch up with her.

C: 你见证了天谴猎手的追忆，该如何形容这个故事？一场悲剧？一个误会？一段谎言？而她念诵那两个名字时的情感，是爱？是恨？还是只有疑虑？\n你为此探寻到最后，还是没能给出答案。\n他所爱慕的身体的鲜花要是凋谢了，他就会展翅离开，哪怕曾经说过很多的话，曾经有过深沉的承诺。
E: Having witnessed the Furiae Archer's memories, how would you describe this story? A tragedy? A misunderstanding? A lie? And the emotion in her voice when she pronounces those two names... Is it love? Hatred? Or simply confusion?\nHaving explored this story to its end, you still cannot find an answer for yourself.\nIf the flowers on the body that he so loves were to wither, he would sprout wings and fly away. It does not matter what sweet words he'd said before, or how deep a promise he had made.

C: 在你的指导下，希拉就「如何做人」这件事取得了阶段性的成果。不过，你有些怀疑古恩能否接受这样的「学习成果」……
E: Sheila has made remarkable progress in acting human. But you're not sure if Gunn will be satisfied with the result...

C: 磐岩镇遍地都是奇怪的纸团，你开始理解阿丽娜在担心什么了……
E: There are strange balls of paper scattered around Boulder Town. You begin to understand why Alina is worried...

C: 铁卫禁区的吉尔伯特似乎有些烦恼，去和他聊聊看吧。
E: Gilbert from the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone seems troubled. Go talk to him.

C: 民间科学家雷金正在找人帮忙。\n他似乎对贝洛伯格教育部的题库产生了兴趣，还指望你能帮上些忙。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, is looking for help.\nHe seems to have currently taken an interest in the Belobog Ministry of Education's question bank. Maybe you can help him.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望你能去帮他打探一下教育部的题库储备。\n答错或答对已经不重要了，你已经帮雷金打探到了他想要的消息——去找他回报情况吧。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, wants you to test the Ministry of Education's question bank reserves.\nIt no longer matters if you got it right or wrong. You have already gotten the information he needs. Find him and tell him your findings.

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n你听到了一段塔米拉与他人的有趣对话，快去把你的发现告诉塞琳吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nYou overheard a fun conversation between Tamila and another person, so go and tell Celine right away.

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n开朗的孩子想要为自己拍张照作纪念……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe outgoing kid wants to take a photo of themself as a souvenir...

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 你收到了帕姆的短信，声称列车里出现了奇怪的东西，希望你帮忙抓捕。\n很奇怪，你又能做到什么呢？这又不是《捉*敢死队》，但列车长的请求，你只能听从。
E: Pom-Pom messages you, claiming that something strange has appeared on the Express. They hope you can help them catch it.\nWhat can you possibly do? It's not like you're a member of the Weird-Busters. You've got no choice but to heed the conductor's request, though.

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 夜幕再度降临，云石市集的附近有些骚动，似乎有人遇到了危险，快去看看。
E: As night falls again, there is a commotion near the Marmoreal Market. It seems like someone is in danger, hurry over and take a look.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 不知为何帕姆的腿麻了，只能站在原地动弹不得，赶紧过去帮帮帕姆吧。
E: Pom-Pom's legs are numb for an unknown reason, and they can only stand there. Go and help Pom-Pom out.

C: 车厢的加湿器坏了，帕姆需要你帮忙洒水，以维持车厢内的湿度。
E: The humidifier in the car is broken, Pom-Pom needs you to sprinkle water to maintain the humidity in the car.

C: 你设身处地为帕姆着想，再三挑选过后，你为帕姆买到了最适合帕姆喝的饮料（你认为）。不知道帕姆喝下去会有什么反应呢，帕姆会吧咂嘴吗？莫名地，你开始期待着帕姆的反应……
E: After placing yourself in Pom-Pom's shoes and giving the choices a lot of thought, you have bought the perfect drink (in your opinion) for Pom-Pom. What would Pom-Pom's reaction be when they drink it? Would Pom-pom smack their lips? You find yourself eagerly anticipating Pom-Pom's response...

C: 你再次加入了铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n演习的目标是击败名为「少校」的机器人。想办法通过禁区的齿轮栈桥，找到「少校」吧。
E: Once again, you join a joint training in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nThe objective this time is to defeat a robot called Major. Find a way to get past the gear bridge in the restricted zone and locate Major.

C: 你再次加入了铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n你找到了一张密钥，用它来开启控制终端，操作齿轮栈桥吧。
E: Once again, you join a joint training in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nYou find an encryption key. Use it to activate the control panel and control the gear bridge.

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」是次元扑满所为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「追猎行动」。\n地衡司以行医市集为陷阱布置饵食，希望由你抓住引起异象的扑满……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "cloudhymn magic imitation" is a Warp Trotter's doing. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to go on a "hunt."\nThe Realm-Keeping Commission has placed baited traps all over Healer's Market, and they hope you can capture the Trotter causing the abnormalities...

C: 与守卫迴星港的云骑兵交谈，看看他们是否需要帮助。
E: Talk to the Cloud Knights guarding Stargazer Navalia and see if they need any help.

C: 机巧鸟栖木似乎遭人蓄意破坏，正不断用高频音波吸引附近的丰饶孽物。\n你得击败聚集在栖木下的丰饶孽物，才能操纵机巧鸟。
E: The cycrane roost seems to have been deliberately altered, and is currently emitting high-frequency sound waves that attract Abominations of Abundance.\nYou need to defeat the Abominations of Abundance gathered under the roost before you can reach the cycrane.

C: 「屠杀，并不是一次有无数人被害这么简单。它是谋杀这种重罪，同时发生无数次的结果。」\n——灾难的幸存者需要做些什么来铭记自己的朋友。
E: "A massacre is not as simple as countless people being killed at the same time. It is the product of a heavy sin, such as murder, being simultaneously repeated countless times."\n— Survivors of calamities need to do something to immortalize their friends.

C: 实验助手工作正式开始！去问问看温世玲本次实验还缺少什么素材吧。
E: The work of a lab assistant has officially begun! Go ask Wen Shiling what materials are still missing in this experiment.

C: 与「交易」有关的「物体」…雷金的灵感真的靠谱吗？
E: An object related to "transactions"... Is Regin's intuition trustworthy?

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•蜘蛛」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Spider combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了鼹鼠党老大——漆黑的虎克大人。代她们前往磐岩镇，了解漆黑的虎克大人是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on the boss of The Moles, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great. Head to Boulder Town in their stead, and see whether Pitch-Dark Hook the Great is interested in the position.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是主控舱段中的某样东西……
E: The shady object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the master control zone...

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，你需要化身机巧鸟，破除禁制、收集丹药、获得初代司鼎的秘宝…你感觉怪怪的，但西衍先生说，这是象征着你如鸟儿一般自由。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, you need to become a cycrane to break the containment mechanism, collect pellets, and obtain the secret treasures of the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission — You feel odd about this, but Mr. Xiyan says this symbolizes you are as free as a bird.

C: 斯科特在阴阳怪气的时候确实早有准备，想到之后还要与他谈判就感到棘手。幸好小秘书想到了神秘的会长，会长能教我们谈判技巧！\n话说回来，估计又是连烟代替会长吧，你已经习惯了会长保持神秘感的态度。
E: It seems like Skott was already prepared when he started to act weird. Considering you'll need to negotiate with him down the line, he's clearly going to be a bit of a problem. Thankfully, Miss Secretary remembered that the mysterious Merchant Guild President is around. The president should be able to teach us all sorts of negotiation techniques!\nCome to think about it, it might be Lianyan operating in place of the president again. You're already pretty used to the secrecy the president seems to maintain.

C: 霄老大态度坚决，也许继续问下去也不是办法。\n总之，先离开这里，再做打算。
E: Mr. Xiao is steadfast in his decision. Inquiring further might just lead nowhere.\nYou can leave first and make new plans after.

C: 霄翰建议你们效仿学徒的方式接近霄老大，这些匠人大都是刀子嘴豆腐心，稍微让他们心软以后，对话也会变得顺利。\n你已经做好学徒该做的事情了，接下来就该老师傅发言了。
E: Xiaohan recommended that you pose as an apprentice to get close to Mr. Xiao. Most of these craftsmen are harsh of words but soft of heart. Maybe after you wear them down, the talks will get smoother as well.\nYou have already done what a good apprentice is supposed to do. Next, it's time for the old teacher to speak.

C: 拍摄完绘影图形之后，需要和素裳讨论一下「商业宣传」的方向，并决定下一处拍摄主题。\n你当然可以相信素裳的商业直觉，不过，有没有一种可能，直接问问小秘书会更有效率？
E: After shooting the visiograph, you need to discuss with Sushang about what direction the "business promotion" is supposed to take, and decide the theme for the next promo.\nYou can definitely choose to trust Sushang's business instincts, but might it be wiser and more efficient to directly ask Miss Secretary Mingxi?

C: 金人巷不少商铺与码头建立了合作，码头上的运单也比之前更加复杂。小秘书似乎是有事相求的样子。\n到码头看看，也许有你能帮上忙的部分。
E: Plenty of shops and stores in Aurum Alley have established a collaborative relationship with the docks, and the logistics orders coming in also more complex than before. Mingxi's expression seems to imply a need for assistance.\nHead to the docks and see if you can help with anything.

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n据希露瓦和佩拉所说，这里的试炼是点亮全部的「照雪灯炉」...很难不让人怀疑她们在白嫖挑战者的劳动力。总之，为了得到资格徽章，将这片区域的谜题通通解决吧！
E: In order to challenge the championship contender for each Victory Zone, you must complete the corresponding trial in the Zone.\nAccording to Serval and Pela, the trial here is to light up all the Snowshine Lamps... It really makes one wonder whether they're exploiting the challengers' free labor. Anyways, let's go solve all the puzzles in this Zone and get the Mastery Marks!

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n有些玩家在通关之余会忍不住怀疑，如此简单的谜题真能难得住人？而另一些玩家...他们就是被难住的人。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nSome players can't help but wonder whether such simple puzzles can really stop anyone. Meanwhile, players who don't wonder about this question... are the ones who got stopped by these puzzles.

C: 挫败浮烟后，你们向它提出了第一个问题：「衔药龙女于金人巷众目睽睽下消失不见」。
E: After defeating Cirrus, you pose your first question to it: "How did the Healer Lady vanish in broad daylight in Aurum Alley?"

C: 黑塔等人给「扩展装置」加了一个新的演算分支：这一次他们培育了模拟「博识尊」，并选取了#27 帝皇鲁珀特死亡前的时间……
E: Herta and others have added a new algorithmic branch to the Expansion Module. This time, they have simulated Nous and selected the time before the demise of #27 Emperor Rubert...

C: 帮助辛格勒收集线索——它们应该就散落在神秘空间的战利品宝箱中。
E: Help Singler search for clues — they should be scattered in the mysterious space's treasure chest.

C: 进入了司令的心绪空间，好好陪它玩个痛快吧。
E: You've entered Mr. Bigwig's Emoscape. Have some fun together.

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n本层要帮助员工们逃离，打败敌人吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nYou need to help staff members to escape on this floor. Defeat the enemies!

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 完成「码放货物」简单模式I
E: Complete Inventory Arrangement Easy Mode I

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n你和财富学院代表达成了赌约——若是乐队未能在他到达舞台前开始演出，所有成员都会遭到开除。等待乱破归来的这段时间里，和现场观众聊聊吧。或许…事情还会有转机。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nYou and the Fortune Academy representative made a wager: If the band cannot start their performance before he reaches the stage, then all members will be expelled. As you wait for Rappa to turn, chat with the audience. Perhaps... things might take a turn for the better.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到折纸小鸟的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the origami birds' beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n在校园里到处逛逛，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nWander around the campus to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 「闭嘴」说，帕姆和三月七跑到楼上的房间去找你了。奇怪，他们为什么要去那里找你？
E: Shush said that Pom-Pom and March 7th went to the room upstairs to find you. Strange... why did they decide that was the place to go looking for you?

C: 不知不觉间，时间已经过去了这么久啊…如今回想起来，可真是令人怀念。\n什么？你说你根本不记得自己刚上车时经历过这段剧情？呃哈哈…你可真是贵人多忘事呀！
E: So much time has passed before we knew it... Thinking back, it's really quite nostalgic.\nWhat? You say you don't even remember experiencing this part of the story when you first boarded? Haha... You sure have a way of forgetting important things!

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「扎格列斯之手」。只有完成它的试炼才能继续前进。

C: 热闹的奥赫玛市集中出现了一名走失的孩子，她左右张望，似乎在寻找什么……
E: A lost child has appeared in the bustling market of Okhema. She glances around, seemingly trying to find something...

C: 据说生命花园为优秀的管理员准备了些难度更高的工作，有兴趣的话就去看看吧。
E: The Garden of Life has apparently prepared some more challenging work for capable Administrators. Check them out if you're interested.

C: 昔涟正出神地望着庭院旁的湖面，究竟在想些什么呢？过去问问看吧。
E: Cyrene is staring blankly at the lake by the courtyard. What could be on her mind? Go ask and find out.

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 原以为驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大能够顺利成长下去，实现它的梦想，却没想到，在它身上出现了一种会变小的奇怪症状。据称，这代表它有欧洛尼斯相关的潜质…？那刻夏提出了一个出乎所有人意料的解决方案－让驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大修习欧洛尼斯祷言，进而稳定这一特性。好吧，神奇的第二次养成，开始啦！
E: You thought Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas would grow without a hitch and achieve its dreams, but unexpectedly, it developed a strange condition that made it shrink. Supposedly, this indicates it has potential related to Oronyx...? Anaxa proposed a solution that surprised everyone: Having Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas study Oronyx's Prayer to stabilize this trait. Well, time for a second round of magical nurturing!

C: 黑色的羽翼在气流中轻旋，保持着飞翔的样子，长度与一人同高。你想象一位冒险者的身影，挥舞双翼，乘风而起。

E: Is the damage to the space station serious?

E: Stellarons, huh? Ask away, I'm listening.

C: 在我看来，「未知」并不比「已知」可怖，「未知」…往往也表示尚能掌控与改变。
E: In my opinion, the unknown is no more terrifying than the known... In fact, the unknown signifies something we can control and change.

C: 又是因为星核么？
E: Because of the Stellaron?

C: 在「黑塔」，你度过了平静的一生。星穹列车返回数次，就再也没有了消息。从来往空间站的旅行者口中，你听说了星穹列车与星核猎手那震动寰宇的结局。有时，你不禁思忖如果自己踏上那辆列车，他们的未来会否有所不同。
E: You spend a peaceful life on the space station. The Express visits a few times before disappearing for good. From the occasional visitors on the station, you hear stories about how the final end of the Express and the Stellaron Hunters shakes the universe to its very core. Sometimes you wonder whether their destiny would have changed, had you stepped onto that train.

C: 很有精神。
E: Full of energy.

C: 闲逛而已。
E: Just looking around.

E: This velvet blanket is soft to the touch and feels comfortable. Sitting on it feels just as comfortable; not sure about sleeping on it, though.

C: 有也不要说出来！

C: 地髓长在这颗星球的地表之下，由下层区的专业矿队开采，然后通过输运管线送到地上。相对的，上层区会通过同样的管线，把地表才有的支援物资送到地下去。
E: Geomarrow grows beneath the surface of the planet, and specialist Underworld mining teams are there to extract it. Transport lines shuttle it up to the surface. In the Overworld, we use the same lines to ship surface goods and aid down to the Underworld.

C: 好的，没问题。
E: Sure, why not.

C: …别添油加醋太多。
E: ...Try not to embellish the facts.

C: 刚才试探过了，结果你看到啦？没有铁证拍在脸上，老弟绝不会质疑可可利亚的命令。你们要是先去找了他，计划铁定完蛋。
E: I was gauging his reactions just now, did you see? Unless we have irrefutable evidence, he won't question Cocolia's orders. If you go after him now, our plan's as good as over.

C: 总之，如你所见，我和希露瓦小姐正一起研究我的传家宝呢。就是上次事件结束时我们找回来的那个——
E: Anyway, as you can see, Miss Serval and I are trying to figure out the mystery about my family heirloom together. The one we brought back from the last incident—

C: 哟，菲丝，我回来了～
E: Yo Fizz, I'm back!

C: 结果，等我赶回家里的时候…整个屋子已经被他们翻了个底朝天了！所有值钱的、不值钱的…全都、全都被他们抢走了啊！
E: By the time I got home, the whole house had been turned upside down by them! All the valuables, and even the worthless stuff are gone... Everything. Gone. They took everything!

C: 欸，真的假的？要是你们因为我的事出了什么意外，我肯定会……
E: What, for real? If anything happens to you because of me, I'll definitely...

C: …欸？我说错话了吗？对不起！
E: ... Eh? Did I say something wrong? Sorry!

C: 啊…希露瓦小姐——
E: Uh... Miss Serval...

C: 为了庆祝希露瓦机械屋迎来第一位助手——就由我来给各位演奏一曲吧！来，佩拉，把你的架子鼓搬出来——
E: To celebrate the first assistant of Serval's Workshop, let me play a song for everyone! Come on, Pela, get your drum set up here.

C: 放心吧，有佩拉在呢，{F#她们}{M#他们}俩肯定没问题。
E: Don't worry. I trust Pela is capable of handling anything. They will be fine.

C: 「开拓者」，欢迎回到行政区。
E: Welcome back to the Administrative District, Trailblazers.

C: 布洛妮娅的讲话还真是振奋人心呀！换成我的话，肯定紧张得站都站不稳啦。
E: That was some speech, Bronya! If I had to talk like that in front of a huge crowd, I'd be shaking head to toe!

C: 唔…丹恒，最长寿的人类能活到多少岁呀？
E: Hmm... Dan Heng, how long can humans live for?

C: 看，我给你们拍了照片！
E: Have a look! I took a photo of everyone.

C: 赞美存护，孩子，赞美祂的宽宏…这个小家伙是…？
E: Praise the Preservation, my child. Praise THEIR leniency... And who's this little one?

C: …爷爷！
E: ...Hello grandpa!

C: …知道了。我来帮你。
E: ...Fine. I'll give you a hand.

C: 过去的就让它过去吧，姐姐。
E: Let bygones be bygones, sister.

C: 没问题。等你收拾好，我们就一起出发。
E: Agreed — as soon as you're packed.

C: 这已经是最好的结果了，你们不必挂心。
E: Don't worry, the hard work is already behind us.

C: 两个垃圾桶，一个锃光瓦亮地站着，一个锈迹斑斑地躺着。
E: Two trashcans. One stands glamorously shining, the other lies unceremoniously rusting.

C: 你在垃圾桶里找到一张皱巴巴的手写传单，传单最上方用娟秀的字体写着：「正当权益会社。」
E: You find a wrinkled handwritten flyer in the trashcan. Written at the top in beautiful handwriting you see: "The Rightful Rights Society."

C: 一瓶未开封的吉姆•罗杰面包味汽水；
E: An unopened bottle of Jim Roger bread soda.

C: 这只垃圾桶好似被火焚烤过，桶身扭曲变形，黑色仿佛焦灰的物质在桶底铺了淡淡一层，光线照进来时，它们轻轻飘浮，像在跳舞。
E: This trashcan looks like it was set on fire. The entire trashcan is deformed, with a layer of dark, scorched, ash-like substance coating the bottom. In the light, you see the particles floating softly, almost dancing.

C: 啊，那个小意思，没事。说实话，你们几个都只是昏了过去，所以其实我没做什么。
E: Oh, please, you needn't worry. You've just been asleep for a while, I barely had to lift a finger.

C: 按他的说法，这是生意人的天赋。
E: According to him, that's the gift of a businessman.

C: 那是…布洛妮娅？
E: Is that... Bronya?

C: 希儿小姐！呼，幸好你出手及时，感激不尽啊~
E: Miss Seele! Phew, it's a good thing you showed up when you did. My heartfelt thanks~

C: 而且穿着打扮挺有品味…喂，他不会是想撤了吧？那个红衣服的小姑娘怎么办？
E: And more fashionably dressed, too... Hey, is he about to leave? What about the girl in red?

C: 该怎么做……
E: What should we do...

C: 又安排休息？我对这个世界的休息都有心理阴影了……
E: Again? I'm starting to get nervous of "arranged rest" on this planet...

C: 呃…呃，对、对啊。你拿到冠军就有名气了，出名了「地火」就愿意见你了，没毛病啊。
E: Uhh... Uh, y—yeah! I mean, If you'd fought in the final round and won, you'd have incredible street cred right now! Wildfire wouldn't think twice about talking with you. I don't see the problem.

C: 现在就算了吧。
E: Not right now.

C: 我已经清楚了，继续吧。
E: I'm clear on this bit. What else?

C: …有梦想谁都了不起，好励志呀。
E: ...People with big dreams have big determination.

C: 你怎么不来句「知人知面不知心」？
E: Don't you have something cool to say, like "Appearances can be deceiving"?

C: 与我无关。
E: It has nothing to do with me.

C: 可我改变不了她的想法。我试过了，但她听不进去。我找不到方法……
E: But how can I change her mind? I've tried, but she won't listen. I don't know how to get through to her...

C: 抱歉，我本想暂时抛下这些烦心事的…但果然还是逃不开。
E: I'm sorry, I said I'd forget such problems for a while... And, as expected, here they are keeping me company.

C: 不记得做没做梦了。
E: I can't remember.

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 没礼貌！你应该叫我漆黑的…算了算了，不说这个了！
E: How rude! You should have called me Pitch-Dark... Ugh, never mind...

C: 怎么了，你怎么还傻站在这儿，有什么要向鼹鼠党的老大报告吗？
E: Anyway, why are you still standing here, silly? Do you have something to report to the boss of The Moles?

C: 穿上后有不良反应吗？
E: Any adverse reactions after wearing it?

C: 你是来看「怪物盔甲」的吗？
E: You're here for Monster Armor?

C: 接下来，我准备安排他去跟机器人打两场，把拳赛的话题度再炒起来。
E: I'll get him to fight a robot a few times next, just to heat things up again.

C: 与其可怜那家伙，不如来可怜可怜花了一大笔冤枉钱的我！
E: Instead of pitying that guy, you should feel sorry for me, who wasted all that money!

C: 他怎么倒下了，是体力不行了么？
E: Why did he fall? Is something wrong?

C: 他不打拳还能去干吗？你养他？
E: What else can he do to put food on the table? It's not like you are gonna pay for his living.

C: 为了让妻儿过上更好的生活？
E: To provide a better life for his wife and children?

C: 您现在在天梯榜上的位置是…第<unbreak>17</unbreak>名！这可是俱乐部的顶级拳手们才能达到的高度…我稍后就把这场比赛的奖金转给您——史考特一开口，就知有没有！
E: Your current position on the ladder is... No. <unbreak>17</unbreak>! That's the heights the club's top boxers can achieve... I'll pass on the prize money for this fight to you later. Scott will see if he has it!

C: 如果您想继续比赛就请随时和我说，我来为您安排！
E: If you want to continue fighting, please let me know and I will arrange a match for you!

C: 没问题！我这就给您安排加赛。
E: No problem! A match for you right away.

C: 请睁大眼睛吧，观众们——精彩的对战即将上演！比赛，正式开始！
E: Don't blink, or you might miss a moment of this brilliant spectacle! Now, let the fight begin!

C: 匹克小伙，你醒了？没事就好，没事就好！慢点慢点，别勉强自己……
E: Peak, are you awake? Oh, thank goodness you're alright! Easy now, take your time...

C: 虽然不知道会不会有所谓的庆功宴…但我想，虎克和克拉拉应该不会拒绝跟你们坐在一块儿的。
E: Haha, I don't know how much of a celebration we'll be having... but I know Hook and Clara will be pleased to sit with you.

C: 怎么样？准备好搭乘缆车回上层去了吗？
E: So! Ready to climb aboard?

C: 发生什么事了？别慌张，慢慢说。
E: What happened? Take a breather.

C: …啊，不会吧——老弟他不会就是想靠愧疚感劝服我留下吧？！
E: Wait a minute, was that Gepard's plan all along? Use guilt to make me stay!?

C: 要不是各位出手相助，我们姐弟俩恐怕已经……
E: If you hadn't been there, we would've...

C: 真不愧是你啊，老弟……
E: I know what you're up to, Geppie...

C: 说不定{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}<color=#dbc291ff>凭借着目录的提示，还能找到剩下的书页！</color>
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, maybe you can <color=#dbc291ff>track down all the rest of missing pages with clues from the table of contents!</color>

C: 但是人们的想象是会超越风雪的嘛……
E: But people's imaginations can far surpass the wind and the snow...

C: 聪明的人会用这些矿车整个活，但不知道他们整的活聪不聪明。
E: Smart miners will use these mine carts to make their work easier, but it remains up for debate whether it makes their work smarter.

C: 打开。
E: Open.

C: 大垃圾箱肆无忌惮地敞着口，你看见它的肚子里装满了镇民丢弃的垃圾。突然，有个声音开口说话了：「开拓者啊，你想要的是这七个普通的垃圾，还是这个好看的垃圾呢？」
E: The big trashcan lies in plain air. You can see that it has been filled with citizens' discarded trash. Suddenly, you hear a voice saying: "Trailblazer, do you want these seven normal pieces of trash or this beautiful piece of trash?"

C: 推进去。
E: Push it in.

C: …好吧。
E: ...Very well.

C: 杨叔是担心这次面见仙舟的长官，我们会重蹈贝洛伯格的覆辙嘛…？
E: She is a top Xianzhou leader... Mr. Yang, do you think this could be Belobog all over again...?

C: 仙舟的将军亲自支持我们！这回可不会——等等，上次是不是也这样？要是他们安排咱们住店，可得小心！
E: We've got a Xianzhou general on our side! This time we have to... wait, does this seem familiar to you? Let's hope he doesn't offer us a hotel!

C: 很抱歉，仙舟上目前出了些…特殊状况。但云骑军一定会尽速妥善解决的。
E: Sorry, the Xianzhou is currently caught in... unusual circumstances. But the Cloud Knights will resolve the issues as soon as possible.

C: 小朋友，你在给他们看病？
E: Aren't you a little young to be realigning bones?

C: 不认识啊，遇见他和遇见你，这不是同时嘛。
E: Nope, I met him when I met you.

C: 我觉得「曜青」和「罗浮」各有各的特色，虽说现在我是罗浮云骑了，但还是觉得曜青好点…就拿领导来说吧，我觉得景元将军就没有我们曜青的女将军靠谱……
E: I feel the Yaoqing and the Luofu have different characteristics. I might be a Luofu Cloud Knight now, but I still think the Yaoqing is better... For example, when it comes to leadership, I don't feel General Jing Yuan is as reliable as our madam general back on the Yaoqing...

C: 刚才有一位狐人小姐姐，点了一份鸣藕糕。
E: A foxian lady. She ordered a songlotus cake and went on her way.

C: 谁曾想「迴星港」也有停转的一天；「星河夜转漂迴星，银浦流云学水声」…这是某位诗人描绘当年迴星港造船的盛况。
E: Who'd have thought that Stargazer Navalia might become so quiet. "Long were the nights, when the clangor of hammers rose to meet the stars." ...People used to write poems about the shipwrights here.

C: 你不想参与战斗吗？
E: You want to leave all the fun to us?

C: 碰到战斗，小女子既不擅长，也从不拿生命冒险。能借来「谛听」，已是尽了最大的心意啦。
E: I was never much of a fighter, and I'm not one for risking my life either. Getting Diting into your hands is already beyond the realm of my job description.

C: 可恶，这里完全过不去，得想办法抄近路截住她。
E: Ugh, there's no way through here, we need to think of a way to cut her off!

C: 我们受景元将军的委托来此捉拿星核猎手，感谢太卜出手相助，但人得由我们押送到将军那里。
E: We received an assignment from General Jing Yuan to arrest the Stellaron Hunter. Thank you, diviner, for coming to our aid, but we must escort the fugitive to the general.

C: 虽然{RUBY_B#翻译装置}联觉信标{RUBY_E#}让每个字都能看懂，但连一块儿就不明白是什么意思…这是卡芙卡留下的东西吗？
E: Thanks to the {RUBY_B#machine translator}synesthesia beacon{RUBY_E#} I can understand the characters, but I don't get what any of it means... Is this something Kafka left behind?

C: 是啊。景元将军把指挥云骑的重任交给她，必然知道她会按卜算的结果行动。
E: Indeed. Since General Jing Yuan tasked the master diviner with commanding the Cloud Knights, he must've known she'd act on the results of her divination.

C: 哼，本座只是客气客气。依着卜算结果，你在这里也没等多久。
E: Hmph, I was merely being courteous — according to my divination you've hardly been here long.

C: 云骑的第一次强攻只是掩护，太卜用云骑主力吸引敌人注意，而让我们去熄灭丹炉，止住烟雾。
E: The Cloud Knights first assault was just a cover. You're using the main army to attract the enemy's attention, while we douse the elixir crucibles and stop the smoke.

C: 赐予我们星核的人…这么说……
E: The one who gave us the Stellaron... said that...

C: 那团火焰自称绝灭大君，幻胧。这个名字，我曾经从其他无名客口中听过。
E: The flame we witnessed claimed to be Lord Ravager Phantylia — a name I've heard other Nameless speak of in the past.

C: 你、你再坚持一下，我们找人来救你……
E: H—Hold on! We'll find someone to help...

C: 数千年来，联盟一直想祓除这隐秘组织，始终未能如愿。选在这个时刻出世，一定不是偶然。
E: The Alliance has been trying to root out their secret organization for millennia — it's no coincidence that they've chosen this moment to reveal themselves.

C: 那些怪物…
E: Those monsters...

C: 服役三百年的老人都变成了…那种不人不鬼的模样！只差一点…只差一点我就……
E: Even seasoned soldiers — soldiers of three centuries were turned into... twisted beings! I was almost... almost...

C: 恩公有没有同这些「药王秘传」的人说过话了？你觉得他们如何？
E: Have you talked with these Disciples, benefactor? What do you make of them?

C: 等等，停云小姐，你怎么还不回去！这里离丹炉很近了！
E: Wait, Miss Tingyun, why are you still here!? You're too close to the crucible!

C: 嗯…抱歉。
E: Mm... I'm sorry.

C: 云骑军很快就会检查你我的身份。我也有要去的地方，此地不宜久留。
E: The Cloud Knights will soon check our identities. I have somewhere else to be — I've tarried here too long.

C: 我是行商啊，还有一笔交易没做完呢。
E: I'm a traveling merchant. I have one more deal to see through.

C: 但诚如符卿所说，幻胧的出现令事态不再可控。身为罗浮将军，我不得不借丹恒的力量，也要请各位全力相助。
E: However, as Lady Fu has explained, the appearance of Phantylia means that the situation is far from under our control. As general of the Luofu, it would be foolish of me not to ask Dan Heng and the rest of you for your strength at this critical moment.

C: （不知三月他们到底情况如何…）
E: (I wonder if the others are okay...)

C: 区区藤萝，一剑即可斩断。
E: The weeds in my garden give me more grief.

C: 停云最信赖的人，只有驭空大人了吧？
E: The person who Tingyun trusts the most is Madam Yukong, right?

C: 哇哦！将军许诺的好处这就来了吗来了吗来了吗？
E: Oooo! All those benefits that the general promised — they're finally here! Yippee!

C: 我明白了，这件事就交给我们吧。
E: ...I understand. Leave it with us.

C: 你们打算如何处置「建木」？
E: What do you plan on doing with the Ambrosial Arbor?

C: 符玄看起来干得有模有样的…
E: Fu Xuan seems to be handling things pretty well...

C: 这不仅是安慰逝者，安慰那些不再能对我们说话的灵魂，也是在安慰他们留在尘世里的血亲、挚友和所有仙舟住民……
E: It's not just to comfort the dead — those souls who can never talk with us again — but also to comfort their surviving relatives, close friends, and indeed all residents of the Xianzhou...

C: 岩明先生？
E: Mr. Yanming?

C: 盒子底下似乎还印着字…「不夜侯」。我想想，我记得在哪儿听过这个名字？
E: It looks like there's something printed on the bottom of the box... The Sleepless Earl. Let me think — where have I seen that name before?

C: 难道你真的不想说点儿什么吗？
E: ...Is that really everything you want to say?

C: 希望将来各位能有机会返回罗浮，浮生短促，我很希望能再见到你们。
E: Life is fleeting. We hope you'll have the opportunity to return to us on the Luofu soon.

C: 再见，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: Bye, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}.

C: 老大，算了算了，让这个灾星赶紧离开罗浮，咱们也好重新开展工作。
E: *sigh* Boss, let's just forget about it. Let this bad omen off the Luofu so we can get on with business.

C: 就是前几天新闻里说的那个药王秘传的老大啊！
E: She's the leader of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus — the one everyone was talking about!

C: 不过，有关「家族」这次邀请，我确实还有些在意的细节想和各位讨论下…但不是现在。先尽情享受愉快的假日吧。
E: But, regarding The Family's invitation, I do have some details that I wish to discuss with everyone... just not now. Let's enjoy our vacation for now.

C: 梦不是虚假的吗？
E: Aren't dreams fake?

C: 别有用心的公司使节，巧舌如簧的精明商人，张扬轻浮的阔绰公子…也许都是吧，直觉告诉我，他还有深藏不露的一面。
E: An IPC ambassador who knows more than he lets on, a silver-tongued businessman, a flamboyant and debonair aristocrat... He could be all of them. My instincts tell me he's much more than meets the eye.

C: 关于「钟表匠」…
E: About the Watchmaker...

C: 据说是匹诺康尼的历史名人，他的传奇经历口口相传，激励人们来到盛会之星追逐梦想。真是个有趣的人，想来其遗产也极具吸引力吧。
E: They say he's a historically important figure in Penacony, and tales of his life have been handed down over generations. Such tales encourage believers to come to the Planet of Festivities to pursue their dreams. He's an interesting fellow, that's for sure, and his legacy still has the power to draw people in.

C: 可能是在梦里…
E: Perhaps in a dream...

C: 欢迎光临「梦境贩售店」，星穹列车的开拓客！
E: Trailblazers from the Astral Express — Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store!

C: （抱歉。当我收录这枚梦泡时，其中的部分音轨就已经丢失了——也许忆质也无法承载那不可言喻的声音吧。）
E: (My apologies. When I received this dream bubble, some of the audio tracks were missing... Perhaps, even the memoria is unable to transmit the voice of Akivili.)

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 等等等等——总计四十六起恶性事件！你是否承认，它们皆由你所为？
E: And that's not even half the list! There are a total of <unbreak>46</unbreak> cases of malicious conduct! Do you admit to being the culprit in every case?

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 图穷匕见了是吧。
E: So that "first dream bubble for free" was just a sales pitch, huh?

C: 别想跑！你这个偷渡犯！
E: Don't even think about running away, you stowaway!

C: 我还有事，先告辞了。如果你们有需要，就找附近的幼犬联络我吧。祝你们享受这场美梦。
E: I need to get going. If you need help, you can reach out to me through the young Bloodhounds in this area. I wish you an enjoyable experience in this land of dreams.

C: 应、应该没问题吧，我还是有点积蓄的……
E: Th—That shouldn't be a problem. I have some savings left...

C: 喔！原来是这样，我就说——也没过去多久，三月姑娘这变化也忒大了。
E: Oh, no wonder! I was just thinking, there's no way Miss March could change her appearance so dramatically in such a short time.

C: 幸会，幸会！
E: Nice to meet you, too.

C: 但你还没完成游戏，对吧？拜托了——我需要通关街机的奖励，才能让你们体验「有趣的东西」。
E: You didn't finish the game, did you? Well, I'm going to have to ask you to finish that game — I need those game rewards so I can let you two experience something fun.

C: …我本来还在期待你发现真相的瞬间，会露出什么表情呢。
E: ...I was looking forward to seeing your face when the truth dawned on you.
...Sure.

C: 你听起来很有把握嘛～显得你已经把家族那位鸡翅膀男孩搞定了似的。
E: You sound very sure of yourself. Looks like you've already convinced that Chicken Wing Boy from The Family.

C: 筹码不好吗？在赌桌上，只有筹码不会把自己赔进去。你看流光忆庭和星穹列车的朋友都明白这个道理，他们就很聪明。
E: What's wrong with chips? In any gamble, the only players that will never be on the losing side are the chips. My friends from the Garden of Recollection and Astral Express are all smart enough to understand that.

C: 噢，天哪——他们简直要乱套了。不过，现在是不是个让他们离开的好机会？
E: Woah, things are turning into a mess. But then again, maybe now is a good chance to ask them to leave?

C: 噢，请别。因为我一定制服不了你。
E: Please refrain from that. I know I won't be able to overcome you.

C: 噢，那我会建议您找爱德华医生接受精神分析治疗。
E: In that case, I'd recommend that you see Dr. Edward for a psychotherapy session.

C: 看来你得想办法让这位筑梦师<color=#dbc291ff>振作</color>起来了。
E: It seems you need to find a way to <color=#dbc291ff>uplift</color> the Dreamweaver.

C: 我应该早点怀疑他的…对不起。无论如何，家族一定隐瞒了什么，关于梦境的真相……
E: I should've been wary of him sooner... Sorry. Regardless, The Family must be hiding something — something about the truth behind the Dreamscape...

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 您…曾听说过「垃圾之王」塔塔洛夫吗？
E: Have you heard of... Tatalov the Garbage King?

C: 异乡人，这里有一桩纠纷等待着你公正的判决。
E: Outlander, a dispute awaits your fair judgment.

C: 为了向塔塔洛夫报恩，那人类把自己也变成了垃圾桶…这竟然是个惊悚故事。
E: In order to repay Tatalov, that human turned himself into a trashcan... This is actually a horror story.

C: 这是…是那个骇客小姑娘！
E: It's... It's that hacker girl!

C: 你说她已经回到现实了。
E: You said she already returned to reality.

C: 闸门关闭了。你感觉自己的思绪也被回旋的水流扰动，牵引其中，在深谷中下降、沉沦。当舱门再度开启时，你会看到何种景象？也许没人能给出答案。
E: The gate shuts. Your thoughts, stirred by the swirling current and pulled along, descend into a deep abyss, sinking. When the hatch opens again, what sights will you behold? Perhaps no one can provide an answer.

C: 她似乎在和什么人分享自己的发现，而且…和「钟表匠」相关。
E: She seems to be sharing her discovery with someone, and... it's related to the Watchmaker.

C: 你愿意帮我走出这片忆域吗？
E: Are you willing to bring me out of this Memory Zone?

C: 下次见面时，你又会带来怎样有趣的记忆呢…我很期待哦。
E: What fascinating memories will you bring for me next time we meet...? I sincerely look forward to them.

C: 「因此，定居该星球的智慧种族如今已寥寥无几，他们分化成数个氏族，多营游牧，在干旱少雨的荒漠原野中艰难求生，并发展出完全独立于星神体系的民俗信仰……」
E: "This is why very few intelligent species have made this planet their home. Dividing themselves into several tribes to eke out nomad lifestyles as they struggle to survive the arid desert wilderness, they have developed their own folk beliefs that are independent of the Aeon belief system..."

C: 你是幸运的孩子，被祝福的孩子…就像你的名字一样，是祂赐给埃维金的礼物…我的孩子……
E: Such a lucky child, such a blessed child... Just like your name. A gift from THEM to Avgin... my boy...

C: 现场有目击证人，家族姑且相信你的不在场证明，但往后的时间…你恐怕得在猎犬的监视下度过了。
E: There were eyewitnesses at the scene, and The Family, in their graciousness, has tentatively accepted your alibi. However, for the foreseeable future... you shall, regrettably, find yourself under the vigilant watch of the Hounds.

C: 现状不容乐观啊，教授，我都开始冒冷汗了。你觉得眼下这局面…还有翻盘的可能么？
E: Things aren't looking too optimistic, Doctor. I'm starting to break out in a cold sweat. Do you reckon... there's still any chance of a comeback given how things are?

C: 一段时间前……
E: A while ago...

C: 因为在祂们开辟的道路上，你走得比我更远……
E: Because on the path THEY have forged, you have traveled farther than I have...

C: 你有什么理由这样做？
E: What reason would you have for doing that?

C: 「…轮不到她出场████我一人便足够…」
E: "She won't be necessary ████ I alone am enough."

C: 他们怀疑我出千，但我没有…我赢得光明正大。
E: They suspected me of cheating, but I didn't... I won fair and square.

C: 这只是一串项链…可是卡卡瓦夏，你是我最后的家人了。
E: Look, this is just a necklace. But Kakavasha, you are my only family.

C: 姐姐，大家都说我聪明，可我不明白…如果每一场雨都是母神的宽恕和恩赐……
E: Sister, everyone praises me for being smart, but I don't get it... If every rainpour was Gaiathra Triclops' forgiveness and grace...

C: …当然。
E: ...Of course.

C: 不然我给你表演个钟表把戏？
E: How about a clockwork trick?

C: 我以为这才是你想要的结果，毕竟我可是像你说的那样——「忠实地履行了自己的职责」。
E: I thought this was exactly what you wanted. After all, I faithfully fulfilled my duties as you instructed.

C: 搞不好呢？兴许这就是我死到临头还想着发钱的原因。
E: Well, who knows? Maybe that's why I'm handing out cash even when I'm about to bite the dust.

C: 他们说…它最喜欢出现在醉鬼面前了…尤其是，醉倒在路边的大！笨！蛋！哈，太有趣了……
E: They say... it loves to appear to drunk people... especially the ones... who are passed out on the side of the road! Hah! How funny...

C: 真讽刺啊，如今被匹诺康尼拒之门外的这些偷渡客，和几个琥珀纪前被奉为拓荒者的逐梦客…又有什么差别呢？
E: How ironic. What's so different between the stowaways rejected by Penacony today and the dream seekers once hailed as pioneers several Amber Eras ago?

C: 嗯…那你想得到什么？
E: Hmm... What do you want then?

C: …这不可能。你是什么人？
E: ...Impossible. Who are you?

C: 不，你变了…你现在变成追人的那个了。最后一次捉迷藏…好好享受吧。
E: On the contrary, now you're the one who does the hunting. The last round of hide and seek, and you get to be it. You should enjoy it.

C: …这是作弊。
E: ...That's cheating.

C: 我们得在这里分别了，卡卡瓦夏。卡提卡人就要来了。
E: This is where we go our own way, Kakavasha. The Katicans are coming.

C: 为什么？卡提卡人已经抢走了我们所有的钱、吃的，还杀死了爸爸妈妈…他们还想要什么？
E: Why? The Katicans have already taken all our money, food, and they killed our parents... What more do they want?

C: 仅此而已…朋友，你真的让我不知该怎么接话了。
E: That's all... My friend, you really leave me at a loss for words.

C: …并且能活着回来。
E: ...And lives to tell the tale.

C: 也正因如此，它没有意义。
E: And because of that, it's pointless.

C: …对。因为他们不在这里…爸爸、妈妈、姐姐……
E: ...Yes. Because they are not here... My papa, mama, and big sis...

C: 无声地…平静地…坠地了。
E: Quietly, peacefully, it at last landed.

C: 你试图睁开眼，可看见的只有一片漆黑。
E: You try to open your eyes, but find only blackness before you.

C: 这个……
E: Well...

C: 没想到会在这遇见粉丝呢，我很荣幸。欢迎来到匹诺康尼，一个满盈着美梦的世界。
E: I didn't expect to meet a fan here. I'm honored. Welcome to Penacony, a world filled with wonderful dreams.

C: …你有驾驶证吗？
E: ...Do you have a driver's license?

C: 离「剧本」下一幕还有些时间，让我再多待会儿吧，用这副身体。
E: There's still some time before the next part of the script unfolds. Let me stay a little longer in this body.

C: 一如既往，一片空白。它不在这颗星球。为什么突然问这个？
E: As always, it's a blank slate. It's not on this planet. Why the sudden inquiry?

C: 很高兴能再次与你同行。事到如今，我也终于能向你袒露全部的事实。如你所见…我的另一个名字是「星核猎手」萨姆。
E: It's a pleasure to journey alongside you once more, but it's time I laid bare the entire truth before you. As you might have heard... I also go by another name: Stellaron Hunter, Sam.

C: 在它即将行凶的瞬间，我从那只骇人的瞳孔里看见了「另一片梦境」的倒影。
E: In that instant before it killed me, I saw the reflection of another Dreamscape in its ghastly pupils.

C: 现在这个名字又出现在流萤小姐口中…很难不令人心生怀疑。
E: And now with Firefly mentioning his name again... it's hard not to be suspicious.

C: 一起吧，{NICKNAME}。我想你应该注意到了。
E: Let's go, {NICKNAME}. I'm sure you've already noticed him.

C: 如此一来，困扰匹诺康尼的两桩命案便有了解答。只是幕后主使的用意…变得更扑朔迷离了。
E: Well, we now know the answer to both murder cases that have caused such commotion in Penacony. As for the intentions of the mastermind behind it all... we're still none the wiser.

C: 在梦里入睡怎么了？
E: What's wrong with sleeping in dreams?

C: 流梦礁的生活十分自由，也没什么组织可言。大家各过各的，井水不犯河水，我能做的…也只是每天定时打扫几座墓碑罢了。
E: Life in Dreamflux Reef is pretty liberating. Everyone here mostly keeps to themselves, without meddling in others' affairs. My daily task involves... cleaning a few tombstones.

C: 身为橡木家系的家主，为了匹诺康尼的光明未来，我义不容辞。我和知更鸟会即刻前往美梦，想办法找到梦主对质。如果家族真的偏离了「同谐」……
E: As the head of the Oak Family, I'm responsible for ensuring Penacony's promising future. Robin and I will head into the sweet dream and confront the Dreammaster, and if it turns out that The Family has truly strayed from the Harmony...

C: 不出所料，事件的核心依然是…「星核」。
E: As I suspected, the core of this issue lies within... the Stellaron.

C: 希望我们能得出令所有人都满意的结论。
E: Let's hope we can reach a consensus that satisfies everyone.

C: 我们心目中的那座乐园…也不应该只是一场虚无缥缈的梦。
E: No, and the paradise we yearn for... shouldn't be just a fleeting dream either.

C: 好啊，那我们约好了。
E: It's a deal then.

C: 星穹列车？可是之前……
E: The Astral Express? But I thought...

C: 我倒不是专程来的！只是正好赶上。其实我都不太清楚那是做什么的，就听说特别热闹。
E: Well, I didn't come all the way here specially for the festival. Honestly, I don't really even know what it's about, but I heard it's a lot of fun.

C: 姐们，跟你扫听个事…我听说梦里出了点事，可能会影响谐乐大典……
E: Hello! So, there's something I wanted to ask about... I've been hearing some unsettling rumors about certain incidents that might affect the Charmony Festival...

C: 「血罪灵」…命途行者的执念，它们从IX的阴影中诞生，将自己视作事主，不自知地重复着逝者生前的行为。
E: Sin Thirsters... the obsessions of the Pathstriders. They emerge from the depths of IX, seeing themselves as masters of their own destiny, unknowingly repeating the actions of their past lives.

C: 自我介绍一下，我是苏乐达™工厂的厂长，艾迪恩•列达。四位朋友，也向全银河的观众介绍一下自己吧！
E: Allow me to introduce myself. I'm the director of SoulGlad™'s factory, Aideen Leeda. My four friends, introduce yourselves to the audience across the cosmos!

C: 可以快点开始吗？
E: Can we get the ball rolling already?

C: 原来我们还有一支奇兵没用…
E: Looks like we have one more ace up our sleeves. Time for the masterstroke!

C: 那…要怎么才能参加这个「盛会海选」呢？
E: So how do we go about participating in these Festivity Auditions?

C: （拍案而起）
E: (Stand up and smack the table)

C: 匹诺康尼有危险，能让一让吗？
E: Penacony's in danger. Can you get out of the way?

C: 钟表小子？我也能看见…这一位是舞台布景吗？
E: Clockie? I can also see him... Is this character part of the show?

C: 又来…但没关系，我们已经完全习惯这支火箭筒了。
E: Here we go again... but no big deal, we're pretty handy with this bazooka now.

C: 那是一位逐梦客，也是一名偷渡犯。和其他所有人一样，他怀着对美好生活的向往来到匹诺康尼，只是他付出的代价对于凡人而言…也足以称作「倾尽一切」。
E: He was a Dreamchaser, and an illegal stowaway. Just like the rest of them, he came to Penacony in search of a better life, except that, to most people, the price he paid... I suppose you could say it was "everything."

C: 当一重又一重的错误充满人群，变得无从追溯…这一座座监牢便共同组成了一幢监狱，一条名为「适者生存」的自然法则。
E: When one mistake after the next permeates the masses, they become impossible to trace... Thus, the amassing of these individual cages culminate to form a prison, a place dictated only by the rule of "survival of the fittest."

C: 每次回来，他都会给我看航海日志，说起海上发生的事。我的梦想就是成为和米哈伊尔一样的冒险家。
E: Every time he came back, he'd share his logbook with me and tell me about his adventures at sea. I want to become a great adventurer just like him.

C: 等待米哈伊尔航海归来的时间里，瓦尔德大叔给了我这间工作室，玩具间，我的「秘密据点」……
E: While I spent my time waiting for Grandpa to return from his voyage, Walder gave me this workshop, and it became my "secret base"...

C: 我会在这条时光走廊的尽头，等候各位的到来。
E: I'll be waiting for you at the end of this corridor of time.

C: 今天过后，耶佩拉的名字就会从银河历史中消失，而永火官邸将取而代之，在不远的未来收到一封邀请函……
E: After today, Jepella's name will disappear from cosmic history, and the Ever-Flame Mansion will take its place. In the not-too-distant future, you'll receive an invitation...

C: 来到这里前，我的上一站叫俄尔刻龙。那里也有荒无人烟的山崖，也有火堆照亮的夜晚。天上会下紫红色的雪，含在嘴里…有树莓的味道。
E: Before coming here, I stopped by a place called Orkron. It had barren cliffs and nights lit by bonfires. Burgundy snow would fall from the sky, and when it landed on my tongue... it tasted like raspberries.

C: 不仅如此，这整座剧场也安静得出奇。不仅没有观众，连工作和演职人员都没看到……
E: And not only that, the entire theater is eerily quiet. No audience, no staff, no one around...

C: 这出剧目名叫《囚人颂》，结合周边的氛围…恐怕接下来要上演的是匹诺康尼的过去。
E: This act is named Ode to Prisoner. Given the atmosphere here... I believe it's about Penacony's past.

C: 我得帮三月七收拾行李…
E: I HAVE TO help March pack her suitcase...

C: 这太危险了，真希望你没下去。
E: It was too dangerous. I wish you hadn't gone down.

C: 喂——喂喂——各位乘客请注意——
E: Ahem, hi, hello~ Attention all passengers.

C: 时间滚滚向前，而「开拓」之旅亦将翻开新的篇章。
E: Time marches forward, heralding the arrival of a new chapter in the history of Trailblazing expeditions.

C: 三月七
E: March 7th

C: 星期日
E: Sunday

C: 她来自受「记忆」启蒙、学阀独裁的卓瑞娜-乌尔德星系，专攻忆质动力学。
E: Hailing from the Zorina-Urd system — enlightened by Remembrance and dominated by academic cliques — she majored in memoria dynamics.

C: 太好了。感激不尽，黑天鹅小姐。
E: Thank you so much, Black Swan.

C: ——不，没这个必要。
E: ...No, no need for that.

C: 凡人走在命途上，就像坐着小船渡过水面，留下一条蜿蜒的行迹，推开无数可能性的涟漪。相较人类转瞬即逝的一生，这些波浪久久不会平息。
E: Mortals who walk the Paths are like sailors on a vast ocean, leaving behind a trail that creates countless ripples of possibilities. These ripples last longer than the fleeting lifetimes of humans.

C: 或许吧。这是我的职责…黄泉的守望者。
E: This is my duty... as the watcher of the Acheron.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>请问，你会对亲手斩断这种联系感到恐惧吗？</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Might I ask if you fear severing these bonds with your own hands?</color>

C: 既然如此，也让我做一件没有意义的事吧……
E: In that case, allow me to do something meaningless, too...

C: 嗯，那你准备押什么呢？
E: Alright, what will you wager?

C: 没人按下去试试？
E: Hasn't anyone actually tried pressing it?

C: 好主意，我一会儿回来。
E: Great idea. I'll come back soon.

C: …这杯好像不太对。没关系，再来一次。
E: ...This doesn't seem quite right. Don't worry. Let's give it another try.

C: 你准备好了就和我说。
E: Let me know when you're ready.

C: …对了，还有一件事。
E: ...By the way, there's one more thing.

C: 不过想想也是，你们无名客的生活未免也过于刺激了。听说你们之前整了个大活，把橡木家系都连带着给一锅端了。
E: Thinking about it though, the lives of the Nameless are so excessively exciting. I heard you guys pulled off a big stunt, cutting down the Oak Family in one fell swoop.

C: 公司和学会的行政人员对我们的定义是「战略合作伙伴」。但在我看来，我永远只能扮演「教师」，而他则是「学生」，就像你和其他每一个人。
E: The executives of the IPC and the Guild say that we are strategic partners. Yet, from my perspective, I am invariably the teacher, and he, along with you and every other individual, is the student.

C: 没事，你已经道过歉了。
E: No problem. You've already apologized.

C: 你想感受一下吗？我可以念给你听，但一切后果花火大人概不负责。
E: Care to experience it? I can chant it for you, but Miss Sparkle won't be responsible for any of the consequences.

C: 故人？不，我不是人。
E: Old acquaintance? I'm not even human.

C: 我是一只「岁阳」，原本住在罗浮的绥园里。我热衷于研究仙舟亚文化，但慢慢地，我发现仙舟亚文化也是有极限的。
E: I'm a heliobus, originally from the Luofu's Fyxestroll Garden. I'm passionate about researching Xianzhou subcultures, but I've slowly come to realize that Xianzhou subcultures also have their limits.

C: 我想，他最后一定到过这里，来和他的无名客朋友道别。同样地，你们应该也有不少话想对他们说吧。
E: I believe he must have come here at the end, to bid farewell to his Nameless friends. Similarly, I'm sure you all have plenty you want to say to them.

C: 来和老无名客们告别。
E: We've come to say goodbye to the old Nameless.

C: 因为我们见过他们生活的点点滴滴，会认为这些人是特别的。
E: Because we've seen every nook and cranny of their lives, we see these people as special.

C: 又见面了，各位。
E: Everyone, we meet again.

C: 不说题外话了。如果星穹列车现在急需一趟特别的开拓之旅来为引擎补充「动力」——
E: But I digress. If the Astral Express is in urgent need of a special trailblazing expedition to recharge its engine...

C: 带带我。
E: Take me along.

C: 帕姆？你在说什么呀……
E: Pom-Pom? What are you talking about?

C: 这只猴子和你刚刚见到的那些家伙一样目光呆滞，如果再跟它对视几秒，你的智力属性可能会受到影响。
E: This monkey looks just as dazed as the ones you saw earlier. If you stare at it for a few more seconds, your intelligence might be affected.

C: 给你介绍下，这是折纸大学现在最流行的小家伙，比钟表小子还火。
E: Allow me to introduce you to the most popular little guy in Paperfold University! It's more beloved than Clockie.

C: 不满意，重新考吧。
E: I'm not satisfied. Let me retake the exam.

C: 话说回来，那位芮克先生居然问到了贝洛伯格的事，他是怎么知道的？
E: By the way, Mr. Reca asked me about Belobog. How did he know about that?

C: 是吗…我不太说话……
E: Did you...? I don't really chat...

C: 新生？以后看清我的脸，我来了就是来查纪律了！
E: New students? Then remember my face well. Be on your best behavior when I'm around!

C: 这、这是要打起来了吗！？
E: Huh? Are we going to fight!?

C: 别、别掏枪啊，蕉子动口不动手！想参加活动是吧，可以是可以……
E: P—Put the gun down, sir! We can talk this out without going bananas. I gather you're keen on checking out the event? Well, that's fine and all...

C: 他香蕉的，这都什么？
E: Banana my sundae! What kind of questions are these?

C: 它说累了就休息吧，停下来也没关系~
E: When you're tired, take a rest, take a break, it's for the best~

C: 哎哎…不是，瞧你这话说的。你来了我家，然后和我说「跟自己家一样就行」？
E: No, are you mistaken or something? Coming to my place and then telling me to "make myself at home"?

C: 本来还打算提醒你离远点，但故弄玄虚的家伙变猴子就变了吧，还能清净些。
E: I was planning to tell you to stay away from this place, but you're being so annoyingly pretentious that you're better off turning into a monkey. At least you'd be less noisy then.

C: 此乃缭乱•符印，还请大头•邪祟评点。
E: I present to you: the Dazzling Seal. I am eagerly anticipating your appraisal of it, Bighead Fiendling.

C: 这么说来，据说最近有个身份不明的偷渡犯潜入了匹诺康尼…粉发、红衣、燃烧的围巾，猎犬的目击报告和你有几分相似啊，同学。
E: I'm only asking because we know a stowaway has recently snuck into Penacony. Eyewitness accounts from the Bloodhounds describe someone with pink hair, red attire, and a blazing scarf... And you seem to match that description.

C: 你想伸手试试它的质量，但睡蕉小猴似乎被你吓了一跳，突然拔腿跑掉了……
E: You reach out to feel its quality, but the Slumbernana Monkey is startled and suddenly bolts away...

C: 百货•忍徒！在下已向忍徒们求证，这些邪祟傀儡皆来自阁下商铺。速速招来，你是否受到了御猿•邪忍的蛊惑？
E: Nay, Ninja Initiate Merchant! The other initiates have verified that these fiendling puppets are from your shop. Confess at once! Are you under the spell of Evil Ninja Osaru?

C: 如此凶狠的忍•真言！不愧是球棒•忍者。
E: A brilliantly ruthless rendition of the ninja mantra, Baseball Bat Ninja!

C: 怎么能在课堂上使用暴力啊！
E: You're not supposed to use violence in the classroom!

C: 借一步？有什么不能在这聊的……
E: Just me? Why can't we just talk here...?

C: 想讲清楚原始博士的事迹并不需要太多时间……
E: It doesn't take much time to tell Dr. Primitive's stories...

C: 啊！原来是您，早有耳闻，您有潜力成为真正迈入本源的人，请到我身边来吧。
E: Oh, it's you! Yes, I've heard about you. You have the potential to truly reach the source. Please, come over to me.

C: 虽然不是初次见面，不过……
E: This isn't the first time we've met, but...

C: 丑时三刻，一颗飞星坠落划破长夜，此乃忍徒•乱破的终点，亦是忍侠•乱破的起点……
E: In the darkest hour of the night, a falling meteor streaks across the sky, marking the graduation of Ninja Initiate Rappa and her new identity as Ninja Hero Rappa...

C: 你隐约听到门外传来了小猴的*蕉声*，幸福、快乐、轻松的音调让你不禁心生羡意蕉。
E: You faintly hear the playful Banagibberish of monkeys outside the door, and the happy, cheerful, carefree tones make you feel a twinge of *banana* envy.

C: 当然。痛楚是忍者的平常，在下绝不会退却。
E: Certainly. Pain is but common to a ninja and I shall never flinch in the face of it.

C: 话说回来，为什么是忍者？
E: Since we're on this, why ninjas?

C: 你做得非常好，真正的忍侠，就该一心贯彻自己的忍道。
E: You have done extremely well. A true Ninja Hero must wholeheartedly devote oneself to the way of the ninja.

C: 弟子应该画些什么？
E: What should I paint?

C: CUT！完美！
E: CUT! Perfect!

C: 睡蕉小猴？哈哈，你怎么提这么过气的东西啊。
E: Slumbernana Monkey? Haha, that's so last year.

C: 别这么说，你一定会对这份片酬感兴趣的，因为这份片酬的内容是……
E: Don't say that. I'm sure you'll be very interested in my remuneration. After all, this remuneration is...

C: 看到这颗美丽的梦泡了吗，家族用万千家徒「同谐」的心愿与星核的力量筑造了匹诺康尼，而我则将万千小猴「放弃」的心愿汇聚为这个梦泡，筑造了「睡蕉的时刻」。
E: See this beautiful dream bubble? The Family relied on the Harmonious wishes of thousands of Family members and the power of the Stellaron to construct Penacony. But I simply gathered and converged the abandoned wishes of thousands of monkeys into this dream bubble to create the Moment of Slumbernana.

C: 「来！直面我——面对你内心至深的恐惧！」
E: "Come, face me! Face the fear that lies in the depths of your heart!"

C: 通路…修复了！
E: The passage... is now cleared!

C: 发现了…老鼠！
E: Found... a rat!

C: 它如今的「封闭」一定另有隐情。只是，如果原因也是万界之癌…有些直接或间接的迹象还未得到印证。
E: There must be other reasons for its current state of isolation. It's just... if the Cancer of All Worlds is truly the culprit, then we should have observed certain phenomena — explicit or otherwise — by now, but that isn't the case.

C: 呵…另一种意义上的匹诺康尼啊。
E: Heh... In another sense, it's Penacony all over again.

C: 虽然很想再多留你几日，但若将你强留在奥赫玛…树庭的人可要背后多话了。
E: I would love to keep you in Okhema for a few more days, but I would hate to provoke the ire of the Grove.

C: 这…确实是好严肃的事情啊。阿格莱雅女士，不会是想让我……
E: That... sounds pretty serious. Lady Aglaea, you can't be asking me to...

C: 咦，大家快看，那边——有什么东西冒出来了？
E: Eh? Everybody, look over there! Something's appearing...

C: …唔，没有了。它们的记忆很稀薄，连画面都没有，只能听到这几个模糊的词。
E: Uh... That's it. Their memories are too faint for me to see anything. I could only vaguely make out these words.

C: 啊，等等……
E: Ah, wait...!

C: …黑潮威胁果真加剧了，只没想到竟是树庭首当其冲。
E: ...The black tide is posing an even greater risk to us now. I did not expect the Grove to be the first to be impacted, though.

C: 吾师，只看这名伤患的状况，你我应做好最坏的打算……
E: That being said, based on the condition of this patient, Tribbie, we should prepare for the worst.

C: 炎枪，冲锋——！
E: Flaming lance, chaaaarge!

C: 他说他叫阿那克萨戈拉斯。
E: He said his name is Anaxagoras.

C: 不好…这可算两个问题喏。
E: That's no good... You asked two questions.

C: 吾需要帮助——可就像诸位对吾有所提防一样，吾也须确保，汝等并非妄图染指火种的恶徒，且有能耐对付近在眼前的威胁。
E: I needed your help, and just like how you were wary of me, I had to ensure that you were not villains who were trying to get their hands on the Coreflame. I also had to ascertain that you were capable of dealing with the threat at hand.

C: 燃烧的仙境、破碎的太阳，还有……
E: The burning paradise, the shattered sun, and...

C: 「神明眷顾沃土，遍地欣欣如火……」
E: "Happiness abounded in this lush land by gods chosen..."

C: 前方是…「垂泪净身室」？
E: Is that the... "Chamber of Purifying Tears"?

C: 那刻夏老师？不…是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}？
E: Professor Anaxa? No... It's {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}?

C: 让我成为他的递补，你们原本就是这么打算的。
E: ...And she expected me to take his place. That was the plan all along, wasn't it?

C: 喔，王子来了！ / 今天真走运！ / 我想听你讲战场上的故事！
E: Oh, the prince has arrived! / What a lucky day! / I want to hear your tales from the battlefield!

C: 这次，呃…这次就先放你过去，下、下不为例！
E: I—I'll allow you to pass this time... but just this once!

C: 「天谴之锋」在上，并由元老院诸将士共作见证：我，歌耳戈，依悬锋法典发起「挑战王权」之动议——
E: With the Blade of Fury above us and the Council bearing witness, I, Gorgo, hereby move to challenge the crown in accordance with the laws of Kremnos!

C: 悬锋人不读这种软弱的文字，但{RUBY_B#歌耳巴尼帕耳大图书馆}我的图书馆{RUBY_E#}里不乏这类藏书——
E: Kremnoans steer clear of such weak literature, but {RUBY_B#Garbaniphoro Grand Library}my library{RUBY_E#} doesn't lack collections of this kind —

C: 或许我们都需要释放压力。来吧，迈德漠斯，延续你我之前的竞赛……
E: Maybe we both need to relieve some stress. Come, Mydeimos! Let's recommence our previous competition...

C: 还真是…丑态百出啊。
E: ...What a spectacle of folly.

C: 你若真能带领族人打破这染血的命运，就再次证明给我看吧，迈德漠斯。
E: If you're truly capable of leading our people beyond this bloodstained fate, then prove it to me once more, Mydeimos.

C: …过去的千年，悬锋人活在血腥的轮回里。复仇、征战、昌盛、衰败…那段历史中，多少无辜者的血汇入冥河，多少无谓的牺牲可以被避免？
E: ...The Kremnoans have been trapped in a cycle of bloodshed for the past one thousand years: They seek vengeance, start wars, become prosperous, then decline... How much innocent blood flowed into the River of Souls in all of those years? How many needless sacrifices could we have avoided?

C: 妈妈，现实里有这么可怕的东西吗？
E: Momma, does something that scary exist in real life?

C: 嗯…很遗憾，它确实存在于翁法罗斯，只是离我们的圣殿还很遥远。
E: Yes... Unfortunately, it does exist in Amphoreus, but it's very far away from our temple.

C: 「汇作一条滚烫的河，流遍世间英雄末裔。」
E: "Converge into a boiling river that flows to the heroic heirs of this world."

C: （这是我…童年的事吗？想不起来了……）
E: (Is this... from my childhood? I don't remember...)

C: 但如果我会被一则凭空出现的谵语吓破了胆，当初就不会受到你的注视，加入逐火的旅路。
E: If I were to be terrified by drivel with no basis, I would not have attracted your gaze and joined the Flame-Chase Journey in the first place.

C: 我将返回悬锋城对抗黑潮，恐怕不会再回到奥赫玛了。
E: I'm heading back to Castrum Kremnos to fight against the black tide. In all likelihood, I will never again return to Okhema.

C: 出发前，还有些人要见。
E: There are some people to meet with before I leave.

C: 因为*我们*觉得，为了把{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神谕传递出去，肯定要走很远很远的路，所以想提前了解各地的风土人情。
E: Because we believed that we would need to travel great distances to convey {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s prophecy to everyone, and should learn about the terrains and customs of various places beforehand.

C: 呵呵……
E: Hehe...

C: 母亲啊……
E: Mother...

C: 难道，泰坦…站在她那边…？
E: Could the Titan... actually be on her side...?

C: 也正因此，才会有指点迷津的圣女为众人指引明天所在——雅努萨波利斯的预言才会以「门径」的形式呈现。
E: And that is why a Holy Maiden exists to lead the world toward tomorrow, and why Janusopolis' prophecy unfolds as passages.

C: 但我猜，我们被盯上应该已经有一阵了…只是特意等到你我分开才开始行动。
E: But I suspect we've been on their radar for a while... and they only made their move when you and I got separated.

C: 他们的提问事无巨细：从我们来到奥赫玛的过程，到和每位黄金裔的私交，连我们在市集的经历都要剖根问底。
E: Their questions were quite specific, from how we arrived in Okhema to our relationships with each Chrysos Heir. They even asked about what we did in the market.

C: 汝记得便好，正所谓「等价交换」嘛。
E: It's good that you remember. Thus, "equivalent exchange" — it's only fair.

C: 与此同时 云石天宫的另一边
E: At the same time, on the other side of Marmoreal Palace

C: 不如按照先前分工，我和风堇留下来接应援兵。你带剩下的人返回圣城，告诉阿格莱雅你们的计划吧。
E: Why don't we split up as previously discussed? Hyacine and I will stay to regroup with the reinforcements. You go back to the holy city with everyone else and tell Aglaea about your plan.

C: 有趣？位高权重的人生命每一分钟都价值连城，谁会愿意放下身段陪他消遣这样的把戏？如果事后证明所谓的圣杯只是纯粹的商业噱头，事情恐怕会变得更有趣喽。
E: Fascinating? People with real power wouldn't waste a second of their time on something like this. Who would lower themselves just to entertain him? And if this so-called Holy Grail turns out to be nothing but a marketing gimmick, things are gonna get really interesting.

C: ——是我们。这*公司粗口*叫「隐忧」吗？我还不知道这里每个人都跟我有仇？
E: It's us. You call that a *IPC profanity* "complication"? Like I didn't already know everyone here has a bone to pick with me?

C: 的确一无所知。
E: Not a thing.

C: {NICKNAME}…你们，点了这么多吗？
E: {NICKNAME}... you two ordered all of this?

C: 但，我明白我错了。能将「音符小姐」召唤现界，意味着圣杯确实拥有某种能力——而将自己朦胧未明的愿望托付给不可知的存在，就是一切危险的开始。
E: But now, I realize I was wrong. Summoning Miss Note to the present world showed me that the Holy Grail does possess some sort of power — and entrusting my vague, unclear wish to an unknown entity would lead us down a very dangerous path.

C: 所以，你要留下来吗？新来的。
E: So, newcomer, are you staying?

C: 我，我无话可说…
E: I... I don't know what to say...

C: 平凡的人生……等离开了再后悔，就来不及了。
E: There's no turning back once you leave your ordinary life behind.

C: 但他为了拯救什么而举起剑的模样，却在不列颠的至黑之夜里留下了一颗星星。
E: But the way he raised his sword to bring deliverance left a shining star in Britain's darkest nights.

C: 你似乎想起了什么，在空间站外划过的引擎火花，列车跃迁开始前的轻微失重…等等，这些全都是不存在的空想，科员，你应该把精力放到现在的工作上。
E: Something stirs in your memory, sparks from an engine streaking past the space station, the faint weightlessness before the Express conducts a warp jump... Wait, no. None of that is real. Researcher, you should be focusing on your task at hand.

C: 轻松完成工作。
E: Breeze through the work.

C: 不要再前进了，无名客的未来只有一片虚无和绝望。
E: Stop. The future of a Nameless is nothing but emptiness and despair.

C: 答案伤人啊。在他们眼里，我不过是一只，趴在匹诺康尼的橡树顶端——
E: The answer really hurts. To them, I'm nothing but a parasite, sucking out the sap of Penacony's oak from the top —

C: 抱歉，这可是默片，在我的面前，只有门下面一串挂着「砂金」名字的字幕。想要证明自己，除非自曝十件只有我御主知道的糗事。
E: Sorry, this is a silent film. All I see is a line of subtitles under the door, with the name "Aventurine" slapped on it. If you want to prove you're really my Master, you'll have to spill ten humiliating secrets that only my real Master would know.

C: 藏头露尾的Assassin，一旦让我走到你的面前，你想要发出多大的尖叫，让谁来救你都可以。
E: Skulking Assassin, once I reach you, scream all you want, call for anyone to save you.

C: …但陷阱中的尖刺要是伤不了猎物，那倒霉的就该是猎手了。
E: ...But if the trap can't hurt the prey, then it's the hunter who'll be in trouble.

C: *鼓掌*看来大家已经有了明确的目标了。
E: *clap hands* Sounds like everyone's got their sights set.

C: 你这贱人全程都躲在后面，我的眼睫毛出的力都比你多。
E: Coward! You've been hiding at the back all this time. Even my eyelashes did more work than you.

C: 你发出一声恐惧的*哼*。
E: You let out a terrified *hmph*.

C: 我的弦音远不如知更鸟小姐那样强大，但驱散这点不协和音，还是能做到的。御主，接下来请安静些，不要扰乱了我的旋律。
E: My resonance isn't nearly as powerful as Miss Robin's, but it's enough to clear this minor dissonance. Master, please stay quiet and don't disturb my melody.

C: 御主，哪怕是开玩笑，也请不要说出这种有悖骑士精神的话。
E: Master, even as a joke, please don't say things that dishonor the knight's code.

C: 可他反倒故意找来一群不受控的危险人物，打上一场根本不可能打起来的圣杯战争。
