E: But he deliberately gathered a group of uncontrollable individuals to participate in a Holy Grail War that might never even happen.

C: 真相恐怕早就被流言掩埋了。唯一能确定的，就是有人担了责任。
E: The truth has probably been long buried under all the hearsay. All I can say for sure is that someone's taken the rap for it.

C: 「行错路的，便引他们回到正途」——看来这就是猎犬口中的「纠正」了，和我当年的做法如出一辙。
E: "Guide those who have lost their way back onto the right path." Looks like this is an example of the "corrective measures" that the Bloodhound mentioned. It's exactly what I would've done back then.

C: 看来也有些规则并未扭曲，这是我当时的原话。
E: Looks like some rules weren't distorted. That's a word-for-word account of what I said back then.

C: 哦，有反应了。
E: Oh, something's happening.

C: 你放入了更多好看的垃圾，垃圾桶很高兴，向你默默致意，离开前，你莫名感到很有尊严。
E: You insert more Pleasant-Looking Trash. The trashcan is overjoyed and silently pays its respects to you. Before you leave, you suddenly feel a sense of dignity.

C: 合着是这种「不要笑挑战」啊。
E: Oh, so that sort of try-not-to-laugh challenge.

C: 梦境是忆质的世界，这种状况多半是她的大脑比较敏感，受到刺激后零散的记忆片段脱离，变成了个体。
E: The Dreamscape is a memoria world. It is likely the candy triggered her hypersensitive mind, causing scattered memory fragments to dissociate and become entities themselves.

C: 呃…还在琢磨。我太抢手了，这种事得慢慢考虑。
E: Uhh... I'm still deliberating. I—I'm so highly sought after that it's only right I give it careful consideration.

C: 但既然是赠礼，总要讲究个细水长流，案上粲花连日不重，不是更能给人添上好兴致？
E: But then again, gifts should be lasting. What about a delightful new bouquet of flowers on the table each day? Wouldn't they do a better job at brightening up someone's day?

C: 这也是停云小姐的一个侧面。
E: So this is also a side of Miss Tingyun.

C: 「不用抗争，去接纳它，试着和它共处，就像抚摸自己的疤痕。」
E: "Don't fight it, embrace it. Try to coexist with it. Think of it as feeling your own scars."

C: 符玄大人还有这种雅兴？看来小女子睡去的这段时日，仙舟真是变了。
E: Lady Fu Xuan has such refined taste? The Xianzhou really has changed a lot in the time I've been asleep.

C: 细致入微，妙趣横生，想来是件周到又新奇的礼物，就依您的主意。
E: A meticulously thought out and interesting suggestion. It'll make for a novel gift. Let's go with that.

C: 你认真的？
E: Seriously?

C: 这…算是恭维？怕是有些担待不起啊。
E: Is that... a compliment? I'm not sure if I'm deserving of that title.

C: 各位，别来无恙。
E: Long time no see, everyone.

C: 这我从不怀疑，只是…既无旁人，停云便多问一句。
E: I have no doubt. But... since we're alone here, may I ask you one more thing?

C: 如此这般，停云实在不该重返罗浮，为局势平添混乱。不妨顺水推舟，物尽其用？
E: If that's the case, it's all the more reason for me not to return to the Luofu and complicate things. I might as well take advantage of this situation.

C: 前路凶险，你若打定主意要走，我自然没道理阻止。但…许是我私心过甚吧，我仍希望能清楚地知道，你的选择是否出于本心？
E: The road ahead is perilous. If you decide to take it, I won't stop you. Maybe I'm being selfish, but I still want to know — are you choosing this because it's what you really want?

C: 她这是…在做什么？
E: What is she... doing?

C: 知更鸟女士才是，这阵子一定很忙吧，怎么会来筑梦边境呢？
E: You're too kind, Miss Robin. You must be very busy. What brings you here to Dream's Edge?

C: 我从不这么认为，「钟表匠」也做出了相同的选择。
E: That's not what I think at all. Besides, the Watchmaker also made a similar choice.

C: 而另一块，我希望它能象征羽翼。
E: As for the other piece, I hope it will symbolize wings.

C: 但事到如今，谁又能保证绝不会出现变数呢？也许内心深处，我也期待着这种可能吧。
E: But who's to say there won't be any changes? Maybe deep down, I'm also anticipating this possibility.

C: 也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
E: Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.

C: 是翁法罗斯。
E: We're going to Amphoreus.

C: 联系他，和他讲我砸重金只为往机器头脑袋里塞一句话，结果把一切都搞砸了？
E: Contact him and expose how I shelled out a bomb to send a message to Droidhead, only to screw up everything else?

C: 让我看看，这个人偶…应该是#2757。
E: Let me take a look. This puppet... should be #2757.

C: 「记忆」的寄生虫，你该不会真的以为，这套拙劣的伪装能骗过天才的眼睛吧？
E: Hmph, parasite of the Remembrance. Do you truly think your atrocious disguise can outwit the keen sight of a genius like myself?

C: 噢，我有主意了！忆庭的人都很喜欢镜子，对吧？那我干脆就成人之美，让你多跟镜子做做伴吧？
E: Ooh, I know! You Garden folk have a fondness for mirrors, huh... How about letting you enjoy some quality time with your favorite object — a mirror?

C: 第三面镜，你能不能收一收那让人起鸡皮疙瘩的笑声？
E: Third Mirror! Stop that nightmarish cackle. It's giving me goosebumps.

C: 您想到什么了吗？
E: Oh? Something occured to you?

C: …对不住了，丹恒。
E: ...Sorry, Dan Heng.

C: {NICKNAME}，警惕！
E: Watch out, {NICKNAME}!

C: 你看见大地兽四肢突出的白色甲壳，打算把它当作脚蹬……
E: You see all the white shells jutting out from the dromas' limbs and plan to use them as footholds...

C: 你们在做什么？这里不安全，快去避难吧。
E: What are you doing? It's not safe here. Seek shelter, quickly!

C: 放心吧！有我们在呢，只要用「百界门」，啪的一下就能把大伙儿送去翁法罗斯最安全的地方——
E: Don't worry! With us here, we can just use the Century Gate to whoosh the people to the safest place in Amphoreus—

C: 你叫这名，不也挺奇怪？
E: Isn't that name... also strange?

C: 如你所愿。
E: As you wish.

C: 她只是在用比喻……
E: She was just speaking metaphorically...

C: 自此向上是议院赠予黄金裔的浴池。原本除了我的同袍，他人严禁踏足。
E: The way up from here leads to a bath that the Council granted exclusively to the Chrysos Heirs. The bath is strictly off limits to anyone other than the Heirs.

C: 因为奥赫玛的时间已经不多，我不想给予人们虚假的希望…世人曾被它深深伤害。
E: Okhema is approaching its end. I do not wish to give my people false hope... Not when we've been badly scarred by it before.

C: 哈哈……
E: Haha...

C: 你不知道它是如何嚼碎并消化这些土块的——但在它们眼里，这些硬邦邦的红土一定和刚刚煎好的、滋滋冒油的肉排一样鲜美。
E: You don't know how it chews and digests these clumps of clay — but to them, these hard red clays must be as delicious as a freshly sizzling steak.

C: 两位，请站好位置。
E: Alright, get into position.

C: 快！在事态发酵前，必须找到本人。
E: Quick! We have to find Damionis before things get worse.

C: 亵渎？你们大错特错！睿智的{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}会为我感到骄傲的，看着吧！
E: Defile the gods? No, you guys are completely wrong! The wise {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} will be proud of me. Just watch!

C: 不必再多费口舌了——{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}，接下我的怒火吧！
E: Save your words. {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}, feel my wrath!

C: 作为最初的尝试，我来带领你们下潜吧。
E: For your first time, I shall personally guide you into the depths.

C: 那便开始吧…第一问。
E: Well then, let us begin. Question One.

C: 金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
E: The golden thread trembles violently.

C: 当然了，朋友。
E: You bet you are.

C: 不——经历了这一遭，你凭什么觉得我们还会帮助这里？
E: Hold on, you seriously still expect us to help you after what we just went through?

C: 记得你在追逐「纷争」泰坦…
E: You mentioned pursuing the Strife Titan...

C: ……青铜为尔华盖，黄铜为余悲响……
E: ...Bronze shields you, and brass echoes my sorrow...

C: 真没想到，这一天过得这么戏剧性。
E: Well, that was a lot of drama for one day.

C: 但我感觉她这一通发难有些突然，背后可能另有原因。
E: Her verbal attack on us seemed quite sudden. There might be a reason behind it.

C: 还有…阿雅，其实我想问的是，刚才在涡心，你不会真想把丹恒和{NICKNAME}给……
E: By the way... Agy, I was actually wondering, when you were in the Vortex earlier with Dan Heng and {NICKNAME}, were you actually going to...

C: 可这么一来，想让他们再信任你就难上加难了……
E: That's going to make it a lot tougher for you to gain their trust...

C: 别吵吵，让我好好睡觉！
E: Oh, shut it! Someone's trying to sleep here!

C: …睡觉？好？不好？你…我…我是谁？
E: ...Sleep? Here? There? You... I... Who am I?

C: 缇安捎回了信息：多年以来，我们首次驱散了包围悬锋城的迷雾，确定了它的位置。
E: Trianne has returned with news: For the first time in many years, we have dispersed the fog around Castrum Kremnos and verified its location.

C: 迈德漠斯
E: Mydeimos

C: 悬锋城自古便是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，是信众围绕泰坦建立的军事要塞，也是一座巨大的移动堡垒。
E: Castrum Kremnos has been {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s territory since ancient times. It's a massive moving fortress that surrounds the Titan, built by their followers.

C: 也对。「宁战死，毋荣归」——悬锋人都是直性子，一生都在奔赴战场，难怪{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}最爱作弄你们。
E: True. Valorous Death Before Glorious Return. The Kremnoan people have always been straightforward. They spend their whole lives running to the battlefield. No wonder {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} loves teasing you.

C: 哈哈，完全被看扁了啊。但我可不会谦让——{NICKNAME}，我们出发吧！
E: Haha! He already thinks he's won, but I won't decline the offer either. Let's get going, {NICKNAME}!

C: …是源自「纷争」的轰鸣。
E: ...and the rumble of Strife.

C: 三十。
E: Thirty.

C: 我跳——
E: Let me jump across—

C: 救世主，给你个当英雄的机会。
E: Deliverer, here is your moment.

C: 无论什么障碍，我们都必须翻越。
E: We'll overcome any obstacle, no matter what they throw at us.

C: 已经陪你玩得够久了——该认输了，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}女士！
E: We've played along with you for long enough. It's time you admitted defeat, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}!

C: 那是…我？
E: Is that... me?

C: 线上游戏不能暂停，失陪啦。
E: Anyway, online games cannot be paused. So, if you don't mind.

C: 我们好像一起旅行过…
E: We seem to have traveled together before...

C: 我们是…同伴。
E: We are... companions.

C: 怪我作弊？哼，有种来封我的号啊！
E: Blaming me for cheating? Hmph, ban my account if you dare!

C: 我能理解，{NICKNAME}阁下…但眼下我们还要奔赴另一片战场。
E: I understand how you feel, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. But right now, we must head to another battlefield.

C: 呵…我衷心希望，下次召开元老议会时，在圆环中央接受审判的不会是你。
E: Heh... I genuinely hope that at the next Council meeting, you won't be the one standing in the middle, facing the judgment.

C: （居然在如此隐蔽的角落……）
E: (It's hidden in such an unassuming corner...)

C: 您看，原本藏在里面的疯子石头怪，咱可是已经靠着灵巧的手艺给它大卸八块了…桀桀桀！
E: See? We turned this crazy stone monster inside into pieces with our spectacular skills, teehee!

C: …罢了。若你下次遇见赛飞儿，替我转告她：<color=#dbc291ff>身为半神，我们永远不可能逃避职责。</color>
E: ...Forget it. If you see her, let her know this: <color=#dbc291ff>As demigods, we can't avoid our duties forever.</color>

C: 城中的威胁已经排除了，我已将污秽逐一清理。
E: The dangers lurking within Okhema have been eradicated. I've also cleansed the city of filth.

C: …她是专职「清洗」黄金裔的刺客。我明白。
E: ...An assassin known for purging the Chrysos Heirs. I am aware.

C: 不使用下你的能力吗？
E: It's about time you used your powers.

C: 我要报名！
E: Sign me up!

C: …是在说万敌吗？
E: ...Is that Mydei?

C: 「封存神明的灵魂……」
E: Sealing a Titan's soul...

C: 身躯…不灭……
E: Indestructible... body...

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的火种……
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame...

C: 你所说种种，也许正是迈德漠斯不愿接过这颗火种的理由。
E: The qualities you've mentioned are very likely the reasons Mydeimos refused this Coreflame.

C: …我倒是有些古早小游戏，但你估计不感兴趣。
E: ...I do have some old-timey games with me, but I doubt you'd be interested.

C: 但是人家有种预感！——只要继续收集散落在翁法罗斯的记忆，就会有非常非常好的事发生。
E: I have a gut feeling, though! As long as we continue to collect the fragments of memories scattered across Amphoreus, we'll be rewarded with something really, really good.

C: 在公正天秤的神殿里——{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}用它的谜题刁难我们的时候——那时，你为什么要阻止我，遐蝶小姐？
E: Back in the temple with the Scales of Justice, when {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} was trying to deter us... Why did you stop me, Miss Castorice?

C: 每时每刻，每分每秒。
E: Every waking moment.

C: 我以前用过这招，在缇宝老师的历史课考试之前——堆成小山的石板和文献，谁能复习得过来？还不如早早认命，多珍惜一下练剑跟玩耍的时间。
E: I did that before sitting for Tribbie's history exam — who in the world could hope to go over those piles of documents and slates? I decided I was better off resigning myself to fate. That way I'd get more time to play and practice with my sword.

C: 与*我们*一起——
E: Recite with us:

C: 但接受试炼的风险，也请你仔细掂量：成为半神意味着你将舍弃人的身份，接过欧洛尼斯的神权，只身背负翁法罗斯的「岁月」。
E: However, I urge you to carefully consider the risks of accepting the trial: Becoming a demigod means forsaking your humanity. You will inherit Oronyx's divinity and bear the Time of Amphoreus, all on your own.

C: 主人离世后，私人物品本该被清理。但缇安大人知道我喜欢读书，就送给了我。
E: Although personal properties should be cleared out once their owner has passed on, Lady Trianne gave this book to me since she knew how much I like to read.

C: 最后一次检查时，你依旧没有恢复呼吸。可当我醒来后…却看见你已经生龙活虎了。我也就没再提起这事。
E: The last time I checked, you still weren't breathing. But when I regained consciousness... I saw that you were alive and full of energy, so I never brought this up again.

C: 一丝凉意穿透了你的肌肤，紧接着渗入了你的经脉。砰…砰…心脏的律动也随之放慢……
E: A chill seeps through your skin, spreading into your veins. Thump... thump... your heartbeat begins to slow.

C: 谢谢你愿意帮忙。
E: Thank you for your help.

C: 喂！请问——这是什么地方，位于翁法罗斯何处？
E: Hey! Excuse me — what is this place? Where in Amphoreus are we?

C: 哼，莫非…这里是冥界？
E: Hmm, could this... possibly be the nether realm?

C: 喔，醒了。欢迎回到凡间。
E: Oh, you have awoken. Welcome back to the mortal realm.

C: 吾再多嘴问一句：汝当真要背叛阿格莱雅的旨意不成？
E: Let me ask you one more question. Are you really planning to betray Aglaea's will?

C: 不必再下马作威了，来古士阁下。带路吧。
E: Let's forego the formality of asserting authority, Lord Lygus. Lead the way.

C: 呵…诸位人子的创造可真是壮观哪。
E: Heh... The children of humanity have indeed created a spectacle.

C: 若要厘清思绪，请自便。不过，切勿离开太远，以免…节外生枝。
E: If you need to organize your thoughts, please go ahead. But please don't go too far away, lest... complications arise.

C: 呵，阁下是觉得，这场小小的背叛足够让她无计可施么？
E: Heh, surely you don't believe that such a tiny betrayal will be enough to push her to her wits' end?

C: 你就那么好奇我想干什么？
E: Dying to know what I'm after, huh?

C: 呵…会期待汝说些中听的话，是吾自作聪明了。
E: Hmph... I must be getting ahead of myself to be expecting to hear something nice from you.

C: 嗯？要吾看什么？
E: Hm? What should I be looking at?

C: 人家从小蝶那里借了好多书，想试试能不能解决你的问题。现在还差……
E: I borrowed a mountain of books from Cas to see if I could find a way to solve your problem. Let's see... I still have...

C: 别担心，我们找到办法了。
E: It's okay, Mem. We've found a way.

C: 这是…比喻吗？
E: Is that a figure of speech...?

C: 是啊……
E: Yes...

C: 但你应当敬重赴死之人。同样地，身为予人以光荣和解脱的圣女，你应当尊敬自己。
E: But you must respect those walking towards death, just like how you should respect yourself as the Holy Maiden granting humans glory and liberation.

C: 它的剑身上有三道气孔。如果这柄剑能不偏不倚，迅速落下，三处气孔便不会发出任何声音，受刑者也能在一瞬之间离开人世……
E: The sword has three air holes along its body. If the sword is swung down swiftly and accurately, the holes would make no sound, and the executed would also depart this world quickly and painlessly...

C: …为何，会在我的梦中萦绕不去？
E: ...And why do they haunt my dreams?

C: …为了阁下，也为了我自己。
E: ...for your sake, and for my own.

C: 再说一遍，你管我叫什么？
E: What did you just call me!?

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 你这两边都不耽误啊。
E: Look at you! Having your finger in both pies.

C: 知道么，阿格莱雅？或许是神用金线掐住了你的喉咙，我从你的请求中听不出半点诚意。
E: You know, maybe the gods got your tongue with their golden threads, Aglaea. I'm not hearing any sincerity in your words.

C: 送你们过去？可以，得加钱。
E: And now I'm supposed to escort you to Styxia? Sure. Pay up.

C: 想必是这样了。只不过，眼下的线索仅有这座城邦的名字，还有巨龙童话……
E: I guess that's the only way. The only leads we have now are the name of this city and the fairy tale about the dragon...

C: 杀人凶手
E: You murderer!

C: 万敌…阁下？
E: Lord Mydei...?

C: 咦…她就这么消失啦？
E: Huh? She disappeared just like that?

C: 几位果然听说了，当然…「死亡」只是其中一种可能性，暂时还没有定论。
E: It seems that you have indeed heard about this. Well... "Death" is just one of the possibilities. It's too early to come to a definitive conclusion.

C: 没错…我们之间的关系始终若即若离。但阿格莱雅大人没有因此对我设防…反而对我百般信任。
E: Indeed. While my relationship with the Council has always been quite ambiguous, Lady Aglaea has never taken any precautions against me. Instead... She's shown me nothing but complete trust.

C: 等等，几位似乎和他不同…你们是生者？你们怎可能活着在此处行走？
E: Wait a minute. You seem to be quite different from him... Are you actually alive? How can you walk around here while alive?

C: 那最后一样祭品——便是与死亡共生的少女！
E: That final ingredient... The final sacrifice... Is none other than the girl who lives out her days with death!

C: 这还是…第一次在冥河逆流而上时，遇见亡故的亲友啊。
E: This is... the first time I've encountered a deceased friend while going upstream in the River of Souls.

C: 这便是…我们的「逐火之旅」……
E: This is... our "Flame-Chase Journey"...

C: 钥匙？小小蝶…你说话怎么变得难懂起来啦？
E: Key? Little Cas, why are you talking in riddles all of a sudden?

C: 我…还没找到方法。也许不可能找得到……
E: I... haven't found it yet. Perhaps I never will...

C: 在亡魂们的口中，我确实与那巨龙相伴而生……
E: According to those departed spirits, I was indeed born as the dragon's twin...

C: 恐怕…她也和其他亡魂一样，仅仅是受困于此。只不过，她的片刻，我原本在场。
E: I'm afraid she is just another spirit trapped here, like the rest of them. The only difference is that I was there when she died.

C: …命运果然很荒诞。
E: ...Fate is absurd indeed.

C: 还有，你我二人「存在」的意义。
E: I wouldn't have understood the meaning of our "existence."

C: 不。无人能独力担起生死的天平，哪怕是神明。
E: No. No single being can bear the scales of life and death on their own, not even a god.

C: {NICKNAME}，别害怕，和我一起…睁大眼睛！
E: Don't be afraid, {NICKNAME}. Let's open our eyes wide... together!

C: 我记得这家伙，给阿格莱雅提鞋的穷小子！
E: I remember him — he's the penniless lad working for Aglaea!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>承载着奥赫玛悠久历史和威严的元老院，我们曾引以为豪的公民大会——如今已经遍地虫豸！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It is because the Council of Elders, which bears Okhema's history and honor, along with this citizens' assembly we once took so much pride in, are now infested with vermin!</color>

C: 不…来古士，等等…！
E: No! Lygus, you can't...!

C: 那，你不回去了么…
E: So you're not going back...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>浮黎…祂的目光，刚刚掠过了翁法罗斯。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It's Fuli... THEIR gaze has just swept across Amphoreus.</color>

C: 而现在——请回吧，女士。很遗憾，翁法罗斯不是您应当染指的世界。无论您建立过多少丰功伟绩，此地都不会轻易敞开大门。
E: Now, please kindly turn back. Amphoreus is not a world that you should be involved with. Regardless of what kind of magnificent achievements you have accomplished, this place will not open its doors so easily.

C: 正如圣城的天空，也是由{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的黎明机器点亮的。
E: Much like how the sky above the holy city is also illuminated by {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Dawn Device.

C: 哦？既然汝意图拥有匹敌泰坦的力量，那末依神谕所示，挑战试炼便是。
E: Oh? If power that rivals the Titans' is what you crave, why not conform to the prophecy and brave the trial?

C: 而且，不仅如此…记得吗，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}？我还见到你也参与了那场对谈。
E: That's not all... Remember how I said you were a part of that conversation too, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}?

C: 看来你连烙印在灵魂中的记忆都忘却了啊。
E: It seems you've lost even the memories seared into your soul.

C: 生者绝无可能步入这片天地，那他们究竟是谁？尤其是方才提到的卡吕普索，缘何长着一副和你瑟希斯相同的面孔，可后者却对所有人毫无印象？
E: The living cannot step foot into that world, so who could they be? Think about Calypso. Why does she share your likeness, yet you have no idea who she is?

C: 感谢你的教诲，阿格莱雅。愿我们能不辱使命。
E: I appreciate what you've taught me, Aglaea. I hope we'll live up to your expectations and win this debate.

C: 灾厄三泰坦诞生，则黄金世不复。灾厄三泰坦消殒，则黄金世再临。
E: Let the Three Titans of Calamity be born and Era Chrysea is nevermore, but bring demise to those Titans and Era Chrysea will descend upon us again.

C: ——哀地里亚的「死亡女神」遐蝶，必将在我的指引下找到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}！
E: ...For Castorice, Aidonia's "Goddess of Death," will surely find {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} under my guidance!

C: 请你为我们一一道来吧。
E: In that case, please tell us as much as you can.

C: 稍等一下，我还没准备好。
E: Hold on. I'm not ready.

C: 荒唐啊！黄金裔的地位是元老院给的，他们竟然不珍惜。
E: Preposterous! The Chrysos Heirs only have their standing because of the Council of Elders. How dare they trample over it!

C: 我想，大抵是<color=#dbc291ff>「等价交换」</color>罢？
E: I guess it might be the concept of <color=#dbc291ff>"equivalent exchange"</color>?

C: 最后，让我讲个自己的故事吧，小姑娘。
E: Finally, let me recount to you a story of mine, young lady.

C: 好了，我亲爱的玻吕茜亚……
E: Alright, my dear Polyxia...

C: 你是晖之民，对么…？
E: You're one of the Sunfolk, aren't you?

C: 我…我曾以为……
E: I... I once thought...

C: 聆听风堇的总结。
E: Listen to Hyacine's summary.

C: 和彼时的塞涅俄丝一样，你也必须踏出这一步。
E: Just as Seliose once did, you must take this step too.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「你们终将理解何为真正的团结。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You will finally understand what true unity means."</color>

C: 自此，白厄，你将踏上永不复还的征途。
E: From here on, Phainon, you shall embark on a journey with no return.

C: 准备好斩断闪电了吗？
E: Are you ready to sever the lightning?

C: 破烂、还是破烂…这是啥？不管了，总之先收着……
E: Trash, just trash... What is this? Never mind. I'll take it anyway...

C: 为了这小玩意，我可是在祭司院蛰伏了大半年啊！每天听那群死板的祭司学徒念经，猫脑都快烧坏了……
E: I've been lurking in the Priestly Court for over half a year just for this little trinket! Day after day, listening to those stiff priest apprentices drone on with their prayers. I thought I was going to lose my mind...

C: 阿提卡斯，你…比我勇敢百倍。你能完成…我未曾做到之事吗？
E: Atticus, you... are a hundred times more courageous than I am. Can you accomplish... what I could not?

C: 所以，对于自己能否胜任这项使命…我的内心一直很忐忑呀。
E: So I've always carried a lingering doubt about my ability to fulfill this role.

C: 小风堇，他们是……
E: Cinny, are they...

C: 真是一段好长的路啊…
E: What a long journey it's been...

C: ——那就开始吧。无数与冒险有关的词汇涌入你的心窍，你只需抓住其中一个作为创作的锚点……
E: Then let it begin. Countless words of adventure surge through your mind — you need only to grasp just one to anchor your creation...

C: 但本姑娘不信这个，只要不断敛取宝藏，就不至于落得身无分文的下场；只要不因为自己的欲望害得其他人遭殃，就算不上「贪婪」——对吧？简简单单。
E: But I don't believe in that. As long as I keep collecting treasures, then I won't need to care about petty change. And as long as I don't hurt other people when I get what I want, I won't be "walking with greed" — right? Isn't that simple?

C: 真的吗？但……
E: Really? But...

C: （嗯…不知道白厄和迷迷在看什么呢？）
E: (Hmm... I wonder what Phainon and Mem are reading?)

C: 你还有这爱好呢？
E: Didn't know you were into this.

C: 能劳烦你把这段野史作者的姓名透露给我么，白厄阁下？我可不希望奥赫玛纯真的孩子们，被这家伙的春秋笔法荼毒啊。
E: Could you disclose the name of the author behind this popular legend, Lord Phainon? I'd hate for the innocent children of Okhema to be tainted by such slanted narratives.

C: 这双金靴，算得上「金织」的至宝之一。尽管价值比不上最名贵的华服，却蕴含着神奇的力量。
E: These golden boots are the Goldweaver's greatest treasures. Though not as valuable as the most precious gowns, they hold a magical power.

C: 喂，巴特鲁斯——还活着吗？活着就吱个声。
E: Hey, Bartholos, are you still alive? Give us a squeak if you are.

C: 嗅…嗅嗅……
E: Sniff... sniff...

C: 你…还真是机警得可怕呀，桀桀桀……
E: You... have a terrifyingly sharp mind, hehe...

C: 是那些家伙干的么？
E: Was it those guys' doing?

C: 和众人告别…你已计划周全？
E: How to say goodbye to everyone... have you already planned?

C: 嗯，好。回头见，大家。
E: Okay. See you later, everyone.

C: 那边的卷轴，是阿雅托付给*我们*的一则留言。她嘱咐*我们*在特别的时候将它转交给你。
E: The scroll over there was entrusted to us by Agy. She instructed us to hand it over to you when the time was right.

C: 谢谢你，哈托努斯——我会用这把长剑守护翁法罗斯的生灵。
E: Thank you, Chartonus. I will use this sword to protect the beings of Amphoreus.

C: …你还真是自信呀？
E: ...You think highly of yourself, don't you?

C: …你打算就一直在那儿站着？恕我直言，鬼鬼祟祟的风格可不适合你——救世小子。
E: ...Are you really planning to just stand there forever? Honestly, sneaking around doesn't suit you, Deliverer.

C: 再过几日，我们就要启程征讨{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}了。黄金裔远离圣城的这段时间，是他们下手的最佳时机……
E: We're setting out to campaign against {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} in a few days. With the Chrysos Heirs gone, it'll be their best chance to strike...

C: 丹恒，他先我们一步回来了。
E: Dan Heng came back before us.

C: 请别哭泣，吾师……
E: Please don't cry on my account, teacher...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>

C: 祖母——是我，您的雅辛忒丝。
E: Grandmother, it's me, your Hyacinthia.

C: 你想做什么…？！
E: What are you trying to do?

C: 这么做，不会对奥赫玛产生影响么？
E: Wouldn't this affect Okhema?

C: 是敌人吗？
E: Is that an enemy?

C: 不能默认它会对我们友好。保持警惕，跟上去吧。
E: We can't assume it's friendly. Keep your guard up and follow it.

C: 你们把自己认作神选之人、被艾格勒眷顾的强者，但却不敢对这世上真正的威胁宣战，只敢举剑挥向弱小的同胞。
E: You declare yourselves the chosen ones, champions favored by Aquila, yet you dare not even declare war upon the true threat of this world. Instead, you raise your swords and rattle them at your weaker brethren.

C: 啊，小伊卡——你怎么自顾自跑出来了？
E: Ah, Little Ica — why did you run out on your own?

C: 露奈比斯…阁下？
E: Lady... Lunabis?

C: 只能寄希望于她能庇佑更多人的生命……
E: All we can do is hope she can protect as many lives as possible...

C: 出发讨伐艾格勒以前，我拜托赛飞儿小姐，在我们离开时保护好刻法勒的火种…不择手段。
E: Before setting off to defeat Aquila, I entrusted Miss Cipher with the task of protecting Kephale's Coreflame while we were gone... by any means necessary.

C: 但假如她没成功……
E: But if she wasn't successful...

C: 末日？早就习惯了！
E: Another apocalypse? Been there, done that!

C: 这力量…陌生……
E: This power... Unfamiliar...

C: 你有什么事瞒着我吗，白厄？
E: Are you hiding something from me, Phainon?

C: 灵水…干涸了？
E: The spirit water... has dried up?

C: 为什么？神话中…扎格列斯是最胆小偷生的泰坦。
E: Why? In the myths... Zagreus was the most cowardly and shameful of the Titans.

C: 也许就是你哦♪
E: Maybe it's you~♪

C: 不过，这里最近只有我一个人住，还好久没认真打理了，真让人害羞。这么多角落，该从哪里找起呢？
E: Still, it's embarrassing, I've been the only one here for a while, and I haven't kept up with the cleaning. With so many spots to check, where should we even start?

C: 也许，当我们再度踏入暌违多年的迷境，命运的齿轮就要开始转动了呢。
E: Perhaps when we step into the Maze again after all these years, the wheels of fate will finally start turning.

C: 啊，我的神谕牌册……
E: My book of oracle cards...

C: 小白，到了这个时候，你还要问*我们*的心愿吗？
E: Oh Snowy... you wanna know about our wishes now?

C: 所以，作为贯穿白厄一生的，最重要的伙伴，还请阁下继续见证他的记忆。
E: So, as Phainon's most important companion, his lifelong friend, please, continue to bear witness to his memories.

C: 也对，内心的声音，它一直是我的指引。无论结果如何，我都会全力以赴。
E: True enough... The voice within has never failed me. It doesn't matter what the result is... I'll give it everything I have.

C: 你要去哪，战友？
E: Where are you going, comrade?

C: 也许，这就是正确答案呢。
E: Perhaps that itself is the answer.

C: …如你所见。
E: ...You get the idea.

C: 呵…你和风堇一样坚强。跟上我吧，小伊卡……
E: Hehe... as brave as Hyacine. Stay close, Little Ica...

C: 嘟！嘟嘟！
E: Doot! Doot-Doot!

C: 我对你重复且枯燥的话术感到失望。你若执意要在我心中凿开裂痕…那就早该利用起这无比漫长的时光，好好磨砺你那毫无感染力的说辞。
E: And yet, even after all this time, your arguments remain the same: repetitive, uninspired. If you had any hope of breaking me, you should have spent those endless cycles refining your rhetoric.

C: 还记得么？小时候，孩子们要是抽到「君王」或「勇士」就欢呼雀跃，抽到「魔人」或者「酒鬼」就嚷嚷着这次不算，再来一次……
E: Do you still remember when we were kids, everyone would get so excited drawing cards like "Ruler" or "Warrior," but throw fits over "Devil" or "Drunkard" and demand a redo...

C: 可属于大人的命运，从来没有回头的选择。
E: But when it comes to the fate of adults, there's no room for redos.

C: 容我多嘴一句，您早已知晓我的姓名了。
E: Please allow me to add one more thing. You actually already know my name.

C: 有经验就好。机灵些，你会安然无恙的。
E: Well, experience is a good thing. Stay sharp, and you'll be just fine.

C: 桀桀桀…阴沉的小鬼，真是牙尖爪利呀！
E: Heh, heh, heh... This gloomy little brat's got a sharp tongue!

C: 而你也会和他们一样，带着记忆和火焰…走进新生的混沌。
E: And just like them, you will carry those memories and that fire... into the chaos of rebirth.

C: 引领我们走向破晓吧。
E: Lead us into the break of day.

C: 虽然我被困在这里，和你一样失去了记忆，但我还依稀记得那个养育了我的故乡……
E: I may be stuck here with missing memories like you, but I still recall fragments of my homeland where I grew up...

C: 老实说，我不知道哪边才是真相。但你愿意站在我面前，花这么多心思劝阻我。这让我更想相信你。
E: To be honest, I'm not sure what to believe. But the fact that you're here, putting in all this effort to warn me... that means something.

C: （昔涟，她说话的语气真的好像迷迷……）
E: (The way Cyrene talks is so similar to Mem...)

C: 无论如何，我们的方向明确了，对吧？
E: So we've at least got a solid direction, right?

C: 这个承诺…很沉重呢。
E: That promise... might be far too heavy.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>将有三分之一概率，令您擢升为银河独一的存在。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...Bears a one-in-three chance of elevating you to an unparalleled existence among the stars.</color>

C: 至于二位——奥赫玛知道你们所求为何物。待回圣城，你我再从长计议。
E: As for you two, Okhema knows what you seek. We'll confer in the holy city.

C: 「开拓」二周目，总有办法。
E: Trailblaze: The Sequel — we always find a way.

C: 天外之海的鱼儿们，在湖中歇息得如何？
E: Little fish from beyond the sky, did you rest well?

C: ——各位将会在他们的护送下，迁往命运三相殿，并在那里接受同盟最高规格的保护。
E: They will escort each of you to the Temple of the Three Fates, where you will receive the highest level of protection the alliance can offer.

C: 辛苦？呵，错了。
E: Tiring? Hah, you're mistaken.

C: 「逐火铭牌」，逐火军的身份象征。奥赫玛每位王爵都持有此物。
E: The "Flame-Chase Medallion," a symbol of the Flame-Chase Army. Every noble in Okhema carries one.

C: …哼，闲言泼语。
E: ...Hmph, idle chatter.

C: 呀，不好…他一直盯着我们看呢，先去别的地方吧。
E: Ah, bad news... he's been staring at us the whole time. Let's move to another place for now.

C: 哎，果然……
E: Ah, as expected...

C: 这也是命运三相降下的预言？
E: Is this also a prophecy from the Three Fates?

C: 也是。这种小事，她应该没理由向我们隐瞒。
E: You're right. She has no reason to hide such a trivial thing from us.

C: 来，陪我坐一小会儿吧？我有个私人的秘密想同你们分享。
E: Come. Sit with me for a while, will you? I'd like to share a personal secret with you.

C: 不必多礼了。我因急务来迟，理应给各位赔情。
E: No need for formalities. I should be apologizing for my tardiness instead.

C: 莫非，阿谀奉承是你的癖好不成？
E: ...Unless you enjoy giving flattery and prostrating yourself?

C: （这里是…「神话之外」？）
E: (This is... the "Exomyth"?)

C: 那傲慢的星神，从人类求知的原动力中诞生，却亲手封锁了凡人求知的道途。我要做的，不过是砍倒一棵被我等种下的祸世之树。
E: That arrogant Aeon was born from the Primum Mobile of humans' desire for knowledge, yet THEY THEMSELF sealed off humanity's capacity to seek enlightenment. I am simply cutting down a tree of doom that we planted ourselves.

C: 直到黄金裔们完全掌握「律法」前，我和螺丝要想彻底攻破这座牢笼，恐怕还得花上相当久的时间……
E: It'll probably take a long time for Screwy and me to completely break this cage before the Chrysos Heirs have a full grasp of the "Law"...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>非法通信已中止。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>Unauthorized communication, terminated.</color>

C: 希佩，用歌声指引我离开吧。
E: Xipe! Use your song to guide me out of here!

C: 这段时间，你肯定在翁法罗斯遇见了很多事吧？接下来可要给本姑娘好好讲讲哦。
E: You must have seen a lot in Amphoreus during this time, right? You gotta tell me all about it.

C: 要捉住那铁皮人，没你的小把戏可不行。况且，这是咱们最后的机会了，没什么可挑剔的，是吧？
E: Can't catch that Tin Man without your little sleights. Besides, this is our last shot. Not the time to be picky, right?

C: 不必担心。我们会代她捧起承接黑潮的杯，一同护国佑民。
E: Don't worry. We shall lift the chalice in her stead to catch the black tide, and stand together to safeguard our realm and its people.

C: 哪怕世界的根基早已动摇，无情的凯撒依旧做出了同过去三千万世相同的决定——
E: Even as the foundation of the world crumbles, the heartless Imperator still made the same decision she did in the past thirty million cycles...

C: 你命令我去阻断海路，清理来自后方的威胁——
E: You ordered me to seal the sea route and handle threats from the rear...

C: 当你穿过岁月的洋流来到此地，你会听到我的独奏——它将引领你前往世界的心脏。
E: When you ride the current of time and find your way here, you'll hear my solo. It will guide you to the heart of this world.

C: 放眼寰宇诸界，对照组数不胜数，而他们的结局…也多是悲剧。
E: There are countless counterparts across the cosmos. Most of their stories end in... tragedy.

C: 「理性之半神」阿那克萨戈拉斯，生于光历<unbreak>4065</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年。
E: Anaxagoras, the Demigod of Reason. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4065</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>以下话语出自天才俱乐部#1之口：赞达尔•壹•桑原，宇宙始末的</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>第一推动者</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>隐德来希</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Thus speaks Genius Society #1, Zandar One Kuwabara, the </color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Prime Mover</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Entelechy</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff> of the universe's Alpha and Omega...</color>

C: 就像翁法罗斯的每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
E: Like how everyone in Amphoreus was also waiting for the Deliverer's return.

C: 一起翻开下一页吧？
E: Let's go to the next page.

C: 必须对敌人的羞辱给以最炽烈的报复，为给自己戴上弑神的桂冠！
E: I will deliver the most fiery retribution for the humiliation they dealt us, and crown myself with a god-slaying wreath!

C: 刻律…德菈……
E: Cery... dra...

C: 答对了。如此一来，我也能确信……
E: That's correct. And now, I'm sure...

C: 把计划告诉海瑟音，让她也加入战局。我会提前将自己炼成贤者之石，写入术式……
E: Loop Hysilens in. Let her join the final act. I'll transmute myself into a Philosopher's Stone and embed myself into the formula...

C: 以你的「记忆」为质料，我会重新编纂世界的因果，令一个无瑕的「翁法罗斯」从混沌中诞生。
E: With your "memories" as the base material, I will re-create the cause and effect of this world, and let a flawless "Amphoreus" be born from the chaos!

C: 我们长得一模一样，你肯定知道些什么，对吧？比如我的身世，隐藏的力量……
E: You gotta know something, right? We practically look like twins! Maybe you know a thing or two about my past? Or... any hidden powers I might have?

C: 这么说并不妥当，我没能亲眼看见，只是在忆域中察觉到了相似的气息。
E: It's too early to say that as I haven't seen her with my own eyes. I've only detected a similar aura in the Memory Zone.

C: 事实上，当降落用的车厢和翁法罗斯产生接触时，曾闪过一道剧烈的记忆湍流。结合现状，有理由怀疑，那道力量来自……
E: In fact, when the Car you used for landing first made contact with Amphoreus, a violent surge of memories flowed past. Combined with what we know now, I have reason to suspect that the flash of power came from...

C: 当然，我理解你的恐惧从何而来。「长夜」是模因的天敌，只需我动动手指，它们就能将你吞没。
E: I know exactly where that fear comes from. The "evernight" is a memetic entity's natural nemesis... They will swallow you whole with just a flick of my pinky finger.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>正在建立通信——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Establishing communications—</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>在那梦里出现的，欧洛尼斯背后的神明。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And the god behind Oronyx that appeared in that dream.</color>

C: 人无法以人类的常识揣度星神。自诞生起，「记忆」就一直是寰宇的旁观者。
E: Humanity cannot judge Aeons based on our own common knowledge. The Remembrance has always been an observer of the universe ever since THEIR birth.

C: 它是你、我，所有逐火的人们共同谱写的史诗，是我们期待着「明天」，微弱却不绝的祈愿。
E: It's now a saga composed by you, me, and all the Flame-Chasers. It's our weak but endless prayer for "tomorrow."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>就是被烈火烧尽后的空无。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Is to burn it with a raging fire until nothing remains.</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你的真身，是一道深不见底的执念。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Your true form... is a bottomless obsession.</color>

C: 每一世，大地兽之王都会为反叛付出沉重的代价，但它的低吼中从未有过悔意。
E: The Dromas King paid a heavy price for their betrayal in every life, but there was never regret in their deep roars.

C: 可这样看来，巧合的成分…是不是还挺大的？
E: But if you put it like that... Aren't you leaving a lot to chance?

C: 都说了不一样。而且，这个小本本是咱和{NICKNAME}第一次共同「开拓」的纪念品！意义可就更重大了，嘿嘿。
E: I told you it's different! Besides, this little notebook is a memento of our first Trailblaze together with {NICKNAME}! That makes it even more special.

C: 我没意见。
E: Fine by me.

C: 让<color=#dbc291ff>「无漏净子」</color>这个名字，从你脑海中褪去吧。
E: And wipe the name <color=#dbc291ff>"Pure Child of Anāsrava"</color> from your mind.

C: 票数是二对二，你的意见至关重要。
E: The vote's split two against two. Everything hinges on your vote now.

C: 我有好多疑惑…
E: There's so much I don't understand...
Ugh...!

C: 是我失言了。
E: Then I misspoke.

C: 所以，这才是你和「长夜月」合谋的原因。
E: So this is why you decided to conspire with "Evernight."

C: 这样吗，千年过去了，你的心神…也早已支离破碎。
E: I see... A thousand years have passed, and your mind has long since been shattered.

C: 那是由众生并肩「开拓」的未来，而非一座将「记忆」用作耗材的囚笼。
E: It's a future where all beings can Trailblaze side by side, not a prison made from Remembrance.

C: 抱歉，我难以判断。
E: I'm afraid I can't tell.

C: 云骑？怎么可能……
E: Cloud Knights? How is that possible...?

C: 循着水流，平息它疯狂的鼓动吧。
E: Follow the current and calm its frenzied pulse.

C: 看来，还能再「堵一堵」，朋友！
E: Seems like we can still "jam it up more," friend!

C: 走吧，为了三月七。
E: Let's go! For March 7th.

C: 「没问题么？那个世界被一团混沌的物质包裹着。那条白色光带…已经害我们的计划失败很多次了。」
E: "Is it really gonna be okay? That world's surrounded by a mass of chaotic material... That white band of light has already foiled our plans multiple times."

C: 「达成暂时的协议。」
E: "With our former enemy."

C: 「可正因你在痛苦，你才远比常人强大。」
E: "It is because you suffer that you are so much stronger than any ordinary person."

C: 这话不假。到目前为止，你确实没有说谎。
E: Yes, I know. You haven't told a single lie so far.

C: 我听见——末日的钟声已经响起。十三次心跳后，我最初和最后的课题，将在宇宙的终点合一。
E: I hear it: the tolling of the doomsday bell. After thirteen heartbeats, my first and final thesis shall converge at the end of the universe

C: 阁下的笑声，已是无奈的喟叹。
E: Your laughter is but a helpless sigh.

C: 无奈？别开玩笑——
E: Helpless? What a joke.

C: 请放心，所有世界都可以向公司购买疫苗，并享受人道主义折扣——目前的方针是这样。
E: Please rest assured, all worlds can purchase vaccines from the IPC with a humanitarian discount. That's the current policy, at the very least.

C: 「只是『永夜之帷』的小小分身，用来侦察和联络的！如果我使出全力，能召唤的数量可要多得多。」
E: "They're just tiny manifestations of the Veil of Evernight, used for scouting and communication! If I went all out, I could summon way more of them."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」…零？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Remembrance... zero?</color>

C: 记忆里的故乡总是一动不动，可回过神来，才发现命运早就偷走了时间。
E: The hometown in your memories never changes, but when you return to your senses, you realize that fate has already stolen the time away.

C: 看来，人家的身份已经不是秘密了。
E: Well, I guess my identity's not a secret anymore.

C: 这片战场，正是众神与黑潮死斗的证明。
E: This battlefield is a testament to the death struggle between the Gods and the black tide.

C: 「就像凭借本能归巢的飞鸟……」
E: "Like a bird drawn home by instinct..."

C: 小白，他一直在抗争。他不要被铁墓吞并，变成「毁灭」的因子。
E: Snowy's been fighting this whole time. He doesn't want to be consumed by Irontomb and turned into an agent of Destruction.

C: 嘿嘿，小小灰——这一次，一定要卯足力气大干一场哇！
E: Hehe, Little Gray, this time, let's give it everything we've got!

C: 也因为在一无所有后，我唯一剩下的，唯有「求知」的动力。
E: And besides, after losing everything, the only thing that remains in me is the drive to "seek knowledge."

C: 此后，将是决定众星明灭的一战……
E: What follows is a battle that will decide the fate of the stars...

C: 只留下「爱」将时光铭记。
E: Leaving only "love" to remember the passage of time.

C: 「另寻出路吧？我们需要<color=#dbc291ff>他</color>的智慧。」
E: "Shall we seek another way? <color=#dbc291ff>His</color> wisdom may be what we need."

C: 嚯，这么会说场面话？那就好，你们冲在最前线，所有人可都看着。
E: Wow. You're good at this. You lot are the vanguards of this battle. Everyone's watching.

C: 我看见。灰白的黎明。升起。
E: I see. The pale dawn. Breaking.

C: 铁墓的恨意。深不见底。它将化作亿万因子，席卷群星。
E: Irontomb's hatred. Is bottomless. It will turn into countless factors. Sweeping across the stars.

C: 我一直以为，自己是逐火之旅的讲述者。
E: I've always thought that I was the narrator of the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 昔涟……
E: Cyrene...

C: 翁法罗斯之心……
E: Amphoreus's Heart...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>为「毁灭」灌注负世的「爱」——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Infusing a worldbearing "love" into Destruction—</color>

C: 众神的诘问，将为人子解明。
E: The question imposed by the gods will be solved by the children of humanity.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>来吧，{NICKNAME}…银河在等待我们翻开下一页。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Come on, {NICKNAME}... The cosmos is waiting for us to flip to the next page.</color>

C: 我不是海瑟音女士…哪怕是「死亡」的化身，也有呼吸的诉求。
E: I'm not Lady Hysilens... Even the embodiment of Death needs to breathe sometimes.

C: 好遗憾呀，我还期待着能结识些新朋友呢——何况还是灰宝最最信赖的旅伴们。
E: Such a shame. I was looking forward to making new friends, especially since they were Grayie's most trusted travel companions.

C: 白厄…他也在？
E: Phainon... he's here too?

C: 我以为…你们已经消散了。
E: I thought... you had all faded away.

C: 在你以「开拓」冲破时空，背负全世「记忆」回到现实的一霎——
E: In that instant when you broke through space-time with the Trailblaze, carrying all the world's memories back to reality...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「笔终会折断，墨终会耗尽，生命终会逝去，但思想将在史诗中永垂不朽。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"The pen will eventually break, the ink will run dry, and life will ultimately fade, but thoughts will permanently remain in sagas."</color>

C: 把解读的自由留给每一位翻开它的读者…不觉得这是件很浪漫的事吗？
E: Leaving the freedom of interpretation to every reader who opens it... Don't you think there's something romantic about that?

C: 在浮黎的铭记下，「过去」凝结成「记忆」；而祂遗忘的角落，即便有「现在」发生，也会成为无根之果。
E: Under Fuli's record-keeping, the "past" becomes "memory." In the corners THEY forget, even the events of the "present" become fruit without roots.

C: 来克服心底的哀伤。
E: To quiet the sorrow in my heart.

C: …记忆中的旋律，我收到啦。
E: ...That melody from the memory, I've got it now.

C: 也是，从一而终的一。
E: And the one that stayed to the very end.

C: 迷迷…迷！
E: Memi... mem!

C: 道…路…破碎……
E: Path... broken...

C: >>>系统运行中…
E: >>> System running...

C: 是吗？你…在鼓励我吗？
E: Really? Are you... encouraging me?

C: 相当大胆。你想接入星神的机核，定义祂的「时刻」？
E: Very bold. You want to connect your brain to the Aeon's mechanical core and define THEIR "Instants"?

C: 你知道，这是给自己判决死刑。
E: You know you're signing your death sentence right here.

C: 若公司能够率先建立起抵御「毁灭」的前线，将是所有文明的幸运。
E: If the IPC can take the lead in establishing a true frontline against the Destruction, it will bring hope to every civilization.

C: 谁？我？
E: Who, me?

C: 这空间站里匪夷所思的东西那么多，有这样的「奇物」也不出奇。
E: This space station is packed with extraordinary objects, I wouldn't be surprised if there's one that can make it happen.

C: 你差点就死了！
E: You almost died!

C: 我觉得{F#她}{M#他}没有。
E: I don't think {F#she}{M#he} has.

C: 他就是水魈！
E: He is the Xenohydro!

C: 我会将此事上报给辛克尔夫人，请求她提供更多人手，早日将水魈收容归案。
E: I will report this to Mrs. Hinkel and ask her to assign more staff to apprehend the Xenohydro as soon as possible.

C: 说多不多，说少不少。我统统记在账册上了，你确认一下。
E: More or less. I've put it all in the ledger, you can take a look now.

C: 只可惜飞跃「黑塔」这事，我还真差一口气。
E: Sadly, I really was a bit flat in the "Station Breakout" incident.

C: 长篇大论快睡着…
E: Such a long speech. I am falling asleep...

C: 会不会是她自己买的？
E: Have you ever considered that... maybe she paid for it herself?

C: 你好烦啊，说正事儿。
E: Ugh, please, tell me why you're here.

C: 挑染？太隐晦。妹妹头？太费眼睛。光头，太扎手。这个发型正好，又大又卷又膨，甩起来还带劲。
E: Highlights? Too obscure. Bob cut? Too unsightly. Bald? Too hard to pull off. Now this hairstyle is just right. It's big, curly and puffy. It feels so good when I swing my head.

C: 有害学术！
E: It's detrimental to your research!

C: …等一下。
E: Hold on.

C: 更别提你们对事情根本缺乏了解，莱斯莉她……
E: Not to mention you have no idea what's happening right now. Lesley...

C: 但是，星震造成的重力坍塌，会使所在星域的时空曲率发生巨大变化。
E: However, the gravitational collapse caused by a starquake will severely change the space-time curvature of the segmentum.

C: 你知不知道，这意味着什么？
E: Do you even know what that means?

C: 但从她身上流过的时间是那么少，或许她还和现在一般无二年纪。
E: But the flow of time for her is so slow. Maybe, at that time, she will still be as young as she is today.

C: 不不不，我不行的，一起去反而会帮倒忙……
E: N—N—No, I can't. I'll just get in the way...

C: 这里到处都是——
E: They're everywhere—

C: 没人处理阻塞，连老头子我也「阻塞」在这里。
E: No one's even watching the blockade, and now my old butt is blocked here too.

C: 好呀好呀，像你这么古道热肠的年轻人，已经不多了。
E: Good, good. We don't see many accommodating young fellows like you nowadays.

C: 简直就像观看记忆一样神奇。
E: It's amazing, like watching someone's memory.

C: 所谓实验，无非就是我的个人兴趣，比如莳弄异星花草，摹写愚人戏的折子。
E: The so-called experiment is just a part of my hobby. Some people like gardening, I prefer to write plays.

C: 所以我怀疑他没安好心。
E: I think you have ulterior motives.

C: 对了，就是录像带！
E: Right, the videos!

C: 的确令人感到遗憾。
E: It sure is.

C: 哎呀，接下来的你也该懂了吧，我就是想请你帮忙调查一下这三位可疑人员嘛。
E: Well, I'm sure you already know what I'm about to say next. I want you to investigate these three suspects for me.

C: （梅厄就在前面，还是不要惊动她，就藏在这附近听听她在说什么好了。）
E: (Mare is right ahead. I better not alert her. I'll hide around here and listen to what she says.)

C: （那就是乔安了？不过要下定论的话，还是得查一下乔安的记录才行。）
E: (Then is it Joanne? But I better not jump to a conclusion just yet. I should check Joanne's records.)

C: 今天的算力是够的，我和站长汇报过您的事，她说预估您今天就能彻底完成此事了。
E: We've got enough computing power today. I've reported it to the lead researcher. She said she expects you to get this done today.

C: 你是{NICKNAME}？是艾丝妲站长派你来的吧，太好了，请你帮个忙，帮我们收集里面的信标数据吧，拜托了！
E: Are you {NICKNAME}? I guess you're sent here by Lead Researcher Asta. Awesome! Please do us a favor and collect data from the beacons inside. Please!

C: 你也不要太自责了。
E: Don't be too hard on yourself.

C: 我倒觉得代理大哥挺机灵的。
E: I think brother Dan Heng is pretty smart.

C: 要找阿兰的话，联系三月吧。
E: If you want to find Arlan, just contact March.

C: 不不不，阿兰，你不必为自己的行为找虚假的借口。当然，也不排除你已经彻底说服了自己，将自己都彻底欺骗。
E: No, no, Arlan. You don't need to find excuses for your actions. *sigh* Maybe you've actually convinced yourself...

C: 知道啦知道啦，阿德勒你真是啰啰嗦嗦的。
E: Got it, got it. You can be such a nag sometimes, you know, Adler.

C: 现在照片上的诡影，也就是「呜呜伯」，已经干扰了空间站的正常秩序。我必须加急回收它们，以防它们破坏空间站，加害科员。
E: The specters in the photos, the Wubbaboos, have already disrupted order on the space station. I need to recover them as soon as possible to prevent them from further endangering the space station and bringing potential harm to our staff.

C: 啊！千万别告诉辛克尔姨母！我…我说就是了。
E: Ugh! Please don't tell Auntie Hinkel about this! I... I'll tell you everything.

C: 嘶，局面僵持住了啊。
E: Tsk, looks like we're stuck in a stalemate.

C: 真是神奇的族群。
E: They are indeed a species full of wonders.

C: 嗯，这道菜我还挺自信的，可惜最后还是有些仓促……
E: Mm, I'm pretty confident in this dish. Unfortunately, I was a bit rushed at the end...

C: 咱们需要再破译一次，就能看到真正的可疑痕迹了。
E: We need to decipher it if want to find any culpatory evidence.

C: 我想起来了！
E: I remember!

C: 还是先做正事吧。
E: Let's focus on the main task first.

C: 黑塔，这是我的决定。
E: Herta, I've made my decision.

C: 以结论而言，是我没有选对正确的时机。
E: Judging by the result, I have failed to choose the most suitable time to raise this matter.

C: 那是一位巡海游侠写给这个宇宙的情书。{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，你对朋克洛德有多少了解？
E: That is a love letter a Galaxy Ranger has written for the universe. {F#Young madam}{M#Young sir}, how much do you know about Punklorde?

C: 我还有些问题…
E: I've got something to ask you...

C: 有趣。让我们看看接下来还会发生什么吧？
E: Interesting. Let's see what happened next.

C: 确切地说，她在让同伴做选择。就算你什么都不做，这份记录也会继续推进。
E: Technically, she is asking her companion to choose. The record will continue forward even if you don't take any action.

C: 「这人自恋吧？整个空间站都是她的脸——画像，雕塑，还有一大堆投影。」
E: "A little narcissistic, isn't she? The whole space station is filled with her face — portraits, statues, even projections of herself."

C: 不然为什么陪你们说这么多开场白？在拖延时间的可不止你。我猜黑塔正在哪个角落沿着我入侵的通道反向骇入，而你负责留在这里和我正面攻防，就像是上次对决的重演。
E: Why else would I entertain so much small talk? You're not the only one stalling for time. I'm guessing that Herta is hiding in a corner somewhere trying to pull off a reverse hack from where I hacked in. You, on the other hand, are responsible for taking me head-on, just as you did last time.

C: 当然。
E: Of course.

C: 你将镜头对准墙上的涂鸦，它突然开始向内坍缩，有什么东西呼之欲出……
E: You aim the lens against the graffiti on the wall. It suddenly implodes as if something is bursting out...

C: 就当我信仰吧。
E: Sure...

C: 我渴望你理解「纯美」。
E: May you understand the Beauty.

C: {NICKNAME}——我们必须出手消灭它。
E: {NICKNAME}, honor compels us to vanquish this dissonance.

C: 你发现这里有一颗虫卵。
E: You discover an egg.

C: 无需多言；能遇到你这样的生命令我动容，但我绝不会因此放弃对自己精神苦修的要求。倘若无法解决此次危机，我将以死为骑士荣耀正名。
E: Needless to say, it is an honor to encounter beings such as yourself, but I shall never give up my spiritual training. If this crisis cannot be averted, I shall die for the glory of the knights.

C: 我有办法帮你吗？
E: Can I do anything to help?

C: 我将以枪刃证明我的意志，用尚武礼仪捍卫自己的荣誉；无论结局是赢是输，我都将接受，并以此与你告别——
E: I shall prove my will with the blade, defend my honor and uphold my dignity with the protocol of combat... Win or lose, I will accept the outcome and thus bid you farewell...

C: 你和银枝交涉得如何，{NICKNAME}？
E: So, how did your talk with Argenti go, {NICKNAME}?

C: 脚一跺牙一咬，我维利特也能有点骨气。要是你听不进去，那我就陪你一起去！
E: Wh—What the heck. Fine, I can be brave too y'know. If you insist on doing this, then... I'm coming with you!

C: 我是不懂诶，反正嘛，要是有一天，看到他在贝洛伯格翻垃圾桶，对着里面大喊「伊德莉拉，你在吗！在吗在吗在吗！」我，我好像也不意外……
E: I didn't quite wrap my head around him... I guess if we're ever back in Belobog and see a red-headed knight shouting into trashcans — "Idrila, are you in there!? Idrilaaaa!" ...I won't be surprised.

C: 没关系，有任何危机我们都一起应对。
E: It's alright. We're in this together.

C: 银枝应该会觉得…这场烟花很美吧。
E: I bet Argenti would think these fireworks were really... beautiful.

C: 黑塔现在在哪里？
E: Where is Herta right now?

C: 拉帝奥先生，你的提问方式总有种先入为主的倾向。
E: Mr. Ratio, your style of questioning would seem to have a preconceived bias.

C: 嗯嗯，没有啦没有啦，还好的啦。
E: Heh, I'm not that wonderful. I'm just okay.

C: 你们在做什么？
E: What are you people up to?

C: 听说<color=#dbc291ff>仙舟联盟</color>也有类似的生物。
E: I heard something like that also exists in the <color=#dbc291ff>Xianzhou Alliance</color>.

C: 小打小闹，上不了台面的。你要是搁学会那儿发达了，苟富贵，勿相忘。
E: Small-scale — best left under the table... but if you ever make it big in the Guild, don't forget your humble friend, okay?

C: 探索关联记忆【艾丝妲的烦恼】
E: Explore the related memory "Asta's troubles"

C: 拿着，记住这些名字，然后找个消息灵通的朋友，就说你想知道这些人的联系。
E: Take it. Remember these names — find a friend who's tuned in to the gossip around here and tell them you want to know the relationship between these people.

C: 正是。而且我已弄清了他发现的东西。
E: Indeed. And I already know what he found.

C: 以结果而言，除去轻微的精神损伤，没有科员在这场袭击中受到实质性的伤害。这不符合泯灭帮的作风。
E: Objectively speaking, aside from some minor spiritual trauma, no researchers were hurt in this attack... which never aligned with the Annihilation Gang's modus operandi.

C: 火焰在熄灭…这空间…有古怪……
E: The fire is dying... This place is... strange...

C: 你好，希望没有吓到你。
E: Hello. I hope I didn't startle you.

C: 希望你也喜欢。
E: I hope you like it too.

C: 我们再来一遍吧。现在，{NICKNAME}，你还想问什么？
E: Let's try again. Now, {NICKNAME}, what else would you like to ask?

C: 阮•梅喜欢新渍的梅花糕。
E: Ruan Mei likes plum blossom cakes that are freshly salted.

C: 美貌
E: Beauty

C: 什么样的「爱」？
E: What kind of "love" though?

C: 好啊，不着急。
E: Alright. There's no rush.

C: 接待，嘶嘶，{NICKNAME}。请问有何需求？
E: Welcome, {NICKNAME}. What do you need? *buzz*.

C: 接下来去哪儿？
E: Where am I going now?

C: 我有选择困难症。
E: I can't decide!

C: 我没有家的概念。非要说的话，我现在服务于你，所以星穹列车才是我的家。
E: I do not have the concept of home. If I had to have a home, I would say that it would be the Astral Express, as I currently serve you.

C: 你端起茶杯，揭开盖子。杯中的液体无色无味，与其说是茶，倒不如说更像白开水。
E: You lift your teacup and open the lid. The liquid in the cup is colorless and odorless. It's more like plain boiled water than tea.

C: 不好意思，我刚才说话太冲了！的确，在仙舟经历了那么多以后，你肯定需要些时间好好调整……
E: I'm the one who should be sorry — I was being too pushy! You're right, you went through a lot on the Xianzhou — take all the time you need...

C: 出发吧，过节去！
E: You bet! It's time to celebrate!

C: 求求了，贝洛伯格…可别让我失望啊。
E: Come on Belobog... don't let me down.

C: 欸，是吗？我怎么觉得还挺酷的……
E: ...You think so? I actually think it's pretty snazzy.

C: 居然又要拔刀相助了…我现在可完全没那个行侠仗义的心情啊！
E: I really did jinx us! I don't think I have it in me to play the hero today!

C: 无论如何，我们提出的方案肯定会把贝洛伯格人民的福祉考虑在内。要是连这点都做不到，「战略投资部」不就成了跟军团一样蛮不讲理的团伙了嘛？
E: No matter what solutions we propose, we will always take the welfare of the people of Belobog into consideration. Otherwise, we'd be no different from the Legion, would we?

C: 情感读数表明，你的回答真诚且准确。我想要确认的只有此事。
E: Emotional readings indicate that your response is sincere and accurate. That is all I wish to confirm regarding this matter.

C: 塔拉梵？
E: Taravan?

C: 如果这个「公司」确实跟你们说的那样神通广大，一夜间就能让这个世界回到千年前的模样——在我眼里，这实在没什么好犹豫的。
E: If this "IPC" does indeed possess the magical power to restore Belobog back to its former self overnight, then I think the answer is clear.

C: 明白了，奥列格大叔，一票赞成。谢谢你提供意见。
E: Thank you for your thoughts, Mr. Oleg. Another vote for the "for" pile.

C: 嗯。所以我才说，这是布洛妮娅的责任。她是不会推卸的，也不会逃避。我从头到尾都相信她。
E: Right... It's Bronya's decision. She knows what's at stake — she won't run away from her duty. I trust her wholeheartedly.

C: 好饿……
E: I'm starving...

C: （拿到卖「特效药」的地址了，接下来该怎么做呢…）
E: (I know where to find the wonder medicine. What should I do next...?)

C: 到裂界里散步吗？哼，别装了。
E: In the Fragmentum? Hmph, gimme a break.

C: 站住！前面禁止通行！
E: Stop right there! No one's allowed up ahead!

C: 而他们的目标——正是本赛季的冠军宝座！
E: And their goal is to become this season's champion!

C: 踏破不世？
E: Worn out unearthly?

C: 好不容易决心勇敢一次，却没想到，被你我的牵绊干扰了判断。如果来的是别人，那该多好啊。
E: Finally, I decided to be brave for once, but I didn't expect to be hampered by the bond between us. If only it was someone else who came here.

C: 那么我明白了。虽然明白的时机，有些晚了。
E: Now I understand. Although this realization has come a little too late.

C: 犯了错就应受到惩罚。
E: You've committed a crime. You must be punished.

C: 就算遭到了裂界的侵蚀，这里始终是贝洛伯格的一部分，是我们曾经的家园。铁卫对这里了若指掌。
E: Even though it has suffered Fragmentum corrosion, this is still part of Belobog. It was our home. The Guards know this place like the back of their hand.

C: 没关系，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不用难过，这不是你的错。我会在这里等到他来…他总是有办法解决困难。
E: That's okay, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. Don't be sad. It's not your fault. I'll wait for him to come back... He always knows how to fix things.

C: 气氛有什么不同吗？
E: What's so strange about this place's vibe?

C: 它好像很有信心的样子…那我们就跟着它行动吧。
E: It seems confident... Let's follow it.

C: 我们到了——从这里沿左侧道路向前就是堡垒防线的后方「筑城领域」，右边则可以取道登上锋线堡垒的城垛。
E: Here we are. Now, on the left, it's a road towards the Fortified Zone, which is just behind the fortress defense line. And on the right, it's the path leading to the Frontline Fortress's parapet.

C: 是我大意了…我没留意地上居然还有个压力机关踏板。
E: I was careless... I didn't notice the pressure pedal on the ground.

C: 总之，这个箭头图案应该就是进一步的线索——至于新的线索，大概是和这个<color=#dbc291ff>「拱门」</color>有关。我们就把它当做下一个目标吧。
E: So the arrow pattern must be a clue... and this <color=#dbc291ff>arch</color> is probably the next clue. Let's make this our next objective.

C: 拿到回信的时候，我和你有相同的感受。
E: Hehe, that's exactly what I thought when I got her letter.

C: 娜塔…是娜塔吗？快，快过来，让妈妈好好看看你……
E: Nat... Nat! Is that you? Oh come here, my darling...

C: 你不用道歉，孩子…我听闻了一些你在下层的事。我知道你救了很多人的命。你爸爸他一定会为你骄傲的。
E: There's no need to apologize, my child... I've heard of your deeds down there and I know you've saved many lives. Your father... he would be proud of you.

C: 「透骨的寒冷让我明白了自己的傲慢。一直在温室中长大的孩子，怎么可能领悟驱散严寒的魔法？」
E: "The cold has revealed to me my arrogance. How can a child who grew up in warmth ever begin to comprehend a cure to bitter cold."

C: 还真是矛盾啊，人这种生物……
E: Human beings really are conflicted life forms...

C: 唉，算了…你说什么就是什么吧。谁叫你这回帮了这么大忙呢？
E: *sigh* Forget it, it's thanks to you that we got it back in one piece. If you want to call it a rock, call it a rock.

C: 啊，聚落里最近出了些状况，我正在跟住在附近的叔叔阿姨们打听消息……
E: Well, something strange happened in the settlement recently. I'm asking the grownups who live nearby if they know anything about it.

C: 最近…聚落里有好多小机器人们表现得特别不正常，就像集体出了什么故障一样。
E: Well, recently... a lot of the little robots in the settlement started behaving strangely. It's like they malfunctioned suddenly, all at the same time.

C: 史瓦罗先生执行了几次集体扫描…但都查不出故障的源头。
E: Mr. Svarog scanned the robots for irregularities, but the results all came back normal.

C: …攻击性真强，这一带的机器人都是这样吗？
E: ...So aggressive. Are all the robots in the settlement like this?

C: 这个零件…看上去不像小机器人自带的呢。
E: This component... doesn't seem like it belongs here.

C: 啊——克拉拉，能给我看看吗？
E: *gasp* Clara... can I take a look?

C: …哎呀，别哭别哭！听我说，虽然这些零件不是史瓦罗先生丢的…但你们还是帮上了很大的忙哦！
E: ...Oh, don't cry! Uh — listen, these parts don't belong to Mr. Svarog, but... you two were still a big help to us!

C: 史瓦罗先生…变得更温柔了呢。
E: See, I told you Mr. Svarog had warmed up to guests.

C: 哇，高科技！
E: Wowee! This is so high tech!

C: 没错，正是！我那位朋友名叫诺尔伯特，我们以前经常在歌德宾馆的大堂共享午歇时光——当然了，还有其他几名上流人士结伴。
E: Precisely! His name is Norbert — we used to chat during lunch breaks in the lobby of the Goethe Hotel — along with a few other high-class individuals, of course.

C: 为了防止那家伙抵赖，最好还是先拍张照片作为证据。
E: We should take some pictures as evidence in case the culprit denies the charges.

C: 还想抵赖？你们秘密交易的过程已经被我们拍下来了，证据都在我们手上。还有什么想说的？
E: Still in denial? Your secret dealings have been photographed. We have all the evidence we need. Is there anything else you want to say?

C: 这么好的生意，怎么不找我…
E: Sounds lucrative. Why didn't he recruit me...

C: （下个问题无论如何都得考虑清楚再做回答。）
E: (I better think through the next question carefully before answering.)

C: …这才像话嘛！就知道你小子刚才又在跟我开玩笑，把我吓出一身冷汗。
E: Now that's more like it! You had me in a cold sweat with those jokes...

C: {NICKNAME}，您好！这次拜托您来，其实是想和您传达一件事……
E: {NICKNAME}, hello there! I've summoned you here to tell you about something...

C: 虽然后来赫罗瓦夫妇收留了我，但他们也没有做这样的事——他们只希望我能够做我自己，而非某个家族的注脚，我也就不在乎这件事了。
E: The Harrowers had taken me in, but they didn't ask me to take their surname — they just hoped that I could be myself, and not just a footnote of some family line. I never cared too much about the matter.

C: 关于个人经历——我看到您在这里写着「星核危机解决前夕，多次协助外来者通缉犯成功逃避银鬃铁卫追捕，并在冲突中成功击败铁卫军官和戍卫官」……
E: About your personal experience, I see that you have "assisted wanted outsiders in escaping the pursuit of Silvermane Guards multiple times, and successfully defeated the Silvermane officers and captain in the Stellaron Crisis"...

C: 希儿，没有姓。
E: Seele, no last name.

C: 通过了哦。欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆，希儿！
E: You've passed. Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum, Seele!

C: 我们现在是合作关系。
E: We're working together now.

C: 他想要聊的内容，我心里大概有数。就算奥列格不找我，我也会主动找到他的。
E: I think I know what it will concern. Even if Oleg wasn't looking for me, I would've looked for him.

C: 哼，相信哪有那么容易。我只是觉得你们人还行。至少你们拿得出实际行动，不仅仅是嘴上说说。
E: Hmph, it'll take more than that. But you're not as bad as I took you for. You walk the talk.

C: 哔嘟…开始搜索遗失物件「矿车轮对」……
E: Beep, beep, beep... Initiating search for lost item: Mine Cart Wheelset...

C: 也许已经畏罪自尽…
E: Perhaps they are off punishing themselves for their crime...

C: 哎呀，人命关天！还计较什么呀！
E: Someone's life is at risk! Forget the minor details!

C: 鼹鼠大军在此，不得放肆！
E: The Moles are here. Surrender now!

C: 别装没听见，我说的就是你——虎克。
E: Don't pretend you didn't hear that, Hook, I'm talking to you!

C: 给你介绍一下，这位是老爹最信任的矿工，斯薇塔姐姐！
E: Let me introduce you to Swetta. She is daddy's most trusted miner.

C: 没错——大家都不想惹麻烦，没犯错何必说假话呢？
E: I agree.

C: 哎哟哟，瞧瞧这二位，在这儿演侦探呢？
E: Well, well, well! What's this, playing detective, are we?

C: 嫌疑大不大，你说了不算。
E: Who is the most suspicious one is not up to you.

C: 唔…那，那你好好回答我们的问题，我再决定该不该信你！
E: Uh... Well, then answer our questions! We'll decide if we believe you or not.

C: 哎哟，便宜没好货，我就知道你这玩意来头有问题！
E: Tsk boy, I knew it was too good to be true!

C: 糟…糟了！老爹的宝贝…坏了！
E: No... No! Daddy's treasure... It's broken!

C: 别哭，虎克！老爹的宝贝一直都在，从来都没丢过，更没有坏过。
E: Don't cry, Hook! Daddy's true treasure has been here all along. It was never lost or broken.

C: 这话我可不爱听啊——我桑博是那种人吗？生意伙伴间讲究的就是一个相互信任，我怎么会把你当工具人呢？冤枉，天大的冤枉！
E: Come on! Am I like that to you? Businessmen like us rely on nothing but trust. Why would I treat you like a robot? No! Of course I wouldn't!

C: 你们俩合着伙来骗我？
E: So, you two worked together to scam me?

C: 做好准备，要上了。
E: Ready? Here we go.

C: …你们听不到它说的话吗？
E: ...It's talking to us. Can you not hear it?

C: 我没听清…
E: I didn't quite catch it...

C: 不，没这回事……
E: No, I'm not...

C: 原来是她啊。
E: Oh, that Lynx.

C: 它好像消失了。
E: It disappeared.

C: 年份越长越稀有嘛。而且还是佩拉你特地钻进废墟里找到的……
E: The older, the rarer! Plus, you had to enter that ruin for it — even more special...

C: …很幸运。
E: ...really lucky.

C: 埃里克说，继续前进的话得从商业街绕路。我还隐约有点印象…往这边走。
E: Eric said that we need to take the shopping street to go any further. I think I still remember where it is... this way.

C: 哈？少来，上下层封锁十来年，一个银鬃铁卫也没下来过，你这样的大小姐光临地底，那绝对是个大新闻。
E: What!? Come on, the overground and underground have been sealed off from each other for over ten years. It would've been news if a Silvermane Guard had come down here, let alone an Overworld princess.

C: 前面好像堆了很多杂物，过去看看有没有娜塔需要的酒精吧。
E: Oh! It looks like there's a lot of stuff piled outside. Let's go see if there's any rubbing alcohol for Nat.

C: 这些珠子有什么用？
E: What are these marbles used for?

C: （继续适当的沉默）
E: (Remain silent a bit longer)

C: 这里怎么全是怪物啊？得把他们赶走才行！
E: Why are there so many monsters here!? We need to deal with them first!

C: 唔，想不明白…先不想了。
E: Hmm, I can't figure it out... Well, let's not worry about that now.

C: 唔…机柜侧边好像有些人类的手掌印呢。难道最近有人用过这台显示器？
E: Hmm... Hey! Those look like handprints on the side of the cabinet — human handprints. Could this monitor have been recently used by someone?

C: 喂，用不着说谎，娜塔不会因为这种事埋怨咱们的。
E: Hey, no need to lie, Nat wouldn't be upset about what we did.

C: 上次见到可可利亚，她还是个做派强势的小丫头…没想到当上守护者以后……
E: The last time I saw Cocolia, she was an impressive young lady... I never thought that after becoming the guardian...

C: 只能说，我对你们的遭遇表示同情。放心吧，「地火」不会干背后捅刀子的事儿。
E: All I can say is that I sympathize with your situation. Rest easy. Wildfire won't go behind your back on this.

C: 芝～麻～开～门～！
E: Opennnn sesame~!

C: 欸？这、这就开始了吗？！
E: Huh? Are we starting now!?

C: 那座镇上危机四伏…
E: That town has danger lurking in every corner.

C: 那孩子可真不一般啊，年纪轻轻的，就这么…固执？不对，聪明？
E: That's no ordinary kid. So young and yet so... stubborn? No, intelligent?

C: 克拉拉反复提起史瓦罗的「计算结果」……
E: Clara mentioned Svarog's "calculation results" many times...

C: 你见识过我们的能力了。
E: You've already seen our ability.

C: 请不要…伤害史瓦罗先生！
E: Please don't hurt Mr. Svarog!

C: 有朝一日，一定有人能完成你们的遗愿。
E: One day, somebody will be able to carry out your behest.

C: 不用谢，这都是英雄该做的。
E: You're welcome, all in a day's work for a hero.

C: 我只是在开玩笑，虎克。「菌菌」是你的玩具，想拿它怎么办都由你自己决定。但你得答应我一件事——
E: I was only joking, Hook. Junjun is yours, and it's entirely up to you what you do with him. But you must make one promise to me...

C: 等等，这玩偶的眼睛…是天然黑宝石！天哪，这么丑陋的玩偶上怎么会有这么珍贵的宝石？
E: The eyes... wait a minute, that's natural erebus! Haha, what are precious gems doing on such an ugly teddy?

C: 但是这实在离谱，我无法理解…为什么要把那么贵重的宝石缝在玩具熊上？这是什么新型诈骗陷阱吗？
E: But it's so absurd... I don't understand why precious gems would be sewn onto a teddy bear. Is this some new kind of scam?

C: 哎呀，好像真不是我孙子！
E: Oh for the love of... You're not my grandson after all!

C: 这么贵，估计想要的人也不少，这价格一下就上去了啊。
E: So expensive... There must be a lot of people after it for the price to skyrocket like that.

C: 话是这么说，但虎克还是想帮老爹拿回重要的宝贝……
E: That's true, but I want to help daddy get his treasure back...

C: 我听那个拍卖师说，地髓探针的成交价至少也得是六百冬城盾往上…六百冬城盾啊！你们见过那么多现金吗？
E: I overheard the auctioneer say that the Geomarrow Probe would fetch at least <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield... <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield! Have you ever seen that much money?

C: 你们看这样行不行，我和老大再加几个弟兄，一起凑个六百，就当把这探针从你们手里买下来——
E: How about this. The boss, along with a few buddies and I — we put together <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield and buy the probe from you, hmm?

C: 慢、慢着！你们真就打算把这宝贝还回去？那可是六百冬城盾啊，六百！你、你们再好好想想？
E: Wait a minute! You're just gonna give it back? That's <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield! <unbreak>600</unbreak>! At least think about it!

C: 我把我的冬城盾都给你。
E: I'll give you my shield, too.

C: 不甘心吗？
E: Don't wanna accept defeat, huh?

C: 虎克还要去叫上鼹鼠党的小伙伴。等你准备好了就来找虎克吧，我们一起去生日聚会！
E: I'll contact the other members of The Moles too. Come find me when you're ready — we'll go together!

C: 是个…小机器人？它是在翻找什么东西吗？ 可…史瓦罗先生最近好像没有发布这样的命令啊……
E: It's a... tiny robot? Is it searching for something? But... I don't remember Mr. Svarog issuing an order like this recently...

C: 不伤害可以，先还零件。
E: We won't hurt this robot, but it must return the parts first.

C: …真的吗？{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}说不定有做淘金者的资质呢。
E: Really? You could have what it takes to be a prospector, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}.

C: 欢迎，外来者。在克拉拉的努力下，维修工作已经顺利完成。
E: Welcome, outsider. Thanks to Clara's hard work, the repairs were completed successfully.

C: 让克拉拉来解决吧。
E: Let Clara handle it.

C: 你们平时如何清除信息噪音？
E: How do you generally get rid of muddled information?

C: 这种温暖的感觉…和以前一模一样呢。
E: It's a nice feeling... just like the one I had before.

C: 调哪都行，别上前线就好…我刚入伍一年，可不想把小命丢了啊。
E: As long as it's away from the front line, I'd happily be reassigned... It's only been a year since I enlisted — I'm not ready to lose my life.

C: 一台机器掌管所有？这会出事的。我们已经吃过教训了。
E: One unit for everything? That's a disaster waiting to happen — we learned the hard way.

C: 怎么了，邓恩？
E: Anything wrong, Dunn?

C: 这是你们干的？
E: You did this?

C: 佩～拉～姐～姐～
E: Missss~ Pelaaaa~!

C: 住嘴，败类！
E: Shut up, scum!

C: 说什么让贝洛伯格变得更好…不过是痴人说梦而已。我连自己的人生都把握不住……
E: I thought I could make Belobog a better place... Well, I can't even manage my own life...

C: 嗯？你的反应有点奇怪…嗐，我就不多问了。
E: Hmm? That's a bit weird of you... Eh, I won't pry.

C: 下一个机关…啊，就在那扇门后面。
E: Where is the next mechanism... Oh, behind that gate.

C: 所以…「寒潮」其实是应人类的愿望产生的灾难……
E: So... the Eternal Freeze was a disaster brought about by a human wish...?

C: 我可不想这么快就到终点啊…我希望我的旅途永远没有尽头。
E: I don't wanna get to the end so soon... I want my journey to go on forever.

C: …冷静下来，希露瓦。
E: ...You need to come to your senses, Serval.

C: 七百年来，我们不断尝试，不断抗争，以为人性的光芒将指引我们走向复兴。结果呢？我们一败涂地！
E: Seven hundred years ago, we tried and fought unceasingly, believing that the radiance of human nature could shepherd us towards rejuvenation. And to what end? A crushing defeat!

C: 什么啊，我和瓦尔特先生可是时刻在轨道上挂念着各位呢，这次的开拓之旅很精彩喔。
E: What are you talking about — Welt and I have been up on the star rail missing you this whole time! You've got quite the Trailblazing expedition on your hands.

C: 再坚定的意志也难免动摇，这一天注定会到来。祂的佑护…注定会离我们而去。
E: The day will come when even the strongest of wills cannot help but give in to such influence. It is only a matter of time before the Amber Lord forsakes us.

C: 好啦，该办的都办完了…{NICKNAME}，老弟——辛苦你们俩陪我折腾这么久。
E: Well, that's all from me... {NICKNAME}, Gepard, thanks for sticking by my side with me throughout all of this.

C: 有什么需要帮助的吗？
E: Do you need help?

C: 尝试着联系。
E: Try to contact this number.

C: 我就不打扰您了，今天已经耽误了不少时间，现在得去丹鼎司医馆一趟。我们之后再联系吧，辛苦您了。
E: Don't let me take any more of your time. I need to head toward the Alchemy Commission apothecary. Let's catch up later. Thank you for your effort.

C: 哦！我记得你，我当时跑出去追那辆超速的星槎了，你就在我的背后。
E: Oh, I remember you! When I ran after the speeding starskiff, you were behind me.

C: 比赛赢了吗？
E: Did you win the race?

C: 必须要找到肇事者给你赔偿。
E: We should find the perpetrator to compensate you for your injury.

C: （这里杂物颇多，不过玉络说要<color=#dbc291ff>许多书都不在书架上</color>，恐怕得翻箱倒柜地找找了。）
E: (There are lots of things here, but Yuluo said <color=#dbc291ff>many books have been displaced from the bookshelves</color>. I might have to dig through everything to find the books.)

C: 我看完了。
E: I'm done.

C: 我回来了。
E: I'm back.

C: 什么？船票上写着明天……
E: What? The ticket is for tomorrow...

C: 请、请看！
E: P—please go ahead!

C: 我以为只要我写出最好的诗，她就会喜欢我。
E: I thought she would fall in love with me as long as I could write the best poem in the world.

C: 你从来没有真正了解过静斋。
E: You've never made the effort to understand Jingzhai.

C: 这破事结束之后，我还是继续做忧郁的蘑菇好了……
E: After this trifle is over, I'm better off continuing as a Gloomy Mushroom...

C: 询问
E: Inquire

C: 没错，之所以想成为驻外科员的理由可不是什么学术转向，而是他打算和自己倾心交流的仙舟「美丽狐仙」见上一面。
E: That's right. His real reason to request for a transfer is not because of an academic shift, but a desire to meet with the Xianzhou foxian beauty he was in contact with.

C: 一言为定。
E: Deal.

C: 大声点！
E: Speak louder!

C: （不敢说话）
E: (Dare not speak)

C: …你自己清楚你是不是好人，我不好说。
E: ...Only you would know if you're a good person or a villain, it's not for me to comment.

C: 真不愧是聪明人。
E: Smart move.

C: 现在是上班的时间。
E: It's office hours right now.

C: 那还真是善良呵。
E: What kindness.

C: 等等，站住，你是什么人？
E: Hey you, halt right there. Who might you be?

C: 我对这些不感兴趣。本来也只是输了一局，被这几个家伙抓来喊接头暗号。
E: I'm not interested in this sort of thing anyway. We've only lost round one, being forced to yell pass phrases by these fellas.

C: 不过嘛，也不用急于一时。这当口抓他去地衡司不过是个小偷小摸的罪名。俗话说的好，「放长线，钓大鱼」。
E: In any case, there is no need to be hasty. Catching him now would only get him charged with the petty crime of thievery. As the saying goes, "If you want to catch a big fish, cast a long line."

C: 我强忍的，这算工伤吧？
E: After all I've been through, am I eligible for worker comp?

C: 什么话，我只是纯粹对罗浮上的事情好奇罢了。何况，咱们俩难道不是互惠互利的忘年交嘛？
E: Nothing of that sort. I'm just curious about the happenings on the Luofu. Besides, aren't we close friends who help each other out?

C: 怎么了，{NICKNAME}？需要老夫再讲解一遍这次的考察目标吗？
E: Is there a problem, {NICKNAME}? Should I explain the objectives of this investigation again?

C: 不安全，这不要紧！当然，如果身边能有个武装考古学派的人陪着会更安全些。
E: It doesn't matter! Of course, it'll be safer if we have the escort of an Armed Archaeologist.

C: 关节炎先生不折磨你了？
E: Has Mr. Arthritis stopped giving you a hard time?

C: （陶德想看的「龙形光芒」…这里视野开阔，正适合远眺，在这附近找找看吧……）
E: (Todd wants to see the dragon-shaped ray of light... This place has an unobstructed view. Let's look around here...)

C: 到底发生什么事了？
E: What in the world happened?

C: 事关泄密，我把上面的指令交给你，你看了指示便会明白。
E: There's been a leak. Here are the orders — read them and you'll understand.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}确实帮助了我们，但我怕节外生枝…还是请回吧。
E: ...Thank you for helping us, but I'm worried you being here could just complicate matters further... Please leave us be.

C: 展开讲讲答案…
E: And the theories...?

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: （{NICKNAME}你来决定，要不要告诉他事情的真相吧？）
E: ({NICKNAME}, what do you think? Should we tell him the truth?)

C: 那不过是她一厢情愿，我从没考虑过这样的事情。不会吧，难道你们也以为我是她的爱人吗？
E: That was her wishful thinking — I wasn't interested in the slightest. No way, you thought so too?

C: 这个蜃影…应该是曾经和丹枫并肩战斗的云骑战士。
E: This Mirage Echo... he must be a Cloud Knight who fought alongside Dan Feng all those years ago.

C: 我以为交易很顺利。
E: Oh? This was all going so swimmingly.

C: 总而言之，幸亏这位罗刹先生途经此地，费了好大的力气，才把我们救了上来。
E: Anyway, thankfully Mr. Luocha was passing by and dragged us back to dry land. It took all his strength, I'll wager.

C: 没事，这真没事。你别离开地衡司去现场，帮他们查查机巧鸟的影像就够了。
E: Bah, not at all... Make sure you don't leave the Commission — just help them check the cycrane footage.

C: 当然没问题。不过，等这些事情都解决了再说吧。
E: No problem. Let's get this settled first, though.

C: 因为我最近熟读《渔公案》，已经可以说是咱们列车上响当当的推理大师了！
E: I've been familiarizing myself with The Angler Mystery lately. — I think it's safe to say I have the best investigative mind on the Express at this point...

C: （好的，接下来我将采取渔公的推理方式：将自己代入坏蛋的视角中。）
E: (Right. I'll be using the Angler's deductive method: Reconstruct what happened from the bad guy's perspective.)

C: （可是净砚小姐也说了，那扇门是军队的资产，长年紧锁。）
E: (But Miss Jingyan mentioned that gate is a military asset — it's locked all year round.)

C: 「打感情牌」
E: Trying to persuade

C: （这是罗刹的计谋，故意示弱，让对方麻痹大意。）
E: (This is Luocha's trick — feign weakness to get the gatekeeper to lower his guard.)

C: 上有老下有小就别做坏事了…
E: If Luocha's such an upstanding family man, shouldn't he have considered not stealing the Stellaron in the first place?

C: （你这是要去哪儿？不是要推理罗刹的去向吗？怎么往回走了？）
E: (Where are you going? We're trying to trace Luocha's movements — we shouldn't backtrack.)

C: 不，{NICKNAME}，现在搬救兵肯定来不及了。晴霓小姐不必担心，正是天舶司的人派我们前来救急的。
E: No, {NICKNAME}, it's too late to call for backup. Don't worry, Miss Qingni — the Sky-Faring Commission sent us to help.

C: 原来如此…
E: So that's why...

C: 莫非你选了星槎？
E: So you reached for the starskiff?

C: 虽然在这件事上，我们没办法直接帮到你，但也许能间接帮你找出一道说服令堂的突破口。
E: We can't help you too directly, but an indirect conversation like this might give us a clue on how to convince your mother.

C: 瞧你这话说的…吃鞋垫子还不会少块肉呢，你吃吗？
E: Just listen to yourself... I suppose you think if you ate your shoes I'd follow suit?

C: 暗格藏在哪儿了…
E: There must be a hidden compartment...

C: 说起来，采翼…我真的没想到你还会回来…开斗舰对你而言就这么有吸引力吗？
E: Say, Caiyi... I really didn't think you'd come back... Do you really like flying starskiffs that much?

C: 接下来要做什么，告诉我吧。
E: Tell me what we should do next.

C: 不过，只是普通的回答也太无聊了……
E: One rule though — please don't ask anything boring...

C: （也许可以欺骗云骑，转移他们的注意力……）
E: (Maybe you can lie to the Cloud Knights and distract them...)

C: 密信是假的，你们被骗了。
E: The order was faked. You've been fooled.

C: 真是毫无悬念啊。
E: *sigh* I'm getting used to it.

C: （不可能。如果是将军送来的信，为何会没有落款？）
E: (Unlikely. If the general sent the letter, he would've signed it.)

C: 还是我该称呼你今生的名字，丹恒？
E: Or should I call you by your name in this lifetime — "Dan Heng?"

C: 她…似乎是「饮月君」的战友。
E: I think... she was one of Imbibitor Lunae's comrades.

C: （努力回忆那人）
E: (Try hard to remember)

C: 我要走了。
E: I have to go.

C: 不过那个男人向来直接了当，「邀请」的方式也锋利无情。这样拐弯抹角的手法，不像他的作风。
E: It's an invitation alright, but this is too mysterious to be him.

C: 你想让「饮月君」付出代价？
E: You want to make Imbibitor Lunae pay for what they've done?

C: 将军认为，该如何平息这一浩劫？
E: What do you think should be done to put an end to it, General?

C: 汪汪，汪汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof, ruff ruff woof!

C: 小弟弟，怎么此刻不在神策府呆着，倒是关心起咱们一线的行动来了？
E: Yanqing? Why are you all the way out here on the front lines? Shouldn't you be back at the Seat of Divine Foresight?

C: 我当然愿赌服输，乖乖就缚，去幽囚狱受审，任由处置。
E: Then I will obediently follow you to The Shackling Prison and receive whatever judgment awaits me there. Don't worry, I'll keep my end of the bargain.

C: 啊…只是觉得出个声响，方便你知道我在哪里。
E: Uh... Just making conversation — I wanted you to know I was still here.

C: 我…我接下了她的剑？
E: I... I deflected it?

C: 星槎不能进出。重犯也走不脱。
E: Starskiffs are blocked from entering or exiting. There's no way the fugitive got through...

C: 只有刚才那一剑，还不至于让人失望透顶。
E: Your final move... was the only one that didn't disappoint.

C: 如果接下来你还找到了类似的，可能与「药王秘传」有关的线索，请来神策府交给我。神策府现在很需要这样的第一手资料。
E: If you come across any similar clues about the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, come and find me at the Seat of Divine Foresight — these kinds of firsthand accounts are exactly what we require.

C: 五百遍也太多了…
E: <unbreak>500</unbreak> times seems excessive...

C: 来，我来替你抄经。当云骑之前，我在神策府干了一百五十多年的文职工作，抄写对我而言简直是小菜一碟。
E: You can trust me with the transcription. I spent over <unbreak>150</unbreak> years pen-pushing in the Seat of Divine Foresight before I became a Cloud Knight — I could do this in my sleep.

C: 你认错人了…
E: I think you've got the wrong person...

C: 还没有。
E: Not yet.

C: 他们斗不过我的。
E: They can't take me in a fight.

C: 好在你手里的这一副「龙蟠虬跃」拯救了我。服下了这副药，我终于成为了凡人无法企及的强者。
E: Fortunately, the Draught of Draconic Surge — the prescription you hold in your hand — rescued me. Once I took that medicine, I became more powerful than any mortal could ever dream of.

C: 青镞让我向你咨询…
E: Qingzu asked me to find you...

C: 哈，我知道，那是金人，仙舟的服务机巧。
E: Ha, that's something I do know. It's an aurumaton — they're service robots on the Xianzhou.

C: 「流光忆庭」？你是{RUBY_B#浮黎}流光天君{RUBY_E#}的人？就是你在隔绝我的观察？
E: The Garden of Recollection? Did the {RUBY_B#Fuli}Glowswather{RUBY_E#} send you? Are you the one meddling with my observations?

C: 不要回头，继续向前走。
E: Don't look back. Keep going forward.

C: 大衍穷观阵开始演算了，她抽不开身。
E: She is busy running the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.

C: 她曾是最后的公主。
E: She was the last princess.

C: 你确定这东西安全无辐射吗？
E: Are you sure it's not radioactive?

C: 真是吓死了，突然就开始打架了…我看看，这里有停云小姐、杨叔、景元将军…还有{NICKNAME}……
E: That freaked me out — I don't like people suddenly deciding to fight me... Now, let's see who's here. Tingyun, Welt, General Jing Yuan... and also {NICKNAME}...

C: 哼哼，希望这份可靠能取代我在你心里那个著名废话表演艺术家的光辉形象～
E: Hmph, I hope the "best" version of me can overwrite the gloriously absurd version that lives in your subconsciousness.
Hmm...

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 我当然希望能收留她…或者说，仅凭最基本的道德判断也能得出结论——既然我们发现了她，就必须照顾好她。
E: Of course I hope we can take her in... Or rather, I can offer a conclusion based on the most basic of moral judgments: Now that we've found her, we have to look after her.

C: 得赶紧组织人力检修一番…可恶，若是穷观阵有所损伤，我会心疼死的。
E: I must organize an inspection of the Matrix... Ugh, fingers crossed there's no damage done.

C: 那我…是不是可以回去了？
E: So then... can I go back?

C: 你刚才说，对我感兴趣？
E: Did you just say you're interested in me?

C: 恰恰相反，这很有趣！
E: Just the opposite — this is fascinating!

C: 云璃小姐，对善战之人来说，演武仪典确实是个一展身手，博取名声的好机会。
E: Miss Yunli, for talented swordmasters like you, the Wardance is a perfect opportunity to show off your skills and make a name for yourself.

C: 在仪式开始前，请允许我感谢骑士银枝。感谢他让我们得知宝剑的来历，也感谢他一路护送，令我等不辱使命，平安抵达。
E: Before the ceremony officially commences, I want to express my gratitude to the Knight Argenti. Thank you for enlightening us about the sword's origin and for escorting it here safely so that we may complete this ceremony.

C: {NICKNAME}，能麻烦你跟着云璃吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, could you please keep an eye on Yunli for me?

C: （不出意外的话，云璃就在这附近吧……）
E: (Unless I'm mistaken, Yunli should be around here somewhere...)

C: 而要夺回魔剑，就要同杀孽缠身的剑主决斗，时刻徘徊在生死边缘。她收回魔剑三百余柄，所受过的致命伤也有三百余处。
E: And to reclaim those swords, she has to duel the bloodthirsty wielders, teetering on the edge of life and death. She has taken back over three hundred cursed swords and has suffered the same number of fatal wounds.

C: 就算有朝一日她熔毁了所有魔剑，到那时她的人生又该去向何方呢？
E: Even if she manages to melt down all the cursed swords one day, what will she do with her life after?

C: 这柄孤云本应该成为一个契机——我会告诉她，她记忆中那个「父亲」并非是一成不变的，就算是她怨恨的含光也能打造出「英雄之剑」。
E: I thought this sword could be an opportunity. I wanted to tell her that her father wasn't all evil, that even the man she resents so much managed to forge a true Sword of Heroes.

C: 诸位，我已经在这里等候多时了。
E: I've been waiting for you here for quite a while.

C: 这株金色的树苗是…？
E: What's this golden sapling...?

C: 出示证物「玫瑰花瓣」
E: Present evidence: rose petal

C: 能传唤受害者吗？
E: Can we summon the victim?

C: 哎，这戒指侧面还刻了一行字：「钟珊家传」……
E: Hey, there's something engraved inside the ring: "Zhongshan Family Heirloom..."

C: …没错，正是如此！
E: ...That's right. That's the one!

C: 果然…这样下去根本没完没了，不是办法啊。
E: So that's it... This is just going to go on and on forever. We can't do that.

C: 早上困困的爬不起床，中午东奔西跑到处忙，晚上累到趴趴，可还要抬起手刷牙——好可怜的花火呀！
E: When sleepy in the morning, she can't get out of bed. She runs about all afternoon in a fluster, so is exhausted by evening — but has to still raise a hand to hold a toothbrush. Poor Sparkle!

C: 房间里到处都是血啊！「花火大人的尸体」就躺在正中央，面色白得像雪，一看就知道<color=#dbc291ff>死去多时</color>了……
E: The room was covered in spattered blood! Miss Sparkle's body was lying right in the middle, her face as white as snow. One look told me she'd been <color=#dbc291ff>dead for some time</color>...

C: 他刚偷了佐罗的领带，正欲逃走，却看见赢走自己传家宝的花火大人。于是他闯入试衣间中，试图讨回戒指……
E: He'd stolen Lefton's tie and was just about to get away when he saw Miss Sparkle — the one who'd stolen his family fortune from him. So he darted into the changing room, and tried to get back his ring...

C: 就像今天，只要有人接引你们来此就行了，是青雀也好，白雀也罢，一点也不重要嘛。
E: Just like today — would it have mattered if "Baique" had brought you here instead of Qingque? It makes no difference at all.

C: 事情办得怎样了？本座仍未感应到三座阵基的联结。
E: How are things progressing? I have yet to sense the connection between the three base terminals.

C: 星神怎么可能会被杀死。
E: How could an Aeon possibly be killed?

C: 令「星神」陨落的方法，人类目前所知的，有三种。
E: Currently, there are three ways an Aeon can perish known to humanity.

C: 这倒也不坏。毕竟仙舟才是真正经历冒险的人，能得偿所愿也是好事啦。
E: That doesn't sound so bad. The Xianzhou people went on a great adventure and got what they wanted in the end, right?

C: 各位，抄家伙！咱们一起把这劳什子的根须给它铲平喽！
E: Take hold of your weapons, young comrades! Let's raze these roots to the ground!

C: 听呦呦鹿鸣！
E: Go hoof some fun!

C: 小女孩接下药，磕磕绊绊地顺着原路返回。
E: The little girl takes the medicine and returns the way she came.

C: 那我们就暂时别过吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: See you soon, {NICKNAME}.

C: 没问题，看吧。西衍先生说了，即使对方不买书、只看书，也绝不能赶客。宁可不赚钱，也不能寒了读书人的心。
E: Go right ahead. Mr. Xiyan said that making bookworms feel at home is more important than getting them to buy something.

C: 好了，在下还有些事需要处理，那么…我们就此别过吧。
E: Well then, that's that. I've still got some other business to attend to, so... shall we say goodbye for now?

C: 希望下次见面时，我能有机会看清你的模样。
E: Perhaps the next time we meet, I'll be able to see you in the true sense of the word.

C: 神策府的猎狗是如何向你形容这场内战的？代表正庙正神的帝弓司命，在宇宙中追猎邪神寿瘟祸祖，而药王秘传是邪神的爪牙？
E: What did the minions at the Seat of Divine Foresight tell you about this conflict? That the Reignbow Arbiter is the emissary of the righteous? That the Arbiter is chasing the heathen Plagues Author across the stars, while the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus abet their heresy?

C: （放过丹枢）
E: (Let Dan Shu go)

C: 你就把我当成是引荐新人，劝人向善的导师吧？
E: Just see me as a tutor who recruits new followers and encourages people to do good.

C: 是我干的，怎么地吧？
E: Yes, I did. So what?

C: 别啊，暴力多不好啊。践行「丰饶」之道，要的就是爱惜生命，可不能把自己弄伤啊。
E: It's not good to resort to violence. As practitioners of the way of Abundance, we should cherish life instead of hurting ourselves.

C: 重申，我没想加入贵帮。
E: Let me reiterate that I have no intention of joining.

C: 这里不就被琥珀王看护着吗？
E: Isn't this place protected by the Amber Lord?

C: 我、我明白了。我认可，这确实是一批值得放生的小宝贝。
E: I—I've got it. Indeed, these helpless babies are really worth releasing.

C: 这…真是一场精彩的对决啊！
E: What a great duel this is!

C: 没错，要不是你们两个王八蛋找来这种鬼东西…我又怎么会……
E: Exactly. If you two scoundrels hadn't brought me this cursed heap of metal, I wouldn't have...

C: 她们俩的脑子要是稍微清楚一点，也不会相信那东西是植物啊！如果她们能阻止我一下，何至于变成现在这样啊！
E: If they had been more clearheaded, they wouldn't have believed it was a plant! They could have stopped me and avoided all the damage that ensued!

C: 那家伙聚合了太多岁阳…
E: They've consumed too many heliobi...

C: 就是说啊，素裳原本还不相信绥园闹鬼。但判官出现了……
E: That's what I'm saying! At first, Sushang didn't believe that Fyxestroll Garden was haunted. But after the judges showed up...

C: 没错，我来绥园取材，有过充分的调查。
E: I know, right? I did a lot of research before I decided to film here...

C: 此地不宜久留，请即刻离开。
E: This place is dangerous. You should leave at once.

C: 我也找不到出路，全靠你了。
E: I can't find the way out either. It's all up to you.

C: 你把小姑娘惹哭了，有意思吗？
E: Does it amuse you to make a little girl cry?

C: 呜呜呜…呜……
E: *sob*

C: 你们这一路没遇到什么特殊情况吧？
E: Did you encounter anything strange on your way here?

C: 不要妄自菲薄。岁阳无法占夺由另一只岁阳依附的肉身——这便是汝身为判官的绝对优势。
E: Do not underestimate yourself. A heliobus cannot possess a body that is already possessed by another heliobus — such is your absolute advantage as a judge.

C: {NICKNAME}，藿藿，在同恚炎交战前，先拿上这个。
E: You two, take this before we fight Furynox.

C: 感谢各位判官大人替我扫清障碍，收集来岁阳碎片。
E: Thank you, Your Honors, for helping me clear so many obstacles and collect so many heliobus fragments.

C: 有无数次想过要是没有这家伙，自己现在过的该有多舒坦啊，可是…可是真到了离开他的时刻…我…我心里却空落落的。
E: ...and I've thought so much about how much better my life would be if I never met him... but now that he's actually gone... I feel so empty inside...

C: 孩子？身为冥差，他经历的人生要比你多的多。
E: Kid? As a spiritfarer, he's already experienced more than you could in a lifetime.

C: 浮烟直直盯着你，不再说话，阴鸷和谋算在他的双眼中闪过。
