E: Cirrus stares at you in silence, and you can tell from their eyes that they are conspiring.

C: 周遭一切如同无事发生，恢复如初。
E: Everything returns to normal.

C: 雪衣大人虽然冷冰冰的，却从来不会数落我…这说话的口气不像雪衣大人，倒像是尾巴。
E: Ah! M—Madam Xueyi can be a bit of a meanie, but she'd never talk to me like that... That doesn't sound like her... Come to think of it, it kinda sounds like Tail.

C: 穿过铜镜。
E: Pass through the mirror.

C: 快看四周，尾巴大爷，咱们似乎已经摸到这个幻境的边缘了……
E: Look around us, Mr. Tail. I think we're at the edge of the illusion...

C: 别别别，一边去。
E: Hey, hey, hey — get away from me...

C: 我…我明白了，老师！我一定会努力的。
E: I... I understand, sir! I will do my best.

C: 该给它取个什么名字呢……
E: What name should I give it...

C: 你已经很久没来找过我了…此时此刻，你出现在这里…你想要什么？你在渴求什么？
E: You haven't come to find me for a long time... And yet, you're here now.... What do you want? What do you desire?

C: …哪怕要强迫你留在这里。
E: ...Even if I have to force you to stay here.

C: 「那些未完成的画，仍在流淌的歌」
E: "Those unfinished paintings and the songs that are still playing."

C: （希望一切安好…要不还是回现实问问乔凡娜吧。）
E: (I hope everything's all right... Why not return to reality and check in with Giovanna.)

C: 啊，我的签名……
E: Ah, my autograph...

C: 这是我在《远星旧梦》那部电影里的台词，它非常贴合我当下的感受。
E: This was one of my lines in the movie Ancient Dreams of Distant Stars. It feels very appropriate in my current situation.

C: 没人回应。
E: No answer.

C: 难道是…难道是我刚才打扫的时候忘记锁门了？
E: Did... Did I forget to lock it after I finished cleaning?

C: 不然的话，不然的话…他们肯定会判我工作失职、禁止我再入梦的！
E: Or else, or else... I know that they will deem me negligent of my duties and forbid me from ever dreaming again!

C: 我需要再考虑一下……
E: I need some time to think...

C: …现实点吧，罗伯。我们活在一个没有希望的世界里，什么星际旅行、银河之星，那些名词都和我们无关。
E: ...Wake up, Rob. We live in a world without hope. These concepts of "interstellar travel" and "cosmic star" have nothing to do with us.

C: 我不想让你接触那些东西，就是因为……
E: I am trying to keep you from those things because...

C: 该如何验证我们的成果呢？
E: How would we test the results?

C: 莱斯利•迪恩是完美的。他没有缺陷，他……
E: Lesley Dean is perfect. He has no flaws, and he...
*sobs*

C: 匹诺康尼的城景若虚若实地映在他的身上——皮肤之下不见骨血，只有灯烛与星光。
E: The cityscape of Penacony reflected on his body, half illusion, half true. No blood or bones could be seen under his skin, only candles and starlight.

C: 很抱歉，我知道无名客都身怀绝技，但空艇事务繁杂…还是找位经验丰富的大副对接更稳妥。
E: I apologize. I know the Nameless are all masters of their craft, but airship affairs are quite complicated... It's better to look for a first mate with ample experience to handle them.

C: 二号候选人「冷芯」，优雅的智械，拥有管理学博士学位。
E: Number two is Caldwick, an elegant Intellitron, armed with a PhD in Management.

C: 把我的模样涂上去吧！
E: Spray-paint my face on it!

C: 大副人还怪好的。
E: The first mate is a pretty nice guy.

C: 基于我们的成功，我建议我们对空艇进一步改变——有几位船员主动向我反馈了一件事，他们有一处地方有些问题，恐怕需要您和我实地走访一下。
E: With this successful endeavor in hand, I'd like to suggest a few improvements to be made to the airship — a couple of crew members have come forth with feedback on an issue they're facing in a certain area. I'll need your help to conduct a site visit with me.

C: 这里不是船长室嘛，之前我来替您准备交接事项时，发现这里空了一块。
E: This is the captain's cabin, no? When I came to prepare for your handover, I realized that it has a blank area.

C: 您、您好……
E: H—Hello...

C: 好了好了，不多说了！假期的时间可是很宝贵的，赶紧帮我办入住吧。
E: Fine then, say no more! Vacation time is precious, so hurry up and help me check-in.

C: 一个念头突然从你脑中闪过——还记得之前来找你续房的奇怪二人组吗？机甲牛仔波提欧和纯美骑士银枝？
E: A thought suddenly flashes through your mind. Still remember that strange duo who requested your service to extend their stay before? Boothill the cyborg cowboy and Argenti the Knight of Beauty?

C: 从你嘴里说出来，倒也正常…
E: Why am I not surprised to hear this from you...

C: 罗伊罗伊飞速逃离了你们的视线，你对着历代无名客发誓，他绝对是你见过的步频最快的皮皮西人……
E: Royroy flees at lightning speed and disappears. You swear to your Nameless predecessors that he is definitely the fastest Pepeshi you have ever seen...

C: 嗨呀，你们好！
E: Hi, everyone!

C: 我不会，但说不定老奥帝会。
E: I wouldn't, but maybe Old Oti would.

C: 啊，这个，确实…没有参加。
E: Ah, well, no... I didn't.

C: 说话还真是门学问呐…
E: Communication is quite an art...

C: 要不貊泽你再多聊两句？
E: Moze, how about you chat a little longer?

C: 灵砂大人，丹鼎司不能少了你。
E: Miss Lingsha, the Alchemy Commission cannot go on without you!

C: 真羡慕你啊，我什么都做不到，我就只是一个在工造司的混日子的废物…遇到危险也只顾着自己逃命，贪生怕死，一点工造司的匠～人～风～骨～都没有……
E: I really envy you. I can't do anything. I'm just a piece of trash wasting my days away at the Artisanship Commission... Every time I come across something dangerous, I flee in fear. I'm such a chicken, and I've got no sense of ar~ti~san~ship~...

C: 这是一份设计手稿，手稿上解释了「匣里流光」的工作原理。似乎这样的能量武器与一种叫做「岁阳」的妖物有关，设计案署名是公输师傅。
E: This is a design manuscript that explains the working principles behind a Luminflux Pyxis, which seems to be related to a kind of demon called Heliobi. And this design is attributed to Master Gongshu.

C: 这是一份设计手稿，手稿上陈列了星槎的结构设计。设计案提到了一种轻型龙骨的培育模式，设计者提到这样的星槎转弯半径小、速度快、航程远优于市面上的其他星槎。
E: This is a manuscript about the design of a type of starskiff, showcasing its structural finesse. The blueprint boasts a cultivation method for a lightweight keel that promises tighter turns, faster speeds, and much longer voyages, far outstripping any other vessel on the market.

C: 我认识两个说相声的人！
E: Oh, oh, I know a comedy duo who does crosstalk!

C: 既然这样说了，那就走吧，我们去桥上看看星槎。
E: Let's go then. We can go to the bridge and watch from there.

C: 我也是这样想的。
E: That's what I was thinking, too.

C: 我会回工造司再去找你的。
E: I'll be looking for you back at the Commission soon.

C: 我照着师傅剩下的手稿，补全了他的设计。造出了这么一坨垃圾，不可燃的……
E: I finished up the design according to my master's manuscript and produced a pile of incombustible junk...

C: 莱恩老师不是死了吗？
E: Isn't Master Ryan already dead?

C: {NICKNAME}，你最近好像不忙？要是需要帮手，我随时联系你。
E: ...You're not too busy these days, right? I'll give you a shout if I need help.

C: 既然你都问了…
E: Since you asked...

C: 哈哈哈，三肢发达才准确。既然你们都同意我的推断，那干脆就顺着这个思路找起来吧。
E: Hahaha, I'm not just biceps and steel, y'know. Well, if you all agree with what I said, let's go prove it.

C: 检索失败。「大奔」与本机距离过远。需要开启追踪功能。
E: Signal not found. Big Ben is currently too far away from this unit. Tracking function must be enabled.

C: <size=36>「熔锤出身的勇士——」</size>
E: <size=36>"The Moltammerville warrior..."</size>

C: …刚才那算怎么回事？「熔锤镇出身的勇士」，后面还有一大堆……
E: ...What was that supposed to be? "The Moltammerville warrior"...?

C: 接下来去哪？
E: Where to next?

C: 胜负已分。
E: The winner has been decided.

C: 虽然有些难为情，但我还是想托爸爸把这个小本本送给你……
E: It's a bit embarrassing, but I wanted my Dad to give you this notebook...

C: 「可是，史瓦罗太强大了，我们肯定没有胜算！」小伙伴们听说以后，心里都敲起了退堂鼓。
E: "But Svarog is too strong! We'll never win!" My friends are gonna all wanna back out when they hear about this.

C: 时间倒也不算紧迫。这次「开拓之旅」情况特殊，在去往下一站前，列车也应做好补给、支援方面的准备。
E: Mm, there's certainly no rush. This trailblazing expedition is quite unique, and the Express needs to be fully stocked and prepared before moving on to the next stop.

C: 报案吧，场面肯定很精彩…
E: You go file the report, and I go fetch the popcorn. It's gonna be quite the show...

C: 诸位，我和炎老还有些事要商量。眼下让彦卿招待几位客人与云璃小姐先去客栈入住。
E: Well, everyone, Elder Huaiyan and I have some business to discuss. For now, Yanqing, why don't you entertain our guests and take Miss Yunli to the inn?

C: 彦卿领命。
E: I'm on it.

C: 再等等。
E: Not yet.

C: 还记得吗？在你履任之初，我曾告诉过你，「帝弓天将的战场不仅在仙舟之外」。上阵折冲，对内斡旋…将军这个名头所承载的重量要远胜于它的字面意思。
E: Do you remember when you accepted this position? I told you that an Arbiter-General's battlefield goes beyond the physical one. You'll need to lead and manage everything on the Xianzhou... The title of Arbiter-General holds a weight far greater than its literal meaning.

C: 敝上听说，罗浮之上鳞渊境中最近多了一处奇景，十分壮观，想来是赏景去了。
E: Master heard about a spectacular view in Scalegorge Waterscape. I believe she went there to enjoy it.

C: 论说话水平，还得是你！
E: You're a real master of conversation!

C: 看他这心事重重的样子，我还真有点放心不下…我们陪你一起去工造司吧！
E: He looks like he has a lot on his mind. We can't just let him go alone... Why don't we accompany you to the Artisanship Commission?

C: 依照法律提出建议
E: Make proposals from the legal perspective.

C: 也许需要详加审问全体船员，才能排除这个隐患？
E: We may need to interrogate every one of your crew to eliminate this potential risk?

C: 我当然知道自己站在仙舟的疆域上，但是违反了流程，我回去也是要受处分的啊！
E: Yeah, I get it. I know I'm on the Xianzhou, but if I violate the IPC regulations, I'll be in deep trouble when I get back!

C: 这怎么能说无所谓？
E: It doesn't matter? How can you say that?

C: 各位大人，初步查验了一番，确如同匠人担忧的那般，其中藏有生物组织。
E: Our preliminary inspection shows that there is indeed hidden biological tissues inside, just like the craftsman feared.

C: 呼叫将军，呼叫将军…
E: Maybe I should call the general...

C: 只是侥幸罢了。
E: You got lucky.

C: 是啊，的确是位极有压迫感的将军。
E: I agree. General Feixiao is indeed impressive.

C: 这三位甘冒奇险，随景元出入死地，驱逐了首恶幻胧，也揭破药王秘传的阴谋。个中细节，炎老有什么想知道的，尽可以提问。
E: These three braved great dangers, accompanying me to perilous places, defeating the chief culprit Phantylia, and uncovering the conspiracies of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. If you wish to know more, please feel free to ask us.

C: 三月七你倒是个体贴人。放心吧，不勤修苦练个十来年还教不到绝招呢。你别害怕，以朱明剑术的厉害，只要跟我学上几招，包你受用无穷。
E: That's considerate of you, March 7th. But don't worry. It'll take you at least a decade of hard training before you can even start learning special moves. No need to freak out – a few Zhuming swordplay tricks will mean you'll be more than equipped.

C: 可我们本就是来观礼的？
E: But aren't we here to attend the ceremony, anyway?

C: 职责所在，我本来不必向外人解释这么多。但你我曾并肩作战，我不打算瞒你，也希望这些话你过耳就忘，可以吗？
E: Well, duty calls. Perhaps I shouldn't have mentioned all of this to an uninvolved person. But since we once fought together, I didn't want to keep you in the dark. Perhaps pretending you didn't hear any of this would be for the best.

C: 造访「幽狱底层」，授权完成。
E: Visiting the Shackling Prison's crypts. Authorization complete.

C: 经历短暂却致命的失联，被封锁幽囚狱重回掌控。尽管列车无名客一行并无大碍，但曜青来使中却有一人遭到劫持。
E: After a brief but devastating loss of communications, the locked-down Shackling Prison is once more under control. The Express' Nameless may have emerged unharmed, but one of the Yaoqing envoys has been taken hostage.

C: 不过，有言在先，习剑是为了锻炼体魄、心智与力量，不是朝夕可达的游戏。
E: Let me make it clear: Swordplay training is about improving your body, mind, and strength. It's not a casual game you can master overnight.

C: 将军能指教我剑术，却不能教我挥剑的理由。他对我说：挥剑的理由，必须由我自己寻得。为此，彦卿百般苦恼，辗转反侧。
E: While the general could teach me the art of swordplay, he couldn't teach me why I should keep on going. He said the reason must come from within myself. I've been struggling to find that reason.

C: 你脑袋里不也一样没别的吗！
E: I bet you've got nothing better on your mind!

C: ……其实，这儿本是不允许随便擅闯的地方。只是大家是客人，我才带各位来此看看。
E: ...Actually, this is a restricted area, but since you're all guests, I made an exception so you could take a look around.

C: 什么话？
E: What did I say?

C: 拍我干什么？拍他们啊？
E: Why are you filming me? Shouldn't you be filming them?

C: 正是。直来直往，我喜欢。
E: Straight to the point. I like it.

C: 看来你和星核猎手关系匪浅。但这群通缉犯形迹可疑，你这样诚实自白，我倒是欣赏，只是你得明白，这可是在往自己身上揽嫌疑喔？
E: Looks like you're quite close to the Stellaron Hunters. However, I must warn you that they are wanted felons. While I appreciate your honesty, being honest about this topic might make you look suspicious to some, you know?

C: （他要离开了…快想想办法…就像过去那样，椒丘，你这个无能为力的废物…想想办法啊……）
E: (He's getting away... Do something, Jiaoqiu... It's just like the old days, you useless loser... Just do something...)

C: 猎物狡诈凶蛮，猎人更要以耐心撑持。犹如挽弓射敌，蓄力满弦，方能一击必杀。一旦呼雷失去耐心，露出爪牙，便是解决它的最佳时机。
E: When facing cunning and ferocious prey, the hunter must be more patient, biding their time to seize the golden chance for a decisive blow. Once Hoolay loses his patience and reveals himself, that's when we'll strike.

C: 熟悉的配方，熟悉的手法。
E: The formula and technique seem oddly familiar.

C: 我所行所求，不过是「问心无愧」四字。但长生种漫长的一生中，真能无愧吗？灵砂小姐为师父的判罚牵累，也不得不远走他乡，对个中缘由一无所知。
E: All I ever want is to have a clear conscience. However, can long-life species truly achieve that goal in their long-drawn lives? For example, you were implicated along with your mentor and forced to leave your homeland without knowing the truth.

C: 至于这些使用云吟的刺客，让龙师身上的这份嫌疑又加重了一些。
E: And the presence of assassins capable of using cloudhymn magic deepens my suspicions about the Preceptors.

C: 你们就是靠着这种手段混进仙舟的。如果不是我对步离人的气味足够熟悉…也无法判断真假。
E: So, that's how you managed to infiltrate the Xianzhou ship. If I hadn't been so familiar with the scent of borisin, I wouldn't have been able to tell.

C: 港口看起来并无异状。你心中充满了忐忑。
E: Nothing seems out of the ordinary in the harbor. You're filled with anxiety.

C: 现在客人要一个人走吗？起步价六巡镝，您打算去哪儿？
E: You want to leave alone now? Sure, the starting fare is six strales. Where do you want to go?

C: 你不是我们的人，但你身上有些熟悉的味道。
E: You're not one of us, but I smell a familiar scent on you.

C: 我们收到了上级指示，为了避免无关人等干扰云骑检查，我们特地将这里封锁了起来，请你们理解我们的工作。
E: Yeah, we've received orders from the higher-ups, so we've blocked off this area to prevent any interference with our inspection. Thank you for your understanding.

C: 我可从未下过这样的命令。
E: No, I never issued such an order.

C: 步离人的兽舰已经在方壶上登陆了…要不了多久，这儿也会被攻破。
E: The borisin beast ships have already landed on the Fanghu... It won't be long before this place is overrun as well.

C: 我听得很清楚…准备一支「颠踬散」。我们必须现在开始手术！
E: Loud and clear... Get me some Tumbledust! We've got to start the operation right now!

C: 「月狂」，狼之赐福，狐之诅咒。对于步离人来说，在战斗中被月狂撕裂身体，兽化变形…是为无上喜乐。但对你们这些自愈力有限的狐人来说，它是死路一条。
E: Moon Rage, a blessing for wolves, and a curse for foxes. For borisin, to have their bodies torn apart by Moon Rage and transform into a beast... is the ultimate joy, but for you foxians with poor regenerative abilities, it means certain death.

C: 末度，我们是位居食物链顶端的强者。
E: Mok Tok, we're the apex predators at the top of the hierarchy.

C: 是假的。
E: It's not true.

C: 汪汪。
E: Woof woof.

C: 交给我吧！
E: Leave it to me!

C: 欢迎来到强者的世界。
E: Welcome to the world of the strong.

C: 接下来，不管你逃到何处，飞霄将军都会逮到你，送你步上末度的后尘。
E: From now on, no matter where you run, General Feixiao will catch you and send you to the same fate as Mok Tok...

C: 那就尽可能让他看见竞锋舰。天舶司会清空航道，减少其他星槎通航。这样一来，当天上只剩下一艘船时，他便有了不得不去的理由。
E: Then we just need to draw his attention to the Skysplitter. We'll have the Sky-Faring Commission clear all transport lanes and cut down starskiff traffic. Then, when the time comes, there will be only one ship in the sky, and he will have no reason not to attack.

C: 那么，你能「治好」战争吗？
E: Okay... Then can you "cure" war?

C: 云璃师父你在哪儿？
E: Master Yunli, where are you?

C: 我…不是怪物！
E: I am not a monster!

C: 可惜，在这里只有一位师父，我还好哦。
E: Unfortunately, only one master is here. I'm doing fine.

C: 大海捞针肯定不是办法，你有没有什么其他线索？比如他可能会去哪里？
E: This is like finding a needle in a haystack. Do you have other clues? Like places he might go?

C: …你真以为猎犬认你这个土皇帝啊？笑死了，演的自己都信了吧？
E: ...You really think the Bloodhounds recognize such a lame Emperor as yourself? That's hilarious. You really believe in your own act?

C: 对不起！我以后再也不在工作时间沉迷玩乐了……
E: I'm sorry! I'll never slack off during work hours again...

C: 好…好的……
E: Y—Yes...

C: 昏君，老子直接宰了你！！！
E: You repulsive tyrant, I will end you today!!!

C: 她小时候不是这样的人。
E: She wasn't like that when she was young.

C: 因为这里是匹诺康尼，全银河最大的销金窟，充斥着邪恶、贪婪与背叛。
E: Because this is Penacony, the greatest money pit in the cosmos. It is full of evil, greed and betrayal.

C: 为臣民服务，是朕的义务和荣幸！
E: It is my duty and honor to serve my subjects!

C: 听上去很了不起。
E: Sounds impressive.

C: …所以我开始了逃亡，我不想穷尽一生都活在一片阴影之下。
E: ...So, I decided to escape, not wanting to live the rest of my life being controlled by others.

C: 当赞达尔用古老且陌生的语言将「虚数之树」几个字书于纸上…他的眼中看到了什么？
E: What did Zandar see when he was recording tomes on the "Imaginary Tree" in his strange and ancient language?

C: 我想，查德威克博士该休息了。
E: I think it's time for Dr. Chadwick to rest.

C: 家主大人？
E: Esteemed head?

C: 还有其他问题吗？
E: Do you have any other questions?

C: 它属于曾经的「折纸筑梦师」费歇尔，也是我的导师——他在晚年时带领我们这些折纸大学的学生一起整理了隐夜鸫的家史资料，这照片应该就是那时放进去的。
E: It once belonged to Origami Dreamweaver Fischer, who was also my mentor. In his later years, he led us Paperfold University students in compiling a family history of the Nightingales. This photo should have been from that time.

C: 谢谢你，不知名的好心人。我们得加快脚步了。
E: Thank you, kind stranger. We must hurry.

C: 筑梦师失去了他的最后的家人，于是在匹诺康尼的最下方建了一处庇护所，就此躲在里面。
E: The Dreamweaver lost the last of his family, so he built a shelter at the bottom of Penacony and is hiding there.

C: 桌上放着一张略有破损的《逐梦客时讯》，中间印着这样一条报道。
E: A mildly worn Dreamchaser Bulletin rests on the table, with a news headline printed in its middle.

C: 不过…我的恩师费歇尔先生曾赠给我一句话，希望它也能为你提供几分宽慰。
E: But... my mentor Mr. Fischer once told me this. I hope it can bring you some sort of comfort.

C: 我要买一箱食物。
E: I want a crate of food.

C: 她皮笑肉不笑地捧着那个苹果，把它塞进你的怀里。
E: She offers the apple with a awkward grin, thrusting it into your arms.

C: 最开始，吾师说自己有门路搞到药，但必须由我把药带出城。他为我指明一处小巷，让我在一刻钟后回来拿药……
E: In the beginning, Master said he had a way to get the medicine, but I had to be the one to transport it out of the city. He directed me to an alley, and told me to return to take the medicine from him when a quint had passed...

C: 站在我左手边的是辩方代表，嫌犯的弟子，学者帕拉滕。他认为考虑到嫌犯确实救了许多人命，应当轻判。
E: To my left is the defendant's representative and student of the accused, Scholar Palaten. He believes that the sentence should be light, considering the actions of the accused did indeed save many lives.

C: 出于这个理由，我认为……
E: In light of this reason, I believe that...

C: 你说处死就处死？
E: He should be executed just because you say so?

C: 你不怕外邦人反抗？
E: You're not afraid of an outlander revolt?

C: 有事我真上！
E: You can count on me!

C: 刚刚没掉落什么稀有材料啊。
E: I didn't see any rare loot just now?

C: 我就知道这任务没完事儿。
E: I knew this mission wouldn't just end like that.

C: 金丝…帕里斯的…被偷走了……
E: The golden thread... Paris'... It was stolen...

C: 它的位置每个故事说的都不一样，有的说它在翁法罗斯的最中心，有的说它在法吉娜的海底…还有的说它在一群蝴蝶的背上，于高空中飘荡。
E: As for its location, every story says something different. Some say that it is at the center of Amphoreus. Some say it is in the ocean depths of Phagousa... Some even say that it is on the back of a flock of butterflies, floating high in the skies.

C: 失败的纷争利器，负罪的悬锋子民。残躯已无法继续征战，荣耀的悬锋会将你背负耻辱的躯壳粉碎，让死亡的手来抹除悬锋的污垢。
E: You have failed as an instrument of strife, and you bring guilt on the citizens of Kremnos. Your broken body is capable of battle no more. The glory of Kremnos will smash your body that bears such shame and allow the hands of death to purify this stain on Kremnos.

C: 你们瑟希斯的传人真是保守，在「浪漫」面前，万物都应一视同仁……
E: You descendants of Cerces are far too narrow-minded. In the eyes of "romance," all should be seen as equal.

C: 终于找到你了。欢喜月之初的天宫庆典多么热闹，为何独自遁逃，躲在此处？
E: I finally found you. The palace's Month of Joy celebration is so lively, but why are you hiding here alone?

C: 帕里斯在找你。
E: Paris is looking for you.

C: 塔兰顿的天秤解密太无聊了！
E: Talanton's scale puzzle is boring!

C: 唉，墨涅塔啊，请赐予我浪漫的奇迹吧！
E: Oh Mnestia, please grant me a romantic miracle!

C: 你俩进展这么快？
E: Aren't you two moving a bit fast?

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 阁下，我想您多半是误会了。
E: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, I think you're mistaken.

C: 「我放弃了…命运，自始至终，我都没能挣脱它的枷锁。如果说，还有什么方法能从中逃离，我能想到的只有——」
E: "I've given up... I've never been able to break free from the shackles of fate since the beginning. If there's a way to break free of it, I can only think of one..."

C: 大师，算得真准。
E: Your foresight is amazing.

C: 这就是我们深信不疑的命运？难道，我们就要眼睁睁地看着这座城邦被献祭给野蛮的尼卡多利？
E: This is the destiny in which we so devoutly believe? Are we supposed to watch helplessly as this city is offered to the savage Nikador?

C: 如果我现在告诉你，黑潮不会降临，我们都能活下去。你会相信吗？
E: If I told you now that the black tide will not breach us, that we will all live, will you believe me then?

C: 毕竟，有些事必须被铭记。比如「那位」大守护者，比如星间发生过的一切抗争……
E: After all, some things must be remembered. Like "that" Supreme Guardian, like all the acts of defiance that occurred among the stars...

C: 翁星翻覆千轮事，《如我所书》见真章。欲知后事如何，请听下回分解！
E: Through countless cycles of upheaval, As I've Written reveals the truth of Amphoreus. Want to know what happens next? Stay tuned for the next chapter!

C: 装花的瓶子，看起来有些昂贵。你靠近时，一个慵懒的声音从中响起。
E: A vase with flowers in it. It looks quite expensive. As you approach, a languid voice echoes from within.

C: 爱，友谊，愤怒，遗憾…一枚小小的梦泡，竟蕴含着如此复杂的情感，就像往陶罐里倒了满满一瓶伏特加。
E: Love, friendship, rage, regret... Such a tiny dream bubble contains such complex emotions. It's like pouring a whole bottle of vodka into a dolium.

C: 也许，这才是「创世」的最后一步。
E: Perhaps this is the final step of "Genesis."

C: 白厄真君，竟有这么一段奇事…
E: Did this really happen to Lord Phainon...

C: 昔涟！原来你还在…
E: Cyrene! So you're still here...

C: 需要什么样的帮助？
E: What kind of help do you need?

C: 呜呜～感谢呜呜～安全呜呜～报酬呜呜～
E: Wooo... Thank you... safe... Reward... Wooo.

C: 你看现在，都没人愿意和她一起做实验了。我知道她只是嘴巴不饶人，但本性不坏。
E: Look at her now — nobody's willing to do any work with her. I know her bark is far worse than her bite and that she's not a bad person really.

C: 老师，请问有没有什么万能句子，能让我在忙碌的时候能不假思索地说？
E: Teacher, are there any catch-all phrases that I can say when I'm too busy to think?

C: 嗯嗯，好的好的。
E: Mmm, mmm, sure, sure.

C: 错误编号<unbreak>19</unbreak>，是哪里报错来着？
E: Error code <unbreak>19</unbreak>... What's the problem again?

C: 那些机器人是你修的吗？
E: So, did you fix those robots?

C: （看来是误会一场，回去告诉阿德勒吧。）
E: (Looks like it's all a misunderstanding. Time to let Adler know about it.)

C: 哇哦，所以说居然是一次奇物实验的产物？可惜无缘一见…等等。
E: Woah, so it's actually the result of a Curio experiment? Pity I didn't get to see it... Hold on.

C: 什么，谁？你这人说话怎么没头没脑的，真奇怪……
E: What? Who? I don't understand what you are saying. You are strange...

C: 没错，年轻人。我，华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，想继续在这茫茫人海中寻找真心朋友。
E: Yes. I, Wallace Cambridge Limestein, wish to continue to seek true friends.

C: 赶紧把照片拿走，我看不得这玩意——那莱姆士汀是故意派你来气我的吧？你给我转告他，我罗希这辈子都不可能跟他交朋友！
E: Take this picture away. I don't like it. Wallace sent you here to grind my gears, didn't he? Tell him that I, Rossy, will never be his friend!

C: …有什么好惊讶的？那可是莱姆士汀呀！你知道他们家在行政区有多少套房产吗？
E: Why are you surprised? He is a Limestein! Do you know how many properties his family owns in the Administrative District?

C: 感谢你的帮助，年轻人。这是你的报酬——下次我再需要帮忙的时候，希望你还在。
E: Thank you for your help. This is the payment I promised. I hope you can still help me the next time I need your help.

C: 他很有钱。
E: He's rich.

C: 尽可能地找到了来自过去的典籍，它们是真的复制了过去吗？还是说，这只是破碎的残象而已。
E: Even if we find all books from the past, are they really copies of the past? Or is it just a shattered illusion?

C: 只要我们坚持这么做，鼹鼠党很快就能在下层区积攒名声，说不定有朝一日还能取代「地火」！嘿嘿……
E: If we keep doing this, The Moles will soon build a reputation in the Underworld, and maybe one day replace Wildfire! Hehe...

C: 喔、喔哦，要开始了吗？！我、我还没准备好呢——
E: Wow, yes, the rap is gonna start!? I—I'm not ready yet!

C: 哎，跟你真是说不通……
E: *sigh* You just don't get it, do you?

C: 那个…要跟它来硬的吗？我……
E: So... You're going to fight that thing? I...

C: 自然数。
E: Natural numbers.

C: 要不说你们「非科学家」就是不行，满脑子就是钱钱钱钱钱。
E: You "non-scientists" are always like this. All you think about is money, money, and more money.

C: 自从把他拉入黑名单后，他倒是消停了几个月。没想到他竟然还会雇人来…哎，你能答对这么多难题，显然不是等闲之辈，何必帮他做这些事啊……
E: He's been inactive the past few months since his ban. I never expected him to hire someone else... *sigh* You're good enough to answer all of these questions. Why'd you help him do all this...

C: 啊——我明白了，您是带着任务来的，对吗？您是想来验收一下教育部的题库储备，对吧？
E: Ah, I see. You've come on a mission, haven't you? You've come to test the variety of questions in our quiz pool, haven't you?

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 抱歉，让你为难了。
E: Sorry for putting you in a difficult position.

C: 小女子听说塔米拉小姐今天要去歌德宾馆，拜托你去歌德宾馆看看她是去做什么吧~谢谢你啦~
E: I heard that she's going to the Goethe Hotel today. Please, can you go to the hotel and observe what she's up to? Thank you so much~

C: 好嘞~您稍等。
E: Right then, a moment, please.

C: 我这就来、这就来——你赶紧带我走！赶紧！
E: I'm coming. I'm coming — Hurry and take me away. Quickly!

C: 怎么样，你能做到吗？要是不行的话，我得再想想其他办法……
E: Can you do that? If you can't, then I'll think of something else...

C: 尼古莱这么说…
E: This is what Nika said.

C: 你在告示板的角落里发现了这样一张纸条——
E: You found a note in a corner of the notice board that says:

C: 你这小毛贼…口气不小啊！成天偷东西就算了，现在还想暴力拒捕？
E: You've got guts, little thief! Not only do you steal all day, you're also trying to resist arrest?

C: 裂界…是大人说的那个，很危险的地方吗？
E: Fragmentum... Is that the very dangerous place the adults talk about?

C: …啧，说漏嘴了！
E: ...Tch, slip of the tongue.

C: 嗯…无论如何，我会顺着你的思路继续往下想的。感谢你提供宝贵建议，大兵。
E: Hmm... Anyway, I'll keep thinking along these lines. Thank you for your valuable advice, soldier.

C: 他踱着步，一面思考着技术图纸的实现方案，一面向残响回廊深处走去，直到他来时的踪迹彻底消失——就像他从未出现在这里一般。
E: As he thinks about how to materialize the plans in the blueprints, he paces towards the depths of the Corridor of Fading Echoes until the traces of his appearance completely dissipate — as if he had never been here.

C: 我…我的腿在哪儿…我感觉不到——呕……
E: Where... are my legs? I can't feel... *barfs*...

C: 队长…队长……
E: Captain... captain...

C: （将捡到的漂流瓶交给跃渊）
E: (You hand the drift bottle you picked up to Yueyuan)

C: 总之，辛苦你了，这是你应得的报酬。
E: Either way, thank you for your hard work. Here are your well-deserved rewards.

C: 听说你找我帮忙巡逻。
E: I hear you needed me for a patrol?

C: 谢谢你，志同道合的朋友。酒坛我会带走，功德会留在心头。
E: Thank you, my like-minded friend. I shall take the wine jars with me. Your great merit shall stay in my heart.

C: 好好好！你放一坛，我放一坛，我们功德无边！
E: Okay, okay! You do one jar, I'll do the other. We'll accumulate boundless merits together!

C: （不知道漂流中的故事是真是假，那种自我封闭、自我陶醉的逃避做法，不能代表所有人的想法不是吗？）
E: (I don't know if this story from the waves is true, but this insular, self-indulgent escapism could hardly be representative of everyone's ideals, don't you think?)

C: 也许接下来，你又走上了别的命途。谁也不知道……
E: Perhaps you shall set off along a different Path in the future. Who knows...

C: 这一次漂流瓶里装着灯神，你打算怎么做？
E: This time, there is a Genie stored inside the drift bottle. What will you do?

C: 挺好喝的，就是不够燃。
E: It tastes good, but not "flaming" at all.

C: 我拿你当朋友你却羞辱我…
E: I treat you as a friend, but you treat me like a worker for hire...

C: 某款滞销的碳酸饮料曾记录过这种冷彻心扉的感受：「冷彻心扉！比每一天都没有人爱你还要冷。」这下你知道这款饮料为何滞销了。
E: An advertisement for a certain carbonated beverage once described this feeling as "Cold to the bone! Colder than staying unloved and alone with each passing day." After that description, it doesn't take much to understand why this product didn't sell so well.

C: 喝就完事了！
E: Bottoms up!

C: 黑底金纹的大门，与浴场轻松休闲的氛围格格不入，只有尊贵的客人到来时才会开启。
E: A black door with gold trimmings stands in stark contrast to the baths' leisurely atmosphere — it only opens for the most esteemed of guests when they arrive.

C: 在低温浴池保鲜，在高温浴池烹煮——完善的厨房体系在你脑中被构建出来。
E: Refreshing awareness in the cold bath, stewing in the hot bath — a perfect kitchen system has been formulated in your head.

C: 你不是第一次听说这东西，它是翁法罗斯灾难的源头。关于它的来历，你在脑海中闪过了几种不同的可能性，其中一个甚至让人后怕。
E: This is not the first time you've heard its name. It's the source of the disaster that is befalling Amphoreus. As for its origins, a number of possibilities flash through your mind — one of which leaves you feeling quite uneasy.

C: 欢迎收听今天的星际和平播报节目：
E: Welcome to a new episode of the Interastral Peace Broadcast:

C: 奥赫玛市民共浴的满溢主池。
E: The Overflowing Bath for residents of Okhema.

C: 金线日渐紧绷，却又偶尔传来些许生意盎然的波澜——恐有大事将要发生了。
E: The golden thread grows tighter by the day, yet waves of life can be felt from time to time... I fear something big is about to happen.

C: 你凝视着壁画，理性本身所化的立像伫立在画面中央，放射状的光芒自其身后迸发，像是一轮被冻结的曙光。
E: You fix your eyes on the mural. At its center stands a statue embodying reason itself, radiating beams of light from behind — a frozen dawn.

C: 我，赤陶学派，相信自然语言。学习山之民，成果显著。
E: I, an Erythrokeramist, am a believer in natural language. Studied the ways of the Mountain Dwellers. The results are evident.

C: 我决定…
E: I decide...

C: 你很难想象，一个孩子如何能在如此有限的空间内熬过漫长的时光。反正你肯定做不到——即便是在黄金至尊豪华的车厢里也不行！
E: It's hard to imagine how a child could endure such a long time in such a limited space. You know for certain you couldn't — not even in the most opulent, gold-laden carriages of luxury!

C: 有时候真难分清，到底是刻法勒在守护这座城市，还是这座城市在守护着最后的光明。
E: At times, it's hard to tell — does Kephale guard the city, or does the city protect the last remnants of light?

C: 傻孩子，要是妈妈真的怕疼，为什么不向神殿的叔叔阿姨们要手套呢？
E: Silly child. If I was scared of hurting my hands, why would I not just ask the old folks at the temple for a pair of gloves?

C: 他本以为从此能高枕无忧，谁知悬锋城降临的时候，所有曾受他恩惠的小城邦畏惧天谴的锋芒，争先恐后地俯首称臣。
E: The King was convinced that he now had nothing to worry about. Who could have imagined that when Castrum Kremnos did attack, all of the small neighboring cities that had received his blessings were so scared of the Blade of Fury that they all rushed to surrender?

C: 破碎的石柱就这样无视重力悬浮在空中，真不愧是「浮石」泰坦刻法勒。您理解了吗？「浮石」与「负世」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
E: The broken stone pillars float freely, defying gravity — fitting, indeed, for the "Weightless" Titan, Kephale. Do you understand now? "Weightless" and "Worldbearing" share the same first character, doesn't it strike you as amusing?

C: 这是黄金世的风铃，这个声音是千年以前的声音——里头有锤，你只要一晃动，你就能通过这个声音，穿越千年，听到黄金世的声音。
E: This is the wind chime from the Era Chrysea. The sound you hear is from a thousand years ago — inside, there's a hammer. With just a shake, you can use this sound to traverse a thousand years, hearing the voices of the Era Chrysea.

C: 你听到某种朦胧不清的响动，像是树木抽枝绽叶、花苞盛放的声音。年纪最大的祭司转过头，他浑浊的目光穿越迷雾与时空，定定地望着你。
E: You hear a vague, indistinct sound, like the sound of branches and leaves growing and flower buds blooming. The eldest priest turns his head. His murky gaze pierces through fog and time, and fixes upon you.

C: 献出火种前，那位以愚钝自称的贤人曾揭开再创世的真相：新世界建立在往日的礁石上。如今被仰望的泰坦们，曾经也不过是凡人。
E: Before he offered the spark, the sage who humbly called himself a fool unveiled the truth of the Era Nova: The New World is built upon the remnants of the old. The Titans, now revered and gazed upon from below, were once no more than mere mortals.

C: 当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最有勇气的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
E: It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the bravest person in all of Amphoreus!

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 法吉娜信徒成天瞎弄…
E: Phagousa followers and their "ways"...

C: …你选什么我就选什么！
E: ...I copied yours!

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 嘿，这不是怕大姐头又把我拽去啥危险的地方嘛。现在这奥赫玛可不太平，咱一个小贼灵可不想掺和进啥大风大浪。
E: Hey, I'm just trying to avoid you dragging me to dangerous places. Okhema's not safe right now, and as a little Spirithief, I want no part in big troubles.

C: 你怕死吗，巴特鲁斯？
E: Are you scared of death, Bartholos?

C: 破碎的来路悬浮在空中，似乎并不被重力束缚。
E: The shattered path ahead floats in midair, seemingly unbound by gravity.

C: 沸腾的池水散发着令人窒息的热量，有时候，最闪耀的黄金并非容器中的流体，而是甘愿为世界牺牲的魂灵。
E: The boiling pool emits suffocating heat. Sometimes, the most radiant gold is not the fluid in the vessel, but the souls willing to sacrifice themselves for the world.

C: 那位步伐轻巧的盗贼有的是脱身的手段，应该不会为了这种事搭上性命吧？可是，她真的不会吗？若如预言所说，最终只有一人得以觐见奇迹……
E: That light-footed thief has many ways of escaping. She wouldn't risk her life over something like this, right...? Would she really? But... if the prophecy is true... then only one person will ultimately witness the miracle...

C: 恭喜你得到了「不死的球棒」，它的弱点在你握住它的地方。
E: Congrats! You've obtained the Undying Bat! Its weak point is wherever you're holding it.

C: …对，据说活得太久啊，会得一种叫「魔阴身」的病。就跟泰坦似的发疯…然后爆炸！
E: Yeah, they say if you live too long, you be struck by something called "mara." Makes you go crazy like a Titan, and then... BOOM!

C: 那不用担心，是病就有得治…听说天外有一种特效药，好像叫什么「模因生命」…
E: No need to worry. Every illness has its remedy... I heard there's a wonder medicine beyond the sky called "memetic life" or something...

C: *唐突的清嗓*…来这里属于是「政治避难」。
E: *abruptly clears throat* ...We are here to seek "political asylum."

C: 还得多亏那刻夏老师教学有方。
E: All thanks to Professor Anaxa's excellent teaching.

C: 这相拥短短一瞬，却是我「活过」的证明。
E: This embrace may be brief, but it's the proof that I once "lived."

C: 忍耐——我已习惯忍耐孤独，它也算是我的老友了。
E: I shall endure — I've gotten used to persevering loneliness. It's like an old friend at this point.

C: 那是你故意透露给他们的？
E: Did you deliberately leak that to them?

C: 天外？那…吉奥里亚赠予你我的「大地」会怎样？
E: Beyond the sky? Then... what about the "Earth" that Georios bestowed upon us?

C: 需要救援——需要——援——
E: Mayday... may— ay—

C: 我爬了大半虫生才爬到这里，而您后来者居上，马上又将飞向我难以企及的高度，这一切都印证了那句真理——
E: I've spent most of my nymph life crawling to get here, and you, the latecomer, are already soaring past me to heights I can't even dream of reaching. All of this just proves that old saying—

C: 就让我留在这爱的囚笼里吧！
E: Just let me stay in this prison of love!

C: 动起来啊！动起来啊！
E: Move! Come on, move!

C: 嘶——果然有点手段，但只要我这样…再这样……
E: Sss— you do have some tricks. But if I do this... and then this...

C: 喂、你，对，就你，能不能帮我往草垛子外挪挪？
E: Hey, you! Yes, you! Can you help move me out of this grass patch?

C: 啊，那就好，我还怕你生气了呢。
E: Ah, that's good. I was afraid you'd be angry.

C: 它问…1+1为什么=2？
E: It asked... Why does one plus one equal two?

C: 这倒证明了我一直以来的猜想：看来异问魔应该是「智识」的造物。
E: This actually confirms a theory that I've always had: It seems like Inquisition Spirits are a creation of the Erudition.

C: 不得不说，能认识你是我莫大的荣幸。我要把见证你作战英姿的数据多备份几次！
E: I have to say, meeting you has been my greatest honor. I'd love to capture lots more data about your heroic combat moves!

C: （这是小姐特意给我定制的信标功能，很神奇吧！）
E: (This is the custom beacon that Missy gave me. It's awesome!)

C: 什么是…奇物……
E: What is a... Curio...

C: 同为「阮•梅」造物，我有多独特呢？比如说——阮•梅女士不希望我被低级的生理需求所困，所以我连进食都不需要！
E: How unique am I as a fellow Ruan Mei's creation? For example, Miss Ruan Mei does not wish for me to be affected by lowly physical needs, so I do not even need to eat!

C: 好深奥的发言呢。人家总觉得，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子似乎要暂时告一段落了。这样也好，生活就是既有命中注定，也有许多突然的奇遇。
E: Such a profound statement. I feel like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. That's fine, life is about destined paths and unexpected adventures.

C: 看得好入迷呀，你喜欢这些牌吗——抢答，人家特别喜欢！
E: You're so into it — do you like these cards? I'll go first: I love them!

C: 我其实偷偷看了十遍。
E: I've actually read it ten times.

C: 这样呀…那我们一定要成为例外呀！毕竟之前约定过，要一直提醒对方乐观…无论什么时候，可都要记好哦？
E: I see... Then we must become the exception! After all, we promised to always remind each other to stay optimistic... Please remember that no matter what.

C: 行，那等你有空再来。
E: That's fine. Come back when you have time.

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment, I have something else to do.

C: 所谓「流水不腐，户枢不蠹」，大衍穷观阵是需要经常运行，以备需要时能随时投入卜筮的。
E: But just like sharpening a blade, the Matrix of Prescience Ultima needs frequent operation so that it can be ready for divination at any time.

C: 何况举手之劳的活计，却有报酬可拿，想来您也不会拒绝吧？
E: The job is a piece of cake, but it's paid. I don't think you'd want to miss out on that, right?

C: 好吧，我就不过问了。
E: Alright, I won't ask.

C: 记得我提到过「亚伯南安星系大乐透」吧？不记得没关系，那是随机抽选一个人变成富翁的大乐透，是个乐呵的抽奖。
E: Remember that Abelane Galaxy Lottery I was telling you about? It doesn't matter if you don't. All you need to know is that it's a random number lottery where one person can hit the jackpot. It's a big, happy event.

C: 辛苦了，占算结果已经拿到…这…不妙啊。
E: Great job. Results have been obtained... and they are... bad.

C: 回来了？
E: You're back?

C: 现在没空陪你玩。
E: I don't have time to play with you right now

C: 等一下。
E: Wait a moment.

C: 那就开始了。
E: Then let's go.

C: 就是，没有老大哪有我们「四大天王」，赶紧说正事吧，以老大的安危为重！
E: Exactly! Without the Boss, there is no Formidable Four! The Boss's safety has to be our top priority!

C: 你在牢里也能进行游戏开发？
E: Can you also develop games behind bars?

C: 回见！游客！我要去派对潇洒了！等你与我的两位同伴结识，再来找我们！
E: See you again, guest! I'm going to go live it up at the party! Look for us again when you rendezvous with my two friends!

C: 好。
E: Alright.

C: 只是这种行为…注定徒劳无获。
E: But this act... is destined to be futile.

C: 眼下衣匠已经为你揭露了一只若虫的位置。在找到它之前，其他若虫的信息就暂且保密吧。
E: The Garmentmaker has already revealed the location of one nymph to you. Until you find it, the whereabouts of the other nymphs will remain a secret.

C: 风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
E: The winds riding on golden threads bring tidings of your situation. Esteemed guest, has there been any progress?

C: 多谢你了，贵客，我会请织者们去圣城休整。收下我为你准备的这些礼物吧。
E: Thank you so much, esteemed guest. I will invite the weavers to go to the holy city for recovery. Please take these gifts that I have prepared for you.

C: 嘁，话不投机半句多。我说得口干舌燥，结果都是白费功夫。你就拿着这宝箱自己乐呵去吧，回见！
E: Tsk, this conversation is going nowhere. My throat is all hoarse from talking, and for what? Just take your darned chest and enjoy it yourself. Later!

C: 呕…这种天旋地转的感觉…太糟糕了！
E: Bleh... I feel like the ground is spinning... I feel so sick!

C: 宝箱您自己收着吧，我们下回再会！
E: Take the chest. We'll meet again!

C: 盗窃失败…
E: Theft failed...

C: 那就从偷改成抢！
E: This just changed from a theft to a robbery!

C: 想入这行？你还嫩着呢！
E: Ha! You wanna join our line of business? You're still too wet behind the ears, {F#girl}{M#boy}.

C: 呃，我丢的不是这个……
E: Uh, that wasn't what I lost...

C: 孤陋寡闻！没听说过吗，后手也是手，前脚也是脚…咳咳，为了挽回名誉权，巴特鲁斯只好向你提出决斗！
E: So uncultured! Haven't you heard, any hind-hand is still a hand, and any front-foot still a foot... Ahem, to restore my honor, Bartholos must challenge you to a duel!

C: 是是是…咱早应该知道，对你们这种名为「主角」的生物来说，任何人的私房钱都相当于你们自己的财宝……
E: Yes, yes, of course... I should've known that for creatures called "protagonists," everyone's savings are basically your rightful treasures...

C: 得了吧，我才不信你咧…
E: Pfft, no way! Get outta here with that!

C: 看来贼灵也在幻境里…
E: Looks like the Spirithief's in an illusion too...

C: 你倒是盯着我多看几眼啊。圆圆的紫葡萄，和圆圆的紫色的我…怎么看都非常相似吧？想想吧，无数个卑微的老巴特鲁斯被你们踩在脚下，绝望地爆开肚皮，流出不可名状的黏液……
E: Oh come on, take a good look at me. Big, round, and purple me, looks just like a grape, right? Picture it: countless humble old Bartholoses squashed beneath your feet, bellies bursting in despair, with unspeakable goo spewing forth...

C: 咳咳…不管怎么说，我现在赢得了你的注意，那自然要充分利用这样的机会。时间的指针即将跨越终点和原初…啊，不用在意这个。
E: Ahem... Anyway, now that I have your attention, I should make good use of it. The hands of time are about to cross the end and the beginning... Ah, don't mind that part.

C: 桀桀！走过路过不要错过——这个神秘的房间里有个神秘的宝藏，你唯有借助巴特鲁斯大人的力量才能将它入手！
E: Hehehe! Come closer, don't miss your chance. A mysterious treasure lies hidden in this enigmatic room, and only with Lord Bartholos's power can you claim it!

C: 你被桶踢了一脚。
E: You got kicked by the trashcan.

C: 喂喂，我现在可是卡在了翁法罗斯的服务器上唉！关心一下你的老伙计啦。
E: C'mon, I'm literally stuck inside the Amphoreus servers here! Spare a thought for your old pal here, will you?

C: 倒也不是？只是重要的事情当然要追求点仪式感嘛！
E: Not really, but it's important enough to warrant a sense of seriousness!

C: 比如第一段里提到，「火与光即是那罪的化身」——这段话会不会是指那些伟大的黄金裔？
E: Just look at the first stanza. "Fire and light are the incarnation of that sin." Is this referring to the great Chrysos Heirs?

C: 没错，{NICKNAME}与我见过面的。切莫惊奇，我只是个古泰坦语爱好者罢了。
E: Indeed, {NICKNAME} and I have met before. Don't be surprised. I'm just an enthusiast of ancient Titan language, nothing more.

C: 您只要将此装置插入其中，略等片刻，让绿灯变成红灯，「瑟希斯之心」就可以对各位之前的翻译结果做一次校对，看看我们的研究出发点是否有所偏颇。
E: Just insert this device into the slot and wait a moment. Once the green light turns red, the "Heart of Cerces" will check our previous translations to see if there were any biases in our research.

C: 阁下批评得是。的确是在下弄巧成拙。无论如何，在下还是会为后续的标本支付租借费用，以此聊作补偿。
E: Your criticism is valid. I had truly messed this up. Even so, I'll ensure the borrowing fees for the remaining specimens are covered as a small gesture of apology.

C: 也许有这种可能。
E: It's possible.

C: 前面的那块大晶体…「瑟希斯之心」就在这里。
E: That big crystal up ahead... That's the "Heart of Cerces."

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: 辅祭，石板托付于你了，去交给那位卫兵吧。
E: Acolyte, please deliver the slate to that guard.

C: 能够溯寻一切事物的卜筮器具，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的伟大权能…类似的称号还有很多，就不一一列举了，这是「迷津」在世人眼中的形象。
E: The divination tool capable of extrapolating all things, the great power of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... it has many such titles, so I won't list them all. This is how the world sees the "Maze."

C: 我想重玩之前的迷津！
E: I want to replay the maze!

C: 哗啦——
E: *whoosh*

C: 我没事，营造一下气氛而已，哗啦。用它<color=#dbc291ff>让球改道</color>吧！
E: I'm fine, just setting the mood. *whoosh* Use it to <color=#dbc291ff>redirect the ball</color>!

C: 没有一惊一乍，好不习惯。
E: Wow, no sudden outbursts? Feels kinda weird.

C: 啊，这是！！！
E: Ah... This is—!!!

C: 可…成为「清洗者」虽然能够继承大量知识和记忆，却也意味着自己独有的记忆将被淡化、抹去。
E: But... becoming a Cleaner means inheriting vast knowledge and memories — at the cost of losing your own.

C: 你不舒服吗？
E: Hey, you okay?

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你…帮助我做了件能让自己感到佩服的事。
E: {NICKNAME}... Thank you. You helped me do something I can be proud of.

C: 陌生的词语…但，像是一位天空之子的姓名。或许……
E: An unfamiliar term... but it sounds like the name of a Skyfolk. Maybe...

C: 哈哈，姑娘想哪儿去了？棺中躺着的与我非亲非故，仅有一面之缘。巧合之下答应了别人，只好走这一趟罢了。
E: Haha, miss, whatever gave you that impression? The individual in the coffin is neither friend nor relative — we met only once. By chance, I made someone a promise, and so I have to run this errand.

C: 呃，这次是个意外。
E: Uh. It's an accident this time.

C: 克里珀的出现大概只是个巧合…不说了，总之，对不起。
E: Qlipoth's appearance was probably just a coincidence... That's it. Anyway, I'm sorry.

C: 耀眼的白光吸引了你的注意。你望向高空，只见一颗流星划过天际——那是你生平仅见最璀璨的星星，喷薄有如将死恒星的光亮。流星一闪即去，只在你的视网膜上烙下一颗光点，光点中依稀有个人影，可你看不真切。
E: A dazzling white light captures your attention. You gaze up into the sky and see a comet streaking across. It is the brightest star you've ever seen, its brilliance as blinding as a dying star's. The comet disappears in a flash, leaving only a spot of residual light on your retina. There is the faint shadow of a person inside the light spot, but you can't really make it out.

C: 突然，你感到悲伤。这是在做什么？你为什么在这里？一台巨大的意识机器挟持你的思维，把你带到了遥远的，遥远的宇宙他方。一切都是假的，真相并不存在，冒险毫无意义。悲伤像油脂漂浮在思海之上，很快沉入其中，只留给你巨大的空洞……
E: Suddenly, you feel sad. What's this about? Why are you even here? A gigantic machine of consciousness holds your mind hostage and transports you far away into the universe. Everything is false. Truth does not exist. Adventures are meaningless. Tragedy gloats like oil atop a sea of thought, quickly sinking into it to leave behind an enormous void...

C: 痛苦瞬间便结束了。你仿若新生。
E: The pain is over in an instant. You feel like a newborn.

C: 祂可是「毁灭」啊。
E: THEY're the Destruction, after all.

C: 你说还有别的合伙人？
E: You said there are other collaborators?

C: 你说的酬劳应该是真金白银吧？
E: I thought you were talking about a financial reward?

C: 阿哈到底是怎么回事？
E: What is up with Aha?

C: 哼哼，你也觉得祂们很厉害吧？虚拟星神和人工智能可不一样。我和阮•梅想到了个办法，把虚拟星神和现实的命途连接到了一起。
E: Ha, do you find THEM awe-inspiring, too? A virtual Aeon is not the same as any old AI. Ruan Mei and I came up with a way to connect virtual Aeons with THEIR real Paths.

C: 总会通关的。
E: You'll clear it sooner or later.

C: 「你当然可以，你是阿基维利，祂们会欢迎你加入的…噢，说不好你才是执棋之人。」黑塔对你眨了眨眼睛，「等你分清了祂们的立场，就加入！但可能也没什么用，毕竟朋友转身就变敌人…而你在这转个身——得花上多少琥珀纪？」
E: "By all means. As you are Akivili, THEY will welcome you to join THEM... Oh, you might even be the one that calls the shots." Herta gives you a wink and continues, "Join THEM after figuring out THEIR stances! It probably won't help, as friends can become enemies as you turn around... How many Amber Eras does it take for you to turn around here?"

C: 那只眼睛是…
E: That eye is...

C: …「秩序」消失了？
E: ...The Order disappeared?

C: 你等了几个系统时，直到这位领袖入眠，打起呼噜…你终于找到了机会。走吧…小家伙们，走得越远越好，到远离炮火的地方，振翅飞向天空……
E: You wait for several system hours until the leader falls asleep and begins to snore... Finally, you seize your chance to place your hand on those worms. It's time to leave... little ones. Go find a safer place away from the flames of war and fly freely in the sky.

C: 你看到一只*跟屁虫*跟着你。它似乎不愿意离开。你狠狠心，把它赶走了。
E: You see a *Tagger* following you, reluctant to leave. You steel yourself and shoo it away.

C: 「实验体的生命报告上写着…他一生并无任何值得夸耀的成绩。至于兴趣，他爱吃个头很小的、面粉捏的外皮…川辣味、豆腐馅的…」阮•梅的声音越来越小，她说不下去了。
E: "According to the report... this subject had no significant accomplishments in his life. As for his interests, he loved eating small-sized, doughy-skinned... with spicy tofu filling..." Ruan Mei's voice trails off until she doesn't have the heart to continue.

C: 你发出会心一笑：凡人死后才会变得高尚；无论他生前种种。
E: You exude a heartfelt smile: Mortals would only be exalted in death, no matter how they lived.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了骰蛊里封存的无数记忆重合。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice turns into the overlap of countless memories sealed within the dice holder.

C: 「你已经到第三位面了？这么快吗，简直不可思议。我们竟然会用这么快的速度遍历一次历史上的寰宇蝗灾。」黑塔看了看闪亮的天空。
E: "You've reached the third plane already? This is surprisingly fast. We're traversing the entire historical Swarm Disaster at such a rapid speed." Herta glances at the glimmering sky.

C: 烛墨学派更发现，「终末」的呓语早已在血色图书中写下：<color=#dbc291ff>「知识」会成为「死亡」的开篇；「血液」将染红所有的「扉页」</color>。学会从只言片语中推断：这场盛大的「血色吊唁」是一方势力对星际和平公司的宣战。
E: The Candelagraphos even discovered the Finality's writing in a blood-soaked book: <color=#dbc291ff>"Knowledge" will be the beginning of "death." "Blood" will dye all the "pages" red</color>. The guild made a deduction from this sentence that the grand Sanguine Condolences was a declaration of war by a faction against the IPC.

C: 「我得去杀了它——鲁珀特。」她用手指抚过刀尖，波澜不惊地说，「它宴请宾客的『时刻』过去了，它死亡的『时刻』到来了。」
E: "I have to kill it — Rubert." She runs her finger over the tip of the blade and says with composure, "The moment for its dinner party is over, and the moment of its death is here."

C: 固守阵地。
E: Stay your ground.

C: 不再有天穹的遮盖，密布在护壁上的武器开始自由地向敌舰挥洒火力。进攻是最好的防御，哪怕是筑城者也深谙此道。
E: No longer under the sky dome's protection, the densely-packed weaponry on the second protective barrier unleashed free bursts of firepower on the enemy ships. Attack is the best defense — even the Architects know that much.

C: 「十万信用点！」不知是谁打开了狂热的开关，一个个高昂的气泡从沸腾的人群里钻出来，然后被新的叫价挤得炸开。
E: "One hundred thousand credits!" Goodness knows who flicked that frenzied switch on, but a stream of exorbitant bubbles began to froth up out of the roiling crowd before being popped aside by all-new bids.

C: 「过犹不及，不过至少比老学究好。」面具人嘲笑道，「请您占卜您的未来。」星盘长出手脚，捶胸顿足地告诉你，你将会在一分钟后死在这个酒馆——死于自戕。
E: "It's a little heavy-handed, but it's better than that old pedant." The masked man spouts mockingly. "Please, divine your own future." The star chart grows limbs and beats its chest and stamps its feet to tell you that you will die in this tavern in one minute... By your own hand.

C: 为什么没有选择？
E: Why don't I get a choice?

C: 「真糟糕。您的信仰将您逼入了『终末』的陷阱。」面具人又打了个响指，你的手不自觉地掐住自己的咽喉，嘭！你炸成了五彩斑斓的星星。灯光从你身上移开了，你安然无恙地落回座位。
E: "How terrible! Your faith has drawn you into the trap of the Finality." The masked man clicks his fingers once more and your hand grabs at your own throat against your will. Boom! You explode into a colorful burst of stars. The light moves away from your body and you return to your seat unharmed.

C: 「请把课本翻到一百五十八页，今天的学习内容是『神秘』，顾名思义，祂是所有星神中最神秘的存在……」
E: "Please open your textbooks to page <unbreak>158</unbreak>. Today we will be learning about the Enigmata. As you can tell by THEIR name, THEY are the most mysterious Aeon in existence..."

C: 沉默。
E: Stay silent.

C: 「我们有义务消灭联觉信标，直接聆听彼此的声音，让『相对认知』代替『绝对知识』。如果你不认同这项事业，那么请交出你的教授指环，离开帕隆莱刻学院。」
E: "We have a duty to abolish the Synesthesia Beacon and hear each others' voices directly. We must allow 'relative cognition' to replace 'ultimate knowledge.' If you oppose this undertaking, please hand over your professor's ring and leave Palonglek Academy."

C: 「老师，你说的不对，我们不可能绕着星球走一圈」一个扎着三条小辫的女孩站起来。「因为我们的星球根本不是圆的。」
E: "Teacher, you're wrong! It's not possible to travel around the planet." A child stands up, three pigtails standing proudly on her head. "Because our planet isn't a sphere."

C: 「你在材料工程方面有不少创新，我对其中的超纳米布尤其感兴趣。据我所知，你曾经用这种材料打造出一件作品。」
E: "You have made many innovations in the area of material engineering. I am particularly interested in your ultra-nanocloth. From what I hear, you have developed a product based on these materials?"

C: 活性化压制装置，四肢瞬间瘫软。数百具身体摔倒在地，你牵动眼肌，向四周观望，越来越多的人走进瘫痪圈，他们有的倒下，但更多慢慢站起。低矮的视线里，站立者的身影，汇成遮天蔽日的森林。
E: The activation suppression device causes the appendages to suddenly go limp. Hundreds of bodies hit the floor. Straining your eyes, you look around you — More and more people are entering the paralysis zone. Some of them fall, but others are struggling to stand. From your lowered line of sight, the figures of those standing gather and form a forest that blots out the sun.

C: 你是星河涟漪号的导航智能，你指引星船穿越失去语言的克罗斯特亚，向着旧帝国的疆域深处航行。帝皇虽死，藏匿的反有机方程孑遗，却仍可能暗中将你纳入他们的运算进程。
E: You are the navigation intelligence for the galaxy-roaming ship, Rippling Waves. You guide the ship through the language-less Klostia, deep into the territory of the old empire. Though the Emperor is dead, there may be remnants of the Anti-Organic Equation that may secretly factor you into their calculations.

C: 一颗星星迎面向你们撞来。你认出它悲郁的色彩，鲁珀特二世的衣冠冢，帕提维娅疯狂地在墓碑上刻印出公式，铁皮和着血污嵌进手掌。
E: A star hurtles towards you all. You recognize its melancholy hue — Rubert II's cenotaph, Patavia frantically carving her formula on the tombstone, iron flakes and bloodstains etched into her palms.

C: 他们为你的巢穴浇筑外壳，以防天敌的袭击。甲壳上尖锐的犄角耸立，不时迸发出热量与火光，他们就寄居在这些犄角里。
E: They construct an outer shell for your nest to protect it from natural predators. Sharp horns protrude from the carapace, occasionally emitting heat and flames. They live inside these horns.

C: ——「模拟宇宙：黄金与机械」。
E: — Simulated Universe: Gold and Gears.

C: 赌注是什么？
E: What are the stakes for the bet?

C: 嗯，好问题。时刻注意自己的「自我认知」，防止自己变成机器人，或者全然丧失理性。不用想太多，反正你总会走到祂的计算之下。
E: Hmm, good question. Pay close attention to your Intra-Cognition at all times to prevent yourself from becoming a robot or totally losing your rationality. Don't think too much. You'll eventually end up following THEIR calculations anyways.

C: 「嗯，不错的成绩，换点奖励吧。」黑塔十分敷衍。
E: "Hmm, not bad. Come get some rewards." Herta says perfunctorily.

C: 「比如——巴维鲁的现代居民以为咕嘟的声音，是表达喜悦。事实上，我很抱歉，这种声音其实是脏话。我把脏话的含义改成喜悦，伟大之举。」
E: "For instance, the modern Bavirus inhabitants think that their gobbling sound is an expression of joy. Well, I'm sorry to say this sound is actually a vulgar term. I've given the sound a positive meaning, which is quite a brilliant move."

C: 你的腰椎被注射进药剂，一种宇宙和谐统一的喜乐贯穿你的脑髓，无数冷兵器与燃烧的子弹在其中穿梭。
E: A potion is injected into your lumbar spine, and a joy of universal harmony and unity shoots through your cerebral fluid. Countless steel weapons and blazing bullets flying through your psyche.

C: 你一无所获。
E: You gain nothing.

C: 你获得了大量宇宙碎片和祝福。
E: You have obtained a large number of Cosmic Fragments and Blessings.

C: 「欢迎来到『世界尽头』酒馆。」酒侍布拉琪，向诸位深深鞠躬，「只接待有幽默感的顾客。」
E: "Welcome to Tavern World's End." Bragi, the bartender, bows deeply to the patrons and continues, "We only serve customers with a sense of humor."

C: 你回头看了眼仍在沉睡的领主…你不甘心地抓紧时间，赶在被虫群包围前离开了。
E: You glance back at the Lord of Eternal Slumber, still sleeping. Reluctantly, you hurry up and leave before the Swarm can surround you.

C: 一位机械招待员带你走上台阶…你发现这台阶是由一条条机械手臂托举而成的。你一直向前，直到离开港湾，看见「星际和平机械分部商城」的招牌。
E: A mechanical attendant leads you up a staircase, which you notice is formed by numerous mechanical arms. You keep going until you leave the harbor and see the sign of "Interastral Peace Mechanical Branch Shopping Mall."

C: 你满怀期待地打开点餐软件，可万恶的选择困难症，立刻通过琳琅满目的菜品攫住你的思维，令本就疲惫的大脑陷入一片空白。
E: You open up a food ordering app with great expectation, but the vile beast of decision paralysis immediately grips your mind as your eyes are dazzled with endless menu options, causing your already exhausted mind to descend into blankness.

C: 「我可以为你打造任何兵器，只要你向我保证，它们会被用于无上的毁灭。」独眼独手的老匠人往围裙上抹了把灰，取出尚未冷却的工具。
E: "I can craft any weapon of war that you desire. All I ask is that you promise me that it will be used for supreme destruction." The one-eyed, one-armed craftsman wipes his ashy hand on his apron before pulling out his still red-hot tools.

C: 飞船不断地将沿途的光粒子转化为加速能源，以近乎恐怖的速度冲过终点线。
E: The spaceship relentlessly converts the photons along its path into acceleration energy, crossing the finishing line at a terrifying speed.

C: 一颗子弹在你的耳畔炸开，涂鸦的数据四溅，又被重新编码为炸药。你堪堪躲开杀手的追击，这部经典电影的每一幕都被你记在脑子里。
E: A bullet blasts by your ear. The graffiti data splatters everywhere, before being quickly programmed into explosives again. You narrowly escape the relentless pursuit of the assassin. Every frame of this timeless movie is etched into your memory.

C: 在他曾停留的地方，泛着绚烂色彩的宝物安谧地沉睡着。只不过，长年被黑潮侵蚀的财宝，似乎也早已染上灰黯之手的气息。
E: Where he once stood, treasures gleaming in vibrant hues now rest in serene slumber. Yet, they have long been eroded by the black tide, their luster dulled with the Hand of Shadow's taint.

C: 命运泰坦的信徒以你的行动为依据，模仿人生与轮回的变换。
E: The Fate Titans' disciples model their actions after yours, emulating the change between life and reincarnation.

C: 人们习得它的谋略。
E: People learned their strategies.

C: 他向尼卡多利叫嚣，要与它比拼脚力。男人的傲慢与狂妄，甚至让泰坦都陷入沉寂。它随即放声大笑，并与其约定，只要弗雷托能比它的军队更早抵达希罗科萨斯，就向他承诺家乡的和平。
E: He challenged Nikador to a foot race, and his arrogance and pride quieted even the Titan. Nikador laughed heartily and struck a deal: If Freto reached Silo Kossas before their army, they would ensure peace for his homeland.

C: 「其实扎格列斯老祖只是打了个盹儿，我们所有人都活在它的梦中。」
E: "In truth, the venerable Zagreus merely slumbers, and we all exist within their dream."

C: 塞纳托斯采撷冥河边缘的花朵，托蝴蝶送至海岸，法吉娜留下花瓣边缘的露珠，将花蕊浸泡，香醇里满载着死亡的气息。
E: Thanatos plucks flowers from the edge of the River of Souls, sending them via a butterfly to the shores. Phagousa collects the dew from the petals' edges, soaking the stamens, and the fragrance is infused with the scent of death.

C: 裁决与惩戒亦降临。
E: Judgments and retributions descended.

C: 人类的好日子不会持续太久。
E: Humanity's good days wouldn't last long.

C: 吉奥里亚就这样诞生了。命运三姐妹将它作为最初的砝码，置于天平一侧，翁法罗斯终于有了稳定的物质。
E: And so, Georios was born. The Three Fates placed it as the initial counterweight on one side of the balance, and finally, Amphoreus had stable matter.

C: 最初的吉奥里亚不像今天这般稳重，它和所有新生的孩子一样，对这个世界充满好奇，而每一次向外的探索都会导致剧烈的地震。
E: Originally, Georios wasn't as steady as they are now. Like all newborns, they were filled with curiosity about this world, and every time they explored beyond, tremendous earthquakes would plague the land.

C: 瑟希斯当然没有愤怒，理智的花束于它永不凋落——
E: Cerces naturally wasn't rageful. The flowers of reason would never wither...

C: 于是巨人迈开大步，誓要找寻生命的足迹。
E: And so, with great strides, the giant set forth, vowing to seek the footprints of life.

C: 巨人为了寻遍整个世界，便沿着海岸线出发。它的大脚踏进被海水浸湿的泥沙，飞溅起阵阵泥浆。
E: To search every corner of the world, the giant followed the coastline. Their massive feet sank into the wet sand, sending mud flying in all directions.

C: 战争不会怜惜生命。
E: War will never pity lives.

C: 「那枪早已沾染冥河的污秽，我不会再触碰那等浊物，更遑论将它收回。」
E: "That spear has been tainted by the filth of the River of Souls. I will not lay a hand upon such corruption, much less reclaim it."

C: 再拍一拍。
E: ...tap it again.

C: 离开
E: Leave

C: α射线出现<unbreak>35</unbreak>号效应
E: Detecting type<unbreak>-35</unbreak> effects of alpha rays

C: 你懂得多咯，你来做个适用的方案咯？
E: Since you know so much, then do you have a plan that is suitable?

C: 被千篇一律的「黑塔女士」系列曲踩在脚底的那首音乐，反倒是吸引了你的注意力。
E: There is one track, flooded over by cliché Madam Herta worship tracks, that actually ends up piquing your attention.

C: 浇浇我呗，浇浇我呗！
E: Water me~ Water me!

C: 什么乱七八糟的…
E: What the heck are you harping on about...

C: …我懒得和你说话。
E: ... I don't wanna chat with you right now.

C: 危险的地方少去，下次可不一定这么走运，被咱们救回来啦。
E: Stay out of dangerous places. You might not be so lucky to have us save you next time.

C: 你伸出手，指尖停留在距气泡极近的地方。什么事也没有发生，也许你应该找了解这东西的人问一问？
E: You extend your arm, and your fingertip stops extremely close to the bubble. Nothing happens. Perhaps, you should ask for more info from someone who knows what it is.

C: 签之前你怎么不说。
E: Why didn't you say that before I signed the agreement?

C: 她笑，然后扬手。你感到小臂有了反应，像提线木偶，被看不见的线牵扯。你想对抗，但发觉有些疼，于是你也扬手。痛感果然减轻了。这在你预料之内。
E: She smiles, then raises her arm. You sense a reaction in your forearm. Like a marionette, you are controlled by invisible strings. You try to resist it, but it hurts. At last, you lift your arm, and the pain lessens as expected.

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：回家的路。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "The way back home."

C: 星球表面的所有活物全部消失？这真的可能吗？或许吧，你揣测。毕竟这群人形真菌忠诚于那样怪异的信仰——没准是它们的神把人全接走了呢！
E: All living organisms on the planet have vanished? Is that even possible? Actually, it might be. After all, these humanoid fungi are pious believers of that bizarre faith. Perhaps, their god has brought them all to another place!

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 还好，原来它只是想邀请你，这位来自公司的稀土管理顾问，上台演讲——可作为一个异乡人，你怎么可能懂什么「凯尔萨斯星的未来」呢？
E: Thankfully, the king just wants to invite you, a rare-earth management consultant from the IPC, to speak on the stage. Problem? You're just an outsider. What could you possibly know about the future of Kalsas?

C: 「他说凯尔萨斯星充满希望，」翻译官汗如雨下，「这是通用语…宇宙主义，你们懂的——加入公司，团结一致，沟通无障碍！」
E: "He says that there is so much hope for Kalsas," the interpreter says as he nervously sweats. "This is a common language... Universalism, you understand. By joining the IPC and being united, there will be no communication barriers!"

C: 「这就是我接下来要介绍的部分了，」她的声音依旧冷静，「我们预测到了第四次地震，一场规模空前的反刍——我们会被它的胃酸彻底溶解…无人可以幸免。」
E: "This was what I want to discuss next," she says with a voice that is as calm as ever. "We predicted there would be a fourth earthquake, a regurgitation at an unprecedented scale. We will be completely dissolved by its stomach acid... No one will survive."

C: 喀喀~
E: Crrrk...

C: 喀喀喀喀喀喀喀喀！
E: Crrrrrkkkk!

C: 从现在起，本摊位的所有小吃对您免费——您的名字还将被记上「大胃王」名人堂…这可是莫大的荣誉！
E: From this moment forward, all of this stall's snacks are free for you. Your name will be added to the Competitive Eater Championship's Hall of Fame... This is a huge honor!

C: 这是什么新型骗术吗…
E: Is this some kind of new con...?

C: 这是「幸运」还是「不幸」？
E: Is it good luck or bad luck?

C: 哦…我知道了！一定是虎克老大叫你一起来玩捉迷藏！对吧？
E: Oh... I know! You are the person Boss Hook called to play hide-and-seek with us! Am I right?

C: 哦！
E: Oh!

C: 哎哟，真要命！我、我给还不行嘛！
E: Ack. You're killing me here! I—I gave you credits. Is that not enough!?

C: 接着是一段令人不安的沉默。但很快地，暴跳如雷的男人将这片死寂彻底撕碎：「我绝不会离开这里！没人能让我离开这里！」……
E: After that, an unsettling silence falls upon the room. The man flies into a rage as he shatters the deathly silence. "I am absolutely not leaving here! No one can make me leave!"...

C: 咦？没想到你还挺有天赋的嘛！
E: Hm? I didn't realize that you got some talent!

C: 这违反公序良俗了吧…
E: This goes against public order and common decency...

C: 只有聪明的粉丝才能看到。
E: Only a smart fan can see her.

C: 是时候迈出虫生的第一步了…怎么回事，我张不开翅膀喀！
E: It's time to take the first step in my bug life... What's going on — I can't open up my wings!

C: 好可怕…
E: Scary...

C: …愿仁慈的大大宽恕你的盲目与无知！我身后就有「艾格勒的启目集」，快去读读，沐浴在那位的伟大荣光之下吧喀！
E: ...May the master's mercy forgive your sightless ignorance! Aquila's Enlightenment lies just behind me. Read and bathe in their glorious radiance!

C: 女人露出了一个狡黠的眼神…但她的眼角很快又恢复了平整。
E: The lady gives you a sly look... but her expression quickly returns to normal.

C: …你以为这是场游戏。
E: ...You believed this to be a game.

C: 他的笑容十分僵硬。
E: His smile is stiff as a board.

C: 门的背后是什么…
E: What lies beyond the door...

C: 看样子这支舞还会继续跳好久，我们人间再见吧。
E: It seems this dance will continue for a while longer. Let's meet again in the mortal world.

C: 角落里的阴影开始汇聚，呈现出…巴特鲁斯的模样。
E: The shadows in the corner begin to gather, taking the form of... Bartholos.

C: 你也想喝嗡？那可不行，你不能在这里耽搁，你可是肩负使命的英雄……
E: You wanna drink too? No can do. You've got a hero's duty to fulfill.

C: 真怀念我们的大大…如果它还在，一定能想出办法嗡。
E: I miss our boss... If it were still here, it would've come up with a solution, for sure.

C: 职业病犯了…
E: Occupational habit kicking in...

C: 光明啊…
E: Oh, light...

C: 一只鹤运物流的机巧鸟眯起眼地盯着你，似乎带着某种危险的引诱。
E: A cycrane from Heron Express squints its eyes at you with a gaze that seems to lure you with an air of danger.

C: 嘻嘻，爷会说话就让你这么兴奋吗，还会说酸溜溜的情话，你要不要听？
E: Hehe. Does my ability to talk get you that excited? I can also tell some bitter love stories. Want to hear them?

C: 唔唔…哇！噢噢噢噢噢噢——
E: Oh... Wow! Oh my...

C: 看来你经验丰富，知道古往今来有无数贪心的家伙闯进洞穴深处，都以为自己能够带走些什么…故事最后往往都是以悲剧收尾，无一例外。
E: Looks like you're experienced enough to know that countless greedy people throughout the ages have tried to steal from this cave... And their stories all have tragic endings, without exception.

C: 好心人…就是你，扶扶扶我起来一下…谢谢谢。
E: Oh kind {F#lady}{M#sir}... It's you. Please help me up... thanks.

C: <unbreak>48</unbreak>。
E: Forty eight.

C: 老大只会告诉我们「附加题可以不用做」。
E: Boss just told us to skip the bonus question.

C: 哦？看来我们的{NICKNAME}选手还有疑问！
E: Mmm? Sounds like our dear contestant {NICKNAME} still has some questions!

C: …但说无妨。
E: ...Just speak your mind.

C: 我们拭目以待。
E: Let's wait and see.

C: 你咽了咽口水。看来这场无比胡闹的大胃王比赛终于要正式开始了。
E: You gulp in anticipation. Seems like this ridiculously theatrical Competitive Eater Championship is finally about to begin.

C: 吨吨吨…这股汹涌而来的感觉是…是——嗝。
E: Glug, glug, glug... This overwhelming surge of power... This is— *burp*

C: 退休的时候到了…
E: Time to hang up my boots...

C: 我都说了，我一个人连上这金人没用的，我的神识根本承受不住金人符箓的冲击…你还得给我再找一个测试者。
E: I've told you, I can't activate this aurumaton alone. My consciousness can't withstand the impact of the aurumaton talisman... You'll have to find another tester for me.

C: 伸出右手。
E: Extend right arm.

C: 等等，我好像开始浮现我不曾拥有的记忆了……
E: Wait, I suddenly have memories that aren't mine...

C: 不，你绝不能这么做。这件事实在是太不道德了。
E: No, you can't. This is too immoral.

C: 是谁要揍你？
E: Who wanted to beat you up?

C: 那你把我认成谁了？
E: Who did you think I was?

C: 你什么眼神呐，你可别不信——我就这么说吧，单单这约架的事，我可是从中赚了个盆满钵满！
E: What's that look for? Don't believe me? Let me tell you, just from this fight alone, I made a ton of money!

C: 细说，让我见识见识。
E: Please elaborate and help me understand.

C: 门后是什么呢？呜呜伯、龙、绝灭大君、某位星神本尊…梦中的每扇门后都藏有无限的可能，还是不要轻易打开为妙。
E: I wonder what's behind the door? A Wubbaboo? A dragon? Lord Ravager? A great Aeon...? Every door inside the Dreamscape holds unlimited possibilities, it would be best not to go opening them lightly.

C: Zzz…
E: Zzz...

C: 这也太刺激了！
E: This is just so thrilling!

C: 热心的你毅然放弃了这次唾手可得的游玩机会，你坚持将机会留给有需要的朋友！
E: Being the warm-hearted person you are, you resolutely give up this chance to play. This opportunity should be given to a friend who needs it instead.

C: 你还记得放哪儿了吗？
E: Do you remember where you put it?

C: 山的对面，是奥赫玛…
E: Across the mountains stands Okhema...

C: 哥，你冷静。
E: Buddy, stay calm.

C: 是一拳神王的最新卷…
E: The latest volume of One Punch God...

C: 这帮「投币祈愿」的家伙…也不知道是从哪儿听来了一大套迷信的说辞，非要往玦轮里面扔东西。
E: This wretched clique of Coin Zealots... Who knows where they got their superstitious ideas from, but they insist on throwing stuff into jade wheels.

C: 您说说，这多危险啊！要万一硬币被卷进发动机再甩出来，速度可比旧式火铳的子弹都快。虽说比不上现代武器，但给人打个透心凉可是绰绰有余。
E: Isn't that utterly dangerous!? If a coin somehow got stuck in the engine and spit out, its velocity would be faster than a speeding bullet. Modern weapons are far scarier, of course, but its impact is still enough to shoot through flesh and bone.

C: 你详尽地向帕姆讲述了你在仙舟上的英勇事迹——走到哪儿，球棒就挥舞到哪儿。无论对方是魔阴身孽物，又或是可怕的绝灭大君，再惊险的战斗，都成为你话语间的笑谈。
E: You tell Pom-Pom in great detail about your heroic deeds aboard the Xianzhou — how swashbuckling you were with the bat. Whether faced with a mara-struck abomination or the dreadful Lord Ravager, even the most thrilling of battles were reduced to a joke in your eyes.

C: 太好啦，这就是帕姆的纽扣！接下来只需要拿出针线缝缝补补…锵锵！大功告成！
E: Oh, it's my button! Now Pom-Pom just needs a needle and thread to stitch it all up... Dum-dee-do! All done!

C: 你在做什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: …{NICKNAME}乘客，能不能提点有建设性的意见！
E: ...{NICKNAME}, could you please give Pom-Pom some constructive feedback!

C: 好啦就这样了，谢谢{NICKNAME}乘客的配合！
E: Alright, that's it then. Thank you, {NICKNAME}, for your cooperation!

C: 才没有，帕姆只是太累了，不小心站着睡着了。
E: That's not the case! I was too tired, so I dozed off while standing.

C: 什么叫「关灯节能纯黑」配色啦！唔姆…不过确实好像有点太黑了，要是有乘客不小心摔跤可就不好了。
E: That's not the name of the colorway! Well, it'll be too dark, and passengers might trip over something by accident.

C: 哦，想不到真的有一天会启动这项协议。毕竟咱们法政科，能提供的资源不算多。
E: Oh, never imagined that this agreement would actually be activated one day. After all, we at the Department of Galactic Geopolitics do not have many resources to offer.

C: （告知碟片的事）
E: (Tell her about the discs)

C: 和钱没有关系，我要是有就直接送你了！
E: It's not about money. If I have any discs, I will give them to you directly!

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}乘客，我听三月七乘客说，贝洛伯格可是个大城市，你们还认识那里的大人物！
E: {NICKNAME}, I heard from March 7th that Belobog is a big city and you know the bigwigs there!

C: 感谢你能担当我们的陪练，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: Thanks for being our sparring partner, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: 继续原来的战略，<color=#dbc291ff>击败剩下的银鬃铁卫</color>——或者<color=#dbc291ff>直接迎战杰帕德戍卫官</color>，一劳永逸！
E: Stick to your original strategy and <color=#dbc291ff>defeat the remaining Silvermane Guards</color> — or <color=#dbc291ff>fight against Captain Gepard</color> and wrap up the exercise once and for all!

C: *电波滤音*没错，就是这个方向，次元扑满向这个方向逃了。
E: *electronic voice* Yep, we're on the right track. That Warp Trotter is fleeing in this direction.

C: 早抓住早结束，差不多得了。
E: I'll just catch it and get this over with.

C: 嘘——「四大天王」的动向可是最高机密，不许随意外传！
E: Hush, the whereabouts of the Formidable Four are top secret!

C: 你还敢羞辱我！看我怎么收拾你！
E: You dare make fun of me? I'll get you for that!

C: 眼前的孩子依旧纹丝不动。怎么会有人——我是说，小孩——竟然能对自己获得的胜利无动于衷？你实在想不明白。
E: The kid is still not reacting. How can anyone, let alone a child, not respond to winning? You just can't fathom it at all.

C: 在好运的加持下，你终于给了这骄傲的小朋友一记深刻的教训。或者，用简单的话来说——你赢了！
E: With luck on your side, you taught the arrogant kid a lesson. Or in other words, you won!

C: 精彩的计谋！在裁判一声令下、你们二人出手的瞬间，你便高声叫道「快看，娜塔莎大夫来了！」——
E: Brilliant plan! As you two reveal your hands, you shout, "Look, is that Dr. Natasha!?"

C: ——裂界中的又一个回音残响彻底消失了。
E: ...Another echo of the Cadence lost in the Fragmentum.

C: 虽然但是…这关我什么事？
E: But... what's that got to do with me?

C: 不、不关你事？你知道银鬃铁卫的休息时间有多宝贵吗？你知道浪费别人三个小时的生命是多可耻的一件事吗？
E: "What's that got to do with you"? Don't you know how precious breaks are to Silvermane Guards? Don't you know how precious three hours are to another person?

C: 嘿，这是规矩。你懂什么是规矩，我也懂。
E: Heh, you know them as well as I do that these are the rules.

C: 好吧，那我就用一个。
E: Well, then, I will use one.

C: 哈！可以，你这{M#哥们儿}{F#姐们儿}能处。有机会请你吃太阳薄饼——加奶酪的那种。
E: Ha! So, this {M#dude}{F#gal} does get it after all. I'll be treating you with a nice suncake, you know, the good kind with cheese and all.

C: 把视线带回贝洛伯格。
E: Now back to Belobog.

C: 为了确认这一想法究竟是否正确，你试着掐了掐那柔嫩的花瓣——
E: To confirm the veracity of this hunch, you try to pinch one of the tender petals...

C: 广场上的一眼喷泉，泉水凉爽而不寒冷。透过粼粼水波，你看见喷泉底部不规则地铺着一层金属钱币，想来这里也被当地人派上了许愿池的用场。
E: A fountain in the plaza is shooting out cool, tepid water. You can see through the ripples that the bottom of the fountain has metal coins strewn around. It looks like the locals use this as a kind of wishing pool.

C: 不得不说，这喷泉里真是什么都有，和远古帝王的宝藏相比也毫不逊色！看！你居然从喷泉里找到了——固态净水！？在水池里找到这种东西，真是太合理了！
E: It begs saying that this fountain really does have everything in it, just like the ancient treasure tombs of the emperors gone by! Look! You somehow find amidst those ripples — solid water!? Makes sense to find it inside a wishing well, I suppose!

C: 那个，虽然这么说有点不合适…但你可以把它让给我吗？求你了，它对我来说真的很重要！
E: Um, it's awkward to say, but... Could you possibly let me have that? Please, it really would mean a lot to me!

C: 气氛好像有点紧张…
E: Things are starting to get a little tense...

C: 对话情景一。
E: Scenario 1.

C: 你强行压抑住了内心的冲动。没错，人之所以为人，就是因为我们心中有值得奉行的道德律——
E: You suppress the urge. That's right, we are humans because we know right from wrong...

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.
Zero.
One.

C: 咔哒！清脆的声音从机械锁中响起，第三道机关应声解开。只差一步，你就能发现被史考特藏起来的秘密了！
E: *click* The lock clanged loudly and crisply. The third slot is done. One more to go for Scott's secret!

C: 真不愧是你～
E: That's impressive!

C: 「鹤运物流安全系统」将自动接管远程控制重返安全区。
E: The Heron Express Safety System will automatically take over the remote control to return to the safe zone.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 然后过不了多久，你就会想不起自己曾经放过一枚零件在背包里。
E: And let me guess: After no time at all, you've forgotten that you ever had anything in there at all, right?

C: 不过，这确实是来自我父亲的零件厂，它依然能够激励我。
E: Still, it's from my dad's old factory so it still inspires me.

C: 感觉还可以和谁交换…
E: Feels like I can exchange this with someone I know...

C: 哈哈哈哈，看来我自言自语的毛病得改改了。
E: Hahaha, I really should correct this bad habit of talking to myself.

C: 确实变好玩了。
E: It really is more fun now.

C: 哦，我在学会那边还有工作要做。为了来匹诺康尼这趟，我把攒了好久的年假全请完了——也就二十多天吧。
E: Oh, I've still got some work to do over at the guild. I put all the annual leave that I'd been saving up into this trip to Penacony — just twenty days or so.

C: 等等，你要做什么？玩笑都听不懂吗！
E: Hang on, what are you going to do with that? Don't you get the joke?

C: …我们的友谊已经走到尽头啦！我受够了，这次一定要和他绝交！
E: ...Our friendship has run its course! I've had enough of this. It's time to break off relations with him!

C: 镜头单调故事平庸毫无个性就为能让观众看懂，这种人拍什么电影！
E: The shots are mundane. The story is average, with no personality for ease of understanding. What kind of movie is this person trying to shoot!?

C: 确实挺好。
E: It's really good actually.

C: 那你这孩子…个头可真不小。算了，看在我今儿心情好的份上，和你聊聊也不是不行。
E: Then you're... pretty big for a kid. Whatever, seeing as I'm in such a good mood today, I can chat a little while with you.

C: 浪漫一点的…那就说说小行星带的事吧。
E: More romantic... Then let's talk about the incident in the asteroid belt.

C: 在赏金交到手里之前，我们可不会轻易让出这个位置。
E: Before the bounty is in our hands, we won't just give up this position.

C: 数目确认无误…那我们就走、走吧……
E: The amount is right... Let's g—go...

C: 这，这……
E: Uh, I...

C: 没问题，科琳船长从不拿人手短。不得不说，他们的突然袭击确实吓了我一跳……
E: No problem. Captain Colleen never rips anyone off. I have to admit though, their sudden attack really caught me by surprise.

C: 既然事情已经解决了，我们还是回梦里继续聊吧。老地方，不见不散。
E: Now that everything's sorted, let's go back to our dreams and keep chatting. See you at the old place.

C: 啧，突然想起一件烦心事……
E: Tsk, I suddenly remember something pretty distressing...

C: 我突然想起了在新伦蒂尼恩的经历…正好心情不错，把它当个乐子讲给你听吧。
E: I suddenly recalled the New Londinium experience... Since I'm in a good mood, let me share it with you.

C: 这个星球上的医生都戴着覆面的鸟嘴面具。我最开始还以为是故意凹造型的样子货，在内心狠狠嘲笑了一番。
E: All the physicians on that planet wore face-covering beak masks. Initially, I thought they had deliberately dressed themselves to look stylish and were silently mocking them.

C: 哦，说来话长，这份邀请函原本属于一位货真价实的宇宙行商，我费了些力气才搞到手…这段经历其实挺有趣。
E: It's a long story. The letter originally belonged to a traveling merchant, and I went through some trouble to claim it as mine... The whole thing was quite a fun experience.

C: 我干活时从来不露脸的，悬赏令上都没有我的画像。
E: I never show my face when I work. There's no image of me on my wanted posters.

C: 你让我取的那份资料…
E: About that document I collected for you...

C: 我们的工作室有着辉煌的历史，《班尼古堡》和《末世班尼》这两款IP在整个寰宇间有着数以亿计的忠实粉丝！
E: Our studio has an illustrious track record. We have hundreds of millions of loyal fans across the universe for our Benny's Castle and Apocalyptic Benny series!

C: 我的评价？符合预期。
E: My views? Well, it meets my expectations.

C: 你到底是哪位？
E: Who on earth are you?

C: …行吧，你放心！只要帮我这个忙，好处绝对少不了你的！
E: ...Fine, alright! Just do me this favor, and I'll make it worth your while!

C: …怎么回事？刚才遥控器按了半天，怎么一点反应都没有？
E: What the...? I just pressed the button on my remote control, but why is my car not responding at all?

C: 艾默里奇陷入失落之中。虽然有些于心不忍，但你觉得让他保持这种状态对整个匹诺康尼而言是件好事。
E: Emmrich falls into a state of despair. While this is somewhat disheartening, keeping him in this state may be advantageous for the welfare of Penacony.

C: ——当然不行，你这无礼的家伙！
E: ...Of course not! Rude!

C: 真是太过分了！{RUBY_B#「同谐」}神主{RUBY_E#}在上，愿您赐予这些艺者一点同理心吧！
E: This is simply too much! Seriously, please grant these artists some empathy, {RUBY_B#Harmony}O Great One{RUBY_E#}!

C: 芙尔拉的怒斥声越来越小，最终变作一声哀叹，眉间的怒火被惆怅取而代之。
E: Forla's irritated rant gradually fades, replaced by a sigh. The anger on her face gives way to despondency.

C: 拉洛丝…如果我能早点做出改变，你是不是就不会放弃原本的理想了呢……
E: Larose... Would you have continued chasing your dream if I had come around earlier?

C: 是吃的吗？
E: Is it some sort of food?

C: 您可以试着从我的演出开始，接触一些不一样的音乐形式。或许…「纯美之歌」在您耳中不会逊色于知更鸟前辈的歌声。
E: Perhaps you could start with my performance and expose yourself to different musical forms. Who knows... the Song of Beauty might resonate with you as much as Robin's songs.

C: 这种营销套路我见过太多了，先挂个虚名引来关注，再用这种离谱的行为来哗众取宠，骗取热度。如果这真是「纯美之歌」，那我洗澡时哼的曲子早就把伊德莉拉复活了！
E: I know all about this marketing gimmick. They create the buzz and then pull off this ridiculous act to cash in on the hype. If this so-called Song of Beauty actually worked, the tune I hum in the shower would have resurrected Idrila ages ago!

C: 没听出来她唱的是不是痛苦，作为听众是挺痛苦的。
E: I'm not sure if she's trying to express pure pain, but it can definitely be a real pain for the audience to endure.

C: 不用肩负责任，不用顾忌市场，唱什么都能靠声名收获成功——我一定要成为这样的歌手。
E: Unshackled by responsibilities, unconcerned with market trends, and able to sing anything while reaping success solely based on reputation — I must become a singer like this.

C: 我过往的人生中经历了许多事，其中绝大部分不值一提，另一小部分则能让我半夜在床上气得发抖。
E: I've gone through many things in my life, most of which aren't worth mentioning, but some are so infuriating that they leave me shaking in anger in the middle of the night.

C: 最开始还算有用，繁多的娱乐让我无暇回忆过往。可随着时间推移，各种熟悉的感觉又找了上来……
E: It worked in the beginning when the plethora of entertainment kept me too busy to think about my past. However, as time went on, those familiar sensations came crawling back to me...

C: 就聊这么多吧。
E: Let's call it a day.

C: 你还想我叫谁过来？
E: Who else do you expect to come here?

C: 眼前的智械发出一串电子笑声，里面似乎蕴含着某种…劫后余生的庆幸。
E: The Intellitron before you lets out a robotic laughter with a hint of relief.

C: 是啊，我活了下来。没有什么比活着更美好了。
E: Indeed, I survived. Nothing is better than staying alive.

C: 但我还是奉劝各位，在梦境之地尽量恪守家族制定的规则。至于原因，我刚才已经解释过了——家族时刻都在看着你。
E: However, I still advise you all to abide by the laws as set out by The Family while in the Dreamscape. As for the reason why, I've just demonstrated my explanation: The Family is always watching you.

C: 感谢你的心意，孩子。
E: Bless your kindness, kid.

C: 嘿，孩子，你知道吗？在我们的星球，人们在星夜下一边起舞一边洽谈生意，你的舞步越是出众，生意也越是兴隆。
E: Hey kid, y'know what? On my home planet, people dance beneath the starry night sky while we do business deals. The more outrageous your dance moves are, the more lucrative your deal is going to be.

C: 可能是因为基金会的缘故，大家都很支持我们的事业，不仅没有倒闭，还收购了不少小微企业，未来或许会变成银河系最大的玩具公司也说不定。
E: Maybe it's because of the foundation, but everyone has always been very supportive of our business. We have not just avoided bankruptcy — we've even managed to acquire a few other small businesses and might just be on our way to becoming the biggest toy manufacturer in the whole galaxy.

C: 你不会是听了谁诽谤基金会的话吧？这时代是这样，大家都爱把人推上神坛，再把他打倒。
E: Don't tell me you believe that slander against the foundation? That's just the way it is, these days — everyone loves to hold up the tall poppy before cutting it down.

C: 我不想陪你浪费时间。
E: You're wasting my time.

C: 再大点声。
E: Louder.

C: 请允许我将自己的一切奉献给您，知更鸟小姐——
E: Please allow me to offer myself to you, Miss Robin...

C: 人老了，有的时候就会控制不住情绪…也许是该找个接班人了？
E: As we get older, we sometimes fail to control our emotions... Perhaps it's about time that I look for a successor.

C: 这种木桶是如此常见，以至于工地上几乎每人都可以分到一个。
E: These barrels are so commonly seen on the construction site that almost every worker has one.

C: 不难想象，照片的拍摄者按下快门时一定怀着十分...热烈的情感。
E: Obviously, the photographer must have taken these photos with... intense passion.

C: 你说得对，但这不会是他们胡作非为的理由。
E: You're right, but that's no excuse for them to do what they want.

C: 如果不是封锁令解除了，咱们俩可没机会像这样说话。
E: If the lockdown had never been lifted, we'd never have had a chance to talk like this.

C: 恍惚间，你觉得这种胡闹的感觉——似乎也不坏。
E: In a daze, you start to wonder if this kind of mischief isn't so bad after all.

C: 虫子发现了你！
E: The insect notices you!

C: 可能是吧。
E: Maybe.

C: 可是要让造物引擎自己生产机兵的话，会带来很多额外开销吧......
E: But if we will have Engines of Creation creating automatons by themselves, that will bring a lot of extra expenses, surely...

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 妃色夫人正在找你。
E: Lady Vermilion is looking for you.

C: 你在恶搞钟表小子？
E: You're parodying Clockie?

C: 看这树枝构筑的梦幻穹顶，石子装点的俊宇雕墙、泥巴铺设的亮丽长廊，多么浪漫…您难道不想在这里度过一个美妙而难忘的夜晚吗？啾啾？
E: Look at this dreamy dome built from branches, the stone-decorated carved walls, the brilliant corridor paved with mud. How romantic... Wouldn't you love to spend an unforgettable and wonderful night here? Tweet tweet?

C: 但是现在到处都是石头老板派来的坏蛋，除了客官以外，人家好久没看到新的客人了啾！都怪石头老板，最讨厌石头老板了啾！
E: But now Boss Stone's baddies are everywhere. I haven't had any guests beside you in such a long time, tweet! It's all Boss Stone's fault, and he is the absolute worst, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，有个随性的孩子总是在它设计的<color=#dbc291ff>「梦泡沙发」</color>上偷懒，可以去找找看啾~
E: Let me think... Oh yeah, there's one easy-going child who can always be found slacking off on the <color=#dbc291ff>"Dream Bubble Sofa"</color> they designed. Go check it out, tweet~

C: 啾啾！看来所有的孩子都回来了啾！
E: Tweet tweet! Looks like all the children are back, tweet!

C: 本公子从不吝啬啾！请把报酬和礼物一起带走吧~
E: I'm never a scrooge, tweet! Take this reward and gift with you as well!

C: 哼哼…我是如此慷慨的小鸟，不必谢我，这处美景就让给你了啾~
E: Hehe... Being the generous little bird I am, I shall cede this fine scene to you. No need to thank me, tweet~!

C: 啾！被发现了！明明我藏得这么好！
E: Tweet! How did you find me when I hid so well!

C: 好喜欢电影啾…只要压得够扁，或许我也能钻进去啾……
E: I love movies, tweet... Maybe if I make myself flat enough, I can get inside, tweet~

C: 啾啾——钟表小子的朋友，您好！我代表所有的孩子向你致谢啾~
E: Tweet tweet... Hello, Clockie's friend! Allow me to thank you on behalf of all the children, tweet~

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个很奇妙的孩子，某天回来的时候忽然告诉我「要用智慧拯救折纸小鸟」…唔，虽然不明白，但你大概能在<color=#dbc291ff>路边的灯杆上</color>见到沉思的它啾！
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet... Oh yeah! There's one child that is very intriguing. One day, when they came back, they told me that they would "use intellect to save the origami birds..." Ah, although I don't fully understand them, I imagine you will find them deep in thought <color=#dbc291ff>standing on the street light</color>!

C: 啾啾——其他在小屋里跑丢的孩子也麻烦您了啾！
E: Tweet tweet... Please help me find the other missing children around the hut, tweet!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个演技绝佳的小助手…它是全美梦小镇中<color=#dbc291ff>最会模仿哈努兄弟的折纸小鸟</color>，本公子的影片必须有它的帮忙啾！请帮我邀请一下吧~
E: Hmm... That's right, there is one assistant that is an outstanding actor... They are the origami bird that does the <color=#dbc291ff>best impersonation of Hanu</color> in all of Dreamville. I must have them for my film, tweet! Help me extend an invite to them, please~

C: 我看参赛的那只狗，四肢稳健，气宇不凡，一定是有备而来的老手啾。
E: That dog in the lineup, with its sturdy legs and that vibe it's got going, I reckon it must be a seasoned pro, tweet.

C: 闭上眼睛，好好调动你的想象力啾。
E: Close your eyes and make full use of your imagination, tweet.

C: 是吗？难道他不爱喝苏乐达啾？
E: Is that so? Maybe he doesn't like to drink SoulGlad, tweet?

C: 哪、哪有！你不要凭空污小鸟的清白啾。
E: I—I did not! You shouldn't slander my innocence, tweet.

C: 好心人，好心人，你会弹钢琴吗？啾啾？
E: Oh, kind-hearted stranger, can you play the piano? Tweet tweet?

C: ....您体验风土人情的方式还真是…奇特。稍等，我这就来帮您……
E: ...Your way of experiencing the local views is certainly... unique. Wait a moment, I'll help you...

C: 一台机兵从工地上赶来，帮你分离了舌头和栏杆，这一过程吸引了不少人围观喝彩......
E: An automaton comes rushing over from the construction site to help you separate your tongue from the pole. This whole process brought applause and admiration from a lot of onlookers...

C: 那我在这里卖票，岂不是毫无意义啾？
E: Wouldn't it be pointless for me to sell tickets here, then, tweet?

C: 这气球靠谱吗？
E: You sure this balloon can hold up?

C: 是啊，每天都能看到这般美景也是鸟生幸事啾。
E: That's right. Being able to see this magnificent view every day is the highlight of my bird life, tweet.

C: 可是啾，你的未来…你的命运，也同这指路牌一样清晰吗？
E: But, for your future... Will your fate be as clear as the signboards, tweet?

C: 之前我就想说，难道你是...
E: I wanted to ask you before. Are you...

C: {NICKNAME}大人，看见你，我的胸膛就仿佛被击中了一样。
E: Great {NICKNAME}, every time I see you, it's like I've been struck in the chest.

C: …接下的事情会很麻烦，我要带走你只是确保你的安全，同时也是确保我的安全。
E: ...What we do next might be quite annoying. I'm bringing you along just to ensure your safety and as well as mine.

C: 我是变聪明了，又不是变得会预测未来了。
E: While I've become smarter, I can't predict the future.

C: 这是吉签的一种表现形式…
E: Well, you can consider this a "Weal" in a sense...

C: 狠狠地开！
