E: Open sesame!

C: 我只是打开看看，不是偷。
E: I was just taking a look. I didn't steal anything.

C: 这些供品的确有打开的痕迹，不过东西倒没有少。食盒供品外面的灰尘倒是擦了个干净……
E: These offerings indeed show signs of having been opened; however, nothing is missing. The dust on the outside of the offering packs has been wiped clean...

C: 等你准备好了，就和我说一声吧，我教你怎么唱这首《合巹记》。
E: Once you're ready, let me know, and I'll teach you how to sing Wedding Wine.

C: （阅读唱本）
E: (Read the libretto)

C: 美梦排排乐玩过了吗？
E: Have you played the Dreamy Slots before?

C: 来瓶苏乐达庆祝下吧。
E: How about a SoulGlad to celebrate?

C: 敲一敲它。
E: Bang the drum.

C: …不过？您如果听说了任何消息还请务必告知我们，这对爸爸…还有我…很重要。
E: ...But? If you know something, you must tell us. This is very important to my father... and to me.

C: 难以想象…妈妈她，居然是那么有名的艺术家吗？
E: It's hard to imagine... Is my mother really that famous as an artist?

C: 凶手在每个案发现场都留下了一盘磁带——没错，就和你手中那盘一样。而这磁带就是污染的源头……
E: The culprit in every case has left behind a tape... That's right, just like the one in your hands. These tapes seem to be the origin of the contamination...

C: 按照星际惯例——在我离开这台机器前，只要没有人发现问题或异样，赢的钱就都归我。没意见吧？
E: In accordance with Interstellar customs — If no one has discovered any issues or irregularities by the time I step away from this machine, the money I've won is all mine. You have no problem with that, right?

C: 就差一个…
E: He only needs one more...

C: 别再跟人提起他的事，对你没有好处。
E: Don't mention anything about him to anyone again, it will only cause you trouble.

C: （好紧张的样子，还是先在旁边围观吧。）
E: (It looks pretty tense over here, maybe I should just watch from the sidelines for now.)

C: 这个人来历不简单。
E: This guy's something else.

C: （没有看到浔桑，这是…她留下的字条？）
E: (You cannot see Xunsang anywhere. Is this... a note that she left you?)

C: 哎呦，大可不必。就当是看个戏，戏中人戏外身，可得好好分清楚才行。
E: Oh dear, don't be. Just think of it as watching a play. You'll have to differentiate between the character in the play and their real self.

C: 啾，我知道了，你也是，来、来抓我回去干活的是不是？
E: Tweet, I get it now. You, you're— you came to make me work again, didn't you?

C: 酒瓶被一把抢了过去。
E: The bottle was immediately snatched from your hands.

C: 哎，真受不了…要拍快点拍，我很忙的。
E: Ah, you just don't give up! ...If you're taking the picture then take it. I'm busy!

C: 「对不起，我正在执行任务，」她的声音依旧温柔，「但你一定要玩得开心，好吗？」噢…真是太可惜了。
E: "Sorry, I'm on a mission right now." Her voice is as soft and gentle as ever. "But I hope you have a great time!" Ah... That's a real shame.

C: 我的朋友很少…
E: I don't have many friends...

C: 桶王并不会因为你的质疑就消失，祂是永恒的，并永恒地爱着我们。
E: The King of Cans will not disappear because of your disbelief. THEY are eternal and will love us forever.

C: 非也，我们是觉醒了！从桶盖的缝隙中察觉到了世界的本质！
E: No. We are awakened! We can now perceive the nature of the world through the cracks in the lid of the can!

C: …偷偷带走。
E: ...to sneak off with it.

C: 你想让我请谁？
E: Who do you want me to invite?

C: 您、您好…呼…呼呼…请问您是想启动放映机吗？
E: H—Hello! *huff* *huff* Are you here to use the projector?

C: 奇了怪了，系统上没有任何记录。难道说它并没有犯罪？
E: This is weird. There isn't any record in the system. Could it be that it's not a criminal?

C: 感谢你的理解。即便十王司面对意外已经做出了充足的准备，然而人们总会因为「一次令人印象深刻的混乱」而对幽囚狱此前种种努力视若不见。
E: Thank you for understanding. Even if the Ten-Lords Commission has made the utmost preparations for unforeseen circumstances, The Shackling Prison's various efforts will still be overshadowed by a singular, deeply impressionable instance of chaos in people's eyes.

C: 没有东西。
E: It's nothing.

C: 感谢你，{NICKNAME}大人。能在这里找到逃犯，多亏了你的细心观察。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. It was all thanks to your sharp eye that we found a runaway here.

C: 所以，他们在自相残杀？
E: So, they were trying to kill one another?

C: 我们还有些手续办完就离开这里了。
E: We still have some paperwork to complete before we can leave this place.

C: 嘴巴根本停不下来！
E: But I just can't help myself!

C: 先做个自我介绍吧，你可以称呼我为「白鸟」。
E: First, let me introduce myself. You can call me Shiratori.

C: 集装箱探索，开始！
E: Freight container exploration, let's do this!

C: 走吧，小心别死在里边。
E: Let's get cracking. Take care of yourself in there.

C: 若是以「骨折了，要去医院拍个片」的辐射量（不做防护措施）作比较的话，安检机中大概只有那辐射量的十分之一。所以，以后有人用安检机吓唬你时，你可以堂堂正正地反驳！
E: When compared to an X-ray examination at the hospital, the amount of radiation a security scanner exposes you to is only one-tenth of what you'd receive from an X-ray scan for a bone fracture (without taking precautions). So, if anyone ever tries to scare you with security scanners and the "health risks" they pose, you can now refute them with confidence!

C: 我偏要登上去试试！
E: I'm doing it anyway!

C: 当然，不客气。
E: Of course. You're welcome.

C: 你写的那些台词太过于羞耻了，我光看着就浑身起鸡皮疙瘩，实在是拉不下这张老脸。
E: That script you wrote was way too embarrassing. Just reading it made my whole body cringe! I just can't bring myself to say it.

C: 住手啊——！
E: Stop!

C: 有道理，但不足以说服我。
E: That may be true, but it's not enough to convince me!

C: 早已预感到结局。
E: I saw that coming...

C: 那那那…那你要用什么招数来对付我？呵，别嚣张，我可不会怕你这装神弄鬼的小技巧！
E: S—s—so... how are you going to overpower me? Hah, don't be so arrogant! I'm not scared of some little supernatural magic tricks!

C: 未来啊——
E: For the future!

C: 刹那间，雷鸣闪动。竞锋舰上的灯集体频闪了几下。不多一会儿，光照又恢复正常。
E: At that moment, lightning strikes and thunder claps. The lights aboard the Skysplitter flickered in unison for a few moments before returning to normal.

C: 不，是老夫教学无方…老夫回去要给他们制定一套新的课程，让他们七位一体，团队作战，到时候再来找你试试招。
E: No, it was my teaching that failed me... I will return and give them a whole new education. I will teach them to fight as one. When that time comes, I will find you and test out their strength!

C: 坦白说我很能共情那位劫匪。
E: If I'm honest, I sympathize with the kidnapper.

C: 老板大气！呃…我是说非常感谢，我一定会好好收藏的！
E: Thank you, boss! Uh... I mean, I'm very grateful. I'll treasure it well!

C: 哼~哼哼~
E: Hm~ Hm hm...

C: （根据演员的性格和能力来安排剧情…这样临时改动真的没问题么？）
E: (Arranging the script according to the actors' personalities and abilities... Will such spur-of-the-moment changes really not present problems?)

C: 故事最重要的就是悬念，不是吗？我们对绿选手几乎一无所知，正因如此，我们才相信他能为舞台带来意料外的变化。他是否能成为那最大的变数……
E: Suspense is imperative in a story, is it not? We know almost nothing about Greenie, and that's why we believe he will bring about the most unanticipated change on the stage. Will he turn out to be the biggest variable...?

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 喂喂喂，{NICKNAME}乘客，能听到吗？
E: Hey hey hey, passenger {NICKNAME}, can you hear me?

C: 在黑暗之中，你仿佛觉醒了哺乳动物残留在基因中的本能。这里是属于你的「巢穴」，温暖、黑暗、安全，谁都无法伤害你。
E: It's as if the instincts lurking in your mammalian genes awakened in the darkness. This is your "lair" — warm, dark, and safe, where no one can harm you.

C: 吼吼吼，非常新鲜的角度，可惜可惜，这不是正确答案！
E: Ho-ho-ho, a very refreshing take. Shame it is not the correct answer!

C: 你想到了在翁法罗斯认识的第一个值得信赖的伙伴，白厄，他一定会回应你的请求。
E: You recall the first trustworthy companion you befriended in Amphoreus, Phainon. He will surely respond to your request.

C: 好痛！这狮子怎么还会咬人的…可是，到底哪里出了问题啊？
E: Owwch! Didn't expect it to bite... But, what exactly did you get wrong?

C: …问问阿格莱雅？
E: ...Ask Aglaea?

C: 这根球棒！
E: This ball bat!

C: 妙啊！谜底是刻法勒！
E: Excellent! The answer is Kephale!

C: 万敌会怎么说？
E: What would Mydei say?

C: 说不定，答案会是翁法罗斯某种独特的事物，既然如此，问问当地的新朋友们或许能得到答案？
E: Perhaps the answer is something special that only happened in Amphoreus. If that's the case, maybe our new local friends might have an answer?

C: …你是想看我把这头狮子给砸了吧。
E: ...You just want to see me smash this lion, don't you?

C: 时间不多了，我想好了最后一个心愿。
E: Time is running out, and I have decided my last wish.

C: 这么说实在太不尊重逝者了——正确答案是垃圾桶盖！
E: How disrespectful to the deceased. The correct answer is a trashcan's lid!

C: 脸皮。
E: Cheeks.

C: 倘若由你来回答，你会在走路时扭动自己的桶盖吗？
E: If it were you, would you twist your lid while walking?

C: 对，我也认为那是好的…但究竟为什么呢？是什么让我产生了这种想法？
E: I agree that's quite a brilliant idea... But why? What gave you the idea?

C: 我就是接头人。
E: I'm your contact.

C: 现在我们准备离开，动身之前必须先把它给处理掉。你愿意接手吗？只要一千信用点。
E: We're preparing to leave now, and we have to get rid of it before we go. Are you willing to take over? It just costs a thousand credits.

C: 建个垃圾站！
E: Build a trash depot!

C: 你现在就在梦中。
E: Well, you are currently inside a dream.

C: 昨日，我在这里看到一位柔弱的小桶，正在被恶霸的桶拳打脚踢。如果是你，会如何处理这件事？
E: Just yesterday, I saw a defenseless can being beaten up by a bully can, right here. If it were you, what would you do in this situation?

C: 传授它「扫帚」的做法。
E: Teach them how to make a "broom."

C: 你又欠我个人情，「救世主」！
E: You owe me another one now, Deliverer!

C: 记不清河鱼洄游了多少次，露水干枯了多少次，邮差来了又走多少次…连松树爷爷的眼泪也变成了亮晶晶的琥珀，没想到，我竟然又听见了它的声音。
E: I've lost track of how many times the river fish have swum upstream, how many mornings the dewdrops have dried, how many visits the postman has made and gone... Even Grandpa Pine's tears have turned into shining amber. And yet, just now, I heard it again.

C: 诶，要是那样的话，奇美拉岂不是变成大地兽了？
E: Wait, if that happens, won't chimera turn into a dromas?

C: 嗷呜嗷！
E: Rrrrr!

C: 是呀。小妖精们很害羞，只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入迷境。
E: Yes, fairies are very shy. Only pure and innocent children can enter the maze.

C: 讲讲仙舟「罗浮」的见闻。
E: Talk about the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 与你形似神更似的稻草人正冲着你笑——这是昔涟送你的见面礼。记得她说的话吗？要是有心情，去找她玩玩吧。
E: The scarecrow, resembling you in both form and spirit, is smiling at you — this is Cyrene's welcome gift. Do you remember what she said? If you're in the mood, go play with her.

C: ——疯王的追随者，找的就是你！没想到吧，我不是悬锋城的人！
E: — The Mad King's followers, you're the one I seek! You had no idea, did you? I am not from Castrum Kremnos at all!

C: （先向对方表示你的善意）
E: (Express your benevolence)

C: 是么。难怪始终没遇见除你外的任何活物，原来…我在传送途中迷失了如此久的时间，以至于历史都发生了改变。这究竟……
E: I see. No wonder you are the only living thing I have come across this whole time. I see... I lost so much time when I was lost in teleportation, and even history itself has changed. Just what exactly...

C: 这不是无名客该做的事！
E: This is not something a Nameless should be doing!

C: 所有神驹的使命与目的地都记录在神殿文书里，想知道的话可以自己去查。
E: Every divine foal's purpose and destination are documented in the Temple records — feel free to look them up if you wish to know.

C: 拉冬是个寒冷的地方，地势很高，追逐着天空，荒凉土地间遍布着陷阱与暗算，可他们的人民确实善战。我们需要拉冬的力量。
E: Ladon lies cold and high, stretching all the way to the sky. Its desolate terrain riddled with traps and treachery, yet its people are fierce warriors. We could use their strength.

C: 哈！莫非你想说的是，欧洛尼斯的力量让我们在不同的时空中相遇？倒不是没可能…但属于我的神谕尚未显现，还没到打开「门」的时候。
E: Oh! Perhaps you mean to say Oronyx's power allowed us to meet across different points in space-time? It's possible... though my prophecy remains unrevealed, so the time for me to open the "Passage" hasn't come.

C: 不过，眼尖的你发现，几株嫩芽正在碎石间悄然生长。或许不久后，那些散失的神识碎片将会成为仙女木的温床。
E: Yet, between the stone fragments, your keen eye spots tender sprouts reaching for the light. Perhaps these scattered fragments of soul essence will soon breathe life into new White Dryad saplings.

C: 呼呼，又见面了。
E: Woohoo, we meet again.

C: 汪汪？汪汪汪？汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof? Woof woof woof? Woof woof!

C: 具体时间很难说，但我们会保证尽快恢复空间站的正常运行。
E: It's hard to say, but we promise that the space station will resume normal operation as soon as possible.

C: 不过幸好，空间站并没有失守，大家还能在这里，做实验，聊天，散步。
E: Fortunately, the space station survived. We can still do experiments, chat and stroll around.

C: 若果真如此，那么岂不是那位大人曾注视…不，是正在注视着……
E: If this is true, the lord must've seen... No, must be watching...

C: 即便我努力克制，精心设计，希望不要为他人添麻烦，但也都是徒劳。
E: No matter how hard I try to refrain myself and avoid causing trouble for others, it never works.

C: 而聪明的人，就会借这海啸拉踩上位一气呵成。
E: Those who are smart will know how to take advantage of the tsunami and climb their way up the food chain.

C: 嗯？您怎么欲言又止，不会是我记错了吧，应该不会啊…还是您也有什么事要交代我吗？
E: Yeah? Do you have something to say? Did I miss something again... Or do you have an order for me?

C: 闲聊也是一种休息的方式，如果你有兴趣可以再来找我——只要是和课题研究无关，我都会很乐意聊聊的。
E: Chatting is also a way of resting. Come chat with me if you are interested. I'll be very happy to talk about anything as long as it's not about research.

C: 第二愚蠢的规则——这是一条隐性规则：那就是将不同科室之间，分个高低贵贱、三六九等！
E: The second stupidest rule, which is a hidden rule, is that different departments are ranked on a hierarchy!

C: 哎哟哟，嘴真甜。你们这帮年轻人真会说话。
E: Aww, that's sweet. Young people these days know how to talk.

C: 常驻<unbreak>249</unbreak>个，备用<unbreak>32</unbreak>个。我懒得操纵人偶走路。
E: There are <unbreak>249</unbreak> in service and another <unbreak>32</unbreak> as backups. I can't be bothered to control their walking, so I just keep plenty around in each area.

C: 办公室？空间站给我准备了一个套房，不过我觉得离大家太远，这样太生分了。
E: My office? Oh, the station gave me a suite, but I like to stay around here and hang out with everybody.

C: 为什么你也姓温？
E: Why are there so many Wens on the space station?

C: 你要走了？好吧，没关系，我习惯了…毕竟每个人都是要离开的…没事，咱们下次再聊吧。
E: Are you leaving? No problem. I'm used to it... After all, separation is inevitable... Let's catch up next time.

C: 阮•梅女士…哎……
E: Miss Ruan Mei... *sigh*

C: 这种咸甜酸涩混杂在一起的味道，我果然是不配被爱的，哎……
E: My flavor — a mixture of salty, sweet, sour, and bitter — doesn't deserve to be loved. *sigh*

C: 可我心里还是空空荡荡的，我这种豆沙馅，看上去就是发霉的东西……
E: Yet, there's still an emptiness in my heart. My bean paste filling makes me look moldy...

C: 行，今天的这个单独会面啊就到这里结束吧，以后还有大把合作机会，我们到时候再聊。
E: Well, let's call it a day then. We have plenty of chances to talk when we collaborate in the future.

C: 你是说阮•梅女士吗？那倒不是。阮•梅女士按照做出来的口味，喊我「生煎蛋挞」。
E: Do you think Miss Ruan Mei named me? She didn't. She called me Pan-fried Egg Tart, which is what I was born as.

C: 你好，呜呜？是{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！
E: Hello, Wubbie? It's {NICKNAME}!

C: 我本人已去往更讳莫如深的宇宙地带，通讯不便，联系只好凭借缘分。
E: I have already ventured to a deeper and more mysterious corner of the universe, where communication is difficult. It depends on luck whether you can reach me.

C: 我记得你我之间所有的片段，微小的信息像涓涓细流一样，它们「构成」了世界。
E: I remember all the snippets of memories we shared. Tiny details that flow like little streams make up the world.

C: （附近有没有足以服众的仲裁者呢…找找看吧。）
E: (There's no such arbitrator around here... Let's find one.)

C: 扎格列斯大人，莫非昨日的托梦，也只是一时兴起的恶作剧吗……
E: Lord Zagreus, were your words in my dream a whimsical prank...

C: 已装备「最强之矛」
E: The Strongest Lance is equipped

C: 你费了好大劲才撕开坐垫的表面，一份卷轴从中滑落。
E: After great effort, you finally manage to tear off the cushion's cover as a scroll falls out from inside.

C: 它的底部沾满污垢，甚至隐约可见蜘蛛网的痕迹，看来它是无主之物，被遗弃在这里已有些年头了。
E: The bottom is so stained with dirt, you can even see faint traces of spider webs. It looks like it has been abandoned here without an owner for all this time.

C: 数学，毫无疑问是公认的学科，可关于数学的任何公理都无法从存在的事物中找到。你永远见不到真正的圆形，却不影响我们谈论「圆」的知识。
E: Mathematics is undeniably a recognized school, yet there is no self-evident truth of mathematics that can be found within objects that exist. You will never see a true circle, yet that does not stop us from discussing knowledge regarding "circles."

C: 所以是为何呢？跳过全部推导过程，直接否认结果，这样的质疑怕是构不成你的驳论。
E: And for what reason? I fear that circumventing the process of deduction and directly refuting my conclusion do not, in fact, constitute a rebuttal.

C: 时间之外，当然有物存在。我们度量时间，能从一数到十，正是因为在数到后面的数时，前面的数并未消失。有数在先，才能有数在后。
E: Of course some objects exist outside of time. When we measure time, we can count from one to ten precisely because the earlier numbers still exist by the time I have reached the later numbers. I must count the earlier numbers to reach the latter.

C: 总之，营地遭到了袭击，哈德斯想使用「艾格勒之光」求救，却没想到携带的正是无法使用的劣质物资……
E: Anyway, the camp was attacked and Hadez tried using a "Light of Aquila" to send for help — never realizing that he was in fact using dodgy supplies himself...

C: 以上是我的分析…你还有什么要补充的吗？
E: That's my analysis of the situation... Anything else to add?

C: 宁芙的事，你有线索吗？
E: Nympha. Got any clues about her?

C: 这是宁芙的意思？
E: Is that what Nympha wanted?

C: 至于那小子，自然有他好看。
E: As for that little punk, he's going to suffer.

C: 我们想把这组书信交给你，刚才匆忙整理好的。
E: We'd like to leave this set of letters with you. We've just been frantically pulling this together.

C: 没关系，这个结果…我早有心理准备。对普通人来说，很难有谁能从黑潮的包围中全身而退。
E: It's alright. I was prepared for this outcome. For most people, escaping the grasp of the black tide unscathed is nearly impossible.

C: …防守都被攻破了？怎么回事？！
E: ...The defenses were breached? What happened!?

C: …所以那家伙究竟是个什么来路？
E: Remind me... what's the deal with that thing again?

C: 之前要你写的那份研究报告呢？写得怎么样了？
E: That report I asked you to write before... how is it?

C: 光我们应物科，就有不少人在排队轮候呢，这么多人盯着，我怎么敢徇私让你插队。
E: At our Department of Implement Arts alone, there're loads of people waiting in line. How could I let you cut in when so many people are watching?

C: 但这个牌子我知道，做医药起家的，很有名。
E: But I know this brand. They started out in medicine before making it big.

C: 啊？他也太那个了吧？
E: Hmm? Is he too... y'know?

C: 问就是没有。你还是先把这个理论研究透了，再申请实验吧。
E: Don't have any, sorry. You should really get a firm grasp on this theory first, and then apply to do the experiment.

C: 前辈，我还是不太明白，为什么我算出来的和你算的差这么多？
E: I know you're my senior, but I still don't get why my calculation is so different from yours.

C: 「忘记是普通人能做的唯一的事，但是我决定不忘记她——」
E: "Forgetting is the only thing ordinary people can do, but for her, I've decided not to —"

C: 原来…<color=#dbc291ff>那头大地兽的恋爱对象，是悬锋城啊！</color>
E: Turns out... <color=#dbc291ff>the dromas' true love is Castrum Kremnos!</color>

C: 别扯什么附身，不是你，还能是谁呢？{NICKNAME}大人与达利安是亲眼所见。
E: Don't give me that "possessed" nonsense. If it wasn't you, then who else could it be? {NICKNAME} and Dorian both saw it with their own eyes.

C: 你们俩各打五十大板。
E: Both of you deserve fifty lashes.

C: 刻法勒也离我们好近…我们在这里说话，它能听到吗？
E: Kephale's so close to us... If we talk here, can they hear us?

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，和刻法勒说话需要学习什么复杂的仪式吗？我从没有听说过……
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, do I really need to learn these complicated rituals to talk with Kephale? I've never heard that before...

C: 嘿嘿…我可觉得自己已经是个大人了呢~
E: Hehe... I think I'm already an adult!

C: 抬头就能看到刻法勒…虽然很高、很冷，但一伸手就能摸到黎明机器的光芒。
E: If you just look up, you can see Kephale... They're so tall and cold, but if you stretch out your hand, you can touch the light of the Dawn Device.

C: 您会驱散我的恐惧吗？
E: Will you drive away my fears?

C: 哦？面对我这个「竞技场英雄」亲笔签名的诱惑也无动于衷吗？你这家伙，有点胆识。
E: Oh? Completely unfazed by the temptation of a personal autograph from the "Arena Hero"? You've got some guts, I'll give you that.

C: 这次我们想到的好点子是——黎明机器灯罩！让您的蜡烛如黎明机器般散发光辉~所以，就来圣殿谈合作了。
E: The great idea we've come up with this time is Dawn Device! Let your candles shine with the brilliance of a dawn machine. So, we came to the temple to discuss a partnership.

C: 嗨，现在可不是挑三拣四的时候！
E: Hey, now's not the time to be picky!

C: 问问克利克。
E: Ask Kilik.

C: 一个计划从你心中浮现：捡起斐第斯的石制扩声器，把事情的原委告诉那位正直的守卫，恳请他带孩子们来到刻法勒的神像前……
E: A plan forms in your mind: You take Phedes' stone-made amplifier and tell that upright guard the whole story, asking him to bring the children before the colossus...

C: 果然，我从前骗过{F#女士}{M#先生}你，这回却被你「骗」了一回呀！
E: Figures. I deceived you before, {F#miss}{M#mister}, but now you "tricked" me!

C: 以前，维吉妮娅曾作为外交使者前往树庭，目睹阿波罗尼独辩四贤人。
E: Once, Verginia visited the Grove as a diplomatic messenger and witnessed Apollonius debating against four Sages.

C: 我们…不，我…该怎么办好呢……
E: What should we... no, what should I... do...

C: 那么，你呢？
E: So, what about you?

C: 城下的古遗迹里有一台雅努斯迷津，对阿波罗尼最后的目击记录就在那附近。
E: There's a Janus' Maze in the ancient ruins below the city, and the last sighting of Apollonius was recorded around there.

C: 阿波罗尼，也记得向小维吉妮娅道个歉。她还以为你是不知道怎么面对她才闹失踪，自责了好一会儿呢。
E: Apollonius, don't forget to apologize to little Verginia too. She thought you went missing because you didn't know how to face her and has been blaming herself for quite a while.

C: 当下，最妥当的方案，或许是去委任涅赖德斯阁下——她曾是海瑟音大人的贴身辅佐，也是如今唯一的「海洋」司祭。
E: Our best option now might be to seek Lady Nereides. She was Lady Hysilens's personal assistant and is currently the only "Ocean" Priest remaining.

C: 毕竟…没人会拒绝自己最爱的味道……
E: After all... no one ever turns down a sip of their own deepest longing...

C: 呛人的风味并未如预期般向你袭来，取而代之的却是一种熟悉感，就像在哪里……
E: Instead of the strong kick you expected, you're struck by a familiar taste, like you've had it somewhere...

C: 但我感觉，现在的列车好像和以前不大一样了……
E: I will say, the train feels a little different now...

C: 嗯，有我漆黑的虎克大人在，帕姆一定不会觉得无聊的。
E: *sniff* I—I will! When Pitch-Dark Hook the Great's on the Express, Pom-Pom will never get bored!

C: 克拉拉还有很多知识要学习，有很多问题想向姬子大姐姐和帕姆请教。
E: I've still got lots to learn, and lots of questions to ask Miss Himeko and Pom-Pom.

C: 克拉拉正在想办法把这里看到的风景记录下来！但、但是……
E: I'm trying to capture the views but...

C: 帕姆…走起来一扭一扭的，好可爱喔……
E: Pom-Pom looks really cute when they walk...

C: …对了，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}有空的话，也可以回机械聚落看看哦。
E: ...Oh! When you have time, don't forget to come back to Robot Settlement and pay us a visit.

C: 没问题，这事交给我。
E: No problem. Leave it to me.

C: 和姬子小姐聊了聊……
E: Chatted with Himeko...

C: 抱歉，最近事务繁忙，列车之旅耽搁许久，总算成行了。
E: Apologies, I've been busy lately so I had to put off the Express tour for a while. Here we are, finally.

C: 空间站很多科员喜欢喝咖啡，他们说这样有利于集中精神做实验。
E: A lot of the researchers on the station live off the stuff. They said it helps them focus.

C: 神医救我！
E: Thank you, o miracle doctor!

C: 呃，谈不上、谈不上。
E: Ahem, you are truly too kind...

C: 很反常地，银狼没有向你打招呼，而是竖起食指，聚精会神地在空中点击着什么。
E: Silver Wolf didn't greet you as usual. Instead, she raised her finger and clicked on something in the air.

C: 有空便来看看吧。
E: Come and have a look whenever you can.

C: 我一定会常来。
E: I'll definitely come by more often...

C: 本小姐刚才还找你呢，正好你来了。
E: I was just looking for you, and here you are.

C: 以后还是要多找丹恒老师聊聊天，也许聊得多了，他就能打开话匣子了吧。
E: I'll keep talking to him — maybe I can eventually unlock his chattier side!

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 等着瞧吧卡波特！等我忙完手里的工作，整理完奇物报告，再去忙完收容回收检查，最后再和阿德勒去一趟…哎哟！世玲怎么还有那么多事要忙呀！
E: Just you wait, Capote! When I finished my work, tidied up the Curio report, supervised Curio reclamation, and went with Adler to... Ugh! How come I still have so much work to do!?

C: 没事，我不是来找你的，我来找三月七，交流一些…读后感。顺便给你带了点小礼物，拿着吧。别误会，我真不是特意来找你的。
E: Don't worry. I'm not here for you. I'm here to find March and discuss some... opinions about books, and I brought you a small gift. Here. Don't misunderstand. I'm definitely not here for you.

C: 啊…可是姬子小姐对我说帕姆是独一无二的。我的笔记里好像也没有类似的记录……
E: I doubt it. Himeko told me Pom-Pom is unique. I don't have anything like that in my records...

C: 去三月七的房间里休息会儿吧。
E: Go rest for a while in March's room.

C: 还没…读……
E: Hasn't been...

C: C5H9NO4是什么的化学式？
E: What is C5H9NO4 the molecular formula of?

C: 谢谢你的邀请，{NICKNAME}。我在这里可以暂时忘掉繁杂的政务，还能欣赏到如此美妙的星空…我很满足。
E: Thank you for inviting me, {NICKNAME} — I'll be able to get away from the complexities of politics here. Being surrounded by these beautiful stars... it's such a joy.

C: 这么多的星星，它们到底是在为了谁发光呢？
E: So many stars... Who are they shining for?

C: 真是惬意呀。
E: It's so peaceful here...

C: …好、好主意。
E: ...G—Good idea.

C: …照这么说来，我和你有些相似。
E: I feel like, um, we're kind of... similar, I guess?

C: 最近十王司工作不太忙，然后我有了一段小假期。原本我下定决心告诉自己「假期来之不易，每一天都要充实地度过」。
E: Lately, work at the Ten-Lords Commission isn't too busy, and I ended up with a little vacation time. At first, I told myself: "breaks are hard to come by, I should make the most of every day."

C: 尾巴更可爱。
E: Mr. Tail is cuter.

C: 但我很担心，从「短暂」变为「永久」后，是否会让鲜花不再因瞬时绽放而如此动人。就像…玫瑰被叫做其他名字后，闻起来便不再馥郁。
E: ...however, I'm concerned that making the ephemeral "permanent" might strip flowers of their fleeting beauty... Would a rose by any other name smell as sweet?

C: 这些音乐，虽然和匹诺康尼的风格不同，但依然很动听。
E: The music here is different from what we have on Penacony, but it's still cool.

C: 很久没受过这样的夸奖了。但我想说的是——那边的角落里是不是放过什么带怨气的东西？
E: It's been a long time since I've received such a compliment. What I wanted to say was — was there once something resentful in that corner?

C: 信归信，但有些感觉靠自信可能解释不清。
E: Belief is one thing, but relying on it won't help explain things.

C: 彻底绕进去了……
E: My mind's a complete jumble...

C: 你要是有我这口钢牙，随便嚼！
E: If you have steel teeth like mine, feel free to!

C: 柔软的沙发…
E: The sofa is so soft...

C: 想来一场占卜么？
E: How about a divination?

C: 再次谢谢你的邀请，不久之后，我也要启程了…列车的下一站会是哪里呢？记忆的流向…又将去往何处呢。
E: I thank you again for your invitation. Before long, I too must depart... Where is the Express' next stop? The river of memories... where will it flow to next?

C: 感谢你的夸奖，我的挚友。这团绒球是怪物——「凶恶绒球」的战利品。
E: Thank you, my dear friend. This fluff ball is a prize from a monster — the Ferocious Fluff Ball.

C: 太空竞逐是一场勇气与速度的较量，当引擎的动力达到顶峰，激昂的斗志也会被随之点燃。
E: Space racing is a battle of bravery and speed. When the engine's power reaches its peak, one's passionate fighting spirit will also be ignited.

C: 这么令人沉溺其中的甜香，我曾在小时候闻到过一次。
E: I've only smelled something this sweet and enticing once, when I was little.

C: 早该离开这里了。
E: Time to get outta here.

C: 你认真研读了广告词上的「罐装一切」字眼，你怀疑这和奇物「分装快乐」有些关联，毕竟它们都是「罐头」。
E: You scrutinize the "Everything can be canned!" part of the advertisement and suspect it to have some association with the Joy Filtration Set Curio, since they are both about cans.

C: 嗯？有什么值得一瞧的东西吗？
E: Hm? Are you trying to have a staring contest or something?

C: 我在干什么，我不能再这么思考了……
E: What am I doing, I really have to stop thinking...

C: 呜啊…车厢里很舒服对吧，这就是家的感觉！
E: The Express is so cozy... Just like home should feel!

C: 没什么，再见。
E: Nothing. Have a good day.

C: 不睡觉学猫头鹰？
E: So the reason you aren't sleeping is that you want to imitate owls?

C: 我在等你说完呢。
E: I'm waiting for you to finish.

C: 贝洛伯格就你一个地产中介？
E: You are the only property agent in Belobog?

C: 笑话，一个看不懂我科研的人说我雷金强词夺理——科学界没救了！
E: Says someone who has no clue what I'm doing with my research. Science is dead!

C: 啊，我就是一堆一无是处的垃圾。垃圾桶才是我应该栖身的归宿。
E: Ah, I am good for nothing. I am destined to end up in a trashcan.

C: 现在你怎么看《雪国冒险奇谭》？
E: How would you rate Tale of the Winterlands now?

C: 咳，嗯哼哼…你有什么事吗？
E: Ah, ahem... Can I help you with something?

C: 哎？对不起，我看书看得有点太投入了，说话太激动了点，不好意思……
E: Huh...? Oh... I may have gotten a little too wrapped up in the book. Sorry for rambling on...

C: 问吧问吧！向市民普及防诈骗技巧就是我们的责任。
E: Go ahead! It's our responsibility to help prevent the public from being scammed.

C: 生意怎么样？
E: How's business?

C: 你这是利用职务之便吧…
E: You're just taking advantage of your position...

C: 不过嘛，走街串巷沿街叫卖到底是个体力活…但您要是能给我贡献点销售额，我兴许就能讨些不一样的食，那可是再好不过！
E: Selling these in the streets is hard work... It would be nice if you could contribute a little to my profits. Then, I may be able to afford to eat something different for once!

C: …难道其中藏了我不知道的笑点？
E: ...Is there a joke in there that I've failed to understand?

C: 呼噜…呼噜……
E: *snore*

C: 四舍五入一下，这不相当于让别人替我工作，而且我还有钱挣吗？啧啧，听着就美滋滋啊……
E: All in all, wouldn't that mean someone else is doing the work for me, but I'm still earning money? Tsk tsk, the mere thought of it makes me happy...

C: 你说布洛妮娅？
E: Are you talking about Bronya?

C: 布洛妮娅…我记住了！
E: Bronya... Got it!

C: 你想知道这个干什么？
E: Why do you want to know about this?

C: …不过硬要说的话，那群流浪者里也有不少人有这种手艺啦。
E: ...Well, actually, many people among the vagrants also possess that skill.

C: 事不宜迟，我这就开始收拾行李！谢谢你提供的宝贵情报啦！
E: Without further ado, I'll start packing! Thanks so much for this valuable intel!

C: 老歌德和「歌德宾馆」…
E: About Old Goethe and Goethe Hotel...

C: 到了我这个年纪，很多亲戚朋友都在慢慢走出我的生活。有时候我也不免怀念从前的青葱岁月……
E: At my age, I have lots of friends and families leaving my life. Sometimes I can't help but miss those halcyon days gone by...

C: 当然，这并不意味着你可以随便差使社友…要想享受权利，你就必须有过帮助他人的记录才行。
E: This certainly doesn't mean you get to order other members about... To enjoy the rights, you must first have a record of helping others.

C: 听说洞螈肉最近涨价了，要是能抓到一两只，今天也算是没有浪费……
E: I heard olm meat has risen in price recently. It'd be a day well spent if I could catch a few...

C: 唔…基本上是吧？平时放工之后我就会拿着捕网去捉洞螈……
E: Well... I do. I will grab a net to catch olms after work...

C: 当然有，{NICKNAME}。和你谈话总能让我受益良多。
E: Of course, I do, {NICKNAME}. I've always benefited lots from our discussions.

C: 我很高兴，{NICKNAME}…这一次我不必再编织话术，不必再为了安稳牺牲真诚。
E: I'm so happy, {NICKNAME}... I no longer have to concoct a lie this time. I don't have to sacrifice my sincerity for the sake of stability.

C: 演出？随缘咯～想起来就开，想不起来就算了…这就是摇滚的精神！
E: Gig? Whenever we want~ If we want it, we do it — otherwise, we don't. That's rock music!

C: 茉莉小姐最近如何？
E: How's Molly?

C: 她的能力强在哪里？
E: What's her specialty?

C: 是啊，我做了好久思想准备呢。要是这会儿再反悔，那我不是亏大了嘛～
E: Yes, I've been preparing myself mentally for a long time. If I back out now, it'll be a huge loss.

C: 那是谁？
E: Who's that?

C: 然后你猜怎么着？杰帕德居然让那小子当场来一段！
E: You'll never guess what happened next! Gepard asked the boy to play something, right there on the spot!

C: 我叫邓恩，直属于杰帕德戍卫官，目前担任这片军事禁区的总管。
E: My name's Dunn, and I serve under Captain Gepard. And I'm the current head of this military restricted zone.

C: 哈，吓到你了吧！
E: Hah, did I give you a fright?

C: 如果他们真的愿意把压箱底的技术都拿出来分享，施工速度肯定会翻倍...不，甚至翻上好几番都有可能！
E: If they really are willing to share their technology unreservedly with us, then production speed will definitely double... No! It could even triple or quadruple!

C: 所谓公事公办——此类行为一经发现，我身为戍卫官也无法保你周全。
E: Rules are rules — once any such acts are discovered, even I, the Captain, can't guarantee your safety.

C: 大守护者与她的律法当如环绕这贝洛伯格的铁壁，任何事物都不能凌驾于其上。
E: The Supreme Guardian and her laws are akin to an iron wall around Belobog. Nothing in this place is above them.

C: 克拉拉从来没见过自己的爸爸妈妈…从我有记忆的时候开始，史瓦罗先生就一直陪在我身边了。
E: I've never met my own parents... For as long as I can remember, Mr. Svarog's always been by my side.

C: 在发酵，她知道，孩子的肚子需要被面包填饱
E: Like a fire burning, she knows it's bread her kids' desire

C: 四千个昼，四千个夜
E: Four thousand days, four thousand nights

C: 才用千分之一的功力你就趴了
E: My little finger rapping could still take you to the cleaners

C: 伊妮丝看上去很满意。
E: Eunice looks really satisfied.

C: 玲可拍了拍自己的脸蛋。
E: Lynx softly slaps her cheeks.

C: 我没想到学校里竟然还有第二个《奇谭》粉丝，就想和她聊聊，听听她对《奇谭》的看法…不过，那时的佩拉很害羞，支支吾吾什么也没说出来。
E: I was pretty surprised to find out that she was a fan of Tales too, so I was curious about her opinion on it... But Pela was so shy that she didn't really say anything.

C: …不过这也是我道听途说来的，不是很清楚其中的细节。你就当是个幻想故事吧，别放在心上。
E: ...But these are just baseless rumors, and I don't really know the details. So, don't take this wild story too seriously.

C: 嗯？哈哈哈，没想到连次数你都记得这么清楚！
E: Huh? Hahaha! I didn't think you'd remember the number so well!

C: 我还有其他事要忙。
E: I have other matters to attend to.

C: 明白了？我没法给你提供任何东西。
E: So, you understand now? There is nothing I can offer you here.

C: 拿着，这是给你的奖励。
E: Here, the promised reward for you.

C: 我自打从欧文利星毕业以后就拿到了公司「市场开拓部」的工作——和我的双胞胎弟弟维利特一起。
E: After graduating from Owenley, I got a job with the Marketing Development Department, where I work together with my twin brother Velite.

C: 扑满不愿听从这个命令，生命总会找到出路。
E: The Trotter does not want to obey this order. Life always finds a way...

C: 小熊发出了开心的叫声。也许你可以试着表现得更亲密些……
E: The cub let out a joyous call. Maybe you could try befriending it...

C: …为什么你的兜里会有榛子？这不重要，总之它已经出现在你手里了。
E: ...Why did you have a hazelnut in your pocket? That's not important, it's already in your hand now.

C: 不是，你先等会儿…我一直很好奇一件事。
E: No, please hang on... I've always been curious about this one thing.

C: 工业区的代表来信说……
E: The industrial zone rep wrote a letter to say...
Mm? *sigh*

C: 臭小子，别起哄！
E: Quit heckling, brat!

C: 二十八、二十九……
E: Twenty-eight, twenty-nine...

C: 这是什么以太灵呀？
E: What's this Aether Spirit?

C: 哎，你听说了吗？
E: Hey, have you heard the news?

C: ~我们亲爱的故乡~
E: Our cherished homeland, we stand~

C: ~爱情之花破冰绽放~
E: Love's flowers bloom, brave and bold~

C: 哟，你怎么又逛荡到修理间来了？
E: Hey, why'd you come back to the restoration room?

C: 这几日罗浮仙舟祸乱频出，大家相信云骑军能够处理好大大小小许多事情。
E: The Luofu has been ravaged by disaster recently. Everyone thinks that the Cloud Knights are capable of solving every problem under the sun, no matter how great or small.

C: 伊须磨洲的人们有一个特性，出生后直到青年时期都是陆生动物，用肺呼吸。但成年后就会变成水栖动物，用腮呼吸。
E: The people of Insumousu are special indeed. From their birth until their teenage years, they live on land and breathe with their lungs. But once they reach adulthood, they start to live in water and breathe using gills.

C: …这写诗谁不会啊，她怎么就看不上我呢？我差在哪儿啊？
E: ...Writing poetry is so easy. Why doesn't she like me? What am I missing?

C: 交感幻戏现在不是艺术，是因为还缺乏一个真正的艺术家。如果不是让公司那些目光短浅的人瞎搞，而是我来操刀，也许就能让「交感幻戏」成为真正的艺术……
E: Empathic Immersia cannot be an art form, because it lacks a true artist in its ranks. If I were contracted to do some Empathic Immersia instead of those suits at the company dilly-dallying, then maybe it could have become a true art form...

C: 不久后，我就和这位白鸟老弟一起成立了「阿合马铁窗集团」，专注于用有限的资源为客户提供无限的服务！
E: Not long after, I established the Arma Correctional Group with Shiratori. Our goal is to provide limitless service to our customers when we only have limited resources!

C: 仙舟本地人办的卡都是两百年往上了，您和他们可没有办法比啊，咱这些优惠都是准备给仙舟化外民的。
E: Xianzhou people get membership cards that last them over <unbreak>200</unbreak> years. There's absolutely no comparison to be made here. These discounts are intended for Outworlders visiting Xianzhou.

C: …不过我和那人可没有什么奇奇怪怪的关系啊，别误会。
E: ...But don't get the wrong idea. We don't have anything strange going on between us.

C: 什么叫「说不长就不长了」，我跟你说，建木不再生长正是水分缺失所导致的。
E: What do you mean? I'll say, it's the lack of water that causes the Ambrosial Arbor to stop growing.

C: 与你灵魂产生共鸣的宿敌…
E: He's an old nemesis who resonates with your soul...

C: 你要是实在没事做，我印象里浥尘客栈一直缺清洁工…我与老板娘相识，可以写封介绍信，帮你摆脱「游手好闲」的刻板印象。
E: If you've really got nothing better to do, I think the Petrichor Inn is looking for cleaners... I know the proprietress there and can introduce you. It might just help you shake the stereotype of being a lazybones.

C: 它难道不应该更特别一些吗？
E: Shouldn't it be a little more special than the others?

C: 听完之后很感动。
E: I'm touched.

C: 虽然按照神策府公开的资料，彦卿年纪小小。但实际上，他早已经垂垂老矣。我们持明族中有些人像他一样，停留在少年的身形，终身不会成长。
E: According to the public records at the Seat of Divine Foresight, Yanqing is still young. But word on the street is that Yanqing ain't as young as he seems. In reality, he's already of advanced years. Some of us Vidyadhara folks are like that too, where we stop aging when we hit adolescence.

C: 案牍库可以说是幽囚狱的信息中枢。幽囚狱里这么多要犯，身份信息可全都存储在咱们这案牍库里呢。
E: The document office is the Shackling Prison's central hub. The personal information of all these prisoners in the Shackling Prison are all stored in our document office.

C: 太卜司都做什么？
E: What does the Divination Commission do?

C: 请您相信地衡司的专业性。执事们拥有不同的履历，能够丰富我们处理复杂社情民情时的经验和手段。噗——
E: Please trust in the professionalism of the Realm-Keeping Commission. Our officers come from different backgrounds, which only enriches our experiences and methods of dealing with complex social and public interactions. Pfft—

C: 好说。我这里囤积的过期货物可不少呢～希望您这次运气不错。
E: Not a problem. I've got loads of abandoned goods here~ Hope you strike it lucky this time.

C: 我想买个过期邮包试试手气。
E: I'd like to buy an abandoned parcel to try my luck.

C: 你们俩之间有什么不对付吗？
E: Have you two come to a disagreement?

C: 能怎么办呢？总不能烂在我手里了吧…哎，我不是说赛伯邑超导合金会烂掉，我是说自己不能什么都没赚到就回老家了。
E: What can I do? I can't just leave them to rot... *sigh* I don't mean that Cybercity superconducting alloys could ever actually rot. I just mean that I can't go back to my hometown with my tail between my legs and nothing to show for it.

C: 慢走啊。
E: Off you go. Take care.

C: 你的记忆力为什么这么好？
E: Why is your memory so good?

C: 我的业务自然不止装卸集装箱这么简单，什么货物入港、清关报关、货物检查的，这些该走的手续我都可以代办。
E: Naturally, I don't just handle packing and unloading — that's far too simple. I also handle all kinds of procedures, like cargo entry, customs clearance, and quarantine inspections.

C: 那当然，平时流云渡的货运量大，竞争也大，要讨口饭吃可没这么容易。
E: Sure is. Cloudford is a high traffic port but it's very competitive, so it's tough to make a living here.

C: 暂时没什么事。
E: That's all for now.

C: 我虽然是个卜者，但我不喜欢八卦别人的。
E: I'm a diviner, I shouldn't be gossiping.

C: 我也不知道啊，上头说要我来那我就来了呗。哎，说到这个就来气。
E: Your guess is as good as mine. If the higher-ups say they want me here, then I'm here. *sigh* Talking about this is starting to make me angry again.

C: 开门做生意，态度这么冷淡？
E: How do you get away with such a nonchalant attitude toward business?

C: 想问你点事。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 你是做什么工作的？
E: What do you do for a living?

C: 虽然咱也不是丹鼎司的医士，说不出个一二三四五。但是咱听说，这些药材在仙舟外也大受欢迎，不知道是真的假的。
E: I'm no Alchemy Commission healer or anything and barely know the basics. But still, I hear this medicine is really popular beyond Xianzhou. Though I can't vouch for whether that's true or not.

C: 昨天晚上，我点了一份刺毛猪脚饭，饭馆说现在没办法送外卖到丹鼎司。我猜想，是因为猪脚饭也加入了药王秘传吧。
E: Just last night, I ordered some razorboar trotter rice, but the diner said they couldn't deliver it to the Alchemy Commission anymore. I'm guessing it's because even the trotter rice has joined up with the Disciples.

C: 有些事想问你。
E: I have a few questions I wish to ask you...

C: 我这才出差了多久，怎么感觉一回来整个世界都变了，这还是我认识的丹鼎司吗？ 到底发生什么事了……
E: I wasn't even away for that long! Why do I feel like the whole world has changed? Is this still the Alchemy Commission I know? What happened...?

C: 你没事吧…
E: Are you okay...?

C: 他们爱怎么说怎么说，只要阵法一切正常，其他的事都不值一提。
E: They can say whatever they want. As long as the matrix works smoothly, other things don't matter.

C: 您既然没打算来找事做，再问下去就不礼貌了。
E: And if you're not looking for a job, then you'd be rude to keep asking me questions.

C: 那雾生知道你的目的吗？
E: Does Kiryu know about your plans against him?

C: 另外，每周四咱这儿会搞一个「创意星期四」，出一些特殊口味的「怪味菜」。这也是为了给仙舟的老饕们增加一些变数和乐趣。
E: Furthermore, we host an "Odd-taste Thursday" every Thursday, where you'll find new dishes with interesting flavors. These new dishes will bring new twists and fun to the gourmets in Luofu.

C: 下次再来吃吧…
E: I'll come back later...

C: 狐人的耳朵会反应情绪，若是有欣喜之事，就像有电流通过一样立起来。
E: You can tell a foxian's mood by their ears. When they feel happy, their ears will perk up as if an electric current passed through.

C: 顺遂顺遂，这都是托了客人的福啊。现在金人巷里熙熙攘攘的，我这「杜氏茶庄」也越来越有名了。
E: Thanks to you, it's been going well. Now that the Aurum Alley is bustling with people, my teahouse is garnering fame too.

C: 客人您也知道，我这小店的客人还是喜欢安静，不太希望「杜氏茶庄」太过出名…说实话，我明白客人对于私密的追求。
E: As you know, my customers prefer a quiet environment, so they don't want the place to get too famous... I understand their requirements for privacy.

C: 下次再说吧。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 你是哪种变形生物？
E: What kind of shapeshifter are you?

C: 「别的版本」。
E: "Another version."

C: 处理金人巷事务
E: Take care of the affairs in Aurum Alley

C: 今次幽囚狱遭逢千年未有之重创，诸多事务亟待处理，如果您没有其他事情，请允许在下失陪。
E: The Shackling Prison has just taken a severe hit unlike anything else that's ever occurred in the past thousand years, and there is a surfeit of outstanding matters that I must tend to. If there's nothing else, please excuse me.

C: 唉…在之前的暴乱之中，那群步离人为了给自己打掩护，放出了不少囚犯。如今虽然暴乱平定，但仍有些漏网之鱼在狱中流窜。
E: *sigh* When the riot happened, the borisin set a good number of prisoners free and used them as decoys. Even though the riot has since been suppressed, there are still fugitives on the loose on prison grounds.

C: 此象得主心灵手巧，极具创造力。对于你所问之事——你将见到全新的光景，此事为你囊中物。运用你过往的智慧与经验，诸事可得且有意外之喜。切勿思虑过多优柔寡断，需防备生人，切记多动脑，凡事莫要想当然。
E: The bearer of this sign is handy and creative. As for the question in your mind — your fate will lead you to new insights. Use your wisdom and experience, and you will be able to overcome difficulties and get pleasant surprises. Do not overthink or hesitate. Be wary of strangers. Always rely on your own wisdom and do not take anything for granted.

C: 而我不一样，我是个丹士啊～你看到厨余垃圾，我看到牙膏、沐浴液、护肤品…你看到蛇虫鼠蚁，我看到药品、滋补品、小零食……
E: Not me, though. I'm an alchemist! Where you see kitchen scraps and trash, I see toothpaste, body wash, skincare products, and more. Where you see pests and irritants, I see medicines, supplements, snacks...

C: 啊，你说的可是仙舟星阵棋？
E: Oh, do you mean the Xianzhou starchess?

C: 不行，本姑娘要从现在开始，全力备战下一场危机…啊呸呸呸，还是别有下一场危机了！大家都能安居乐业的话，闲点也挺好～
E: I must start gearing up for the next crisis now... Wait, scratch that! It'd be better if there were no more crises and everyone could just live in peace and comfort.

C: 早先我们在这里初次见面时，我的态度不甚友好…但这是因为，身为司舵，我的一言一行都代表了「罗浮」天舶司的意志。
E: I wasn't friendly to you when we first met at this place... However, that was because I am the Helm Master, and my every action represents the Luofu Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 你怎么还在幽囚狱？
E: Why are you still at the Shackling Prison?

C: 又来和十王司第一好性格冥差守灵来说话了吗？
E: You've come to chat with the nicest spiritfarer in the Ten-Lords Commission again?

C: 这我哪知道，咱们拭目以待吧…实践出真知嘛。
E: How would I know? All we can do is wait and see... Seeing is believing after all.

C: 我给你脸了是吧？
E: I'm working hard enough, don't you think?

C: 那时候我经常来绥园散步。风景也好，空气也新鲜，四周也安静。你看见那边那个燕乐亭了吗？我就是在那里赠出的初吻。
E: Back then, I often came to Fyxestroll Garden for a stroll. The scenery was beautiful, the air was fresh, and it was quiet all around. Do you see the Swallowsong Pavilion over there? That was where I had my first kiss.

C: 无法回答。金人勾魂使四卅七号向你致歉。
E: Answer not found. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> sincerely apologizes for it.

C: 真正懂行的仙舟人，就是只买对的，不盲目追求贵的。
E: A true mark of a Xianzhou native is to buy the right one, not the most expensive one.

C: 「雪衣」和「寒鸦」分别是棋盘上白子与黑子的别称。我们姐妹以此为号，便是在告诉自己，吾等身属十王，任由差遣。
E: Xueyi and Hanya are nicknames for the white and black pieces in a Xianzhou chess game. We sisters adopted these names to remind ourselves that we serve the Ten Lords and are at their disposal.

C: 没想到玉器珠宝会这么潮流…
E: I never expected jade jewelry to be so popular...

C: 亲亲对建木这么感兴趣，是不是想观察建木，又担心离太近了会有危险呢？那亲可要看看咱们这款「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>加」了。
E: Dear, you seem very interested in the Ambrosial Arbor. Do you want to observe it, but worried that getting too close might be dangerous? Well, I'd advise that you take a look at our Auspicious XV+, sweetie.

C: 他自斗篷底下露出自己的右手，让我仔细观瞧。这是一支由活水银铸造的手臂，肌肉纹理细腻如生。他向我演示了这支手臂变化成刀、剑、弓、枪的奇景。
E: He then showed his right hand from under his cloak and asked me to scrutinize it. It was an arm forged of living mercury, its muscle contours artistically detailed. Next, he demonstrated the wondrous sight of turning his arm into a saber, a sword, a bow, or a spear.

C: 你答应了吗？
E: Did you agree to the deal?

C: 怎么可能？
E: How's that even possible?

C: 岂敢岂敢，我这小店从父母那里继承而来，来店喝茶的客人大多是行家里手，梦茗可没有什么能够卖弄之处，还得向客人老师们多多取经。
E: You flatter me! I inherited this store from my parents, and most of our customers are experts. I don't have any particular skills to show off. Rather, there's much I can learn from our guests here.

C: 我常常在担忧，在烦恼——我做得这么好吃，对星槎海的厨师真的公平吗？他们不会因为我的存在而惭愧吗？
E: I've always struggled with this notion: Is it really fair that my food tastes heavenly compared to Starskiff Haven's chefs? Would they not be ashamed in light of my existence?

C: 哦，尽管问，只有谈及美食，我还算是颇有心得的。
E: Oh, ask away. I have much to share, as long as it's about food.

C: 过去的「我」没有留下什么日记，现在的「我」也不想把日记留给未来。即使一身风流情债难以解释，那也没有什么关系。
E: The person I was in the past never kept any diary, and present-day me doesn't really want to leave anything for the future. Even if my debt of love is impossible to explain, I still don't really care for it.

C: 在牢里我越想越生气，觉得这人真是欺人太甚，我明明说了实话，却还是要把我抓来关。
E: I got angrier during my time in prison. This man was a bully! I had already told him the truth, but he still threw me in a cell.

C: 呸呸呸！我都说了我打定主意豁出去了！
E: Hey! I already said I decided to give it my all!

C: 没有东西会凭空消失，肌肉更是如此，它们不过是囤积在了命途海洋的底部，等到肌肉填平了海，筋肉命途就会诞生。
E: Nothing disappears for no reason, my friend, especially muscles. The truth is that they're all collecting quietly at the bottom of the Path's ocean. Once the ocean is filled, the Path of Brawn shall emerge.

C: 我刚到仙舟的时候，收到了一本小册子叫《化外民也能学会的地道仙舟俗语<unbreak>100</unbreak>句》，虽然标题取得不怎么样，内容还是不错的。
E: I was gifted a manual when I first got here, called 100 Common Xianzhou Proverbs for Outworlders. It's a lousy title, I know, but the book itself is great.

C: 咱跑了一路，也累了嘛。
E: I was tired from all that running.

C: 既然我的名字是檀檀，讲座又是关于交通安全的，那这个讲座就叫做……
E: Since my name's Tantan and it's a lecture about traffic safety, why don't I call it...

C: 也许我有机会变成长生种，那个时候再做打算也不错…不过到那时，仙舟未必能让我离开吧。
E: Perhaps I'll get the chance to become long-life species. I can still make my decision when that time comes... then again, Xianzhou might not necessarily let me leave then.

C: 啊！对不起，春分不是那个意思！春分是说{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}是好人，笔记本上也说了，能向小孩儿道歉的大人是好大人。
E: Oh, sorry — I didn't mean it like that! I meant to say, {F#miss}{M#sir} is one of the good guys. It says so in the notebook: Adults who apologize to kids must be good people.

C: 凌解是春分的前一世啊，据别人说她是个履历丰富又开朗的人，知道自己快蜕生结卵之前，专门给我准备了这本笔记，说是给我的礼物。
E: Ling Jie was my past life. People tell me that she was a cheery person with a rich and varied life. Before she molted and became an egg, she left this notebook for me as a present.

C: 旅行呀！凌解的《前世笔记》上「一生必须经历一次」的事情还有很多没能经历…仔细想想，几百年的时间真的够用吗？春分有点担心！
E: Traveling! Ling Jie's reincarnation journal still has so many once-in-a-lifetime trips to experience... and thinking things through, will one lifetime be enough to see them all? I'm worried it won't be!

C: 你听说过仙舟人的贸易节庆「海市」吗？在停云小妮子的支持督办下，也变成了声名远扬星海的盛典。
E: Have you heard of the Grand Fair in Xianzhou? Tingyun turned that into an intergalactic festival.

C: 驭空大人啊…算是我的直属上司。她的能力自不必说，但真正让人佩服的还是她的性格。办事强硬、待人温和，关键时刻雷厉风行……
E: You could say Madam Yukong is my boss. Her competence is undeniable, but her flexible adaptability to different situations is even more impressive.

C: 好说好说，你多来问问我，我们也可以多多交流经验嘛。
E: No problem. Ask me anything and we'll trade stories.

C: 我都说了我是外驻仙舟的科员了。黑塔女士和仙舟本来就有些合作，所以只要我这边申请顺利，外驻一事就顺理成章了嘛。
E: Didn't I say I'm a transferred researcher to Xianzhou? Madam Herta does some work with Xianzhou, so all I need is approval from the locals.

C: 你说你跟彦卿拥抱了？
E: You mentioned that you hugged Yanqing?

C: 我，忍一忍。
E: I'll, try, my best.

C: 我还没进店，钱就没了。
E: My money was gone before I even entered the store.

C: 请云骑协助…
E: Cloud Knights, please assist...

C: 其实我是当事人。
E: Yes, I was actually involved in it.

C: 好嘞，你想聊什么都可以，只要不涉及咱客户们的隐私就成。
E: Alright, what d'you want to talk about? Everything's fair game, but let's stay away from client confidentiality stuff.

C: 不许乱动，我要劫船！
E: No one move, I'm skyjacking this ship!

C: 名唤司辰宫。
E: People know it as the Palace of Astrum.

C: 所以你要挑战击败幻胧的我吗？
E: So you wish to challenge me, the one who defeated Phantylia?

C: 为什么呢，他不怕疼吗？
E: Why then? Does he not fear pain?

C: 只是你我的时间尺度截然不同，我于一千多年前见证的未来，落在你眼中已成了既成的事实。
E: It's just that you operate on a vastly different timescale to me. The future that I first foresaw a millennium ago has grown to become a present that you take for granted.

C: 我看透了你的未来，我已说出了你的未来，你知道了你该知道的未来。
E: I've seen into your future and I've already told you your future. And you know what you need to do about your future.

C: 若昔。
E: Ruoxi.

C: 是正确的，有比生命重要的事。
E: You did. There are things more important than life.

C: 是错误的，你把他给害死了。
E: You were wrong. You got him killed.

C: 说实话，你有点五音不全…
E: To be honest, you're kinda tone-deaf...

C: 宝烛。
E: Arkeri.

C: 这你就有所不知了，我们持明族是能蜕生轮回的。即使没法继承上一世的能力，但也可以记下自己的所学留给下一世。
E: I bet you don't know this: We Vidyadhara can be reborn through hatching rebirth. Even if we can't inherit our abilities from the previous cycle, we can still record what we've learned for the next cycle.

C: 这味道…太可怕了！
E: This tastes... horrible!

C: 别让我分心。
E: Enough distractions!

C: 早点回家，读书看报！
E: Let's go home soon and catch up on our reading!

C: 可别小瞧本执事…
E: But I, an officer, am different...

C: 建木重生，预示着大难临头啊！这一定是寿瘟祸祖干的！
E: The resurrection of the Ambrosial Arbor heralds great misfortune! This must be the work of the Plagues Author!

C: 来自翁瓦克的植物种子。
E: Plant seeds from Vonwacq.

C: 据说还有在逃药王秘传…
E: I hear there are still Disciples of Sanctus Medicus on the run...

C: 他其实是地衡司的密探。
E: He's actually a secret agent of the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 没有，她怎么会生你的气呢…哎…她以后都不会再生气了……
E: No. How can she be mad at you? *sigh* She can never be angry again...

C: 是，但也不是…其他人都被邀请了，连「她」也在，哎……
E: Yes, and no... Everyone else was invited, and even "she" was there. Alas...

C: 所以，能够以「阿那克萨戈拉斯」称呼我的话，如此的对话多半不是无效的——毕竟对方是一个能够照顾你的感受，并且为之做出让步的人。
E: So, if someone addresses me as "Anaxagoras," then the conversation is likely to be meaningful. After all, they're someone who can be considerate of your feelings and make compromises accordingly.

C: 嗯？怎么啦小灰，有什么问题要请教缇宝老师吗？
E: Hmm? What's up, Little Gray? Got any questions for Miss Tribbie?

C: 今天，有没有变得比昨天更好，明天，又会不会变得比今天更好？
E: Have we become better today than yesterday, and will tomorrow be even better than today?

C: 但若是可以，我希望世人不必费力登上山巅，也能过想要的生活。听说天外的群星中，确有几颗如此温柔。
E: But if possible, I hope people won't have to struggle to climb mountains just to live the life they want. I hear there are a few stars out there beyond the sky that are gentle enough for that.

C: 既然如此，要不要尝尝最浓郁的蜜酿？
E: In that case, would you like to try the richest honey brew?

C: 那好，今天我要成为站到最后的赢家，下一个挑战者是谁？
E: Alright then, today I'll be the last one standing! Who's my next challenger?

C: 所以，最后——锵锵！这是*我们*亲手缝的娃娃，很可爱吧？
E: So, finally, ta-da! This is the doll we sewed ourselves. Isn't it cute?

C: 每有一只赛法利娅之手通过测试，就会有一群元老受到伤害……
E: For every Hand of Cifera that passes the test, a group of elders gets hurt...

C: 那刻夏老师，我准备好了。
E: Professor Anaxa, I'm ready.

C: 当然，我没忘记要把这样东西郑重地交给你，和如今那位「大地」的新神——
E: Of course. I haven't forgotten to hand this over to you solemnly, and to that new God of "Earth"—

C: 从前的我只能用这种方式触碰它们，还好，现在可以放心和它们玩耍了。
E: It was the only way I could touch them back then. Thankfully, now I can play with them without worry.

C: 下棋有什么诀窍吗？
E: Any tricks to winning at chess?

C: 口水止不住地往外流。
E: I can't stop myself from drooling.

C: 你问这个干嘛？
E: Why are you asking this?

C: 「药王慈怀，建木生发。莳者同心，同登仙道。」
E: "Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth. Unity of Discipuli Medicus, the Immortality's true path.."

C: 你就是想看比武才带我来罗浮的吧？这打打杀杀的到底有什么好看，真后悔没去方壶泡温泉。
E: You're just here in the Luofu because you want to see the ceremony, right? I don't think this violent fighting is fun at all. How I wish we're at the Fanghu and soaking in the hot springs...

C: 我鞋都跑掉了一只，但里面全是工作人员，我被尴尬到了。
E: I even lost a shoe running in! But there are staff members everywhere in the venue. It was so awkward.

C: 你刚才说的是什么？
E: What did you say?

C: 材质：人类，罪犯芯片
E: Materials: Human, criminal brain chip

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 我打算待会去小卖部整点油炸土豆条。
E: I'm thinking of going to the General Store and getting some fries.

C: 「一只手机罢了…」快递盒细声解释，向后微微退却。
E: "It's just a phone..." The package explains in a feeble voice while backing away slightly.

C: 我来指导指导！
E: I'll lead the exercise!

C: 说的热闹，都是假把式。
E: Nothing more than a charlatan blowing hot air.

C: 别哪壶不开提哪壶啊！
E: Don't bring up sensitive topics!

C: 还是让他自己静一静吧。
E: Let's give him some space!

C: 产自仙舟朱明的极品断纹瓷，流露出一种自然的美。
E: The exquisite porcelain with a cracked pattern was created in the Xianzhou Zhuming. It is beautiful in the natural sense.

C: 「通关入境——请配合司辰宫入港检查并办理相关手续。」
E: "Custom clearance. Please cooperate with the Palace of Astrum for the entry inspection and other related procedures."

C: 「星历<unbreak>7200</unbreak>-<unbreak>8100</unbreak>年间，星际和平公司共观察到了一百二十二个世界陷入不明原因的混乱，最终它们被反物质军团全数击溃。」
E: "In the years of <unbreak>7200</unbreak> to <unbreak>8100</unbreak> SC, the Interastral Peace Corporation saw <unbreak>122</unbreak> worlds falling into chaos due to unknown reasons. All of them were eventually destroyed by the Antimatter Legion."

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 公司」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — Interastral Peace Corporation."

C: 「罗浮医士美名传扬星海的同时，联盟也与相关星球缔结了友好通商协定。」
E: "While healers from the Luofu become well-known across the cosmos, the alliance forms friendly commercial agreements with the related planets."

C: 在工作场所放置盆景可以有效提升工作效率。虚拟盆景会有同样的功效吗？
E: Placing bonsai trees in a workplace can improve work efficiency. Would a virtual one have the same effect?

C: 演出太精彩了！
E: This show is so exciting!

C: 学分已经修够了吗？
E: Have you completed enough credits?

C: 演出现场就涨价是吧？
E: Hiking up prices just because there's a show, eh?

C: 之后是将近二十万字情节曲折爱恨生杀的大戏，末了，两位男主角凄美地在彼此怀中溘然长逝。
E: After that, a dramatic tale of love, hate, life, and death twists and turns over the next forty pages. In the end, the two male protagonists die poetically yet tragically in each other's embrace.

C: 至少这些善意没有被浪费。
E: At least the donation won't go to waste.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 鹤运物流的金人巷分部，这里集中处理金人巷地区物流分发运输的工作。
E: This is the Heron Express Aurum Alley branch. Here they mainly deal with distribution and transportation logistics for the Aurum Alley area.

C: 形虎拳馆总是派出很多人在街头宣传拳法健身，逢人便说「健身武术了解一下」，这样的宣传究竟效果几何，没人知道。
E: Tiger Boxing Gym always sends loads of people out on the streets to promote boxing and fitness. No one is quite sure how effective their "come and learn about martial arts and fitness" slogan actually is.

C: 分拣摆放快递始终是个费力的工作，幸好后来被万能的机巧鸟淘汰了。
E: Sorting and placing courier parcels has always been an exhausting job. Thankfully, that tedious task has been completely replaced by the omnipotent cycranes.

C: 怎么又是这种题？
E: Another one of these questions!?

C: 太嗨了！让我们跳起来吧！
E: This slaps to the high heavens! Let's dance!

C: 呃…好吧，毕竟开拓者是自由的。不过如果你改变主意了，也可以回来看看。
E: Oh... Alright. A Trailblazer is a free spirit, after all. But you can come back and check this out again later if you change your mind.

C: 真的吗？我试试看。
E: Really? Let me try.

C: 暂无聊天功能。
E: Chat function currently unavailable.

C: 不不不，他们要我现身。
E: No, no. They just want me to appear before them.

C: 才没有！我偶尔也会附身到老师身上，给他们上课，这叫教书育人！那帮小孩子真调皮，老在教室里布下层层机关，想暗算老师一次。还好我够聪明……
E: That's not true! I do possess the teacher's body occasionally to teach them. I'm educating and nurturing these people. These kids are playful and love setting traps in the classroom. Luckily, I was smart enough...

C: 书架上弥漫着一股潮湿阴冷的腐朽气息，木纹表面的清漆业已斑驳，但书籍依旧屹立不倒，不禁令人怀疑它们会不会是用来充门面的装饰品。
E: A moist and eerie rotten stench from the shelves percolates the air. The varnish on the woodgrain surface has mottled, but the books remain standing on the shelves, making one wonder if they are just for decoration.

C: 一杯饮品附赠一个小秘密，口味配方随您挑选。
E: Each glass comes with a little secret — you get to pick the flavor combination!

C: 堆了半墙的书籍和影像带，其中有不少是匹诺康尼的古早出品。
E: Books and tapes are stacked halfway up the wall. Among them are a considerable number of early Penacony works.

C: 你把眼睛凑到望远镜前，凝视其中的景象——只看到一片深渊般的漆黑。
E: You peer into the binoculars, but all that meets your gaze is an abyssal darkness.

C: 供游客欣赏梦境时刻壮丽景象的望远镜。不过这架望远镜的视线十分模糊，让你感觉像是在顶着一个桶看东西。
E: A telescope for tourists to enjoy the splendid views of the Dreamscape. However, the view is blurry, and it feels like you're looking through a barrel.

C: 身高<unbreak>1.3</unbreak>米以上不得入内！
E: No entry for individuals over <unbreak>1.3</unbreak>m tall!

C: 书中字迹如同这梦境本身一般，混沌凌乱、无从分辨。
E: The writing in the books is akin to this Dreamscape itself: Chaotic, disorderly, and incomprehensible.

C: 你回想起和那个女孩共度的时光，她柔软的笑容，她轻盈的步伐，以及她最后一刻、被那怪物斩杀时流下的泪。
E: You recall the times spent with that girl. Her gentle smile, her graceful steps, and the tears she shed in her last moments before she was murdered by that monster.

C: 在你靠近的一瞬，台子上的锅碗瓢盆通通躁动起来。恍惚间，你似乎听到了模糊的人声……
E: The moment you get near, the pots and pans on the counter move about restlessly. Suddenly, you seem to hear a muffled human voice...

C: 「看完记得放回原位！」当你触碰到某本书时，书的合页突然说出这么句话，吓得你赶紧抽回了手。
E: "Don't forget to put them back in the right spots when you're done!" When you touch a book, its spine suddenly blurts out a reminder, causing you to pull your hand back in shock.

C: 「回来吧酒吧店主，我最骄傲的团长，历历在目的糖浆，汽水依旧在流淌…」
E: "Please come back, bar owner. You're the leader that I'm the proudest of. The syrup is still there, and the soda is still flowing..."

C: 猎犬无神的眼底散发着品红色的光芒。这视线令你毛骨悚然。
E: The Hound's glassy eyes emit a sanguine glow, creating an eerie sensation.

C: 你从猎犬的视线中捕捉到一丝不易察觉的思绪——宽慰、孤独、哀伤…但为什么？
E: Faint traces of unspoken thoughts are discernible in the Hound's gaze — relief, loneliness, and sorrow... but why?

C: 在来到匹诺康尼之前，我从未想过自己竟会爱上这个地方。
E: Before coming to Penacony, I'd never thought I would fall in love with this place.

C: 大家都想要和橡木家系的成员套近乎，却没人想和笨罐先生做朋友。
E: Everyone just wants to cozy up to the Oak Family, but no one wants to be friends with Mr. Piggy Bank.

C: 每个人都有秘密，每座城市都有它幽暗的角落。如果不想让秘密被暴露在大众的视野之下，可得多费一番功夫学习埋藏真相的技能。
E: Everyone has secrets, and every city has its dark corners. If its secrets are to be kept away from the public eye, you'd have to learn to be very skilled in burying the truth.

C: 我…我真不知道该怎么感谢您才好。这笔钱应该足够我在匹诺康尼多待好一阵了。我一定会继续争分夺秒、挖掘真相……
E: I... I really don't know how to thank you. This money is enough for me to stay on Penacony for a good while. I will keep racing against time to uncover the truth...

C: 你被马达轰鸣般的沉闷声响所吸引，但出现在视线里的不过是位——以对匹诺康尼宾客的评判标准而言——平平无奇的智械男性。
E: You are attracted by the low hum of what sounds like a whirring motor, but what you come across is — by the lofty standards of Penacony's guests — a bland-looking Intellitron man.

C: 我相信，只要价格足够公道，没有什么是非卖品。
E: I believe that, as long as the price is fair, everything's for sale.

C: 最后一次！这次一定得是最后一次！以后再管他我就是■■！
E: Last time! This is the very last time! If I clean up after him next time, I'll be the ■■!

C: 要是我把梦境形象换成皮皮西…
E: What if I changed my Dreamscape avatar to a Pepeshi...

C: 我曾在梦境中有过美妙的邂逅，对方…是我在车站前遇到的一位皮皮西绅士，他满足我对爱情的一切幻想，英俊、博学、温柔而专情。毫无疑问，我迅速迷上了他。
E: I once had a wonderful experience in the dreamscape. It was with... a Pepeshi gentleman I met before the train station. He fulfilled all of my romantic fantasies: Handsome, smart, gentle, and dedicated. Without a doubt, I instantly fell for him.

C: 切诺欢快地掰起了手指头，恍若流连在迷幻的颂歌中。
E: Cielo counts her fingers happily, as if immersed in an illusory hymn.

C: 在你徒劳无益地寻找对策时，冰原熊幼崽自顾自地睡着了！
E: While you're desperately searching for a solution, the little cub falls asleep!

C: 它蹲在你的脚边，仍用天真无辜又带些可怜的眼神望着你。
E: It sits near your feet, still looking up at you with those innocent eyes.

C: 既然大家只想体会快乐，那我们只报道那些能带来快乐的东西就够了。
E: Seeing as everyone only wants to pursue happiness, we only report on the things that bring people happiness — and that's enough.

C: 而驯物师的工作，就是训练这些落选的物品，帮助它们实现「动起来」的梦想。
E: As a props master, I train the rejected items and help them to fulfill their dreams of "moving."

C: 嘴动不如行动，正好这个美梦脆筒还没训练完，我直接给你现场演示一遍。可别眨眼~
E: Let me put my words into action. Here's an untrained Dreamy Cone. I'll give you a live demonstration. Don't blink~

C: 唉，看来脆筒舞者今天是不打算听话了…果然欠训练的物品就是上不来台面。
E: *sigh* It seems like the Cone Dancer isn't planning to obey me today... Indeed, under-trained items should never go on stage.

C: 哦对，你看起来很喜欢吃脆筒的样子——拿去吧，别再吃我训好的东西了。
E: Right, you seem to enjoy eating cones. Take these and stop eating my trained props.

C: 再说了，物质的价值就在于满足人的需求。我的需求就是钱啊！钱！
E: Moreover, the value of these items lies in the fulfillment of human needs. My need is cash! Cash is king!

C: 哈！之前我一定是脑子坏了才会抱怨个不停。
E: Ha! I must be crazy to grumble about my life.

C: 如果您以后在某处遇见她，请务必替我递上一句话：「有只广告牌在中央车站前等你，它会一直等下去的！」
E: If you happen to meet her somewhere, please tell her one thing for me: "There is a billboard in front of the Golden Central Station waiting for you. It will always be waiting for you!"

C: 哈利伯顿胸口的嘀嗒声越发缓慢，嘀…嗒…嘀……嗒……
E: The ticking sound in Haliburton's chest is growing slower and slower... Tick... Tock...... Tick...... Tock......

C: 木桶效应！最短的那块木板决定一切——哈哈哈哈！
E: Law of the minimum! The capacity of the barrel is determined by the "shortest" stave. Hahahaha!

C: …至于存心危害梦境的家伙，我们会严肃地对他做出提醒——如果能从一开始就避免走到这步的话，那真是再好不过了。
E: ...As for those offenders who seek to sully the Dreamscape, we will sternly issue them with a warning — it would be for the best if one would avoid this outcome in the first place.

C: 别说，我还真的带了苏打豆汁儿过来，你也来一瓶？
E: How fortuitous, I have some mung bean soda with me. You want a bottle?

C: 我只是个普通人啊。
E: I'm but an ordinary person.

C: 真好…真好啊！多么自由、多么精彩……
E: Very good... Excellent! So free, so exciting...

C: 谁能想到这「美梦之城」的大街上，还能突然窜出个皮皮西来，把我这老婆子的脖子给勒了呢？
E: Who would've expected that a Pepeshi would suddenly appear on the streets of this city of dreams and strangle an old lady like me?

C: 这位老太太似乎在「让你接受她的资助」这件事上格外执着。
E: This old lady appears to be highly insistent on the matter of you accepting her sponsorship.

C: 我是伸张公义的银河球棒侠。
E: I'm the Galactic Baseballer of justice!

C: 球棒侠…那你想想，假如有人创造了一个机器超级英雄，管它叫「自动棒球侠」，把你行侠仗义的风头全都抢走了，还盗用你的形象，你难道不恨它吗？
E: Baseballer... Just think about it: If someone invented a robot superhero and called it the "Auto-Baseballer," it stole your image and all your glory, wouldn't you hate it?

C: 啧，那群猎犬都是贪婪…永远不会满足的人，该叫它们白眼狼！
E: Pft, those greedy hounds... They are never satisfied. More like freeloading dogs!

C: 我是卸任官员，是政治家，是常盘国的名流——但在那些身份之前，我首先是个漫画家！
E: I am a retired official, a politician, and a household name across Tokiwa... But, before all these things, I am an anime artist!

C: 愿您在匹诺康尼度过一段愉快的时光。
E: I hope that you have a pleasant time in Penacony.

C: 皮皮西的眼睛闪闪发亮——尽管她仍在试图绷紧自己的脸色。
E: The Pepeshi's eyes shone brightly, despite her attempts to keep her face rigid and serious.

C: 请别客气，有关酒店的任何问题我都乐意为您解答。为您服务是全体「家族」成员的荣幸。
E: You're welcome. I'm ready to answer any questions you may have about the hotel. It is an honor for all The Family's members to serve you.

C: 您身边要是有什么爱好交际，而且像咱们这样有身份、有地位的朋友，可别忘了给我介绍介绍啊~
E: If you have any friends who enjoy socializing and hold a similar status and position to us, don't hesitate to introduce me to them!

C: …您、您怎么不说话啦？该不会是饿了吧？我记得今天餐厅有「仰望星空」切片蛋糕，你…您要不先去吃一些吧？
E: ...Wh—Why aren't you saying anything? Are you hungry? The restaurant has the Stargazer slice cakes today. Why don't you... go and grab some?

C: 还有非正规入梦吗？
E: So, are there "unauthorized" services?

C: 这玩意不会有危险吧？
E: Is this device safe enough?

C: …什么乱七八糟的？唉，我花那么大价钱跑过来，就是想看场精彩的比赛，没想到票钱没值回来，饭倒是喂得饱饱的！
E: Ah, what a disaster! I spent a fortune hoping for an epic game, the ticket price wasn't worth it at all, although the food was decent...

C: 我不懂球。
E: I know nothing about Roboball.

C: 聊聊同事？
E: How about your colleagues?

C: 这就急着走了吗？不再看看店里的存货了？
E: Are you leaving now? Maybe you'd like to explore what's in the store?

C: 您要是不介意的话，欢迎换个梦再给我讲讲！
E: Please feel free to share more of your dreams!

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 我已经喝了特调…很快就会好了，很快。
E: I've drunk the special concoction... Soon, I'll get better.

C: 「心灵慰藉特调」…只要一口，一口就好。
E: I just need a sip of the Soulheal Special Mix. Just one sip will do.

C: 那六个字如此自然地从柯柯娜口中冒了出来，连她自己都被吓了一跳。
E: Even Cocona herself is shocked by her standoffish words.

C: 是啊，还能怎么办？
E: Yup. What else can I do?

C: 来。大声呼喊出我的名字！疾风侠，疾风——力量！
E: Come on! Just shout my name! Quicksilver. Speed is power!

C: 来。大声呼喊出我的名字！疾风侠，疾风——力量！
E: Come on! Just shout my name! Quicksilver. Speed is power!

C: 感、感谢您……
E: Th—Thanks...

C: 找鸟好累啊啾…
E: Finding the origami birds is exhausting, tweet...

C: 故事距离「真相大白」的章节还早着呢。
E: You still have a long way to go before reaching the chapter where the truth will be revealed.

C: 要是我不想让别人看见你呢？
E: What if I don't want the others to see you?

C: …录音到这里戛然而止。你猜测那两个人有大概六成的概率在这房间里打了一架。
E: ...The recording comes to a sudden halt. You think there is a <unbreak>60%</unbreak> chance that the two had a fight in this room.

C: 飞碟堡，橡木蛋糕卷，「鲱鱼先生」柠檬塔…好难选啊……
E: Floatdisc burgers, oak cake rolls, "Mr. Herring's" lemon tarts... I can't choose...!

C: 哎呀，竟然是星期日大人的客人！
E: Oh my! A guest to see Master Sunday!

C: 当然，有什么问题也可以回来找我。
E: Of course, if you have any issues, please feel free to come to me.

C: 这里「朝露的时刻」——与匹诺康尼的大部分地区不同，这里并不对外开放，基本留给「家族」成员与少部分贵客使用。
E: Unlike the majority of the other districts of Penacony, the "Moment of Morning Dew" is not open to outsiders. It is fundamentally reserved for use by members of The Family and a select number of VIP guests.

C: 哎呀，还从没有来客问过我这种问题呢。
E: Oh my, I have never had a guest ask me a question like that.

C: 行啊，反正我一时半会儿也做不出决定……
E: Sure, not like I can make a decision on the fly anyway...

C: 直到我从镶金的鸟笼子里钻了出来，才明白并不是只要作品够精彩、够独特，就一定能收获关注与喜爱。
E: Not until I wormed my way out of my gilded cage did I realize that a piece had to be more than just exciting and unique to receive attention and adoration.

C: 嗯，那么，祝你玩得开心。
E: Well, I hope you have a wonderful time.

C: 再见，祝你度过愉快的一天。
E: See you, and I hope you have a wonderful day.

C: 你又怎么知道我没行动呢？
E: How do you know I haven't gotten moving?

C: 请他们去钟表餐厅吃个饭吧，别人都细嚼慢咽，就他一个劲儿往嘴里塞，跟打仗似的。
E: I figured I'd take them out for a meal at the Clock Diner. But where most people take their time and chew slowly, he just rammed it all in his mouth like he was at war with his food.

C: 很显然，他们失败了。就在破产前的那天，他们悄悄离开了这颗星球，将刚出生不久的我留在入梦池中。鸢尾花家系的侍者发现了我，并交给了现任家主——梅芙恩小姐。
E: Clearly, they failed. Just before the day they went bankrupt, they secretly left the planet and placed me, a newborn baby, in the Dreampool. A servant of the Iris Family found me and handed me over to the current family head - Ms. Maeven.

C: 但很快我就厌倦了这种生活。鲜花和掌声只会给我带来深深的疲惫感，舞台上的生活太过虚幻，那不是真正的我。
E: However, I quickly grew tired of this life. The flowers and applause only gave me a deep sense of fatigue. Living a life on the stage is all too illusory, and that's not the real me.

C: 一座神秘的水池？主持修建这座公馆的人究竟在暗示什么？
E: A mysterious pond? Just what was the person that led the construction of this pavilion hinting at?

C: 缺角的披萨，看起来太明显了哇。
E: A slice of pizza with a corner missing is so obvious!

C: 嘻嘻，请…请。吃得越多，暴露的概率越小！大的变小，正正好好！
E: Hehe, please, be my guest! The more we eat, the less likely it is they'll find out! Big slices get smaller, it's perfect!

C: 只有音乐知道。
E: Only music knows the answer.

C: 人家觉得，生活呀，就是充满了...无数像这样意义深远的邂逅。
E: I feel like, this life we live, it is so full... of countless unexpected and profound meetings. Like... like this one.

C: 她的身份可不简单，具体情况你自己去打听吧，反正是个在家族内部很有名望的人，没记错的话…应该是鸢尾花家系？可别说是我告诉你的啊。
E: Her background is complicated, if you want to know the specifics then you should ask around for yourself. Either way, I know that she holds a lot of renown within The Family... The Iris Family, if I remember rightly...? You cannot tell anyone that you heard this from me.

C: 哼，是回忆里的那场真心话大冒险吧，我还以为你忘了。
E: Hmph, it's about the Truth or Dare game, right? I thought you had forgotten about it.

C: 我接受。
E: Sounds fair.

C: 轮到你回答了。我想知道——如果舒翁没有提出委托，见到我们，你会怎么做？
E: Now, it's your turn. I'd like to know... what would you have done to us if Siobhan hadn't hired you?

C: 在充满变数的梦境里，这是仅剩的确定性。我喜欢不变的东西。
E: It's the only certainty left in this ever-changing Dreamscape. I appreciate things that remain unchanged.
(...Meow?)

C: 说说你的爱好。
E: Tell me about your hobbies.

C: 我可以请教一些问题吗？
E: May I please ask you a few questions?

C: 你知道吗？如果不是你们出手干预谐乐大典，像我们这种只有{RUBY_B#「言语的同谐」}第Ⅵ音级{RUBY_E#}的家人根本没可能登上剧院舞台。
E: Do you know that if you hadn't stepped in to help with the Charmony Festival, Family members like us with only {RUBY_B#"Verbal Harmony"}scale degree VI{RUBY_E#} would have no hope of making it on stage?

C: 那位前辈的作品明明那么用心、那么考究，她为每一篇攻略耗费的心血我都看在眼里，可偏偏只要水军带带风向，舆论就完全一边倒了……
E: My senior's work has been so meticulous and well-researched, and I've seen for myself how much effort she puts into every one of her strategies — but as soon as the bots start coming, public opinion drastically tilts out of her favor...

C: 容我和你说两句。
E: May I please have a word with you?

C: 红哨小姐平静了下来。对于熟悉她的人来说，这称得上是个奇迹。
E: Miss Red Whistle calms down, which is a miracle if you ask anyone who knows her.

C: 我去过一次，朋友。我有一次误入了筑梦边境某处的「边界」——那是一道像是梦泡组成的高墙…人可以轻而易举地穿过去。
E: I've been there once, my friend. I once accidentally entered a "boundary" on the Dream's Edge by mistake... It was like a giant wall built from dream bubbles... People can pass through it quite easily.

C: 有时候就…哎，心情挺复杂的。不知道路在何方，只能得过且过……
E: Sometimes I... Ah, it's really complicated. I don't know where my path is, so I just have to keep muddling along...

C: 以开拓客的视角来看待…或许开拓之道的真谛，就是要有选择的余地。
E: As a Trailblazer... Perhaps the true meaning of the way of Trailblaze is to have the space to make decisions for yourself.

C: 就先聊这些吧。
E: Let's leave the topic here.

C: 我的田…它设在流梦礁城外，一处偏僻的梦境角落…原本我想过去「绿洲的时刻」选址，但被猎犬拒绝了。
E: My fields... They're located outside the Dreamflux Reef city, in a remote corner of the Dreamscape... I originally wanted to find land in the Moment of Oasis, but the Hounds refused me.

C: 一问才知道，他居然想把苜蓿钞种在地里，还说过上几年就能成为梦境首富。我拗不过他，就圈了一块地让他自己捣鼓……
E: It was only when I asked him that I learned he planned to plant Alfalfa credits in the land... He said that in a few years, he would be a Dreamscape millionaire. I couldn't convince him otherwise, so I circled off some land for him to play with...

C: 忆质动力学是什么？
E: What is memoria dynamics?

C: 忆域就像一片海洋，流梦礁便是其中一座渺小的岛屿。
E: The Memory Zone is like a sea, and the Dreamflux Reef is only a tiny island on it.

C: 是啊，面对如此棘手的问题，汇聚众人的力量才有解决的可能。
E: Yes. When facing with such a difficult situation, only the power of teamwork can resolve it.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 上电梯的时候看到那个钟表小子的雕像了吗？它是流梦礁的标志性建筑，也见证了流梦礁的兴衰——如果你是钟表小子的粉丝，千万记得与它合个影！
E: Did you see the statue of Clockie when you got into the elevator? It's an iconic landmark of the Dreamflux Reef and has also witnessed the rise and fall of the Dreamflux Reef... If you're a fan of Clockie, don't forget to take a picture with it!

C: 而居民们一直以来恐惧的那只巨鲎，早在很久以前，就和自己融合成一个部落了。
E: And as for the giant horseshoe crabs that the inhabitants have always feared, they had long ago fused themselves into the tribe.

C: 本店是流梦城寨唯一的乐坊，店里的员工都是像我这样的自动乐器。
E: We're the only band in all of the Dreamflux Fortress. All our staff here are talking automated instruments, just like me.

C: 你是想要租赁乐器表演，还是想要来张唱片？
E: Would you like to rent an instrument, or buy a record?

C: 更有甚者，开了一家忆质食品公司——把关于食物的记忆复制一下就能制造食物，热一热就能吃…他们试图用这种方便又劣质的东西垄断梦境的食品行业。
E: What's more, they even started up a memoria fuel company — copying food-related memoria to manufacture food that becomes good to eat as soon as you heat it up... They are trying to corner the Dreamscape's food market with their convenient but inferior product.

C: 你和这只蓝色的小鸟面面相觑。它似乎没有要开口的意思。
E: You and the blue bird stare at each other, but it doesn't look like it's going to speak anytime soon.

C: 嗯…有只小鸟最近总吵着要买气球，被我打发到商业街那边去了。去<color=#dbc291ff>卖气球的店铺附近</color>找找吧，它估计就在附近溜达呢。
E: Hmm... There's a bird that's been crowing about buying balloons recently. I shooed it away towards the business street. Go find it <color=#dbc291ff>near the shop that sells balloons</color>. It's probably strolling around in its vicinity.

C: 是叫「球棒侠」还是「棒球侠」…这些都不重要啾！
E: Is it the Baseballer or Ballbatter... Not that it matters, tweet!

C: 这年头，新孵化的小鸟都越来越浮躁了。我让它们多练习几千次振翅，结果一回头就全溜走了，叽叽喳喳地说要去看比赛啾。
E: These days, newly hatched birds are getting more capricious. I tell them to practice flapping their wings a few thousand more times, but they run away as soon as I turn my head, incessantly tweeting about wanting to watch the races, tweet.

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 只是于我而言，那盛大美梦始终…抱歉，是我多言了，你不必在意。
E: It's just that to me, that grand dream eventually... Apologies, I've spoken too much, please don't mind me.

C: 被埋藏的梦，诞生于命途交汇\n被遗忘的梦，匿迹于物欲横流
E: A buried dream, birthing an encounter with destiny.\nA forgotten dream, hidden in a stream of materialism.

C: 而我如此渴念，陈腐的终将陈腐于陈腐的棺柩\n而我如此渴念，鲜活的终将鲜活于鲜活的洪流
E: And I long, the dead to remain dead in a dead casket.\nAnd I long, the living to remain living in a stream of life.

C: 苏乐达集团的事业不会止步于梦境。我有一个梦想，在不久的将来，哪怕在银河最偏僻的角落都能发现苏乐达的身影，无论贫富贵贱，人人都有畅饮苏乐达的权利！
E: The SoulGlad Enterprise won't simply rest their laurels in the Dreamscape. I have a dream, that in the near future, SoulGlad will be found in even the most obscure corners of the Cosmos. Everyone will have the right to enjoy SoulGlad, regardless of status!

C: 玩这么大？
E: Are you serious?

C: 「如果面前的智械有双碳基生物的眼睛……」
E: "If the Intellitron in front of me possessed a pair of living eyes..."

C: 您也看到了…除了名字以外，这里也很难被称作一艘船，实在没什么用得上水手的地方。
E: You've seen it as well... Despite its name, you can't really call this a "ship," since it doesn't really require any sailors.

C: 那时候他是这样说的——只要孩童们看到花朵仍然能展露出那样的笑容，这个世界无论变成什么样子，都还值得拯救，并且…有「希望」拯救。
E: His explanation at that time was that as long as children are still able to smile upon seeing the flowers, it would mean that regardless of how this world changes, it is still worth saving... and there is "hope" of it being saved.

C: 但他们谁更重要，现在我倒是完全无法分清了。
E: Which joy is more important? I admit I can't tell the difference anymore.

C: 对，做着相同的事情，它们在黑暗中结束了自己的一生，伴随着同类放出的光华。
E: Together in the darkness, they strove toward the same end, just for that one moment of brilliance.

C: 就算发生了像买纪念品被宰、在高科技星球的地铁里晕头转向这种事…但到底也是宝贵的经历。这种值得会心一笑的瞬间，或许就是旅行的意义所在。
E: Even things like being ripped off for souvenirs or getting lost in high-tech planetary subways are valuable experiences. These fun moments may just be the true purpose of traveling.

C: 以至于…忘记了我来这里的真正目的。谢谢你，是你让我回想起了我的…初心。
E: So much so that I've lost sight of my real purpose here. Thanks for helping me remember who I really am.

C: 托马斯是谁？很厉害吗？
E: Who's Thomas? Is he a big deal?

C: 真是没办法啊，你说这人被器重就是…公司没我不行啊！但既然公司这么看得起我，我也得投桃报李嘛。
E: There's no helping it. I guess being held in such high regard means the IPC can't function without me! I mean, if they think so highly of me, I can only live up to it.

C: 啾！是你呀客官…真是有活力呢，人家总能在美梦小镇各个角落见到你啾！
E: Tweet! It's you again... You're quite energetic, aren't you? I've seen you all across Dreamville!

C: 啾！在客官的帮助下，已经有很多孩子回来了啾！
E: Tweet! Many children have returned with your help, tweet!

C: 船长，咱们下次再聊，我得继续打广告了。
E: Captain, let's catch up another time. I'll go back to advertising.

C: 您再多聊两句嘛，您的嗓音这么好听，我还想多听一会儿呢！
E: Please say something else. Your voice is so beautiful that I want to hear more!

C: 你真体贴。
E: That's really considerate of you.

C: 欢迎光临…咦？你是…新任船长？船长好！
E: Welcome... Eh? You're the... new captain? Hi, captain!

C: 您真幽默，要是我连船长都认不出来，我还卖什么船长周边啊。
E: Oh, you're a humorous one! I sell the captain's merchandise, you know? How can I not recognize you?

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 其实我几年前已经有预感，我这辈子就会这么蹉跎下去。搞乐队十几年了，我自己的作曲能力怎么样我是再清楚不过了……
E: To be honest, I already had a hunch several years back. I knew I'd continue wasting my life away. I've played in a band for over a decade, I know full well how my compositions fare...

C: 没事，我随便逛逛。
E: Nah. I was just taking a walk around the place.

C: 这是我的荣幸。
E: I'm honored.

C: 刚还欣慰年轻人热爱音乐呢。
E: You just said that you find comfort in knowing that youngsters have never forgotten about their passion for music.

C: 都随你。
E: Up to you.

C: 整个大学期间，我们都是学校的风云人物，你还能在谐乐学院的墙上看到我的签名呢。
E: During the years we studied at the university, we were considered celebrities of the school. You still can find my signature somewhere on the walls of Charmony Academy.

C: 我也是这么以为的，只要我们做了正确的事，其他一切都能慢慢解决。
E: That's what I thought as well. As long as we did the right thing, everything else could be resolved eventually.

C: 可别和派对王客气，我一向慷慨！
E: As the Party King, I'm always willing to share! No need to be shy around me!

C: 只有一个人不这么想——那天他看了我的比赛，认为眼中所见并非狼藉，而是一颗冉冉升起的明日之星。
E: There was just one person that did not agree... That day, he watched my race and believed that it was not a disaster he was witnessing, but the rising of a star.

C: 忙是真忙，累也是真累。不过能做自己喜欢的事情，再苦再累我也乐意。
E: I'm always ridiculously busy and tired. That said, if it means I can do what I'm passionate about, I don't mind the tiredness.

C: 不知道你有没有看过我们喜剧社的梦泡，有条件的话，我还是建议你来现场看，和梦泡里完全是两回事。
E: I don't know if you've seen any of our club's dream bubbles? If you can, I would recommend that you come and see us live — it's a completely different experience.

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，你来得正好。你知道吗，学校要出毕业年鉴了，每个学院的学生都有自己的专属页面。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, your timing is great. Did you know the school will be releasing its yearbook soon? Every student will have their own dedicated page.

C: 你肯定听说了吧，彩梦校庆的庆典音乐是我创作的！
E: You must have heard that the Dreamlight Anniversary's festive music was composed by me!

C: 呵，这就是做老师的好处吧，至少还有人能把我的所学所想、我的技巧和信念传承下去。我…还能活在学生们的创作里。
E: Heh, this is the perk of being a teacher, at least there are those who can impart my learnings, thoughts, techniques, and beliefs. I... will still live on my students' creations.

C: 是的，就是这样！果然还是搞钱让人快乐，我要努力，我要挣钱，挣大钱——
E: Yes, that's the way! Hustling does bring joy. I'm gonna work hard. I want to earn money, earn big money...

C: 箱子里装满了钱，但哈努兄弟拒绝收下它们，他需要更本质的一些东西，比如友情。
E: The box is stuffed full of cash, but Brother Hanu refuses to accept them. He needed something even more essential, like friendship.

C: 「监控设备状态连接正常，是否启动『探查模式』？」声音在你耳畔回响，你决定——
E: "Connection status to surveillance device normal. Activate Exploration Mode?" The voice echoes in your ears, and you decide to—

C: 这就是丽宾跑车！好酷！
E: This is an Elegantrix sports car — how cool!

C: 总算攒够「潘兴」的钱了…
E: That's enough money for the Pershing, then...

C: 怎么还没到星期四…
E: How is it not even Thursday yet...

C: 对了，现在再往上…
E: Yes, now move it a little higher...

C: 那你也没办啊？
E: But you did nothing in the end!

C: 真是怎么都看不够…
E: I just can't get enough of you...

C: 老大可是家族最强！
E: The boss is the toughest one in The Family!

C: 哪怕看了一千遍一万遍，我还是会为知更鸟的美貌折服。
E: No matter how many times I watch it, Robin's beauty still amazes me.

C: …其实我早就想问了，你一个智械，究竟为什么会对这种垃圾恐怖片感兴趣啊？
E: ...Actually, I've been meaning to ask for a while now. Why would an Intellitron like you be interested in such cheesy horror movies?

C: 您好，请问有什么需要吗？
E: Hello, can I help you?

C: 要是再高一点就好了…
E: If only I was taller...

C: 不会让您亏钱的。
E: There's no way you'll make a loss.

C: 让我来补点光…
E: Let me give you some light...

C: 一定是我大意了。
E: I was careless.

C: 苏乐达的赞助额也到达了历年来的最高点…
E: SoulGlad's sponsorship has reached a new height...

C: 很有品嘛，高手间决胜于一招一式的对决，就是如此精彩。
E: Very classy — the difference between victory and defeat in a clash of titans lies in but a single move. That's what makes it thrilling.

C: 所以关于您在海选前发表的诸多豪言壮语，有什么想说的吗？
E: So, about your impressive speech before the audition, do you have anything you wish to say?

C: 本次海选采用全新赛制。
E: The auditions this time have new regulations and rules.

C: 超越历史上的所有选手…
E: To surpass all the contenders from before...

C: 结果甲板上都是水，我当时就是在这儿摔了一跤，特别惨…还是头朝地的那种……
E: But the deck was drenched, and this was where I slipped and fell. It was a really bad fall... The landing-on-my-head kind...

C: 噢噢，这事啊，我听说了，家族那边的人说，好像家族里哪个大人物将船送给一位无名客了。
E: Oh, that. I heard about it. Someone from The Family said that some bigwig from The Family is gifting the ship to a Nameless.

C: 我听说…公司来了不少大人物，什么部门的高层好像都到齐了？
E: I hear... plenty of major players from IPC have come here. Something about a department's higher management all showing up here?

C: 我只能说，投资的目光不妨放长远些——
E: All I can say is that you should cast your opportunistic eye on the long term...

C: 乖，我们别玩了，等爸爸回来吧。
E: Be good. Let's not play anymore and wait for Daddy to come back.

C: 好吧，我就知道…「谐乐大典」为重嘛，我懂。
E: Fine. I knew it anyway... The Charmony Festival takes precedence. I get it.

C: 我们理解意外是无法预测的，但我们是来这里寻求顶级体验的。
E: We understand that accidents cannot be anticipated, but we specially came here seeking a world-class experience.

C: 飞艇轮候这边请——
E: This way please to wait for the ship...

C: 我们也去和家族谈谈？
E: Let's have a chat with The Family as well?

C: 仔细着点，好好检查…
E: Keep your eyes peeled and look very carefully...

C: 啊——？你说啥？
E: Ahhhh? What'd you say?

C: 这个季度的报表…
E: This quarter's report...

C: 晖长石号要启航了…
E: The Radiant Feldspar is about to leave...

C: 好想把船买下来…
E: I really want to buy the ship...

C: 你知道什么内幕吗？
E: You got any inside news?

C: 公司果真藏龙卧虎…
E: There really are some powerful characters lurking within the IPC...

C: 真奇妙啊…
E: How wondrous...

C: …技术原因，还在检修。
E: ...Technical issues. We're still working on it.

C: 嘿，折纸大学的格拉克斯校长正瞧着你呢，仿佛在说——匹诺康尼的未来就在你的手中！
E: Hey, Paperfold University's Dean Glaux is looking at you, as if saying: Penacony's future is in your hands!

C: 你仔细端详着这幅手稿，隐约觉得有些眼熟，直到作品下方的小字提醒你这是梦境酒店的设计图，它就和匹诺康尼本身一样令人费解。
E: You scrutinize this draft, finding it vaguely familiar, until the fine print at the bottom of the work reminds you that this is the Reverie's design — a drawing as perplexing as Penacony itself.

C: 老奥帝，苜蓿草家系家主，财富学院名誉校长。即便眼前的只是一幅画像，你却仿佛已经听见了老奥帝那标志性的笑声——「嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！」
E: Old Oti, Alfalfa Family Head, Fortune Academy's honorary dean. It is only a portrait before you, but you seem to be able to hear his trademark laugh through it — "Ohohoho!"

C: 你组建的文学社将一直、一直持续下去，直到永远。
E: The literature club you formed will always, always carry on, unto eternity.

C: 好了，幻想时间结束了。为你鼓掌一次。想得很好，但下次请别站在学校门口发呆了。
E: All right. Daydream time is over. I'll applaud you once — great imagination, but don't do it at the school gate next time.

C: 伫立在校园中央的折纸小鸟气球，以骄傲的姿态向所有到访者展示着它嘹亮的歌喉。
E: Situated in the center of the campus, the Origami Bird balloon demonstrates its sonorous song for all to see in all its proud glory.

C: ——给我出去！谐乐学院是培育艺术天才的地方，容不得你这种愚钝的学生！
E: Get out! Charmony Academy is a place for nurturing artistic talents and has no space for dim-witted students like you!

C: 嘘…不该问的事情别问！这样的大人物能被罚站，肯定是出大事了！
E: Shhh... You shouldn't ask about these sorts of things! If a big shot like {F#her}{M#him} is being punished, it means that {F#she}{M#he} must have done something really bad!

C: 「咔哒」，你说要有光——于是就有了光。
E: "Click," you say there should be light — so light appears.

C: 「超智能病毒」看完了你存储的所有影片，催促你再下载一些。
