E: The Supersmart Virus has finished watching all the videos you stored and urges you to download more.

C: 没有一丝使用痕迹，已经有点吃灰了。
E: It shows no signs of use and is already gathering dust.

C: 对于一只自由自在的扑满来说，这些规则委实太严苛了。
E: For a free-spirited trotter, these rules are indeed too strict.

C: 暂且请它出去。
E: For now, ask it to leave.

C: 大地兽的名字都是你取的？
E: You named all the dromases?

C: 大地兽赫拉克勒斯
E: Let's talk about Heracles.

C: 等千万年之后，说不定我的陶罐也会被后人当作古董文物好好研究一番，真期待见到那天呀！
E: Maybe my dolia will be studied as antiques and relics after thousands of years. If only I could witness that day myself!

C: 你先去忙吧。
E: I'll leave you to your work.

C: 你们的感情究竟怎么样？
E: How are things really going between you two?

C: 好啊，我知道了，你怕不是因为我是个外邦人就故意找茬吧？那我不吃了还不行吗！退钱！
E: Oh, I get it now. You're trying to mess with an outlander like me, aren't you? Fine, I won't be eating here, I want my money back!

C: 至于为什么要推广它…在我看来，若是脱离了文化与传统，再美味的菜肴也都是无根之水，无法长久地流传。
E: As for why I'm promoting this style... In my opinion, a dish loses its root and can no longer be passed down when it's severed from its cultural roots.

C: 咂摸一番滋味…
E: Well, the flavor...

C: [★★] 不满意
E: [★★] Unsatisfied

C: 应该没事了。
E: It should be fine now.

C: 那么我和{F#她}{M#他}谁是本我，谁是自我？
E: So, between me and {F#her}{M#him}, who's the id, and who's the ego?

C: 悲观开拓者，热血开拓者，沉默开拓者…这些成就奖励在列车上就能完成，记得拿。
E: Pessimistic Trailblazer, Hot-Blooded Trailblazer, Reserved Trailblazer... these Achievements can be completed on the Express. Don't forget to collect them.

C: 哦，塔兰顿肯定不允许我再额外给你几个蜜果尝尝。哎，那可是今天{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}新采回来的，鲜嫩得很……
E: Ah, got it. In that case, I suppose Talanton wouldn't approve of me slipping you a few extra figs. What a pity. They were picked at the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}, and they look so fresh...

C: 好呀，欢迎你随时再来，年轻人。
E: Sure! You're always welcome here, young one.

C: 让队长训了，卫士工作不能懈怠，不能拿安全开玩笑。唉，只好把嘟噜炖掉，请客道歉。
E: Got told off by the captain for slacking off as a guard and not taking safety seriously. So I had to stew the Dollo for everyone to make up for it.

C: 说说墨涅塔的故事。
E: Tell me more about Mnestia.

C: 这么好！
E: That's amazing!

C: 打扰一下——
E: Helloooo...

C: 没事，不打扰你了。
E: No worries, I won't bother you then.

C: 入场不是免费吗？
E: Isn't it free to enter the baths?

C: 安静的缇宁话最少，活泼的缇安喜欢闹，乖巧的缇宝到处飘！
E: Quiet Trinnon has little to say, lively Trianne loves to play, and well-behaved Tribbie roams around all day!

C: 感受不到，不如界域定锚。
E: I cannot feel it. Shall I use a Space Anchor?

C: 想听听悬锋孤军的来历。
E: I want to hear about the origins of the Kremnoan Detachment.

C: 或许此番讲述还是太过云淡风轻。在那段征途中，我等经历的磨难与牺牲，绝比言辞要沉重千万倍。
E: Perhaps this narration is an understatement. The suffering and sacrifices that we experienced during that expedition were heavier than any words could convey.

C: 只要他能克服内心的恐惧，荣耀自会成为他的冠冕。
E: As long as he can overcome the fear in his heart, glory shall become his crown.

C: 相传扎格列斯喜欢对其他诸神恶作剧，曾偷走塔兰顿的天平和法吉娜的酒杯。诸神为了遏制它的恶行，就在它身上绑了一颗星星，用于暴露扎格列斯的去向。
E: Legend has it that Zagreus used to enjoy playing pranks on the other gods, stealing Talanton's scales and Phagousa's wine glass. To put an end to their misdoings, the gods fastened a star to Zagreus' body to reveal their whereabouts at all times.

C: 这会是法吉娜亲赐之圣物吗？你决定——
E: Could this be a divine object gifted by Phagousa themself? You decide to...

C: 有趣的是，即便是普通的水，经过仪式后，人们也会觉得味如仙酿。这不正说明了信仰的力量吗？
E: The fascinating thing is that even normal water, once it has undergone this ritual, tastes like celestial wine to anyone who drinks it. Does that not show the true power of faith?

C: 在我的家乡——供奉着三重命运泰坦的雅努萨波利斯，千年前曾有位伟大的圣女。那位大人有幸聆听到{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神谕，于是为了整个人类的福祉而盗取了{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的圣火。
E: In my hometown of Janusopolis, where we worship the three Fate Titans, there was once a great and holy maiden a thousand years ago. This great lady had the grace of hearing {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s sacred prophecy, and with this stole the sacred flame from {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} to benefit humanity.

C: 你就差把「骗子」写脸上了。
E: All you're missing is the word "Scammer" written across your forehead.

C: 没事，买卖不成仁义在嘛！以后要是您哪天想打听香料的事情，还记得云石市集里有这么一位阿普里斯，那就再好不过啦。嘿嘿嘿嘿……
E: It's fine, the deal might not have worked out but the friendship remains! If you want to ask more about spices later, it would be beyond great if you could keep humble Hapries from the Marmoreal Market in your thoughts. Heehee...

C: 还没呢，我正在记录它们的异常行为，希望能从中总结出某些规律。
E: Not yet. I've been recording their anomalous behaviors, and hope to be able to put together some conclusions then.

C: 植物们可不会说话，它们倾向于把自己的悲痛藏在根茎里，直到我们发现作物减产才窥得一二，届时奥赫玛恐怕也……
E: Plants can't talk, but they tend to hide their grief down inside their roots. We wouldn't notice if anything was going on until there was a drop in yields, by which time I'm afraid Okhema would...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 悬锋城人都这么不讲武德吗…
E: Do the people of Castrum Kremnos have no morals in war...?

C: 如果你不是这种人，就老老实实带上盾牌，而不是把它放在家里供着。诗人们都说「带上盾牌意味着奔赴最险恶的战场」，但我认为每场战斗都应认真对待。
E: If you are not this kind of person, then you must carry your shield into battle instead of leaving it to gather dust at home. The poets say, "Carrying a shield means one is storming into the most perilous of battlefields," but I believe that every battle should be taken seriously.

C: …不，感觉还是缺乏气势，得想个更帅气的出场词才行。身为克拉特鲁斯大人亲手提拔的悬锋伙友，可不能丢份啊。
E: ...No, still lacks some panache. Got to have a more dashing opener. As a stalwart Kremnos vanguard handpicked by Lord Krateros, I mustn't lose face.

C: 没人能夺走我的荣耀！既然你执意阻止我——那就来碰一碰吧！
E: None will wrest my glory from me! Since you stand in my way, prove yourself with your blade!

C: 我们见过，你不记得了？
E: We've met before. Do you not remember?

C: 别别别，「贼」字多难听啊，您不如改用「翻飞之手」来称呼，那好歹也是扎格列斯老爷留给世人的神体。
E: No no no, "thief" is such a harsh word. Say "Whimsy Hand" instead. I mean, it's the divine relic that Great Zagreus left to us, after all.

C: 这是什么奇怪的习俗？
E: What weird custom is this?

C: …你失去了意识……
E: ...You lose consciousness...

C: 你听见一阵细微的天外之声，像是一枚绚丽的泡泡慢悠悠地朝天上飞去。
E: You hear a wave of faint celestial sounds, like a bubble floating leisurely into the sky.

C: 阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，我要继续刚才的发问。
E: Parmenides of Icatus, I wish to continue my questioning from before.

C: 谁知道它是否存在呢？我能做的，无非是提醒人们对未经思考的事物保持怀疑。无论那是阿卡索斯，是泰坦神明，亦或是…绝对正确的预言。
E: Who knows if it exists? All I can do is remind people to remain suspicious of any object that has not been thoroughly reflected upon. Whether that be Icatus, the Titans and gods, or even... A prophecy of absolute truth.

C: 你看这面墙，它不仅仅是在讲述过去，也在预示未来。这些交织的蓝色线条，代表着命运的丝线。它们纵横交错，就像我们的生活，充满了无限的可能。
E: Take a look at this wall — it doesn't merely recount the past, it also foretells the future. The interwoven blue lines symbolize the threads of destiny, crisscrossing like the intricate tapestry of our lives, brimming with boundless possibilities.

C: 这个我觉得比墓地跳舞的那个要瘆人！
E: Now that one's way creepier than the one dancing in the graveyard!

C: …应该是高空折返跑！哦，还有无影寻宝、捷足战舞也比较受欢迎。怎么，你有兴趣？
E: ...It should be high-altitude shuttle runs! Oh, and shadowless treasure hunting and swift-footed dancing are also quite popular. What, are you interested in?

C: 界域定锚拟人？
E: A Space Anchor personified?

C: 我猜你是想问，为什么会在云石天宫里建个图书馆，是吧？嗯…这要扯到几十个光历年前——记得刚好是第四十三个奥赫玛百年祭那会。
E: I guess you're wondering why there's a repository in the Marmoreal Palace, right? Well... this goes back several Light Calendar years ago — exactly during the <unbreak>43</unbreak>rd Okhema Centennial Festival.

C: 聊得有些多了。要是情感必须通过话语才能传递，那便是演奏者的失职，所以还是请您找个安稳的地方，继续欣赏这水漫琴的乐声吧。
E: We've spoken a little much. If emotions could only be conveyed through words, the musician would have failed at their duty. So I ask that you find a safe spot and continue to enjoy this water lyre's melodies.

C: 尤利娅，你又在这里发呆！
E: Julia, you're daydreaming here again!

C: 你还真是细心，我不过随口抱怨了几句你这都能听出来啊……
E: You sure are perceptive. I was just venting casually, but you immediately caught on...

C: 可以，但是…嗝…我说话可能比较慢，你得耐心。
E: Sure, but... *hic* My speech is a little impaired, so do be patient.

C: 总之，不管你打不打算追求荣耀之死，都祝你每天过得开心——我觉得这才是最重要的。
E: Anyway, whether you intend to pursue glory unto death, I wish you happiness every day — I think that's what's most important.

C: 当记忆的潮水退去，你发觉几块碎晶静静地躺在手心，通透、明亮。难道这就是「命运的馈赠」？
E: When the tide of memories subsides, you discover a few shattered crystal shards lying motionlessly in your hand, clear and bright. Is this a "gift of destiny"?

C: 就是那个…从时空的溪流中采撷而来的「记忆」，你有吗？
E: It's the... "Memory" plucked out of the stream of time. Do you have it?

C: 什么是雅努斯之驹？
E: What is Janus' Steed?

C: 哼，欧洛尼斯与雅努斯从来不可分割，记忆既在时间上接续，也可以在空间上并存，那些碎片中存留的权能超乎你的想象。
E: Hmph, Oronyx and Janus have always been inseparable. Memories are connected through time and coexist spatially in space. Those shards contain authority beyond your wildest imagination.

C: 啊，我是不是该先自我介绍来着？抱歉抱歉，和你一起经历了那么多事，我都忘了还要正式介绍自己了。
E: Ah, perhaps I should have introduced myself? Sorry about that, after everything we've been through, I forgot the formalities.

C: 「虽然只是女主角的替卡，但这次巡演有足足<unbreak>120</unbreak>场，经纪人给我估算了下，至少有<unbreak>30</unbreak>场需要我上场。有机会的话，你可以带上星穹列车的朋友一起来看看，提前跟我说一声，我给你们准备包厢。」
E: "Though I'm just an understudy for the lead, there are a whopping <unbreak>120</unbreak> shows on tour, and my agent estimated I'll be needed for at least <unbreak>30</unbreak> shows. If you get a chance, you could bring some friends from the Astral Express to watch, just let me know in advance, and I'll get a box ready for you."

C: 老歌德。
E: Old Goethe.

C: 接取中，请选择你想接听的联系人！
E: Receiving, please select who you want to hear from!

C: 说实话，你的朋友还挺多的，不像我，就只认识你……
E: To be honest, you have quite a lot of friends, unlike me — you're the only one I've got...

C: 在爸爸眼里你始终是小女孩。
E: In your father's eyes, you'll always be his little girl.

C: 希望这次他是真的能退役吧，他的年纪真经不起折腾了。
E: I hope this time he can retire, he's not getting any younger.

C: 讲些有关圣女的事吧。
E: Tell me about the Holy Maiden.

C: 那时候我的头发还又黑又亮，脸上也没有皱纹，哪像现在。
E: I had sleek, jet-black hair and not a wrinkle in sight back then. Quite a different story from today.

C: 别急，或许你也听说了，圣女的物品到最后都是要被祭司没收的，理由是什么「将借来的时间归还给命运」…明眼人都听得懂这是什么意思吧？
E: Hold on. Perhaps you've heard that all things belonging to the Holy Maiden are ultimately confiscated by the priests, with the excuse of "returning borrowed time to destiny"... But let's be honest. Anyone with a bit of sense knows what's going on.

C: 多锻炼，少熬夜。
E: Train more, stay up late less.

C: 决然接下「天谴之矛」的火种，以不容置喙的王令终结悬锋王朝，又为族人带来荣耀的崭新未来……
E: He decided to accept the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury, ended the dynasty of Kremnos with an unquestionable royal decree, and brought his people a new future of glory...

C: 小灰，请你在心底呼唤「万径之门」，感受空间的摇曳，聆听遥远的彼方在你耳边的呢喃……
E: Little Gray, please call out the "Gate of Infinity" from the bottom of your heart. Feel the wavering of space and listen to the distant murmurs in your ears...

C: 旧昏光庭院的故事…当然可以。正好今天有空，我就和灰宝聊聊吧！
E: The story of the old Twilight Courtyard... Of course. I have some free time today, so I'll have a chat with you, Grayie!

C: 风堇有什么喜欢做的事吗？
E: What do you enjoy doing, Hyacine?

C: 可别小看了我，我和西塔罗斯先生学了很久的鉴宝技术，现在已经是小有所成。
E: Don't sell me short like that — I studied treasure appraisal with Mr. Theodoros for a long time, and I've made some good progress. I'm on my way to being an expert.

C: 在我看来，奥赫玛的管理者，无论是元老院、还是黄金裔，都不过徒有其名——每年税金浪费了不少，效率远不如我们这些商人。
E: To me, Okhema's administration — whether it's the Council of Elders or the Chrysos Heirs — is just an empty shell. Every year, so much tax money is wasted with little to show for it. The bureaucrats can't hold a candle to us merchants when it comes to efficiency.

C: 如果不想清楚这一点…那么即使这位剧作家，在纯艺术的意义上创作出了伟大的作品…恐怕也只会叫好不叫座吧。
E: If they can't figure that out... even if they produce a masterpiece in the purest artistic sense, it'll likely go unappreciated, or worse, unnoticed.

C: 我会带去你的问候。
E: I will give her your regards.

C: 嗯，去吧。愿塔…不，愿刻法勒庇佑我们。
E: Yes, go now. May Talan... No, may Kephale protect us.

C: 懂了，这台是毒舌衣匠。
E: Got it. This one's the Sarcastic Garmentmaker.

C: 把大家集中在这里是我的建议，因为怪物们似乎无法穿过这片水帘。希望外面的骚动能尽快平息，毕竟，有不少人的亲朋还在市集那边……
E: Gathering everyone here was my suggestion, since the creatures seem unable to pass through this water curtain. I hope the chaos outside calms down soon, especially since many people have family members still at the market...

C: 我和他在市集做了最后的告别。听说驻守城墙的卫士们损失惨重，他正准备带上铁匠铺的武器前去支援。
E: He and I said our final goodbyes at the market. I heard that the guards stationed at the city walls suffered heavy losses, and he was preparing to take the weapons from the blacksmith shop to support them.

C: …您好，客人。如您所见，浴场现在暂停营业……
E: ...Greetings, guest. As you can see, the bathhouse is currently closed...

C: …我打算在池水中迎接这份恩赐，希望不会让我等太久。
E: ...I plan to welcome this blessing while immersed in the bathwater. Hopefully, it won't keep me waiting too long.

C: 多亏了那两位小贩，没有他们的牺牲，我们守不住圣殿。
E: We have those two merchants to thank — without their sacrifice, the temple would have fallen.

C: 你听说过多利安古城吗？在黄金战争的年代，这座古城被喷发的火山吞没，漫天的火山灰，顷刻间将整座城邦封存于时光的琥珀中——
E: Ever heard of the ancient city of Doria? During the Chrysos War, a volcanic eruption swallowed the city whole. And in an instant, a cloud of ash sealed an entire civilization in the amber of time —

C: 希望你一切顺利。
E: I hope everything goes smoothly for you.

C: 衣匠一把抓过记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

C: 正有一只若虫等着你将它唤回呢，请先去把它找回来吧。
E: There's a nymph waiting for you to call it back. Go find it and bring it home first.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝需一路向东；西风会赐你一双捷足，勿让这份祝福消失。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You must head east. The west wind shall grant you swiftness — do not squander its blessing."</color>

C: 迷境外的地方…
E: The place beyond the maze...

C: 等倦了、累了，就往回走——村里的炊烟啊，总是比艾格勒醒得都早。
E: And when you get tired, just come home. The smoke in the village always rises earlier than Aquila.

C: 到时候，我和你爸就在家里开锅，备上好吃的等着。你看到麦浪和炊烟，就知道家在哪儿啦。
E: When that day comes, your dad and I will fire up the stove, get a feast ready. You'll see the golden fields, the kitchen smoke curling — and know you're home.

C: 还有个太阳~
E: There's a sun too~

C: 嗯…有位织者满腔热忱。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>麦田边的稻草人上</color>，守护着耕耘的果实呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is filled with passion. The golden thread brings tidings: They are laying on <color=#dbc291ff>a scarecrow next to the wheat field</color>, watching over the fruits of cultivation.

C: 再说了，天空之民都应以塞涅俄丝为榜样，必须永远昂首不怠，才有机会再登天空、重铸荣耀……
E: Besides, all Skyfolk should look to Seliose as their example. Only by holding their heads high and never growing complacent can they have a chance to ascend to the skies once more and reclaim their glory...

C: 也不怕你笑话，我的家族是一支孱弱的冬之民，早在黄金战争初期，所居的天空堡垒便被悬锋城击落，因而不得不在大地上流徙。
E: Not that I'm afraid of a little playful teasing. My family hails from a frail branch of the Winterfolk. Back in the early days of the Chrysos War, the sky bastion we lived in was struck down by Castrum Kremnos, forcing us into exile on the earth below.

C: 请聆听剑旗最后的薄振…无双…万军取首！ / 此剑——当斩，泰坦授首！ / 金血如露，海晏河清。
E: Listen now to the Gladius's final tremor... Unparalleled... One takes the head across an army ten-thousand strong! / This blade... shall sever the Titan's head! / The golden blood is like dew, and the sea runs as clear as a river.

C: 可以料想，在凯撒大人的领导下，逐火的胜利是乃必然。此后我们应关注的，便是横亘在凯撒版图之上的广袤星海了……
E: You can presume that under the Imperator's leadership, the Flame-Chase's victory was inevitable. What we turned our eyes to in the future was the vast sea of stars that sprawled above the Great Imperator's campaign map...

C: 规劝无果后，我离开了树庭，成为统络诸军的参谋，替凯撒效力、为此世分忧。
E: When persuasion failed, I left the Grove. As Imperator's advisor, I marshaled armies to shoulder this world's burdens.

C: 是啊，可不要小瞧我的舌头。即便是同一盘菜肴，在不同主厨手中，口味也会完全不同迷！
E: Of course. Never underestimate my tongue. Even the same dish can taste completely different depending on who's behind the stove, mem!

C: 我错了……
E: I'm sorry...

C: 这样我们就也能被当成英雄了吧！还能和阿格莱雅大人说上话……
E: That means we can be heroes too, right!? And we'll get to rub shoulders with Lady Aglaea...

C: 盖亚，你又在浴场闹事了？
E: Gaia, did you cause trouble at the baths again?

C: 尤利娅，你又在这里发呆！
E: Julia, you're daydreaming here again!

C: 我好羡慕你们！生来就受到吉奥里亚的赐福，拥有强大的力量，这样才能保护身边的人！
E: I envy you all so much! Being born with the benediction of Georios and having amazing strength means that you're able to protect everyone around you!

C: 遐蝶…遐蝶……
E: Castorice... Castorice...

C: 真的假的？
E: Are you for real?

C: 可大人们不是这么说的……
E: But that's not what the grown-ups say...

C: 好累…做不动了……
E: So tired... Can't do anymore...

C: 关于折纸树林…
E: About Paperfold Woods...

C: 咕咕——还好有你出手相助，不然老鸟真拿孩子们没办法。
E: Hoot hoot, thank you for helping me out, else this old bird would be in knots trying to deal with these kids.

C: 关于你的学生…
E: What about your apprentices...

C: 虽然我手里还没拿到决定性的证据，但时间一定会证明我是对的。
E: Although I haven't found any conclusive evidence yet, time will prove me right.

C: 哎，总之，还是要注意安全。现在的情况，发生什么意外都不足为奇……
E: In short, please be careful. The way things are right now, anything can happen.

C: 咳咳…我都说了些什么！那都是空谈，空谈！
E: Ahem... Forget what I just said. It's all nonsense! Nonsense!

C: 意料之中的事情。无论是入侵，还是能够守住空间站，都不令人意外。
E: Expected, both for the invasion itself and the survival of the space station.

C: 我是…{NICKNAME}，你认识我吗？
E: I'm... {NICKNAME}. Do you know me?

C: 来虫呐，快救救我喀！
E: Come on, nymphs! Save me already, crrk!

C: 那条龙真好看…
E: That dragon was really beautiful...

C: 或许意味着，当浪漫与理性、诡计与律法、命运与岁月、乃至纷争与死亡…人为概念中的一切消失殆尽时，一切都会回归物理意义上支撑世界的本原。
E: Perhaps it means that when romance and reason, schemes and laws, destiny and time, even strife and death... when all these human constructs fade away, everything will return to the fundamental physical principles that truly support our world.

C: 我觉得可以这么画……
E: I think we could paint it like this...

C: 不愧是传说中的青冈木，就是结实！再配上阿芙罗小姐编的羊毛毯，嘿嘿，简直了……
E: As expected of the legendary blue oak. It's super sturdy! And with Miss Aphrea's knitted wool blanket on top, hehe, it's just perfect...

C: 喔嚯！这么劲爆——新书的题材这不就有了？好徒弟，回头请你吃点好的！
E: Whoa! This is explosive stuff! Now that's what I call book material! My dear apprentice, I'll treat you to something nice later!

C: 真是出乎意料，我以为得持续好长时间呢。
E: Well, that was unexpected. I thought it would take way longer.

C: 藏在你瞳孔里最深的地方…猩红的血液，从黄金的刀锋跌落。仅仅是一滴，便染红了一整片海洋……
E: Deep in the depths of your pupils... crimson blood drips from the Chrysos blade. Just a single drop is enough to dye an entire ocean red...

C: 而且，我们也打心里喜欢琢磨招式，操练兵器嘛。
E: Besides, we genuinely love figuring out new moves and practicing with weapons.

C: 而且，经验告诉我，议会一旦建立，随之而来的又是反对、谋逆、暗杀、战争。元老院里的那些勾当，我见得实在太多太多了。
E: And experience tells me that once a parliament is established, it's followed by opposition, treason, assassination, and war. I've seen far too much of those shenanigans in the Council of Elders.

C: 这帮牙尖嘴利的野兽正在围攻命运泰坦虔诚的侍者，请务必为我主持公道！
E: These sharp-tongued savages are attacking a devoted servant of the Fate Titans! I implore you to intervene and restore justice!

C: 先吃饭，吃完再说。西塞罗，拿着，角猪串。
E: Eat first, then talk. Here, Cicero. Take, hornswine skewer.

C: 你都去了哪些地方呢？
E: Where have you been?

C: 戳一下。
E: Poke it.

C: 当然是你们啦，小妖精！
E: Of course it's you, little fairies!

C: 裁缝女，今天可是休息日，要我干活，得加钱噢。
E: It's a rest day, seamstress. If you want me to work, you'll have to pay extra.

C: 不巧，我也知道你要说什么——
E: As luck would have it, I also know what you're about to say...

C: 被看穿了啊那刻夏老师…
E: Busted, Professor Anaxa...

C: 希望它能让你铭记这一点。
E: I hope this will help you remember that.

C: 假如有机会，我也想亲眼看一看，呜嗡…但愿我的身躯不会把那里的「大地」压沉。
E: If I ever get the chance, I'd love to see it with my own eyes, hmm... I just hope my body won't sink the "Earth" there.

C: 嗯…有位织者生性坦率可爱。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>被阻断的楼梯高处</color>，预备为所有困惑的人指点迷津呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver of candid, innocent nature. The golden thread brings tidings: They're at the <color=#dbc291ff>blocked stairway up high</color>, ready to guide anyone who's feeling lost.

C: 来自圣城奥赫玛的。
E: The ones from the holy city Okhema.

C: 「命运重渊」。
E: The Abyss of Fate.

C: 除此之外还有很多假说：「伸缩」论，「热炬」论，「平行成像」论……等等。「谜语人」派系宣称银河只是一场梦境，据我所知，Ⅸ的崇拜者很喜欢这个说法。
E: There are other theories as well: The "Stretching" theory, the "Heat Torch" theory, and the "Parallel Imaging" theory... The Riddlers claim the galaxy is just a dream and IX's followers seem to like that claim.

C: 然而，那颗星球却被某种名为「崩坏」的力量困扰着，不断上演毁灭和兴盛的轮回……
E: But it's also a planet haunted by a power known as the Honkai, constantly playing out cycles of destruction and prosperity...

C: （就在这里！）
E: (Right here!)

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}你看目录上提到的<color=#dbc291ff>大矿区</color>，也许在那里会有什么发现呢？
E: Look, the <color=#dbc291ff>Great Mine</color> is mentioned in the table of contents. Maybe there's something there?

C: （它似乎在附近发现了什么……）
E: (It seems to have detected something near...)

C: 师傅说，矿车工是矿山的血液，是咱保证了地髓能够源源不断从矿道深处运送出来。
E: My master said the mining cart operator is the lifeblood of the mine. The operator ensures the Geomarrow can be transported continuously from the depths of the mine.

C: 算了，想这么多也没用…我暂时留在这儿，就当是为了报答师傅的养育之恩吧，这样我心里多少舒服点。
E: Forget it. I guess there's no point thinking so far ahead... I have to stay here for the time being to repay the debt of kindness I owe to my master. If I think like this, I feel more at ease.

C: 不过还没完呢——你稍等，我得再给你来一道题……
E: But it's not over yet — hang on, I'll get another one for you...

C: 噢，对了！应该这样……
E: Oh, right! That's how it should go...

C: 滴、答…啧啧，现在这地方真是太平庸了，哪里有个美梦小镇的样子？简直像个大号的毛坯房！
E: Tick, tock... Tsk tsk, this place is now so boring. Where's that Dreamville vibe? Looks more like a giant waste of barely-decorated concrete!

C: 滴答，天呐，战争太可怕了，我怎么会有这么极端的想法！战争该牺牲多少人呀，我要是在战争变成废铁里该怎么办？
E: Tick-tock, gosh, war is really frightening. How could I have such extreme thoughts! War will sacrifice so many lives. What if I turn into scrap metal because of war?

C: 滴、答，你要小心了，我不是迷钟…我是一颗定时炸弹！
E: Tick, tock. You should be careful, I'm no Ticker... I'm a time bomb!

C: 但真的很感谢，现在我终于可以抬起头做我想做的事，而不再只是低头看时间了…还有我的名字…我的职责，我通通想起来了！
E: I'm truly thankful. Now, I can finally raise my head and do what I want to do. I no longer have to look down and watch the time... My name... and my duties, I remember everything now!

C: 你应该知道吧？前不久，这里遭到了「反物质军团」的袭击。
E: You must've heard, right? The Antimatter Legion put out a hit on us not long ago.

C: 空间站就不一样了，抬头低头都能见着艾丝妲站长。要是运气好，你还能被黑塔女士骂上几句——那可是天才俱乐部的黑塔诶！
E: The space station is different — you can hardly escape the Lead Researcher Asta. If you're lucky, you can even get your ears chewed off by Madam Herta — the same Herta from the Genius Society!

C: 能有什么，猜也知道又有人闯祸了呗，这事难道很稀奇吗？
E: What can it be? I can think with my knees and still know that someone messed up. Is that really a rare occurrence?

C: …好了，我知道了。这次的地点是<color=#dbc291ff>黄金歌剧院</color>——<color=#dbc291ff>雷比尼</color>应该会在那里写生。
E: ...Got it. This time the location is the <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Theater</color> — <color=#dbc291ff>Rebini</color> should be painting over there.

C: 不错不错，你这人够爽快！
E: Not bad. You really are a breath of fresh air!

C: 这样的东西能拿来当展品吗？
E: Can this kind of thing really be used as an exhibition?

C: 我正在制作<color=#dbc291ff>阿丽萨•兰德的骑枪</color>的模型…听说这玩意现在在你手里，对吧？
E: I'm modeling <color=#dbc291ff>Alisa Rand's Lance</color> right now... I heard you're currently in possession of it, yes?

C: 「在她执政中期，这位大守护者颁布了知名的『封锁令』。彼时的她坚信惟有此举能够稳固贝城后方，却也造成了太多惨烈且无谓的牺牲——无人不为之痛心。」
E: "In the middle of her reign, Supreme Guardian Cocolia issued the well-known order for the blockade. At that time, she firmly believed that only this action could secure Belobog's rear, but it also caused too many brutal and meaningless sacrifices — the heartbreak was not unfelt universally."

C: 我想再重新考虑一下。
E: I would like to reconsider.

C: 当然可以——我们还有很多时间。
E: Of course. We have plenty of time.

C: 《黄金歌剧院》 / 《戈利尔的黄金之声》 / 《根本看不出来画了什么》，出自巡回艺术画派巨擘雷比尼之手，描绘了黄金歌剧院在蓝天下熠熠生辉的模样。
E: Golden Theater / Goliards's Golden Sound / Can't Tell What This Is by Rebini, a paragon of the nomadism movement, enlivened the shimmering Golden Theater with the blue sky as the background.

C: 望着铅一般的色调与画幅中的重型器械，你仿佛回到了那个由钢铁铸成的时代。
E: Looking at the leaden tones and the heavy machinery depicted on the canvas, you feel like you were transported back to that era when almost everything was made of steel.

C: 「她将混乱的火种亲手碾作枯焦的薪柴——她为饱受战火蹂躏的城市建立起无数遮风避日的屋宇，又将食粮与温热的地髓带给一切蒙受苦难的人；」
E: "With her own hands, she crushed the kindlings of chaos into charred wood — she built countless shelters for the war-torn city, and brought food and warm geomarrow to all who suffered."

C: 第八任大守护者希莉儿•兰德的肖像画。其展签上如是写着——
E: A portrait of Cyrille Rand, the eighth Supreme Guardian. The exhibition label reads:

C: （怎么办？驭空大人的回答真是无懈可击……）
E: (What should we do? Madam Yukong's answers are impeccable...)

C: 哎，大费周章。
E: Ack, all for nothing.

C: 那个…这张照片能发我一份吗？
E: Then... can you please send me a copy of this photo?

C: 我需要更多黑塔。
E: I need more of Herta.

C: 诶，{NICKNAME}呀，想给我拍照也用不着这么见外吧？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, you really don't need to be so formal when taking pictures for me.

C: 下次再拍。
E: Next time.

C: 好啦！快看，怎么样？
E: Alright! What do you think?

C: 你不是…医生吗？
E: Aren't you... a doctor?

C: 我还要大声地说「我是个有眼无珠的蠢货！不知天高地厚，只会狺狺狂吠！」然后我在你面前只能学狗叫，如何？
E: I'll shout it loud and clear — "I'm a raving idiot howling into the wind!" And then I'll bark like a dog. How does that sound?

C: 这都怪我们之前没有察觉他们的计谋。
E: *sigh* We can only blame ourselves for letting them get away with it for so long.

C: 去检查检查货物里有什么蹊跷吧。
E: Let's check and see if there's anything suspicious.

C: 哈——？你说大声点，我听不太清。
E: Ha...? Say that a little louder, I can't quite hear you.

C: 以后会多起来的。
E: There will be a lot more later.

C: 金人巷商会提供的材料真实可信，根据双方的租赁合同来看，商会依然持有码头经营权。
E: The documentation provided by Aurum Alley Merchant Guild is true and credible, and according to the lease contract between the two parties, the Merchant Guild still holds the rights to operate the dock.

C: 还有呢，你当时说的那句话呢？
E: Don't forget the other part of the bet.

C: …会长就在这里。明明自己也能说话，却要我帮他当传声筒，哎。
E: *sigh* ...I wish the president did more of the talking. I'm getting tired of being a mouthpiece.

C: …我们听说霄老大要求「重组商会」，是来了解原因的。
E: We heard that Mr. Xiao proposed to "reorganize" the Merchant Guild, and we wanted to ask why.

C: 小孩子看了都会做噩梦。
E: I hope there aren't any children here.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这一点毋庸置疑</color>。
E: Things were better in the old days — <color=#dbc291ff>of that I am certain</color>.

C: 我怕联动太火，燕翠忙不过来。
E: No, I think the high demand might mean Yancui has to grow an extra arm...

C: 这跟金人巷关系也不大？
E: Only one set mentions the Alley — you sure people will get the idea?

C: 我还有别的事儿。
E: I have something else to do first.

C: 白露大人，表情再自然一些！
E: Hey Bailu, be natural!

C: 我读书少，你帮我想一句口号。
E: We need a slogan to go with the picture. Ugh... I wish I'd read more books. Any ideas?

C: 去拍摄「{NICKNAME}与机巧鸟」。
E: Shoot "{NICKNAME} and Cycranes."

C: 但驭空大人希望我们能够好好辩论一番，这样才有机会从对方观点中补足自己。
E: But Madam Yukong wants us to have a proper debate to better understand each other's points.

C: 小少爷，就从你开始吧，让我们听听你对金人巷的规划与考虑。
E: Xiaohan, whenever you are ready. Tell us about your plan for Aurum Alley.

C: 我正在想，尽管现在我们对商会的决策无比确信，但事实上，我们还是囿于经历与眼界。
E: It really got me thinking... Even though it seems like we're doing the right thing, will we still think so ten years from now?

C: 我已经拿到不少奖励了。
E: Fancy giving us some more rewards?

C: 哼，现在开始习惯吧。
E: Ha, better start getting used to it.

C: 你曾经在天舶司见过夕葵小姐，出于公正的原则，她不会在这个时候与你私聊。
E: You may have met Miss Xikui at the Sky-Faring Commission, but due to her commitment to impartiality, she refrains from engaging in private conversations with you at the moment.

C: 喂，你手上的是「霍三哥的货」吧？
E: Hey, is that "Mr. Huo's goods" you've got over there?

C: 说到底你还是不信任我。
E: So, basically you don't trust me, huh.

C: （留在这里也是隐患，尽早处理了吧。）
E: (I should take care of them before people get hurt.)

C: 豉油蒸鸡，不要鸡。
E: Steamed soy sauce chicken, no chicken.

C: 你行不行啊，我不要香菜！
E: Guys, I said no coriander!

C: 你放心，我不是甩手掌柜，我知道你反驳她需要证据，你看看我这里有什么能用上的。
E: Don't worry. I'm not some lazy taskmaster. I know you need some evidence to refute her. Let's see what I have here.

C: 这份证言铁证如山，就是你指使他破坏客人商品的。
E: This testimony is concrete proof that you instructed him to sabotage shipments.

C: 感谢感谢，不过…要是出了事的话，别怪我不认识你哦。
E: Thank you very kindly but... If anything happens, don't blame me if I pretend not to know you.

C: …啊，我忘了，我搭档今天又忘记给我还原出厂设置了…我前后左右总是分不清，抱歉抱歉！
E: ...Ah, I forgot. And my partner forgot to restore me to factory settings... I always get my lefts and my rights mixed up. Sorry about that!

C: …哎，为了让我上班竟雇了专人，真是世风日下啊。
E: ...Wait, they hired someone just to supervise me? What a world we live in.

C: 噢，他们给你升级了新的嗅觉系统吗？真羡慕啊，不像我，我身上的还是老一套，只能识别出<unbreak>300</unbreak>种气味呢。
E: Oh, did they update your olfactory system? That's so enviable! Unlike me, I'm still using the old one that only recognizes <unbreak>300</unbreak> smells.

C: 这样就搞定啦！来，报酬拿好，一分不少！什么？你问这<color=#dbc291ff>「你好剂」</color>是个啥？
E: And that should be it! Come, here are your rewards! What? You don't know what this <color=#dbc291ff>"All Good Potion"</color> does?

C: 你的好意我心领了…
E: Thank you, but I'm good.

C: 哎，别跟世玲客气，给你就拿着！拿着了也就再看看吧，说不定能发现一些新思路，留给我下次使用。
E: Come on, don't be shy. Just take these already. Read them through, and maybe you'll come up with some fresh ideas that you can pass on to me later.

C: 旁听
E: Listen

C: 上次的售货机异常我还没有调查清楚，但感应仪就立刻又有了反应。
E: I haven't even gotten to the bottom of the last vending machine, and the sensor's already picked up another signal.

C: （变成一个大衣柜躲在这边…它还能有耐性的。）
E: (Hiding by turning into a huge wardrobe... It's quite patient.)

C: 你要是真的想帮帮忙，就教教我这个小孙子怎么玩吧！
E: If you really want to help, then teach my grandson how to use it.

C: 闹腾腾的小孩子跑走，老太太也跟在后面离开了。
E: The energetic child runs away, and the old lady follows him.

C: 这笔生意我们必须得拿下。
E: We have to take this order.

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: 今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
E: Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!

C: 也向你致敬，我的朋友！
E: Here's to you as well, my friend!

C: 啾，你是来找这把钥匙的吗？
E: Tweet, are you looking for this key?

C: 拼凑一下我们刚刚得到的线索吧，看看有没有什么进一步的发现……
E: Let's piece together the clues we just got, and see if we've made any progress with our findings...

C: 所以我该怎么做？
E: What do I need to do?

C: 因为…这是我这种纵横厨界几十年的老家伙，才有资格品尝的菜肴。
E: That is because... it's a kaleidoscope of gastronomic delectation, which only a proper geezer like me, a master chef with decades of culinary experience under the belt, is entitled to savor.

C: 技术是成为调饮师的必备条件，但想要调出真正让人满意的饮品，需要的远远不止这个。
E: Knowing the mixing technique is the prerequisite to becoming a drinksmith. However, it takes more than that to serve drinks that impress your guests.

C: 来啊，来教训我啊！嘻嘻…我就这个样，打出生就没变过，谁都拿我没辙！
E: Bring it on! Show me what's what! Hehe... I've been like this since the day I was born. Nobody can deal with me!

C: 我会神奇的魔法。
E: I work in mysterious ways.

C: 人家没有邀请你……
E: I'm not inviting you...

C: （上次见面时还好好的，怎么突然就发狂了？）
E: (He was fine the last time we met. Why did he suddenly become frenzied?)

C: 随着梦境加速坍塌，怪物发狂的情况会越来越多。我们调制的这些饮品，充其量只能暂时安抚它们的情绪，不知道什么时候是个头啊。
E: As the Dreamscape collapses faster, more monsters will go frenzied. The drinks we whip up will only calm them down temporarily, and we have no idea when this whole mess will end.

C: 汪！你不觉得舒翁最近的行为很可疑嘛，成天不在酒吧，到底去哪了哇！
E: Woof! Don't you think Siobhan has been acting suspiciously lately? She's never around the lounge these days. Where has she gone?

C: 我也很好奇。
E: I'm curious, too.

C: 就这么说定了汪！
E: It's a deal! Woof!

C: 它说的都是真的吗？
E: Is that true?

C: 所以才派那些坏人过来，想要把我们都清理掉…对不对哇！
E: That's why you sent those baddies to get rid of us... right?

C: 你打算回到家族…继续你以前的事业…我们这些不听话的怪物，只会是你的累赘。
E: You want to go back to The Family... and continue your former career... We're nothing but unruly monsters, just a burden to you.

C: 艾米绮…你别插话。
E: Amiky... just shut up.

C: 那时候啊，有个大傻瓜丢下好好的演艺事业不做，非要跑去当什么调饮师，还总是自信满满地和我说——<color=#dbc291ff>「调饮，就是沟通的艺术」。</color>
E: Back then, there was a fool who gave up her acting career to become a drinksmith, and she always said with confidence that <color=#dbc291ff>"Drinksmith is an art of communication."</color>

C: 你不也是鸢尾花家系的核心成员嘛，真把自己当路过的调饮师了？
E: Hey, you talk as if you're not a core member of the Iris Family. Do you really see yourself as just a random drinksmith?

C: 快打开它吧。
E: Open it up. Quick!

C: 所以是谁在和我说话呢？
E: So who am I talking to?

C: 星期日是落网了，但梦主苦心经营多年，培养的叛徒自然不可能只有他一个。
E: Sunday has indeed been caught. However, as the Dreammaster had toiled for so many years, he must have nurtured more than one traitor.

C: 哈哈哈，除了<color=#dbc291ff>猫头鹰老师制造的烟花</color>，没有东西能伤到它！
E: Hahaha, other than the <color=#dbc291ff>fireworks created by Professor Owl</color>, nothing can so much as scratch it!

C: 这还没完，之后隐夜鸫家系的人跑过来，说这里受到的破坏并非寻常，是什么…「虚无」的力量？反正拽了一堆名词，开了一个我们无法接受的修理费。
E: That's not all. Later, a bunch of Nightingale Family members showed up, asserting that the destruction was unusual and exhibited signs of some... power of Nihility? Anyway, they inundated us with a barrage of technical terms and demanded an exorbitant repair fee that we simply couldn't accept.

C: 您跑到被封锁的大剧院中，是有什么诉求吗？
E: Is there something you're looking for in the barred theater?

C: 我就是「钟表匠」。
E: I'm the Watchmaker.

C: 「监狱的战争、无数的灾难、噩梦的拓荒、美梦的建立…一路走来，我看到梦中的人们逐渐停滞不前，也不再回望。他们说梦外足够残酷，梦中不应再翻阅血泪书写的史书。」
E: "From the conflict in the prison to the countless catastrophes, to the expansion of nightmares, to the establishment of sweet dreams... Along the way, I've witnessed the people in the dreams gradually coming to a standstill without looking back. They said the world outside of dreams is cruel, and one should no longer look back at these sorrowful pasts in dreams."

C: 你们感觉如何？
E: What do you all think?

C: 他听到这个答案过后笑了笑，就让我离开了房间。第二天，我就收到了总制片人的任命通知…真是个神秘的人啊。
E: He chuckled at my answer before dismissing me from the room. The following day, I received the appointment notice from the executive producer... What a mysterious guy.

C: 嗷，我们不能失去这全宇宙最好喝的饮料！喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！
E: Woah, we can't lose the tastiest beverage in this entire universe! Grab this bottle of SoulGlad and make your dreams a blast!

C: 有点意思，开拍！
E: Interesting! Action!

C: 大概是不小心拍坏的胶片吧。没办法，只好都剪掉了。
E: The film wasn't accidentally damaged, was it? We'll have to cut it out then.

C: 不，我是…
E: No, I'm...

C: 有点明白了！
E: I think I got it!

C: 呵，我的垃圾袋里装满了点子，坏蛋逃不出桶的制裁……
E: Heh, my trashbag's full of ideas. The baddies will not escape the trashcan's judgment...

C: 滴答，伙伴们，不用怕，交给我吧！
E: Tick-tock, fear not friends, leave it to me!

C: 去拍下一个镜头吧。
E: Go shoot the next scene.

C: 咕噜噜…汽水先生的外传，这玩意儿到底该怎么做呢……
E: *gurgle* Mr. Soda's extra story... What am I gonna do about that one...

C: 咕噜噜…我现在就像没盖子的苏乐达——气儿都泄光了，啥点子都想不出来。
E: *gurgle* I feel like a bottle of SoulGlad that someone left the cap off... all out of fizz, with no more ideas bubbling up.

C: ——大导演，咱们的故事这样就讲完了吧？
E: ...Director, is that the ending for our story?

C: …哼，不闹了。
E: ...Hmph, quit it.

C: 呼噜噜…啾？导演，怎么了吗？
E: *snooze* ...Tweet? Director, what's up?

C: 咳！等等，老朽还有很重要的问题没想明白！
E: *cough* Wait, I still have some important questions that I don't understand!

C: 这是怎样一种缘分啊！
E: What a happy twist of fate!

C: 亲爱的主角，你的命运正在被重新演绎，何必纠结于无用的选择——为了故事的精彩，下一幕只能是崭新的情节！
E: Dear protagonist, your destiny is being rewritten. Why dwell upon worthless choices. For the thrill of the story, the next scene can only be a brand-new beat!

C: 啊…这……
E: Ah... Wha... *laughs*

C: 嗯…现在也没时间想那么多了，我们快点走吧。
E: Well, we don't have that much time to think it over. Let's go.

C: 哈哈，我只是这部影片的赞助商，导演嘛…另有其人。
E: Haha, I'm just this film's sponsor. As for the director... that's someone else.

C: 但说实话，这家伙真是不听话。普通的忆域迷因都很好控制，但这怪物无论如何都不愿听从命令。真担心这家伙会跑掉啊……
E: But honestly, this guy just won't listen. Typical Memory Zone Memes are pretty easy to control, but this one just won't heed any warnings at all. I'm worried it might run off...

C: 哈哈，抱歉，我只会记住像你这样闪闪发光的巨星。
E: Haha. Sorry. I only remember superstars like you.

C: 编剧：\n {NICKNAME}  流萤\n
E: Screenwriter:\n{NICKNAME}  Firefly\n

C: 倒霉蛋2号
E: Unlucky Fool #2

C: 你所行之处，伴随着祂的凝视。你所践行的，也是祂{RUBY_B#尚未}早已{RUBY_E#}宣告的谶语。繁星是祂的眼，微风是祂的手。你罹受的每场灾祸，皆是「终末」的启示。
E: Wherever you walk, you are under THEIR gaze. What you practice is also THEIR prophecy that has {RUBY_B#yet to be}already been{RUBY_E#} announced. The stars are THEIR eyes, and the breeze is THEIR hands. Every disaster that befalls you is a revelation of Finality.

C: 这位先生的建议虽有些刺耳，但不无道理。
E: While that gentleman's suggestion may sound harsh, it is not without merit.

C: 换句话说，虽然成为徒弟的过程是挺被动的，但是学习的过程你得主动一些。
E: In other words, even though you didn't exactly choose to be our apprentice, you still need to take the initiative during this learning process.

C: 本姑娘不允许你这么污蔑仙舟剑术，有本事你让机甲跟我过上两招！
E: Stop! Don't you dare insult Xianzhou swordplay like that! If you have the guts, I'll show your mechs what I can do!

C: 我看没有什么不妥的，就让三月试试呗，只要她用心练，打个公司废铁应该是没问题的。
E: I don't see any issue with it. Let March give it a shot. As long as she trains diligently, I believe she can easily deal with that hunk of IPC scrap metal.

C: 我知道，就是那个「练得硬桥硬马，方能稳扎稳打」对吧？
E: Oh, I know! It's that "float like a butterfly, sting like a bee," right?

C: 嘿嘿，这都是要多亏了二位小师父和{NICKNAME}你呀。
E: Hehe, I couldn't have done it without my masters and you, {NICKNAME}.

C: （去找椒丘）
E: (Ask Jiaoqiu for help)

C: 金人巷的父老乡亲都看着呢。
E: Everyone in Aurum Alley is watching.

C: 你还没学猪叫呢？
E: What about the "squealing like a pig" part?

C: 三月七小姐、{NICKNAME}，听说斯科特已经送来了战帖，我们想着能不能做点什么，帮助三月小姐战胜斯科特。
E: March, {NICKNAME}, we heard that Skott sent you a challenge, so we were wondering if there's anything we can do to help you defeat him.

C: 哪里哪里，是我要多感谢三月七小姐才是。
E: Don't mention it. It's actually me who should be thanking you, March.

C: 一滴冰冷的泪珠，终于裹挟着强忍不住的悲伤，从男人的眼角，滑落。
E: A single drop of icy tear, finally succumbing to uncontainable sorrow, escapes from the corner of the man's eye.

C: 没人知道银狼到底对三月七的剑做了什么。
E: No one has any idea what Silver Wolf did to March 7th's sword.

C: 这里有你，有我，有{NICKNAME}，这不显而易见了吗？
E: Yeah, with you, me, and {NICKNAME} here, the answer is pretty obvious.

C: 询问人才激励部的福利。
E: Ask about the Talent Motivation Department's perks.

C: 当初金人巷的业务我有参与…眼下这批公司运输船也是我在负责…虽然这些事情好像也不大，但是少了我这些事情就办不成！
E: I was involved in the Aurum Alley investment project... and right now, I'm in charge of these transport ships... They may not seem like big things, but they can't be done without me!

C: 啊啊啊啊——！
E: Arrrrghhh...!

C: 求求你别理解我，你在星穹列车上做自由职业，你和我比不了。
E: No, you don't get it. You're a freelancer on the Astral Express. You're nothing like me.

C: 不要——！不要不要不要不要绝对不要！
E: No—! No no no no definitely no!

C: 星核猎手？你出现在这儿，该不会意味着仙舟又要……
E: A Stellaron Hunter? The fact that you're here, does that mean the Xianzhou is again...

C: 舰船擅自行动起来，将主人的遗体带回了故乡…如果机械灵魂真的存在，那该有多浪漫啊。如果我们遇上了好心机械灵魂，也许…它会愿意教我如何击败公司机甲！
E: The airship moved on its own and brought its owners' remains back home... If Mechanical Souls do exist, wouldn't it be romantic? If we meet a kind-hearted Mechanical Soul, maybe... it will be willing to teach me how to defeat the IPC mech!

C: 这么高深的话不像你啊…
E: When did you start spouting wisdom like that...

C: 我从不讳言，<size=32>我，超爱翻垃圾桶的</size>。
E: I make no secret of it, <size=32>I love rummaging through trashcans!</size>

C: 如果能从这些情感垃圾里找出记忆层面的病因，那么开发治疗方案也就有路可寻了。
E: If I can find a cause for this illness in the psychological trash, then there is hope for the development of a cure.

C: 别这么说，科学可是个严谨的活儿，要大胆假设小心求证。我自己提出的假设，当然得自己想办法验证嘛。
E: Don't sound so disappointed. Science is a meticulous profession. One has to bravely set hypotheses and carefully confirm them. This is a hypothesis that I myself suggested, so naturally, it falls upon me to find a way to prove it.

C: 嘿，{NICKNAME}，告诉你个好消息！感谢你的帮忙，我的研究材料收集得差不多了。如果这项研究能成功，对仙舟人来说也是功德一件。
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, great news! Thanks to your help, my research data is almost complete. If this research is successful, it will be a huge help to the Xianzhou people.

C: 看你身旁的垃圾桶——我正是这桶扭曲后，诞生于「夹层世界」的意识体。
E: Look at the trashcans next to you... I am a consciousness born in the "Betweenwhere" after this trashcan was distorted.

C: 为了小桂子！列阵！！！
E: For Lil Gui! Form up!

C: 因为，你很强，还认识很多厉害的人…在刚才那场你冒充我教练的比赛中，你也真的为我提供了很大的帮助。
E: Because you're strong, and you know plenty of strong people... When you were pretending to be my coach in the last match, you were a great help!

C: 「寻径指津」啊！一玩起来就发狠了，忘情了，没命了！我们在太卜司里，玩了一局多么壮阔、多么豪放、多么火烈的游戏哇——「寻径指津」！
E: "Pathfinder" — Once you play, you'll forget about hatred, love, and life itself! In the Divination Commission, we play such a magnificent, bold, and fiery game!

C: 那位医生让我在城里走走，多见见世面。
E: That doctor advised me to walk around the town, and see more of the sights.

C: 嗯？怎么还和「气质」有关系？气质不好也算有病吗？
E: Huh? What's it got to do with anything organic? I thought mechanical parts were fine in the tournament.

C: 他的脑部有个非常巨大的阴影…难道说……
E: There's a huge shadow in his brain... Could it be...

C: 我想想…刚到仙舟的时候吃了些特产——鸣藕糕、红油乱斩牛杂、鳞渊冰泉、苏打豆汁、辣子鸡丁、蒜苗五花肉……
E: Let me think... I ate some of the local delights when I got here — Songlotus cake, chili oil beef offal stew, Scalegorge spring water, mung bean soda, spicy diced chicken, garlic-infused pork...

C: 素裳将梦貘抱在怀里，露出了甜梦中才有的笑容，离开了你们的视野。
E: Sushang holds the tuskpir in her arms smiling, and then walks out of sight

C: 可不能每次都被吓到出现幻觉啊，哈哈！
E: I can't keep getting spooked and hallucinating all the time! Haha!

C: 哈哈，我倒是有一个诀窍，能帮你在赛前克服恐惧——
E: Haha, I've got a little trick that can help you conquer your pre-match anxiety—

C: 找个空旷无人的地方，把对手的名字大声喊出来，直到发自内心地相信，自己能打赢那个让你恐惧的强敌为止。
E: Find an empty place and scream the name of your opponent until you truly believe that you can beat the enemy you fear.

C: 哈哈哈哈，喵你宝贝！我看你是怕我一枪爱死你！
E: Hahahaha, you lil' cutie fudgepie! I think you're actually afraid that I might dog your cats in one shot!

C: 他呜呜伯的，有人跟你闹着玩，我可不跟你闹着玩！我偏要跟你以命相搏，你没这个胆子，上这儿来干嘛？
E: Dadgum Wubbaboo! Others might play games with you, but I ain't playing! I'm putting my life on the line here, but if you don't even have the guts to do the same, then what are you here for?

C: 尾巴找我有事？
E: You looking for me, Tail?

C: 于是心说要不要你给咱们藿藿也好好训练训练，让她登上演武仪典和人面对面打上几场。这不比看什么恐怖片更能练胆量？
E: I was thinking you could train Huohuo properly, and have her attend the Wardance to fight against a few others. Isn't this much more effective at training one's bravery than watching horror flicks?

C: 等等…这是什么东西！鬼，是鬼啊！原来卢卡选手的粉丝群体已经这么广了啊！
E: Hang on... What's this! I—It's a ghost! To think Luka has fans from realms that transcend mortality!

C: 因为有我尚未准确获知的「变量」，所以——无法得出结论。
E: There is a variable that I have yet to ascertain, so it's impossible to draw any conclusions.

C: 不，我没有放水。你刚才击败了毫无保留的我。
E: No, I didn't. You defeated me fair and square.

C: 史瓦罗大佬，根据你的「理性计算」…你觉得我有机会打败彦卿吗？
E: Svarog, based on your calculations... Do you think I can beat Yanqing?

C: 演武仪典最具人气的异星选手挑战自己的爱徒，他肯定要来观礼的嘛～
E: The most popular Wardance contestant from another planet is challenging his disciple. Of course, he has to be here.

C: 别别别！
E: No no no!

C: 那家店的茶不适合他的年龄。
E: The tea served there isn't suitable for someone his age.

C: 哈哈，你喜欢就好。今天请你喝茶呢，有两件事。第一件，是想给你赔个不是。
E: Haha, I'm glad you like it. I'm buying you drinks for two reasons — I want to apologize to you. That's the first.

C: 糟糕，时间不早了，要错过返程的星槎了！我先走啦～下次再见！
E: Oh, no! It's getting late, I'm about to miss my starskiff! I should get going! I'll see you next time!

C: 看你坚决的眼神，我就知道你和我一样有必须战斗的理由。
E: Looking at your determined eyes, I already know that you and I have the same reason to fight.

C: ……善逝！你答应过我，不会将自己暴露在危险中的！
E: ...Sugata! You promised me that you will not expose yourself to danger!

C: 提问：我无法理解，倘若他们拥有杀戮之上的力量，为何无法在宇宙中自保，还要寻求庇护？
E: Question: I cannot understand — if they possess powers beyond slaughter, why are they unable to protect themselves in the universe and still seek refuge?

C: 虽然驮那师父、毗梨护法和善逝看不见了……但我希望我能代替他们见证这一天的到来，见证丹轮寺的僧侣和孩子们可以不再忧惧，可以在这个宇宙的一角找到自己和平生活的地方。
E: Although Master Dhyana, Dharmic Monk Virya, and Sugata can no longer witness it... I hope I can witness it on their behalf — the day when the monks and children of Claretwheel Temple will know no fear and find a tranquil corner in the cosmos to lead peaceful lives of their own.

C: 这种事情你问我怎么评价？我不知道，你去问他们。
E: You're asking me about it? I don't know. Go ask them yourself.

C: 你误会了，萨姆不是那种人。
E: You're mistaken. SAM isn't like that at all.

C: 感觉配合你们的对话，有点太侮辱智商了…咱们还是少说两句，用拳头来决胜负吧。
E: I feel like I'm losing brain cells just by talking to you... Let's cut to the chase and settle this with our fists.

C: 嗯！谢谢你们！我一定会继续前进，不会让扑满们失望的！
E: Yes! Thank you all! I'll definitely keep advancing, and I won't disappoint the Trotters!

C: 前排左手边第一位。
E: Front row, first from the left.

C: 我们正在积极备战…
E: We are already busy with the prep...

C: （流泪，擦下不存在的眼镜…）
E: (Tear up and wipe at your non-existent glasses...)

C: 实话实说，我不是很有信心。毕竟前面的比赛已经打得很艰难了，后面的选手只会更加厉害，眼下只能寄希望于对手下手轻点吧。
E: Honestly, I'm not totally confident. The previous matches were already difficult, and the upcoming opponents will only get stronger. All I can hope for is that our opponents don't hit too hard.

C: 他赛前会保持空腹…
E: He keeps an empty stomach before the match...

C: 规则是组委会制定的，有本事去找组委会评理啊。
E: It was the committee that drew up the regulations. Go complain to the committee if they're up to it.

C: 接下来的比赛只与实力有关。
E: The upcoming matches will only be about their skill.

C: 卢卡！振作一点！
E: Luka! Get it together!

C: 满嘴谎言
E: Big fat liar.

C: 好嘞！忙完了随时来找我！反正我这也没别的客人……
E: Right you are! Feel free to come to me once you're done! It's not like I have any other guests anyway...

C: 别这样，求你了。你象征性玩一玩也好，帮我提升一下触达率，这样也算是有点立功减刑的依据。
E: C'mon, please. You can at least fiddle with the game for a while and help me boost my interaction rates. That will at least reduce my sentence a little.

C: 恭喜你！成为了咱们庙会速通大赛的困难难度亚军！
E: Congrats! You're our Hard Mode runner-up at our temple fair speedrun competition!

C: 我走啦！还有正事要办。{NICKNAME}、召夏，后会有期。
E: I'm heading off! I still have some business to attend to. {NICKNAME}, Zhaoxia, see you later.

C: 给你看，这是我刚才拍的照片！
E: Here, a picture I just took for you!

C: 呃…你们好，我是乐队的经理，很高兴和各位见面。大家共同努力，完成后续在音乐派对上的演出。本次的目标是——
E: Err... Hey everyone, I'm the band manager. Great to meet you all. Let's all work hard together and complete the music party performances. Our goal this time is to...

C: 就叫这个吧！
E: Let this be it!

C: 需要我帮忙作词吗？
E: Do you need my help to write the lyrics?

C: 容在下先静待片刻——
E: Please allow me a moment of silence...

C: 虽说贝斯确实在乐队里很不起眼，但我还是想表现得更好点。
E: The bass may not be the highlight in a band, but I still want to play it better.

C: 等演出结束后再说吧。
E: Let's talk about it after the performance

C: …为何我等打扮成这般模样？角色扮演？非也！此乃在下精心设计的音忍•盛装是也！
E: ...Why am I dressed like that? Roleplaying? Nay! This is my painstakingly designed Sound Ninja Fashion Garb!

C: 是啊，片场的「善后」花了我不少时间。
E: Yes, the set's "redressing" took me some time.

C: 明白。即使乱破大人离开了，「缭乱」的音乐也不会停止！
E: Got it. Even with Lady Rappa's departure, the Dazzling's music will never stop playing!

C: （请机器人翻译）
E: (Get the robot to interpret)

C: 人类！偷垃圾乃是犯罪，品尝禁忌的滋味，给你一个机会，现在赶紧撤退！
E: Human, stealing trash is a crime! Tasting the forbidden... you've crossed the line. I'll give you a chance, better take your shot, right now, step back, or you'll get caught!

C: 不是我们的对手！
E: No match for us!

C: 贝斯•忍徒对待修行极为认真，从未有疏忽或是懈怠。即便性情内敛，不善言辞，亦始终以真挚善意待人，是我等「缭乱」必不可少的重要成员。
E: Ninja Initiate Bass has always been seriously committed to her training and has never shirked or neglected her duties. Though she is introverted and not gifted with words, she has always treated others with respect and kindness. She is an irreplaceable Dazzling Ninja.

C: 说啥？
E: What did you say?

C: 原来…和同学说话不用这么小心翼翼，现在我也可以抬起头，大声向所有人宣布：我是「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的重要成员，这里需要我！
E: I finally realized... I don't need to be so cautious when speaking with my classmates. From now on, I can raise my head and proudly announce: "I am an important member of Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party, and I am needed here!"

C: 先让我们以为演出可以正常进行，登台时候再玩消失。等观众彻底失去信心，乐队就真的要结束了！
E: First, she makes us think that the performance will go on as usual, then she disappears when it's time to go on stage... When our audience loses all faith in us, that is when a band truly comes to an end!

C: 即使战至最后一人，我等也绝不会撤离战场！
E: Even if we are reduced to our final man, we will never retreat!

C: ——音律•狩猎，开始！
E: ...Let the Sound Hunt begin!

C: 但是，乱破同学两次都找到了我，将我从闭锁的世界中带了出来，所以——
E: However, Rappa found me both times and rescued me from that prison world, so...

C: 小鸟们追逐梦想的身影，不管看多少次，都还是很感动咕！
E: Birds chasing the shadows of their dreams — always so touching, no matter how many times I watch it!

C: …谢谢。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 请你立刻停止回避，别再让我们苦苦寻觅！
E: Please stop avoidin'. Don't make us keep searchin'!

C: 不赚钱你还找我？
E: Why are you asking for my help to not make money?

C: 人们往往会因为「不是外人」而忽视了亲近者的情感需求。伙伴、家人、挚友，都是如此，越是亲近，越不该吝啬于感谢。
E: It's mostly because of this supposed informality that we ignore the feelings of close ones. Companions, family, bosom friends, it's all the same: The closer we are, the more generous we should be in our gratitude.

C: 堂堂正正地正面对决。
E: Meet the showdown fair and square.

C: 实在抱歉，有时我泡完咖啡，就顺手把咖啡渣倒进了绿植里面……
E: I'm really sorry. Sometimes, when I finish brewing coffee, I would pour the coffee grounds into the plants...

C: 我已经给「闭嘴」接上了手柄。不过，我还得实验一下，才能确定手柄键位是如何映射的……
E: I've already attached the controller to Shush, but I still have to test it to see how the controller's key mapping is emulated...

C: 姬子出手。
E: Send Himeko.

C: 欢迎收听今日的「寰宇气象」。
E: Thank you for tuning in to today's cosmic weather report.

C: …以你们的分类学天赋，不去做生物学家真的可惜了。
E: ...With both your talents in taxonomy, it's a real shame you didn't become biologists.

C: 啊？你们智械都喜欢这样的冷笑话吗……
E: Eh? Do all Intellitrons like dad jokes...

C: 等等…难道你们是要拍我这位「盛会巨鹰」啾？记得把我拍得帅一些啾！
E: Hang on... Did you want to take a photo of this Festive Superhawk, tweet? Take a suaver shot of me!

C: 不包邮也敢嚣张？
E: You're cocky for a service that doesn't even offer free shipping!

C: 尾货别叫！
E: Leftover goods should just shut the hell up!

C: 确实是她会做出来的事情呢。
E: Sure seems like she's capable of this.

C: 谐乐学院一定不会让假面愚者赞助的啦！
E: Charmony Academy definitely won't allow a Masked Fool to sponsor them!

C: 可是…人家本来就是美梦剧团哦？
E: But... we are the Sweet Dreams Troupe to begin with?

C: 哼，练剑可不止一昧苦修，得带它们多见些风光事物，才能蕴养灵性。
E: Hmph, sword practice isn't just about training hard. You have to take them to see the sights and experience life — that's how you train their spirits.

C: 呃…所以说，我们三个都得上场吗？我可以帮你们拍照。
E: Eh... So, must all three of us be in it? I can help to take pictures.

C: 恭喜获奖！
E: Congrats on winning!

C: 无论如何，既然命途方程式预测出了复数个可能诞生的灾厄，在庸人们死于安乐前，总要有人扮演厄兆先锋的角色。
E: Regardless, since the Paths Equation had forecasted multiple possible catastrophes, someone must play the part of the Omen Vanguards before the Mundanites die in their serenity.

C: 我的神庙已久未供奉足以享用的秘酿，叫我险些以为我的孩子们已将我遗忘，原来都是被这小贼偷摸走了——
E: My temple has not been offered enough ambrosia for a long while, and I was worried my children might have forgotten me. Instead, it was this thief who took it all...

C: 别说这种丧气话，无论何时都不要放弃希望，振作起来！
E: Stop the depressing talk. We mustn't give up hope no matter what. Keep your spirits up!

C: 当然不用！在乱想些什么呢，别紧张，我会认真教你的！
E: Of course not! What is going through your mind? Don't get antsy. I will teach you in earnest!

C: 意思是，你连奇美拉都不如。
E: Which means, you're less than even a chimera.

C: 现在，这些小奇美拉就归我们管理了。至于后续安排，嗯…先去问问生命花园的园丁吧！
E: Now these little chimeras are ours to care for. As for later arrangements, hmm... Let's go ask the Gardeners in the Garden of Life!

C: 明明自己总在偷懒，还把工作都丢给小奇美拉。遇上这种不负责的管理员也挺难受的。
E: You're obviously slacking off yourself and stacking all the workload on the chimeras. It's probably tough having to deal with such an irresponsible administrator.

C: 是不是还有什么隐情呢……
E: Could there be something more that meets the eye...

C: 作为团队资深成员，你们应当发挥表率作用。明白我的意思吗？
E: As veteran squad members, you should all try to set an example as well. You understand what I'm saying?

C: …第二名的队伍发生了变化？好厉害，突然就蹿了上去，已经超过我们了。
E: ...The squad in second place has changed? Impressive, they came out of nowhere and overtook us.

C: 现在是下班时间。按照花园的规定，加班要付双倍的酬劳嗷呜！
E: I'm off-duty. According to the Garden's regulations, overtime requires double the compensation, awoo!

C: 嘿嘿，灰宝是对我催促你工作这件事怀恨在心吗？
E: Heh-heh, are you annoyed at my constant pestering about work?

C: 你怎么跑对面去了？
E: What're you doing over there?

C: 要是没有领队的话，小奇美拉的工作效率会受到很大影响，这可怎么办……
E: Without a leader, the chimeras' work efficiency will dip significantly. What will we do...

C: 沉甸甸的奖杯承载着冠军的荣耀、难忘的回忆和{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的赐福，阴郁的日子理当由欢歌涤荡。
E: The weight of the trophy carries with it the glory of a champion, unforgettable memories, and {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}'s blessing. Gloomy days shall be cleansed by joyful songs.

C: 池子被人「下毒」了，没有办法继续比赛了！
E: The bath has been "poisoned." There's no way we can continue the match.

C: 那个…呃，「十敌」阁下……
E: Uh... Lord Yourdei...

C: 怎么就剩这么点戏份了？
E: Is this really all the screentime I get?

C: 真是一点都不让人意外呢。
E: Well, color me unsurprised.

C: 不愧是丹恒，他果然很懂「星穹列车德比」应有的气氛，你也应该戴上它。
E: That's Dan Heng for you, knowing exactly what the Astral Express derby needs. You should wear them too.

C: 别骗我，我装了反诈软件。
E: Don't try to fool me. I've got anti-fraud software.

C: 泡泡，你愿意回来我身边了？
E: Bubbles, ready to come back to my side?

C: 嗝~你都听到了吗？是{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的欢乐，战胜了{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的诡计。
E: Burp~ Did you hear that? {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}'s joy triumphed over {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}'s schemes.

C: 她不适应浴池…要么是太烫了，要么是太凉了，要么就是太舒服了！
E: She couldn't handle the bath... maybe it was too hot, too cold, or maybe just too comfy!

C: 呵，那败在{F#她}{M#他}手中的怪盗大人，现在有结论了吗？
E: Hah, then pray tell, master thief who was defeated by {F#her}{M#him}. What's your conclusion?

C: …{NICKNAME}，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...{NICKNAME}. {NICKNAME}.

C: 这是独属于你的史诗故事。
E: This is your very own epic saga.

C: 我已经下定决心不参加比赛了！
E: I've decided to quit!

C: 看来阿格莱雅已经告诉你了，就是那个豹豹…碰碰什么比赛。
E: Looks like Aglaea already told you. Yes, the... something something Seal Slammers tournament.

C: 太好了，我就知道你会来参加！
E: Wonderful! I knew you'd come through.

C: 刚才*我们*还看到…跑得很快的小飞儿。
E: Just now, we saw... Little Ciphy running past.

C: 你注视着黑色的池水，池水里黑色的倒影也在注视着你，你们互相眨了眨眼睛。
E: You stare into the black waters as the dark reflection stares back at you. You blink at each other.

C: 这怎么叫「懒」呢，这叫有计划有选择…缇宝阿姐等你长大以后就明白了。
E: How is this considered "lazy"? This is being strategic and having good judgment... Big sis Tribbie, you'll understand when you grow up.

C: 这万一是个炸弹怎么办…
E: What if it's actually a bomb...

C: 总之，既然正主来了，我们就一起把它打开看看吧——
E: Either way, since the actual receiver is here, let's open it up—

C: …我们很熟吗？
E: ...Do we know each other?

C: 直面魔王的怒火吧！你就是虫子！
E: Face the rage of the Demon King, you worm!
Bo... ss...

C: （不愧是{NICKNAME}，你的车技太牛啦，佩佩四手开车都追不上，你简直是匹诺康尼车神！）
E: (As expected of {NICKNAME}, your driving skills are amazing. Peppy couldn't catch up, even with four "hands" on the wheel. You're a true Penaconian driving legend!)

C: 事不宜迟，咱们这就把「街机厅」开起来吧！别让我们的客人等太久了！
E: Let's get this arcade up and running ASAP! Can't keep the customers waiting!

C: 尾巴大爷，灵符生效了！看来这只幽灵小鸟也是逃窜的岁阳吧！
E: Mr. Tail, the talisman worked! Looks like this Ghost Bird was another one of those runaway heliobi!

C: …那藿藿呢？
E: ...Then where does that put Huohuo?

C: 有完没完，你行你上？
E: Shut it! If you're so good, do it yourself!

C: 堂堂星穹列车的首席调饮师竟然在匹诺康尼不见经传，「闭嘴」真该出来走走了。
E: How can the Express's chief drinksmith be unknown in Penacony? Shush really should get out more.

C: 答案：因为帕姆会说：这位是*托*帕！
E: Answer: Because Pom-Pom would jump up yelling: "She's a plant! To-paz? More like *Total Patsy*!"

C: 这种通缉犯是怎么混进来的，账账，快把他塞回去！！！
E: How did this fugitive sneak in here!? Numby, put him back where he came from, RIGHT NOW!!!

C: 五个小时？！
E: Five hours!?

C: 实在是种天赋。想必你也能废寝忘食地专注于学习中吧。
E: ...a talent. I suppose you can also lose yourself completely in study, forgetting even to sleep or eat.

C: （嗯，就这样，把调饮的名字和效果记录下来吧。）
E: (Alright, that's it. Just jot down the drink names and effects.)

C: …尽管我并不想承认这点。别太灰心，第二名付出的努力也应当受到奖励。
E: ...Much as I hate to admit it. Don't be too discouraged, second place deserves a reward too.

C: 最后…一秒…这是你意识清晰的最后一秒。糟糕，恐怕不会有人叫你起床。
E: The last... second... This is your final moment of clarity. Too bad, there may be no one around to wake you up.

C: 该起床了。
E: Time to get up.

C: 当然！
E: Of course!

C: 真理医生面无表情地挂断了电话……
E: Dr. Ratio expressionlessly hangs up the phone...

C: 这不就是AI黑塔？
E: So this is like... an AI Herta?

C: 砂金、小叶琳娜，稍后再开复盘会吧，我们的客人到了。
E: Aventurine, little Jelena, the post-mortem can wait. Our guest has arrived.

C: 希望能给到你一点帮助。
E: Hope that helps.

C: 像我这种有着五年经验的老手，当然够得上「资深寻宝者」的头衔了。
E: A veteran like me with five whole years of experience is certainly worthy of the title "Senior Treasure Hunter."

C: 据我观察，这座遗迹之下还有更大的空间，我能找到通往深处的路。可遗迹里危机重重，听说有几个人已经折在里头了。
E: Based on my observations, there should be an even larger space beneath these ruins. I can find the way to get down into the depths, but it's very hazardous. I heard a few people already croaked in there.

C: 做好准备吧，想要寻宝就随时来找我！
E: Go get yourself ready, and come find me anytime you want to go hunting for relics!

C: 呼——不愧是你，居然能让咱俩全身而退！
E: Huh — you really ARE good. We managed to both get out of there in one piece!

C: 为什么记录我的神经电波？
E: Why do you need my brainwave?

C: 「{NICKNAME}忽然想起，那持明族的『衔药龙女』曾说过，这三个炉鼎中都有藏着萃取了天精地华的灵丹妙药。」
E: "{NICKNAME} suddenly remembered that the Vidyadhara Healer Lady had once mentioned these three elixir cauldrons, and how they contained essential extracts of everything in the universe condensed into elixirs of life."

C: 「眼见这恶兽盘桓于灵丹左近，不欲离去……」
E: "Seeing as this beast was lurking near the elixir of life, I didn't dare to leave..."

C: 不能通融一下吗？
E: Can't you bend the rules this once, pleaaase~

C: 谢谢你，丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝！
E: Thank you, Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe!

C: 得了，但见龙尊一声清叱，大战就此展开——
E: Alright! But the high elder gave a clear shout as the battle began—

C: 是，是，这剧情写的确实不咋样。但你就说剧情推进得爽不爽吧？
E: Sure, okay fine. The plot is bad. But the plot is progressing along nicely, isn't it?

C: 第三、你得给我加戏。你评书说成什么样跟我没关系，但既然要改编成幻戏，那就得多给我点戏份。米糕没可就是为了这个，才准备买改编版权的。
E: Thirdly, give me some more screen time. I don't care in the slightest how your story gets told, but if it's getting adapted into an Immersia, then you need to give me more screen time. That's what the Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club wants to see and why they're interested in this acquisition.

C: 怎么样？您二位准备好了吗？咱们再一起构思一下，怎么把这个故事给写圆满吧。
E: What do you think? Are you both ready? Let's work together to bring this story to a nice conclusion.

C: 这玩意儿有尝尝的吗！
E: Is it safe to taste this stuff?

C: 第三步，应该是放入这个东西吧……
E: Step three now. I should put this in, right...?

C: 碎星绝尘剑似乎是它之前的名字，这把神兵随着龙尊沦为罪囚而蒙尘受辱。而今得你妙手重铸，不如重新为它起个名字吧？
E: Star-Shattering Blade of Truth is this weapon's old name, and it's been dragged through the mud since the fall of the high elder. Now that you've re-cast it with skill and precision, why not give it a new name too?

C: 虚数内能便携式战术激光炮！
E: Imaginary Intra-Kinetic Portable Tactical Laser Cannon!

C: 现在观众老爷想要个授权…
E: Now your audience wants a "yes" answer...

C: 我正巧按不同的配比，研制了三种全新的「烈焰浓茶」，还请你来试试，然后告诉我你的感受。
E: I happen to have developed three new recipes for Flaming Potent Tea in different ratios. Please try them and tell me how you feel.

C: 嗐，我本来是想找素裳姑娘帮忙的，但我看她也挺忙的，只好来麻烦你了。
E: Well, I was planning to ask Sushang for help, but she was too busy. So I was wondering if I could perhaps trouble you instead?

C: 我哪里懂这些…
E: But I know nothing about antiques...

C: 天天在决胜乐园巡逻，大家都在玩以太战线，看得我心都痒了…趁长官不在，跟我来一把对决吧！
E: I spend every day patrolling the Victory Zone while everyone plays Aetherium Wars, I can't bear it anymore... The Captain's not here at the moment, you'll battle me, won't you?

C: 哈哈，原来二位已经来过这里了？最近，公司看中了雅利洛-Ⅵ的潜力，特地将这座旧武器试验场给翻新了。
E: Haha, so you guys have been here before? The Corporation recently saw the potential in Jarilo-VI and decided to renovate this old weapon testing ground.

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 嘿嘿～不愧是我们俩！
E: Hehe~ That's us all right!

C: 哼哼！哼，哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink! Oink!

C: 噫…这种被人拿捏在掌心里的感觉，真不痛快！不想了不想了，我们还是专注于眼下的目标吧，这些问题不如找个机会当面问他好了。
E: Ugh... why do I feel like we're being played? Anyway, let's forget about it for now, we can ask him in person next time we see him.

C: 咦，这是广播吗？
E: Huh? Is this a broadcast?

C: 好没有仪式感…
E: Feels kinda underwhelming...

C: 没问题，我此行正是为了说明这个。
E: No problem, that's exactly why I'm here.

C: 艾丝妲小姐或许就是看中了这一点，才将这枚特别的以太硬币买来收藏的吧……
E: Perhaps that's what drew Miss Asta to them, and why she decided to add them to her Aether Coin collection...

C: 你看，我们就这样把机器人装进矿车里……
E: Alright, it's like this. All we need to do is load the robot onto the mine cart...

C: …哎，等下等下，你是一旦滚动起来就停不下来的石头吗？我们还有问题没问呢！
E: ...Hey, slow down! We still have questions that need answering!

C: 汪汪！汪！
E: Woof woof! Woof!

C: 请把以太硬币交给我吧，我来为两位注册参赛资格。
E: Please hand me your Aether Coin, and I'll help you with the registration process.

C: …哈哈哈，开玩笑的。友谊第一、比赛第二，祝你们好运！
E: ...Haha, I'm just messing with you. Friends first, competitors second, right? Best of luck out there!

C: 哈——刚才这场对决可真是惊险，咱这小心脏都提溜到嗓子眼儿来啦。
E: Now that was a performance! I thought my heart was going to jump out of my mouth!

C: 她到底是谁？
E: Who exactly is "she?"

C: 什么时候发奖金？
E: So when do we get our prize money?

C: 各位观众请注意，各位观众请注意——
E: Attention all spectators, attention all spectators...

C: 装神弄鬼多半都是人为的。
E: A lot of paranormal activity is just people in costumes.

C: 嗯，不止咱们几个，十王司的冥差们也会暗行调查。
E: Mm. Plus, the spiritfarers from the Ten-Lords Commission will be carrying out their own investigation in secret as well.

C: 当然啦，我知道大家对这个新型捉鬼方式不是很信任…那你们稍等一下啊，我来翻翻情报，咱们几人挑一个试试。
E: I feel like some of you aren't convinced by the whole online ghost-hunting thing... How about this — we take a look at the leads we have so far, and pick one to try out as a test run.

C: 他说为了重续当年的战斗而来到此处，却不应战，难道是变相承认我不战而胜？不对，在人类的逻辑里，不战和胜利不能划上等号……
E: He comes here after I demand a rematch, and won't even fight... Is he conceding that I already won? No, there can be no victory in eschewing combat — human logic negates it...

C: 二位好啊！看衣着想必是丹鼎司的医士，在下是云骑士卒素裳。请问两位是在寻找突然失踪的龙女大人吗？
E: Hello there! Judging by your clothing, you two must be healers from the Alchemy Commission. My name is Sushang — I'm a Cloud Knight Soldier. Are you looking for the Dragon Lady who suddenly disappeared?

C: 你试着打开这扇门，但门却像焊死了一样纹丝不动。
E: You try to open the door but it won't budge.

C: 我再准备一下。
E: I need a moment to get ready.

C: 群策群力嘛，快帮我想想法子！
E: It's all a team effort. Come on, help me think of something!

C: 时间站在我这一边，只要仙舟人还不想扯下人性这块遮羞布。
E: In any case, time is on my side, so long as the Xianzhou are willing to maintain some facade of humanity.

C: 藿藿和尾巴…
E: About Huohuo and Tail...

C: 等等，我有个法子！反过来试试如何？不去追逐白露小姐，而是等她自己跑过来！
E: Wait, I have an idea! How about we use a little reverse psychology? Instead of chasing Lady Bailu, we get her to come to us!

C: 咱们的人生很长的啦，从这个尺度上来看，不会有你想象得那么久～我暂时得跟这些大人走啦！
E: We both have many years ahead of us, so in that sense it won't be long at all... but for now I have to leave with these grown-ups!

C: 啊？！太卜一诺千金，怎么能反悔呢？
E: Huh!? M—Master Diviner, you can't back out now!

C: 有什么话就快说吧！
E: If you have something to say then say it!

C: 好啊。
E: Okay~

C: …希望不是咱俩想一块的那个人。
E: ...I sure hope we're not thinking of the same person.

C: 那么将军，咱们立刻出发吧？如果晚了，素裳恐怕……
E: General, we need to move fast — if we wait any longer, I'm afraid that Sushang might be—

C: 要是尾巴还在的话…我也不会这么拖累大家了。
E: I—If I still had my tail... I wouldn't be slowing everyone down...

C: 挣脱胜负？这是安慰死人和失败者的托词！想一想你在祈龙坛上的惨败！想一想那些在死亡边缘徘徊的感觉。
E: Break free from victory and defeat? Those are just empty words to comfort the dead and the defeated! Think of your crushing defeat at Dragonprayer Terrace! Think of how you felt then — teetering on the brink of death.

C: 她受人欺骗？
E: She's been deceived?

C: 走吧，审问浮烟，务必要从它嘴里撬出些什么。
E: Let's go, we must try to squeeze some answers out of Cirrus.

C: 每个人都会离我而去，我到底该怎么办？我不想再孤伶伶一个人……
E: Everyone always leaves me... I don't want to be alone, not again...

C: 不好意思，藿藿毫无长进。
E: I'm sorry... I guess I still am...

C: 真是搞不懂臭小鬼的表现欲。
E: The behavior of these brats is astounding.

C: 胆小鬼！
E: Coward!

C: 毕竟这不符合判官的做法…
E: After all, this is not in line with the Judge's decision...

C: 因为文远我体会到了爱与被爱的情感…它既有甘甜，又混杂着一丝苦涩和酸楚。像是酝酿了许多年的酒，这就是经过等待和痛苦考验的爱吗？
E: Because of Wenyuan, I've got to experience the feeling of love, and being loved... It's both sweet, but also mixed with a hint of bitter and sour. Like wine that's steeped for years and years, is this how it feels to love after so much pain and waiting?

C: 见到你，就知道帖子说的是谁了。
E: Seeing you now, I know exactly who your post is referring to.

C: 她怎么了…
E: What's wrong with her...

C: 藿藿，有什么困难记得要跟我们讲哦。
E: Huohuo, make sure you tell us if you come across any trouble!

C: 我本是不相信「凶宅」这些说法的…但自从我住下之后，开始出现咳嗽、胸闷等症状，这让我不得不开始紧张起来。
E: I never used to believe in "haunted houses" or things like that... But, ever since I moved in, I've developed a cough and it was difficult for me to even breathe sometimes. It's starting to make me nervous.

C: 哎，这罗浮仙舟资源有限，只能用看着差不多的样板房拼拼凑凑吧。
E: Ah, there is limited resource on the Xianzhou Luofu, I just had to piece things together with a blueprint of a similar house.

C: 我过得很好，你不用担心。
E: I've been fine. You don't have to worry.

C: 总感觉她们之间还有很多…很多故事。
E: It feels like those two have quite a few... stories between them.

C: 只要能实现「带着藏月瓠飞行」的目的，其实也挺简单的。
E: Whatever that fulfills the purpose of "flying with the Lunaumbra Gourd," I guess. It's actually pretty easy to operate.

C: 废话少说，进来吧你！
E: Shut up and go in!

C: 你要做什么？请不要伤害我的朋友。
E: What do you want? Please do not hurt my friends.

C: 我想，去往天外。我不知道，未来会怎样，但我也想体验三月说的平静。
E: I want to go beyond the sky. I don't know how the future will be like, but I'm also keen to experience that peacefulness you mentioned, March.

C: 嗯，我也挺想让它去冒险的。毕竟都是「开拓」之路上的同伴嘛。
E: Yes, I want to let it go on an adventure, too. We're all companions trying to "Trailblaze" our own paths, right?

C: 小家伙，是该离开的时候了——
E: Little buddy, it's time to leave~

C: 没啦！你也知道，罗浮杂俎不过是个灵异见闻类主题的小网站。发过来的银牌也不是真的用银子打的呢。
E: Nope! As you know, the Ghostly Grove is a small paranormal-themed website. The silver medallions dished out aren't even made out of real silver.

C: 好啦，录完这段就结束了。观众都喜欢看真实反应，我只是稍微剪了一下……
E: Alright. We're done after we finish recording this section. Viewers all like real reacts. I just made small edits...

C: 没事，我懂，镜头有畸变嘛。
E: It's fine. I get it. The camera adds ten pounds.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: …和帖子的内容又对不上……
E: ...This is different from that post...

C: 这俩其实是同一个人？
E: Do you think it's the same person?

C: 呃，还没呢…我还在上学。但是论年纪，我怎么都比你要大上不少。
E: Oh, yeah... I'm still in school. But in terms of age, I'm far older than you are.

C: 很遗憾，我见识有限，测试结果大家都不太满意。维修科的人说，没把机器给折腾到冒烟，就说明我还没测试出风险阈值。
E: Unfortunately, my knowledge is limited and people haven't been happy with the test results. The maintenance team said I hadn't reached the risk threshold for testing until I had smoke pluming out of the machine.

C: 正在识别身份…认证中，认证已通过。
E: Verifying identity... Authenticating. Authentication successful.
Meow...

C: 造物们大口咀嚼着食物，闹哄哄地对你表示了感谢。
E: The creations hungrily chomp down the food, raucously thanking you.

C: 空间站的课题和你的研究方向一模一样。
E: Your research topic is exactly the same as that of the space station.

C: 现在有人围在周围，它就自顾自讲故事，没人围在周围，它就像个普通的鸟一样吃了睡、睡了吃。
E: Now, when people are around, it just goes about telling stories to itself. But when there's nobody around, it eats, sleeps, and excretes just like a normal bird.

C: 此人平时不显山不露水，将自己隐藏于市井之中。人们都认为，她不过是一介无权无势的升斗小民。
E: This person is someone who always keeps their cards super close, hiding in plain sight at the marketplace. Everyone takes her for just a powerless peasant living hand to mouth.

C: 话音未落，司令突然从远处惊呼着跑来。
E: Before the sentence was finished, Mr. Bigwig suddenly ran over from a distance, shouting in alarm.

C: 哇嘎嘎嘎，就等你这句话！
E: Mwahahaha, I've been waiting for this!

C: 端走舒翁的饮品
E: Retrieve Siobhan's drink

C: 到最后了么？
E: Is this the end?

C: （完成拼图后，记忆的时间线发生了推进。）
E: (After completing the jigsaw, the timeline of the memory advances.)

C: 你们…人家在这个像迷宫的地方走丢了，怎么都找不到路，可以领人家出去嘛？
E: Oh, you see... I got lost in this maze-like place and couldn't find my way out. Could you please show me the way?

C: 那就小的咯？不改咯？不用想，肯定能赢！
E: So, you are choosing small? Not gonna change? No need to think about it. You've got this round in the bag!

C: 哎哟哟哟！！！你居然敢这么对待客人！你给我站在那，看我不把你砸成废铁！
E: Geez!!! Is that how you treat a customer!? You stay right there. I'm going to whack you into scrap metal!

C: 这样。那你是不需要的吧？太可怜了，就和我一样。
E: I see. You're abandoned too, right? So pathetic, just like me.

C: 我还是会掏钱，但要记住——这是我赏给你的！
E: I'll still pay for it, but remember — it's my treat!

C: 并非是我所点的味道。唉，就连尝到如愿的饮料，对现今的我而言也是遥不可及吗？
E: This is not the flavor I ordered. *sigh* Is it too much to even ask for a drink that quenches my thirst?

C: 那就算了吧。
E: Alright. Forget it then.

C: 你想喝点什么？
E: What would you like?

C: 上次和您聊过后，我的头脑如今变得无比清晰。哈哈哈哈，这就是得到拯救的感觉吗！
E: My mind has become so clear since we last talked. Hahahaha! Is this what salvation feels like?

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 它给你讲过它的爱吗？那其实是它在剧院时候的道具盒，里面都是些漂亮的首饰。不算贵重，但是个纪念。
E: Have they ever told you about their love? Well, it's actually a prop box from their time in the theater, filled with beautiful jewelry. Not expensive, but a memento.

C: 想知道的话，就来梦境酒店吧。
E: If you want the answer, come to the hotel in the Dreamscape.

C: 但这个过程实在太漫长了。即使暂时解决了怪物的情绪问题，噩梦仍然会再度袭来，周而复始，没有尽头。
E: But the process was too long. Even with the monsters' emotional issues temporarily placated, the nightmares will still return time and time again, with no end in sight.

C: 汪！我来找你玩了！请给我一杯<color=#dbc291ff>超级甜，味道强烈，口感浓厚</color>的饮品！喝不到你调的饮料，我就觉得好无聊哇！
E: Woof! I've come to play with you! Please give me a glass of something <color=#dbc291ff>super sweet, strong-tasting, and thickly textured</color>! I'm bored out of my mind when I don't get to drink your mixed concoctions!

C: 你已经是个成熟的调饮师了，该学会记住顾客的喜好。来杯我每次都点的饮料吧，就是<color=#dbc291ff>纸月亮</color>，别搞错了。
E: You've grown into a mature drinksmith. It's time to remember the preferences of the customers. Get me a glass of my usual, the <color=#dbc291ff>Paper Moon</color>. Don't get it wrong.

C: ——喂！傻狗！嘿嘿嘿，就凭你那可怜的小脑瓜，还想教人呢？
E: Hey! Idiot dog! Heh heh heh. You really want to teach someone with that pathetic brain of yours?

C: …这个忆泡…承载了我的童年回忆…还有所有的快乐……
E: This memory bubble... holds all my childhood memories... and all the good times...

C: 汪
E: Woof

E: Woof  Woof      Woof

E: They <rhythm>can't <rhythm>handle <rhythm>anything

E: Woof  Woof  WoofWoof

C: 准备开始正式翻译吧！
E: Prepare to begin the translation proper!

C: 果然是让我打白工…
E: As I thought, you're trying to make me work for free...

C: 那么接下来，愿您度过一段愉快的时光。
E: With that, I wish you an enjoyable gaming session!

C: {NICKNAME}！这边这边——
E: {NICKNAME}! Over here!

C: 没完了是吧！再这样小心你的账号……
E: Are we still talking about that!? Don't forget, I can access your account...

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}，你先把知更鸟小姐的折纸小鸟摆上，给我看……
E: Oh right, {NICKNAME}, you should place Miss Robin's Origami Bird first, so that I can take a look at it...

C: 所以咱们科就派了我过来给前辈搭把手，希望我俩能优化下这套工具。基于需求，我给这一版的程序取了个新名字叫「星芒烁变」…哈哈，新版本新气象。
E: Which is why the department sent me to assist you, in the hopes that we can optimize this tool. As per the requirements, I gave this version of the program a new name — Stellar Shimmer... Haha, new version, new beginnings!

C: 我也觉得。我毕竟来自小地方，实在搞不懂这些大势力的种种套路……
E: I agree. Coming from a small town, I find the intricate games these big players play are just beyond me...

C: 好啦～卡美丽小姐，不要那么悲观。我卢卡哪有那么容易被盘外招击倒？一切都会好起来的！
E: Alright, don't be too pessimistic, Miss Carmella. I'm not so easily overcome by dirty tricks. Everything will work out!

C: 两位朋友，我得罪过你们吗？有必要说得这么难听吗？
E: Friends, have I wronged you in any way? Why speak so harshly of me?

C: 为什么每个人都在谈论我…我到底做错了什么？
E: Why is everyone talking about me... What exactly did I do wrong?

C: 但是，怎么说呢…权当是过来人建议吧——想让烟雾散去，最快的方法是灭火。
E: However, if I may offer a piece of seasoned advice — the quickest way to clear the smoke is to put out the fire.

C: 啊？这是在搞什么名堂……
E: What is this all about...

C: 托帕这是两边下注啊。
E: Miss Topaz is betting on both sides.

C: {NICKNAME}，您好，这里有一个您的包裹，请签收一下。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. There's a package for you. Please sign here.

C: 这正是我们当前面临的困境之一。
E: This is exactly one of the dilemmas we are currently facing.

C: 这节车厢以前叫「会议车厢」。我的{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}说，现在无名客人这么少，用不到一整节车厢来开会，就自作主张改成了「派对车厢」。
E: This used to be called the Meeting Car, until my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous master{RUBY_E#} came along thinking they wouldn't need an entire car for meetings among just a handful of Nameless. That's when my previous master made the decision to rename it the Party Car.

C: 作为一台调饮机器人，我被设计为恰如其分地缺乏存在感。您不记得我，正符合设计预期。
E: As a robot drinksmith, my design ensures I remain appropriately inconspicuous. The fact that you don't remember me is precisely as intended.

C: 你们怎么来这里找我？
E: What made you think I'd be here?

C: 从五千平米的办公室遥遥下望，数不尽的职员站在纵横交织的自动扶梯上，为了金钱、名声和即将到来的绩效评定奔波。
E: Looking down from your <unbreak>50,000</unbreak>-square-foot office, you see an endless stream of workers bustling up and down the extensive web of escalators, all of them slogging away to earn riches, to win prestige, and to nail that upcoming performance review.

C: 不行！今天我们陪你一起，无论如何都要先把卧室装修出来！
E: Absolutely not! We're getting that bedroom done one way or another!

C: …等我有钱了，就雇两个全副武装的智械在这里站岗！
E: ...When I have the money, I'll hire two Intellitrons fully armed to the teeth to stand guard here!

C: 有一天他上班时待人十分和气。提问：他充了什么电？
E: One day, he was unusually serene at work. Now, the question: What kind of energy did he charge with?

C: 用「爱」浇灌。
E: Water it with love.

C: （再采购一些零食和饮料，就能邀请大伙来玩了。）
E: (Once we buy some snacks and drinks, we can invite everyone over to hang out.)

C: 对不起，此地是一片没有「宵夜」的战场。这个笑话怎么样？「宵夜」与「硝烟」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Ah, but you shouldn't have supper if you want to be super. How did you find the joke? Hilarious wordplay, isn't it? You can't help but laugh, can you?

C: 为什么要废弃？
E: Why were they deserted?

C: 到了，就是这里。据我先前探明，通往地宫内部的路就在前方。
E: We're here. Based on my previous scouting of the area, this should be the way into the hypogeum.

C: 因为之后大伙意识到，黑潮一旦来了就不会褪去，再坚固的避难所也不能维持太久。
E: People later realized that the black tide does not retreat once it takes over a location, so even the most robust of shelters would not hold out for long.

C: 怎么样，有什么发现吗？
E: Well? Found anything?

C: 呜嗡！（好耶，我能继承{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}的家业啦。）
E: Grumph! (Yay! I can finally inherit {F#Mama's}{M#Papa's} business!)

C: 行，我来带它长大！
E: Alright, I'll raise this little one!

C: 我知道了。
E: I see.

C: …哦哦，怪不得你俩长得像是一个模子里刻出来的！
E: ...Ohhh, no wonder you two look like two peas in a pod!

C: *嚼嚼*…嗯？蜜饼怎么变成麦粉和水啦？！哇——
E: Nomnom... Huh? Why did my honey cake turn into flour and water?! Waaah —

C: 要不要出去玩一玩？
E: How about we go out and have some fun?

C: 可惜现在，你看不出驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大到底开不开心。
E: Too bad you can't tell if Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas is happy right now.

C: 想什么呢，祷言会失控，八成只是因为你太瘦了，下次培养得全面发展发展。
E: What are you thinking? The prayer went out of control, probably just because you're too skinny. Next time, try developing a more balanced build.

C: 呜嗡（规则，就是用来打破的。）
E: Grumph (Rules are made to be broken.)

C: 所以，考题是什么？
E: So, what's the test?

C: 黎明机器真逊。
E: The Dawn Device sucks.

C: 你轻轻将「土块」送入嘴中，用牙咬下一小块，试着感受蕴藏在那份苦涩中的心意。
E: You gently place the "dirt" in your mouth, taking a small bite and trying to taste the sincerity in its bitterness.

C: 呜，呜嗡嗡！（别在意细节啦，总之，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}就是我真正的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
E: Grumph, Grumphhh! (Don't sweat the details. Anyway, {F#Mama}{M#Papa} is my real {F#Mama}{M#Papa} from now on!)

C: 这种级别的考试，对驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大来说不成问题。赶紧开始吧。
E: An exam of this level is no problem for Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas. Let's get started.

C: 你学得挺快的，明天要继续来进修喔。
E: You're a quick learner. Be sure to come back tomorrow for more training.

C: 奇兽一直是翁法罗斯器皿上的常见主题。许多远古的物种都消失了，我们唯有透过前人的勾勒去想象它们的模样——
E: Magical beasts have always been a common theme on Amphoreus vessels. Many ancient species have vanished, and all we can do is imagine their forms through the sketches of our ancestors —

C: 我竟没有觉察到其中的问题。都怪我一时太兴奋，以为可以见到传闻中难得一见的黄金里拉琴。
E: I failed to notice the issues in my excitement, thinking I could see the rarely seen golden lyre mentioned in rumors.

C: 把它当个故事听吧，你只要记得这块火腿不符合奥赫玛食品卫生标准就好。
E: Consider it merely a tall tale, and keep in mind that this ham falls short of Okhema's food safety regulations.

C: 你好！欢迎回来喵。
E: Hi! Welcome back, meow!

C: 又来？
E: Again?

C: 巨龙愤怒地发出质问，为何要霸占它的星球；无名客的后裔却坚称，这里的一切都是由祖辈亲手建立的。
E: The Dragon furiously demanded to know why they had seized its planet, but the descendants of Nameless insisted that everything here had been built by their ancestors' own hands.

C: 世界万物皆有反相，正如磁体有两极、电荷有正负、动物有生死……
E: Everything in the world has its opposite, just like magnets have poles, charges have positive and negative, and living beings have life and death...

C: 提问！{NICKNAME}喜欢独处吗？我很喜欢哦。一个人望着湖面，秋千一摇一摇，思绪就会飘到很远的地方，再回来时…自己已经睡着啦。
E: Can I ask? {NICKNAME}, do you like being by yourself? I do. Just staring at the lake by myself, gently swaying on the swing... My mind drifts far away, and by the time it comes back, I've already fallen asleep.

C: …我的爱臣都以缄默为美德，看来这次，我得向他们学习才是。
E: ...My dear subjects all consider silence a virtue. Seems I should learn from them this time.

C: 时间不早啦，{NICKNAME}也回去休息吧。
E: It's getting late. {NICKNAME}, you should rest too.

C: 但「哀丽秘榭」作为主题，对小妖精们而言会不会太难懂了呀。
E: But if the theme is "Aedes Elysiae," wouldn't that be a bit too difficult for the little fairies to understand?

C: 搞垄断是要被抓起来的！
E: Monopolies are illegal!

C: 但真正能决定这场胜负的，只能是我们两人的对决。
E: At the end of the day, the only thing that can truly determine the outcome of this match is the duel between us.

C: ——迷迷！迷！别执迷不悟了，要投敌！投敌！
E: Memem! Mem! Stop being so stubborn! You need to switch sides and vote for Mydei!

C: 迷…我们认输！真的、真的吃不动了。
E: Mem... We surrender! Seriously, we're full to bursting!

C: 他本人有这个意愿吗？
E: But is he actually interested?

C: 想看阿格莱雅做饭！
E: I'd love to see Aglaea cooking!

C: 好啦，今天的营业结束了，按照日程，大家一起去参加迷其林美食评审吧。
E: Well, that's the end of today's service! As scheduled, we should all proceed to the Memchelin Food Review now.

C: 各位为经营餐馆而付出的努力，我都看在眼里，并由衷地表示感谢。
E: I've seen your tireless efforts managing this restaurant, and I'm deeply thankful.

C: 毕竟*我们*之间根本就用不着分享！
E: After all, words aren't needed between the three of us!

C: 嗐，千言万语，总结成一句话——白忙活！
E: Phew... If I had to sum it up in one line I'd say: Whole lotta work for nothing!

C: 没想到真有一天，那位高高在上的金织大小姐，也能受我使唤，实在太有意思了！
E: I never thought the day would come when the lofty Lady Goldweaver would take orders from me. It was just too enjoyable!

C: <size=28>信使们还在为甜饼的烹饪方法而争论，悬锋的主厨笑着给出认可。\n无论何时，大家共同制作的菜品才最为美味。{RUBY_B# } {RUBY_E#}</size>
E: <size=28>The messengers were still debating over the cookie recipe while Kremnos' head chef watched with an approving smile.\nAfter all, dishes made together always taste the best.</size>

C: 具体情况，我也不是很清楚。迷境似乎很早便有举办美食评选的传统，获得认可的菜品和店铺会收录进那本指南中。
E: Well. I'm not totally sure, either. From what I hear, the Maze has held food selections since long ago. Any dish or restaurant that wins recognition gets listed in the guide.

C: 等厨师妖精熟悉手头的工作后，情况会有所改善吧，现在就只能靠我先顶着了。
E: Once the fairy chef gets more used to the workflow, it should ease up. For now, I'll just have to shoulder the load.

C: …记下来。经过重新栽培，实验组的单位产量相较对照组，增加了约三成。
E: ...Note this down. After replanting, the experimental batch yielded approximately <unbreak>30%</unbreak> more than the control group.

E: The Random event ended.
