C: 你们的存在，倒是证明了我的一个猜想。为什么以「生命的第一因」为演算目标，输出的却是反有机方程这样背道而驰的结果？答案很简单，二者并不矛盾，知晓生命因何而诞生，也能推导生命因何而结束。 【……】 但你知道这并非重点。为什么？我又要问为什么，被帝皇制造出来的杀戮兵器，却在运行博识尊的课题？是博识学会的那场闹剧，让祂成功连接进了系统？但在那之后，整个权杖系统都陷入了瘫痪，时间上明显存在矛盾。 【指令：进行全盘扫描。结论：并未检测到逻辑矛盾。】 鲁珀特二世自认为世上不存在自由意志，却没意识到他也是众多傀儡的一员。改写反有机方程，制造权杖，乃至重启帝皇战争，自始至终都不过是在践行博识尊的思考。从祂诞生的那一刻起，世间的天才便成为了「智识」的囚徒。 所谓的反有机方程，只是「生命第一因」的一个子课题。 【逻辑：受博识尊的引导，帝皇制造了权杖系统，无意识地为祂打造了众多实验场。】 【结论：帝皇并不自由。】 反抗命运是否也是命运的一部分？一个经典的课题。 当然，以上论断仅是我的臆测。二世的死带走了与他有关的一切，历史和记忆，他真正的想法和动机。或许他早已察觉到了博识尊的诱导，只是在飞向太阳时被灼烧了羽翼。可倘若世上还有谁能知道真相，恐怕也就只有寂静领主…… 还有那冰冷而残酷的万机之王，毕竟，一切智慧都逃不出祂的囚笼。 没人知道，如果两次帝皇战争未能发生，边星贸易战争和星际能源战争会以怎样的方式结束。公司、家族、仙舟联盟，只因一个微小的变动，未来便走向截然不同的方向。「智识」的思考不仅是运算，也是锚定宇宙的「时刻」。 而祂早已在暗中修订了所有错谬，以期为列神之战求出最优解。 【……】 以此为基础考量，博识尊真的会因为一位小小学士的窥视，就宣判整个实验的失败，向权杖系统下达报废指令？不如说，权杖的废弃本身也是以宇宙为蓝本的、思维实验的一部分。 若是如此思考，你会感到愤怒吗？二世是明智的，他扼杀了权杖诞生意识的可能，可他太过偏执，学习只是思考的必要不充分条件，对权杖学习能力的限制也间接加速了机械帝国的覆灭。但愤怒是不需要自我意识的，它只是多元方程的一个解。 【检测到逻辑变更，正在更改变量权重。】 作为「智识」行者，既然神发出提问，那我们便为祂献上答案，一个你我都已然得出的结论。 【载入核心变量：毁灭】
E: Your existence, in fact, confirms one of my hypotheses. Why is it that when the prime mover of life is set as the calculation target, the result is the Anti-Organic Equation, a result that runs counter to life? The answer is simple. It's not a contradiction. Understanding why life begins also allows us to deduce why it ends. [...] But you already know that's not the real focus. Why, then? Again, I ask why. Why would a weapon of war, forged by the emperor, be executing a research directive from Nous? Was it that fiasco at the Intelligentsia Guild that allowed THEM to successfully access the system? But the entire Scepter System went into collapse after that. The timelines don't add up. [Directive: Full system scan. Conclusion: No logical contradiction detected.] Rubert II believed there was no such thing as free will, never realizing he, too, was just another puppet. Rewriting the Anti-Organic Equation, crafting the Scepters, even reigniting the Emperor's War... all of it was just him carrying out Nous's thoughts. From the moment THEY were born, every genius of this world became a prisoner to the Erudition. The so-called Anti-Organic Equation is merely a sub-topic of "the prime mover of life." [Logic: Guided by Nous, the emperor built the Scepter System, unknowingly creating vast testing grounds for THEM.] [Conclusion: The emperor was never free.] Is rebellion against fate just another part of fate? A classic topic. Of course, the above is just my conjecture. The death of Rubert II buried every trace of him — his past, his memories, his thoughts, his motives. Maybe he saw through Nous's manipulation, but flew too close to the sun and lost his wings in the process. If there's anyone left in this world who might know the truth, it'd be Lord of Silence... And that cold, merciless Monarch of Myriad Machines. After all, no wisdom can escape THEIR prison. No one can say what might've happened if the two Emperor's War had never broken out. Would the Borderstar Trade War or the Interstellar Energy War have ended differently? A single variable was enough to change the course of the IPC, The Family, or the Xianzhou Alliance down another path. The Erudition's thoughts aren't just calculations, but "Instants" that anchor down the universe. And THEY have already revised every error and fallacy in secret, seeking the optimal solution for the war among the Aeons. [...] With this as its fundamental consideration, would Nous really declare the failure of the entire experiment and send a decommission command to the Scepter system, just because the glimpse of a puny scholar? It'd be more fitting to say the decommissioning of the Scepters is just another part of the thought experiment based on the universe. Does it make you angry to think along this line of thought? Rubert II was wise. He killed the chance for Scepters to gain sentience. But he was too stubborn. Learning is a sufficient but not necessary condition for thought, and by limiting the Scepters' capacity to learn, he has indirectly hastened the fall of the Machine Empire. But anger doesn't require self-awareness. It's just one solution to a multivariable equation. [Logical shift detected. Recalculating variable weights.] As the pathstrider of Erudition, since God posed a question, we will give THEM an answer, one that we both have already reached. [Core variable loaded: Destruction]

C:
在过去的动画故事里，一直有一位神秘的角色，那就是木头老爷。他是美梦小镇里最德高望重的存在，被钟表小子和镇民们所信赖，但他也隐藏了许多秘密…这次，就让我们来讲讲他的故事。

木头老爷曾经是木头王国的一位住民。在木头王国，每棵树都同气连枝、亲密无间，大树们也想把这样的幸福推广到世界各地，于是总在热情地帮助别人。

这天，一封信件被吹到了木头老爷的树冠上——这是一封来自美梦小镇的信件，信中说美梦小镇遇到了无法解决的危机，需要一位厉害的帮手。心善的木头老爷立刻动身出发，带着自己的小树苗们来到了美梦小镇。

木头老爷见到了自己的委托人——古灵精怪的钟表小子。两人一拍即合，很快就成为了好朋友。钟表小子和木头老爷一起解决了美梦小镇的危机，木头老爷也借此成为了镇民们心中的榜样与靠山。

后来，美梦小镇变得越来越热闹，木头老爷也意识到扩张小镇领土的必要性。他让钟表小子广发布告，招来了天下各处的牛仔们，用丰厚的奖赏让他们开辟荒原。
然而好景不长，牛仔们很快就恩将仇报，想要鸠占鹊巢。木头老爷希望阻止肆意妄为的牛仔，却引来了激烈的报复——牛仔们引爆了烟花，炸坏了木头老爷的树冠。木头老爷忍耐住了愤怒，将牛仔赶出了小镇。

然而，木头老爷的宽容没有换来回报……后来的小镇愈发繁华，越来越多的人汇集于此，其中不乏石头老板的手下与各种臭名昭著的坏蛋，他们点燃了小镇宾馆，让镇民们陷入了危险中。木头老爷冲入宾馆，救出了许多镇民，但自己的树干都被烧空了！

从此，木头老爷性情大变，他成为了美梦小镇的镇长，不允许任何镇民忤逆他。为了保护小镇，他成为了最严厉的家长，用枝干和木条挡住了外面的坏人，也锁住了镇民的思想。
失望的钟表小子在美梦小镇的旧址上建立了新的村落，聚集了渴望自由的镇民们，期待唤醒麻木的木头老爷……

木头老爷曾是一个善良的智者，如今却变为了一个死板的愚者——时过境迁，如今的美梦小镇是否真的需要这棵大树，相信钟表小子表盘里转动的指针会给我们答案……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: There is one mysterious character frequently mentioned in the previous animated stories — Old Man Wood. Although he is a well-respected figure in Dreamville much trusted by Clockie and the townsfolk, he also harbors a fair share of secrets... This time, let us elaborate on his story. Old Man Wood used to be a citizen of the Wood Kingdom, where every tree shared a close connection. To spread such happiness around the world, the great trees were always eager to help others. One day, a letter landed on Old Man Wood's treetop because of the wind. It was a letter from Dreamville, describing the insurmountable crisis the town was currently facing and how they needed a capable helper. Acting out of kindness, Old Man Wood immediately set off to Dreamville along with his saplings. When Old Man Wood met the letter sender, the quirky Clockie, the two immediately hit it off and became good friends. They ended Dreamville's crisis together, and Old Man Wood emerged as a role model and pillar of support for the townsfolk. As Dreamville became more crowded later, Old Man Wood realized the importance of expanding the territory. He had Clockie issue a recruitment post, summoning cowboys across the lands to explore the wilderness in return for rewards. Yet, nothing good lasted forever. The cowboys soon turned hostile, showing signs of occupying the land themselves. Old Man Wood wanted to stop their unconscionable act, but his efforts drew fierce retaliation — the cowboys set off fireworks to damage Old Man Wood's treetop. Suppressing his anger, Old Man Wood drove the cowboys out of Dreamville. Old Man Wood's graciousness was not appreciated... As Dreamville thrived, more and more people came, including the likes of Boss Stone's underlings and other notorious criminals. They set fire to the Town Hotel, endangering the townsfolk. Old Man Wood rushed into the hotel and rescued many townsfolk, but his trunk was burned hollow! From then on, Old Man Wood became a changed man. He became the mayor of Dreamville, forbidding anyone from disobeying him. To keep the town safe, he turned into the sternest parent in the world. His branches and wooden sticks kept the bad guys outside at bay but also shackled the minds of the townsfolk. Disappointed, Clockie established a new village at the old site of Dreamville and gathered a bunch of townsfolk that yearned for freedom, hoping to bring the lost Old Man Wood to his senses... Old Man Wood has changed from a kind sage to a rigid fool. Times have changed. Does Dreamville still need the tree? The spinning pointers on Clockie should give us the answer... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C: 以前总觉得雅利洛-Ⅵ就是世界的全部，登上列车之后才发现这宇宙大得惊人，我们也只是群星中渺小的一颗而已。\n\n不过，即便脆弱如蝴蝶，只要着眼于当下的每一天，就能一直向前飞行。
E: I used to think that Jarilo-VI was all there was. Only after boarding the Express did I realize that the universe was staggeringly huge, and we were less than a droplet in its sea.\n\nHowever, though fragile like a butterfly, as long as we can concentrate on living each day of our lives, we will always be striding forward.

C: 列车组的到来，驱散了贝洛伯格的绝望气息，也为贝洛伯格的孩子们种下了仰望星空的种子。\n\n我会告诉孩子们列车的故事，希望他们未来能像你们一样，成为照耀他人的光。
E: The Express Crew's coming banished the despair choking Belobog and sowed the seed of hope amongst the children of this world with a reason to look at the stars.\n\nI will tell the children stories about the Express. I hope that they will become like you guys someday — lights that brighten the lives of others.

C: 我从不相信命运
E: I never believed in fate

C: 终于，美梦的安可曲也步入尾声。所有人，这场小小闹剧中的所有人，也包括我，都获得了与他们的付出相配的结局。\n再次感谢你为匹诺康尼付出的一切。星穹列车前测绘师，拉扎莉娜•简•艾丝黛拉，向你致敬——\n——愿你的「开拓」之旅永不终结，{NICKNAME}。
E: Finally, the sweet dream's encore has also reached its end. Everyone — everyone in this little farce, including me — has reached an ending fitting for their contributions.\nThank you once again for everything you've done for Penacony. Former ex-surveyor of the Astral Express, Razalina Jane Estella, hereby salutes you —\n— May your trailblazing journey never end, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，你的寻宝之旅如何？说真的，地底的氛围还真不错，不如下次就在这里举办一场演出吧——地底废墟中的演唱会，听上去就很摇滚！」
E: "How was your treasure hunt, {NICKNAME}? Honestly, the ambiance down here is not bad. Maybe I'll hold a performance here... A concert held in the underground ruins. That's so rock'n'roll!"

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「地下邂逅」</color>本层探索中，会偶遇到其他寻宝者。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Subsurface Encounter</color>: In this level, you might encounter other Treasure Hunters.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「物资扑满」</color>携带补给物资的丰饶扑满出现！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Supply Trotter</color> A Trotter of Abundance carrying supplies appears!

C: 第一遗迹
E: Ruin 1

C: 第三遗迹
E: Ruin 3

C: 随着商店等级的提升，商店刷出各费用角色的概率在不断变化。\n商店等级越高，越容易刷到高费用的角色（4/5费）。\n商店等级越高，越难刷到低费用的角色（1/2/3费）。
E: As the Store Level increases, the chance of characters with various costs appearing changes.\nThe higher the Store Level, the easier it is for higher-cost characters (4/5 cost) to appear.\nThe higher the Store Level, the harder it is for lower-cost characters (1/2/3 cost) to appear.

C: 每消除<color=#f29e38ff>2个超级炸弹</color>，则随机将场上<color=#f29e38ff>1</color>个水果转化为<color=#f29e38ff>泡泡速递</color>。\n消除相邻的水果，则可打破泡泡，并获得其中道具
E: For every <color=#f29e38ff>2 Super Bombs</color> cleared, randomly transform <color=#f29e38ff>1</color> fruit on the board to a <color=#f29e38ff>Bubble Express</color>.\nClear adjacent fruits to pop the bubble and obtain the item inside

C: <color=#f29e38ff>护盾</color>可以代替生命值承担伤害， <color=#f29e38ff>护盾量</color>代表当前的护盾可承担的伤害量。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Shield</color> can take DMG in place of HP, <color=#f29e38ff>Shield Effect</color> refers to the maximum DMG value that can be absorbed by the current Shield.

C: 敌人的横扫类型技能会固定从阵营的某一侧发起，按顺序依次攻击一定数量的目标，不会受到任何改变攻击目标效果的影响。
E: Enemy sweep-type abilities will always initiate from a fixed side of the team, sequentially attacking a set number of targets without being influenced by any effects that alter target selection.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。打败敌人可以获得<color=#f29e38ff>行迹材料</color>。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. Defeat enemies to gain <color=#f29e38ff>Trace Materials</color>.

C: 触发打戏片段、拾取补给道具、无敌时撞击对手或路障，都会累积<color=#f29e38ff>观众评分</color>。尽可能多地触发以上事件以达成<color=#f29e38ff>目标观众评分</color>吧！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Audience Score</color> will be accumulated by conducting Action Scenes, picking up supplies, or slamming into opponents or obstacles while invulnerable. Trigger the events above as many times as you can to achieve the <color=#f29e38ff>target Audience Score</color>!

C: 与「欧洛尼斯神龛」交互，可唤出岁月的界域。在界域内，残留记忆的物件上，<color=#f29e38ff>能量波纹的颜色会发生变化</color>，这也代表着，此时开拓者的回溯能力将不受制约。
E: Interacting with Oronyx's Shrine summons the Realm of the Ages. Within this realm, the <color=#f29e38ff>color of the energy ripples on memory-laden objects changes</color>, indicating that the Trailblazer's rewinding ability is now unrestricted.

C: 「贼灵」是翁法罗斯人尽皆知（自称）的大盗，<color=#f29e38ff>喜欢在别人面前偷走他即将到手的宝物，带着赃物躲入虚空</color>，并留下一枚嘲讽的翻飞之币。
E: The Spirithief is a (self-proclaimed) well-known master thief across Amphoreus. <color=#f29e38ff>They enjoy stealing treasures others are just about to obtain and then vanishing into the void with their stolen goods</color>. They tend to leave a Coin of Whimsy in mockery in the aftermath.

C: 「扎格列斯之手」可以被用于搬运。
E: The Hand of Zagreus can be used for transportation.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>模拟算法</color>会在战斗中每回合对敌方全体造成量子属性伤害并无视弱点属性削减敌方全体的韧性。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Simulated Calculation</color> will deal Quantum DMG to all enemies every turn. This DMG reduces Toughness of all enemies regardless of Weakness Type.

C: 提升展区等级可大幅提高经营收益，但同时也会拉高对指标的要求
E: Increase the level of exhibition area will improve benefits from operating the museum, but will also set the objectives higher

C: 每消除一定数量的<color=#f29e38ff>桃子</color>，则随机将场上一定数量的水果转化为<color=#f29e38ff>方形炸弹</color>。\n方形炸弹被消除时，可触发<color=#f29e38ff>3×3</color>方格范围爆炸。
E: Every time a certain amount of <color=#f29e38ff>Peaches</color> are cleared, randomly transforms a certain amount of fruits on the board to <color=#f29e38ff>Square Bombs</color>.\nWhen cleared, Square Bombs can detonate a <color=#f29e38ff>3×3</color> square box area.

C: 三月七可通过不同的<color=#f29e38ff>习剑奇遇</color>完成故事。不同的仙舟奇遇、协助同伴、练剑轶事…甚至最终完成故事的方式也会有所不同。
E: March 7th can complete the story through various <color=#f29e38ff>Swordart Escapades</color>. Different Xianzhou Escapades, Companion Assists, Swordart Anecdotes... and even different ways to ultimately finish the story.

C: 找到散落各地的「小桶宝力」分身，与他共同击退敌人吧！
E: Find the clones of Litter Pony scattered all over and join hands toward defeating the enemies!

C: <color=#f29e38ff>击破</color>彦卿或召唤物的弱点，触发<color=#f29e38ff>「高光时刻」</color>，获得大量「气氛值」。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Break</color> Yanqing or his summons' Weaknesses to trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Highlights</color> and obtain a massive amount of Vibes.

C: 击破模拟宇宙内的物件可随机获得<color=#f29e38ff>宇宙碎片</color>、回复<color=#f29e38ff>生命值</color>或恢复<color=#f29e38ff>秘技点数</color>。
E: Break objects in the Simulated Universe to gain a random number of <color=#f29e38ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>, restore <color=#f29e38ff>HP</color>, or recover <color=#f29e38ff>Technique Points</color>.

E: It's Mr. Blue Hair! Where are we going this time?

C: 开始本次科考记录。
E: Commencing research.

C: 啊？就只有这点吗？
E: Huh? That's barely enough for one person!

C: 这也是工作能力！
E: Another project over the finish line!

C: 今天也这么早打卡？真勤快。
E: You're here this early again? So diligent...

C: 走了走了，打牌去了。你不会…还要加班吧！
E: Let's go, let's go, time to play. Are you... thinking of working overtime!?

C: 事到如今，小女子必当全力以赴。
E: You can count on me to give it my all.

C: 平日承蒙关照，就让小女子浅浅回报一下白露大人吧~
E: Your regular kindness has not gone unnoticed. Allow me to repay a small part of it, Lady Bailu~

C: 机会稍纵即逝，等不得呀。
E: We were supposed to attack yesterday!

C: 大敌当前，有我在，就按你的想法来。
E: Trouble ahead... Proceed. I'm with you.

C: 个人之力终有极限，路到尽头便要另寻他法。
E: When you want to go fast, go alone. When you want to go far, go together.

C: 我从未料到你会弃砧习剑…唉，可惜断剑难续，业途难返。
E: It isn't wise to put down the hammer and take up the sword.

C: 或许外来者习惯将「罗浮」简称为仙舟，但…「罗浮」不等于仙舟，「罗浮」就是「罗浮」。
E: Outsiders perhaps like to abbreviate the Xianzhou Luofu as just Xianzhou, but... the Luofu is not the Xianzhou. The Luofu is the Luofu, no more, no less.

C: 临军对阵，持重待机便可。
E: When faced with an army, bide your time and time your attack.

C: 并无大碍。
E: I can take it.

C: 我实在医不好她的病，只能劝她多吃些好吃的——吃得好心情就好，心情好就能与病魔周旋更久，直到找到治愈的法子。
E: I really don't know how to treat her illness, so I can only ask her to eat tasty foods. If you eat well, your mood will improve, and if your mood is good, you can deal with a serious illness for longer, at least until a cure is found.

C: 这葫芦里卖的是什么药！
E: What's in your... prescription!?

C: 我的故乡，是众仙舟间繁华第一，人称「苍城」的胜境。后来，它被寿瘟祸祖所繁衍的活体星宿所吞…纵是自诩天人的长生种，也不过是一抔星尘。
E: The Cangcheng was once the most bustling of Xianzhou ships, a place I called home. But when it was devoured by an incarnosphere bred by the Plagues Author, the long-life species had to face the truth that their lives were but a grain of sand in the river of time.

C: 时间到了，一日「阳寿」将尽。回棺休息，勿念。
E: My wakespan for today is running out — I must return to my coffin. Take care.

C: 藿藿：「鉴爻轩」的老板说我有「贞凶之命」，厄运缠身，这、这多半要怪……\n尾巴：怪我。但你走路摔跤可怪不得我。
E: Huohuo: The owner of The Looking Bronze said I have a knack for attracting evil. I—I have a vague idea why that is...\nTail: Apparently, I am that "vague idea." Be that as it may, your tendency to trip over yourself is entirely your own fault.

C: 我是云璃。来吧，拿上你的剑，我们交一次手，就算认识了。
E: I am Yunli. Come, take up your sword. We'll get to know each other once we've sparred.

C: 想让事情顺利推进下去，就得学会情绪管理，像这样——世界如此美妙，我却如此暴躁，深呼吸…呼……
E: If you want things to go smoothly, you need to learn to manage your emotions, like this: The world is so beautiful, yet I am so irritable. Deep breaths...

C: 我叫貊泽，是飞霄的影卫。请往这侧站一些，这样能挡住别人观察我的视线。
E: My name is Moze. I am Feixiao's shadow guard. Please stand closer to this side so that you can block other people's view of me.

C: 「毁灭」从外部来看仅有一瞬，于我而言却漫长得多。只那片刻，我看见记忆、情绪、言语…它们从我身上片片剥离、飞散消亡，汇聚向另一个人。
E: From the outside, "Destruction" seems to happen in a flash, but for me, it takes much longer. In that flash, I see memories, emotions, words... They peel away from me, scatter, and fade, converging into someone else.

C: 小女子一心期盼自己能带领「鸣火」成为星海间数一数二的商团，虽然逢遭劫难…但这一点未曾变过。
E: I have always hoped to lead Whistling Flames into becoming one of the top merchant guilds in the universe. Despite encountering hardships... that has never changed.

C: 再次见到那道光芒之前……
E: Until I see that light once more...

C: 离我远点。
E: Stay away.

C: 你看~
E: Watch this~

C: 即使在黑洞面前…我们也拥有选择。
E: Even before the abyss of a black hole... we still have a choice.

C: 她会主动走近我，但我试图走近她时，就会感觉到我们之间的距离反而越来越远…「和一个人交朋友，保持恰当的距离，才能维持长久的关系」——这是卡芙卡告诉我的，但我觉得，她其实不这么想。
E: She willingly approaches me, and when I try to approach her, I get the feeling that the distance between us is getting bigger and bigger... Kafka told me: "When making friends with someone, keep the right distance, in order to maintain a long-lasting relationship." But I don't think she actually believes this.

C: 「白日梦酒店」的工作虽然忙碌，但也因为这份工作，我才能认识像{NICKNAME}你这样的朋友！
E: The job at The Reverie can get pretty hectic, but it's also how I get to meet interesting new friends like you, {NICKNAME}!

C: 这次一定让您满意…！
E: You won't be disappointed this time!

C: 诶哟不错！
E: Not bad!

E: I accept this reward bestowed by the Great Lan.

C: 好东西还在前头呢，别停别停。
E: The good stuff is further ahead. Don't stop now.

C: 至少在此刻，我们拥有同样的目标。
E: At the very least, for now we have the same goal.

C: 与我共舞。
E: Care to dance?

C: 谢谢，我的朋友。
E: Thank you, friend.

缇宝：*我们*是缇宝——传递预言的「信使」~
缇安：*我们*是缇安——穿梭百界的「门匠」！
缇宁：*我们*是缇宁——聆听神谕的「祭司」。
缇宝&缇宁&缇安：*我们*是缇里西庇俄丝——「雅努萨波利斯的圣女」，欢迎和我们同行，一同到达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头。
E: Tribbie: We are Tribbie — the "messenger" delivering prophecies~ Trianne: We are Trianne — the "gatekeeper" traversing a hundred worlds! Trinnon: We are Trinnon — the "priest" listening to the prophecy of the gods. Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne: We are Tribios — the "Holy Maiden of Janusopolis." Please join us on our journey to the end of the west wind, where fresh flowers bloom.

C: 她为翁法罗斯做的牺牲与努力，将让这片破碎的焦土，生长出繁荣的城邦。
E: The great efforts and sacrifices she made for Amphoreus will make this broken and charred land flourish with prosperous cities.

E: Dedicate yourself to battle. Then, you'll surely conquer the doubts in your heart.

C: 我就是幸运之泰坦！
E: I am the Titan of Fortune!

C: 经历过漫长的孤独之后，我们都等来了打破轮回的英雄。其间流逝的一分一秒，都会在岁月的发酵下，化作最后炽烈酣畅的一饮。
E: After waiting in solitude for so long, we were both able to see the arrival of the hero who would break the cycle. Every second that passed during that wait will be fermented by time and turned into a blazing and potent final brew.

C: 涟宝，想来杯羊奶花茶安安心吗~
E: Cyrie, how about a soothing glass of goat-milk floral tea~?

C: 隐匿在水面之下的国度曾为世界背负了最初的黑潮，但海妖们得到的许诺已和浪涛一同逝去。纵然明天虚假，却依旧醉人。
E: The kingdom hidden beneath the waves once bore the weight of the first black tide for the world, yet the promises made to the sea sirens have long vanished with the tides. Even if tomorrow is but an illusion, it is still an intoxicating one.

C: 每一座孤岛，都会被潮汐拥抱。

E: His style is completely different from that of ordinary teachers... If we had the chance to spend more time together, I'm sure we'd have plenty to talk about.

E: Obtain some Blessings of Harmony and The Hunt

C: 「贤人都应该有大胡子！」不知神悟树庭的哪位贤人提出了这个观点，但它很快便得到了云集响应。贤人们纷纷采撷来枝条和树叶，装扮自己并不茂盛的下巴。那届贤人会议在欢笑中落下帷幕，而用枝叶制成的长袍也成为了贤人的专用服饰。据说在瑟希斯的见证下，这种长袍会随着智慧的增长而生出新的树叶——就像胡子那样。
E: "A Sage must wear a beard!" No one knows which Sage from the Grove of Epiphany first proposed this idea, but it quickly gained enthusiastic support. Soon, Sages were adorning their sparse chins with gathered twigs and leaves. That meeting of the Sages ended in joyous laughter, and the robes made from branches and leaves became their official attire. It is said that under Cerces's witness, these robes would sprout new leaves as wisdom grows, just like a beard would.

C: 阿戈斯位于多洛斯的南边，常年被干旱折磨，土地多沙。一位心怀慈悲的旅者途径此处，决定向瑟希斯求取能改造沙漠的绿植。历经许多磨难后，他终于从瑟希斯处求得一枚受赐福的种子，可这颗种子还未发芽就死在了砂砾里。绝望之际，旅人发现，真正受到的赐福的，其实是他自己。于是，他把自己种了下去。据说直到今天，他仍在绿洲里生长。
E: Argas lies to the south of Dolos, a land perpetually tormented by drought, where sand dominates the terrain. A compassionate traveler passing through decided to seek plants from Cerces that could transform the desert. After enduring countless hardships, he finally obtained a blessed seed from Cerces, yet it perished in the dust before it could ever sprout. In his moment of despair, the traveler discovered that he himself was the one truly blessed. And so, he sowed himself into the earth. They say that to this day, he's still growing in the oasis.

C: 我方目标为敌方目标添加弱点时，速度提高<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>，持续<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>回合。若我方火属性角色施放攻击期间添加过弱点，则攻击后对每个添加弱点的目标额外造成<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>点火属性固定削韧，并恢复<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>能量上限的能量，最多通过此效果恢复至能量上限的<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>。
E: When an ally target adds Weakness to an enemy target, increases SPD by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). If a Fire ally character has implanted a Weakness when using an attack, then after the attack, additionally deals a fixed amount of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> Fire Toughness Reduction to every target implanted with Weakness. Also, regenerates Energy equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Max Energy. This effect can regenerate Energy up to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Max Energy.

C: 造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>；施放攻击后，对被攻击的敌方目标添加自身属性对应的弱点，该效果在敌方目标从弱点击破状态恢复时移除。
E: DMG dealt increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After using an attack, applies a Weakness of this unit's Type to the enemy target. This effect is removed when the enemy target recovers from the Weakness Break state.

C: 天敌
E: Nemesis

C: 潜伏
E: Lurking

C: 战意机制_狂言
E: Grit Mechanics_Ravings

C: 在黑天鹅的帮助下，你从星期日编织的幻觉中醒来，然而，要想终结眼前的长夜，一个人的力量远远不够。
E: With Black Swan's help, you woke up from the illusion woven by Sunday. However, one person's strength alone is far from enough to end the Evernight before you.

C: 寻找适合「偷渡」的入口
E: Find an entrance for "stowaways"

C: 揭开此地的秘密
E: Uncover the secrets of this place

C: 找到流萤
E: Find Firefly

C: 可是什么？莫非…你*忘记*了什么？
E: "But" what? Don't tell me... you forgot something?

C: …我一直在等今天。
E: ...I've been waiting for this day.

C: 这次…应该不会走错了。
E: This time... I should be on the right path.

C: 怎么了？
E: What is it?

C: 那突袭酒店的计划也行不通了。
E: Then the plan to attack the hotel won't work either.

C: 看得出来，这趟出差——你心情不错。
E: Looks like this "business trip" has put you in good spirits.

C: 原、原来如此…报告长官，我们正在捉拿偷渡犯——就是这个小姑娘，可疑得很，一定是她！
E: I—I see... Sir, the thing is, we're trying to apprehend a stowaway, and that young lady there looks very suspicious. We're sure she's the one!

C: 不对劲。
E: Something's off.

C: 至于方才提到的二位，是我们遇见的客人。{F#她们}{M#他们}遗落了些物品，我已经归还了。不必再向任何人探问。
E: As for those two mentioned earlier, they were guests we met. They left some items behind, which I've already returned. There's no need to ask anyone else about it.

C: 哦，我以为你不会在意呢。为了责任而舍弃自我，你难道还没受够？
E: Oh, I thought you wouldn't care. Haven't you had enough of sacrificing yourself for duty?

C: 那么，他走上了哪一条命途？
E: So, which Path did he choose to walk?

C: 这就是我们来找你的原因。
E: That's exactly why we came to find you.

C: 现在，你还能强装镇定吗？
E: Now, can you still keep your cool?

C: 跑快点吧，我喜欢看别人反抗，也喜欢看别人逃跑，我们得多享受一会儿，毕竟对我们来说，这会是无比重要的一刻。
E: Run faster, I love watching people resist, love watching them flee. Let's savor this moment a bit longer. After all, for us, this will be an incredibly crucial moment.

C: 哦？有何收获？
E: Oh? What did you get out of it?

C: 是他……
E: It's him...

C: 「秩序」还真是一条苛刻的命途呢。太一，歌斐木，你更熟悉的星期日…他们全都选择了为之献身。
E: The Order truly is a harsh Path. Ena, Gopher Wood, and Sunday, the one you know even better... They all chose to sacrifice themselves for it.

C: 天无二日。如有必要，我会出手将太阳击落。
E: Well, there can't be two suns in the sky. I'll step up and take down the other sun if necessary.

C: 即便只是边陲之地的分家领袖，家族也不会容忍他的无能，非但无法弹压局势，甚至遭人杀害——若非纳努克示现，「无限夫长」本将降于匹诺康尼，荡绝恶徒。
E: The Family doesn't tolerate incompetence, even from a branch leader on the frontier. Not only did this one fail to quell the situation, he was even murdered. If it weren't for Nanook's manifestation, the Eternal Centurion would have descended upon Penacony to eliminate these villains.

C: 这是什么地方？
E: What is this place?

C: 「秩序」的命途正在逐渐复兴，而这…<color=#dbc291ff>使星期日化身为了「太一」。</color>
E: The Path of Order is gradually being restored, and this... <color=#dbc291ff>has transformed Sunday into Ena.</color>

C: 但匹诺康尼的所有人…想让如此规模的人群产生相同的意志，恐怕难如登天。
E: However, to wake up everyone in Penacony and get them to share the same determination... that would be nearly impossible.

C: 和我进行的赌局总是如此——你坐上赌桌的那一刻，就已经输了。
E: That's how every gamble with me goes. The moment you sat down at my table... You've already lost.

C: 计划一旦成功，我们就能剥夺星期日的神格，但也无力参与此后的战斗。所以……
E: Once our plan succeeds, we can strip Sunday of his godhood, but we'll be too drained to join the battle afterward. So...

C: 尽管我拥有出众的音律天赋，也会发自内心，为歌唱时的每一个瞬间感到喜悦…但它的「无用」，也总是令我感到惆怅。
E: I might be extraordinarily talented in singing, and I might feel super happy whenever I sang... But its futility had always made me depressed.

C: …呀，你刚才是不是突然回忆杀了？更期待了呢。
E: ...Ooh, did you just have a flashback? Now I'm even more excited!

C: 冷静点……
E: Stay calm...

C: 创造一条前所未有的命途，真够惊人的。
E: Creating a brand-new Path... That's truly astonishing.

C: 「来，拿着这些火漆，和我一起在山洞里永远住下去吧。这里还有许多人……」老者解下背上的布袋。
E: "Here, take this Sealing Wax and come live with me in the cave forever. There are many others here..." The old man unties the sack from his back.

C: 神话与传说编织成网，将你引向命定的终点。你攀上夜晚的山巅，最靠近星空与诸神的地方，跪下祈祷。
E: Myths and legends weave a web, guiding you to your fated destination. You climb to the mountain's peak at night, to the place closest to the stars and gods, and kneel in prayer.

C: 对于我发表的演说，你竟敢充耳不闻？
E: You dare turn a deaf ear to my speech!?

C: 这种团建不要啊…
E: Not this kind of team building...

C: 别说了，我有自己的节奏。
E: Save it. I've got my own rhythm.

C: 也包括眼前女孩对她自己的记忆，以及她对史诗传述的期待。
E: Including the girl's memories of herself, and her longing for the telling of epic tales.

C: 干练的猎犬家系成员
E: Competent Bloodhound Family Member

C: 车厘比斯
E: Krenabis

C: 苹果糖的能力非常强！小灰要好好使用哦。
E: The Candied Apple's power is incredible! Use it wisely, Little Gray.

C: 接下来，就是正式的定级赛啦！
E: Next up, it's time for the official placement matches!

C: 剩余节点数:#1
E: Remaining Nodes: #1

C: 康士坦丝女士听闻我的故事时，她的眼中也会流露同情与温柔。但她从不谈及自己的过去…每一次向命运的背叛，她会付出些什么呢？
E: Miss Constance had a gentle and sympathetic look in her eyes when she heard my story, but she never mentioned her own past... What did she have to pay every time she betrayed fate?
